subject: Elon’s right. It’s past time to cut the fat

I believe in a lean, smart government that works for the People – not for consultants, cronies, or globalist grifters. | [](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=1cdb4dd58fd74400bc6bff4485b0c52d&_e=vyaPuKj5YMif0FZH3NkEIxXyBoTgL8LQJx8CtQtQ9o8r467vx9Z-I52udYBI2CUXXubiQWAbi9QTkBUitlB4gUi9_Gxkp5Tmy0GryMNT6XLH7hOSAtJHNAm-TYskvKUQbl7xAXEOuoBepUpeXiBWiZJ2-oovx6edKvOsd18cJ1MS8zNx92vbborjw25POVIPuzDh-kVU8oZmbLBVV3Ty36FEusjs8JjmPjI_TO0eFDXGFF8gPUo57p-cPD2QMYRRRtmhoTjcVnvfJuqCR-CSv43_wVuD_nClzSTH9olmGO43FzGg23DWXaJjGjojFiwA-bH6a0cZ7PDVE_Zmwurwt08oFVMdUYt9ElxL9u7Tyl9tzilATCylZP57rmJFnTh7BOekzXicm9V0AlD4LnGg3w%3D%3D)

Friend,

I’m Marty O’Donnell. I’m not a politician. I’m a composer, best known for my award-winning work on the highly acclaimed Halo and Destiny video game series.

But even I can tell when the government is completely off-key.

And right now? **Washington’s a noisy mess of waste, fraud, and flat-out corruption.**

That’s why I support what **Elon Musk** is doing – _cutting the fat._

Slashing toxic bureaucracies like USAID, calling out censorship and a bloated government, and fighting for free speech and real innovation.

He’s not doing it for the headlines, and he certainly isn’t doing it for the money. He’s doing it because someone has to.

[](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=1cdb4dd58fd74400bc6bff4485b0c52d&_e=vyaPuKj5YMif0FZH3NkEIxXyBoTgL8LQJx8CtQtQ9o8r467vx9Z-I52udYBI2CUXXubiQWAbi9QTkBUitlB4gUi9_Gxkp5Tmy0GryMNT6XLH7hOSAtJHNAm-TYskvKUQbl7xAXEOuoBepUpeXiBWiZJ2-oovx6edKvOsd18cJ1MS8zNx92vbborjw25POVIPuzDh-kVU8oZmbLBVV3Ty36FEusjs8JjmPjI_TO0eFDXGFF8gPUo57p-cPD2QMYRRbcEKjFP02qVx30yopfZZVzzh7Xu_fWj83Cx5ojC709RsE13dNbVrXg5tpGeikEev9XEAV8tzFnt1cNTQzvqvomnGTda8bhkla6etvBLfnfT7wcQIQ2dxb5LK3rDIh9-leoS__880WTcwB3qbAMP2Zg%3D%3D)
[**That’s why I’m running for Congress – to go to Washington and help Pres. Trump and Elon rip out the rot and rebuild this country from the ground up.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=1cdb4dd58fd74400bc6bff4485b0c52d&_e=vyaPuKj5YMif0FZH3NkEIxXyBoTgL8LQJx8CtQtQ9o8r467vx9Z-I52udYBI2CUXXubiQWAbi9QTkBUitlB4gUi9_Gxkp5Tmy0GryMNT6XLH7hOSAtJHNAm-TYskvKUQbl7xAXEOuoBepUpeXiBWiZJ2-oovx6edKvOsd18cJ1MS8zNx92vbborjw25POVIPuzDh-kVU8oZmbLBVV3Ty36FEusjs8JjmPjI_TO0eFDXGFF8gPUo57p-cPD2QMYRRR5CJMYYDSonjzUNKThUWqoRjAKMhcrBkhqORJWZV_crEWfR26tO1l6cYyrKNF6BkEywld4T0MO_T1VsJZuuwHfVUDfLy-v1E4a_eniAwzUDsBEeTd_00lm__ynKYWRnfnKqr2_Gh4sTp462uaFAuUQ%3D%3D) I believe in a lean, smart government that works _for the People_ – not for consultants, cronies, or globalist grifters.

And if that makes me “extreme” in my radical left opponent Susie Lee’s eyes? Good.

I’d rather be called extreme than be a part of the same broken system that gave us **$36 trillion in debt** and speech police posing as public servants.

If you’re ready to send a message to the swamp – help me get there.

👉 [**Chip in $7, $28, $117, or whatever you can afford right now. Let’s fight back.**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=1cdb4dd58fd74400bc6bff4485b0c52d&_e=vyaPuKj5YMif0FZH3NkEIxXyBoTgL8LQJx8CtQtQ9o8r467vx9Z-I52udYBI2CUXXubiQWAbi9QTkBUitlB4gUi9_Gxkp5Tmy0GryMNT6XLH7hOSAtJHNAm-TYskvKUQbl7xAXEOuoBepUpeXiBWiZJ2-oovx6edKvOsd18cJ1MS8zNx92vbborjw25POVIPuzDh-kVU8oZmbLBVV3Ty36FEusjs8JjmPjI_TO0eFDXGFF8gPUo57p-cPD2QMYRRdLPgz7vh07i3y4RjDzf-R8xggxDQHaDnjwUYkqY6f34j26I0dY1i9ylHO1FsbnyCD10VQQI6UU0Va35U4mpF2G_DkQgahy5bSBxs79okpkc5bYM4oC5d1lIhvJ3EVubsHo5OGkMlwmTXlVwGZ8TV2g%3D%3D)

We’re building a movement. Not just around politics – around truth, efficiency, and freedom.

Let’s put the adults back in charge.

Thanks,

**Marty O’Donnell**
Republican for Congress, NV-03

[ ** JOIN MARTY WITH $7 » **](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=1cdb4dd58fd74400bc6bff4485b0c52d&_e=vyaPuKj5YMif0FZH3NkEIxXyBoTgL8LQJx8CtQtQ9o8r467vx9Z-I52udYBI2CUXXubiQWAbi9QTkBUitlB4gUi9_Gxkp5Tmy0GryMNT6XLH7hOSAtJHNAm-TYskvKUQbl7xAXEOuoBepUpeXiBWiZJ2-oovx6edKvOsd18cJ1MS8zNx92vbborjw25POVIPuzDh-kVU8oZmbLBVV3Ty36FEusjs8JjmPjI_TO0eFDXGFF8gPUo57p-cPD2QMYRRJUvqvTx-Ai3vhVK4e_4N8OFG735D9WkO618vmho6shMcwNcnhjToM2XuHekWSMnfyOWItFYftEgis51IU1eHd2lqxaTcucAoOr-HM1t1hsItwxvI9qUT48chiXT1rW_6bcywZ53OzC2qKMHUgPNDog%3D%3D)

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

Peter, I may sound like a broken record when I tell you that I’m different from most politicians, but I really mean it. _Let me explain:_ | **[SKIP THE EXPLANATION: CHIP IN $3 TO JOIN RITCHIE IN HIS FIGHT FOR DEMOCRACY »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105455902/538399406/-292812465?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250408_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg5NDc4Zi1kNTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3a2q4DIJp-7CopLqILOHidgz0lptKCh0brI6mIEQ2Qk=)**
---
When it comes to poverty or inequality, food insecurity or housing, mental health or LGBTQ+ rights, I don’t just think about policy — _I think about my own lived experiences._

**I am a Black, Afro-Latino, LGBTQ American. I’m a product of vermin and mold infested public housing. I don't come from a political family. I am open about my own experiences with depression. I don't have a college degree.**

What I _do_ have is lived experience, and I am lucky to bring my viewpoint to Congress, where my unique perspective motivates much of what I do.

[Peter, I vow to never give up on these fights so that more folks like me can have a seat at the table — but I can’t do this alone: Will you chip in $3 to fuel my people-powered movement so I can keep fighting for you? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105455903/538399407/-292812465?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250408_EMDF_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjg5NDc4Zi1kNTE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3a2q4DIJp-7CopLqILOHidgz0lptKCh0brI6mIEQ2Qk=)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | = Peter, I may sound like a broken record when I tell you that I’m different from most politicians, but I really mean it. Let me explain: | = When it comes to poverty or inequality, food insecurity or housing, mental health or LGBTQ+ rights, I don’t just think about policy — I think about my own lived experiences. I am a Black, Afro-Latino, LGBTQ American. I’m a product of vermin and mold infested public housing. I don't come from a political family. I am open about my own experiences with depression. I don't have a college degree. What I do have is lived experience, and I am lucky to bring my viewpoint to Congress, where my unique perspective motivates much of what I do. = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = Thank you, Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. To make the most powerful lasting impact and to join Ritchie in the fight for progressive values in Congress, make a=. Click here to . Click here to . | | = =

With margins so tight in the House we have room to work, Team. We can stop this bill and more like it but we need to unite and fight now, before they vote and start checking voter suppression bills off their to-do list.
RUSH $25 or more right now to stop the SAVE Act, defend our right to vote, and stop opponents of voting rights from destroying our democracy >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=yrwtj1rK/G3S9bCmHioYbqG2S+JkaD3OAmapgWQivlanGS2wXCiZon+vaeYbnQYLPZTm/nEQriOl1CeRdoDO2FXxWbVAFLIbdtNs9oQlWF4=]
NC Newsline: Trump order and so-called “SAVE Act” threaten the fundamental right to vote [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=yrwtj1rK/G3S9bCmHioYbqG2S+JkaD3OAmapgWQivlanGS2wXCiZon+vaeYbnQYLPZTm/nEQriOl1CeRdoDO2FXxWbVAFLIbdtNs9oQlWF4=]
The SAVE Act is being fast-tracked by opponents of voting rights in the U.S. House of Representatives. This bill is a stunning assault on our fundamental right to vote, and we can not afford to let this anti-democratic legislation become law, folks.
Don’t be fooled by the name. This bill would force every voter to present proof of citizenship to register -- something millions of eligible Americans don’t have on hand. And that’s the point.
The bill would also obliterate popular methods of voter registration for all voters, including:
* Registration by mail

* 3rd party voter registration drives

* Online voter registration in states that allow it

* Automatic voter registration
Some estimates say that this bill could disenfranchise up to 11 million eligible Americans , especially women and those who live in under-resourced communities.
Team, the consequences of a bill like this passing would be catastrophic for our democracy. Chip in with $25 or whatever you can today to stop the SAVE Act and other voter suppression bills from becoming law >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Republicans are trying to raise your taxes.
body:
Tariffs, Flat Income Tax, & A Bad Budget Resolution.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/99ff12faf242/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6418790?e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# Republicans are trying to raise your taxes.
---
| Trump put in place the largest tax increase on the American people late last week. At the same time, [Republicans in the House are approving budgets that will add $5 trillion to the deficit](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=baf086d486&e=edbde6c9b1) and at our State House, [Republicans are debating ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0053177552&e=edbde6c9b1)[raising taxes for 60% of South Carolinians. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=593fa5ca90&e=edbde6c9b1)
This morning, Trump’s Trade Advisor Pete Navarro called the BMW plant in Spartanburg ["bad for our economics” despite BMW investing 14.8 billion since it came to Spartanburg in 1992.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=8706d0b31b&e=edbde6c9b1)
It’s time for a Town Hall. And since our Congressman refuses to engage with his constituents, we’re honored to have Congressman Clyburn join us at Wofford on April 24.
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a31b4c10ba&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Click here to watch my video outlining the Tariffs ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=239d5f4746&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | South Carolina’s economy is built on the delicate equilibrium of international trade and domestic production. Trump is disrupting this successful balance — which could do anything and everything from raise prices, deter future investments, cause economic growth to suffer, reduce tax revenues, and cost hard-working South Carolinians their jobs.
Now is the time — speak up and run for something. If you're fed up with the people who are governing you, then change it. I'm hosting an info session **tomorrow** in Spartanburg, [join me](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a3f7c50c86&e=edbde6c9b1) and let's do it together.
---
|
---
|
# Join us for an action-packed Spring!
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=dbb4cf0d8f&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | **So you want to run for office?****April 9th at 5:30pm at SPCDP HQ** Join Emerge South Carolina for an information session on what exactly it takes to run for office.
---
| [Click here to RSVP](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=55c316ca2f&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Town Hall with Rep. Clyburn****April 24th at Wofford College** Rep. Jim Clyburn is coming to the Upstate to host a Town Hall in lieu of our Republicans representatives refusing to hold one. Details are coming, please save the date.
---
| [More info to come!]()
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=55c6f4c346&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | **A Candid Conversation****April 29th at 6pm Wofford College** Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster.
---
| [Click here to learn more](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=87d86d17f6&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Fight for Freedom Fundraiser****May 29th at 6pm, Chapman Center** Join us for a special evening featuring Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg Young Democrats and the SPCDP. The reception starts at 6:00 PM, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage.
---
| [Click here to buy a ticket](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=fe683db9cf&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=ca671aff76&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **H.3927 (anti-DEI bill) Moves Forward to Senate**
* Last Wednesday, by a vote of 82-32, the House passed H.3927, sending it to the Senate to determine its fate. [**Check out ACLU SC**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0389c53e22&e=edbde6c9b1) for their excellent explanation of the bill's impact & what went down in the floor debate. Find out how to contact your state senators before it becomes state law [**HERE.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3ca4847c0b&e=edbde6c9b1)

**Republicans in the Statehouse want to Raise your Taxes**
* Last week, Republicans unveiled a ‘flat tax’ scheme that would raise state income taxes on 60% of South Carolinians. Led by Greenville’s Rep Bruce Bannister, the flat tax has stalled due to pushback this week, but they are determined to get it passed before the end of session. Let your reps hear from you NOW.

**House Debate on Paid Parental Leave**
* [**H. 3645**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=91a3ab266f&e=edbde6c9b1) , a bill that would increase the number of weeks of paid parental leave from six to twelve for all state employees, heads to the House floor for debate. Urge your Representative to support H. 3645 and make paid family leave a priority. Click****[**here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=2a167d11e1&e=edbde6c9b1) to take action and help push this bill forward. Together, we can make 12 weeks of paid family leave a reality!

| **A Look into the Federal Budget**
* Republicans are divided on the budget approved in the **Senate** this past week. In a vote that ended early Saturday, Republicans hoped to leverage their position of power in Washington to enact as much as $7 trillion in tax breaks, boost border security for mass deportations and cut government funding — and do so “without one single Democratic vote,” said Sen. Lindsey Graham. Yet, debt is looming... Senator Rand Paul argued the budget plan would add $5 trillion to the debt over 10 years, echoing an assessment from the bipartisan Joint Committee on Taxation. [Learn more here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6fc5ac9aff&e=edbde6c9b1).

clean_body: Tariffs, Flat Income Tax, & A Bad Budget Resolution. | | | | | | | | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate. | Republicans are trying to raise your taxes. | Trump put in place the largest tax increase on the American people late last week. At the same time, and at our State House, This morning, Trump’s Trade Advisor Pete Navarro called the BMW plant in Spartanburg It’s time for a Town Hall. And since our Congressman refuses to engage with his constituents, we’re honored to have Congressman Clyburn join us at Wofford on April 24. | | | | | | South Carolina’s economy is built on the delicate equilibrium of international trade and domestic production. Trump is disrupting this successful balance — which could do anything and everything from raise prices, deter future investments, cause economic growth to suffer, reduce tax revenues, and cost hard-working South Carolinians their jobs. Now is the time — speak up and run for something. If you're fed up with the people who are governing you, then change it. I'm hosting an info session tomorrow in Spartanburg, and let's do it together. | | Join us for an action-packed Spring! | | | | | | | | | | | | So you want to run for office?April 9th at 5:30pm at SPCDP HQ Join Emerge South Carolina for an information session on what exactly it takes to run for office. | | | | | | | | | | | | Town Hall with Rep. ClyburnApril 24th at Wofford College Rep. Jim Clyburn is coming to the Upstate to host a Town Hall in lieu of our Republicans representatives refusing to hold one. Details are coming, please save the date. | [More info to come!]() | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Candid ConversationApril 29th at 6pm Wofford College Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster. | | | | | | | | | | | | Fight for Freedom FundraiserMay 29th at 6pm, Chapman Center Join us for a special evening featuring Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg Young Democrats and the SPCDP. The reception starts at 6:00 PM, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | H.3927 (anti-DEI bill) Moves Forward to Senate Last Wednesday, by a vote of 82-32, the House passed H.3927, sending it to the Senate to determine its fate. for their excellent explanation of the bill's impact & what went down in the floor debate. Find out how to contact your state senators before it becomes state law Republicans in the Statehouse want to Raise your Taxes Last week, Republicans unveiled a ‘flat tax’ scheme that would raise state income taxes on 60% of South Carolinians. Led by Greenville’s Rep Bruce Bannister, the flat tax has stalled due to pushback this week, but they are determined to get it passed before the end of session. Let your reps hear from you NOW. House Debate on Paid Parental Leave , a bill that would increase the number of weeks of paid parental leave from six to twelve for all state employees, heads to the House floor for debate. Urge your Representative to support H. 3645 and make paid family leave a priority. Click to take action and help push this bill forward. Together, we can make 12 weeks of paid family leave a reality! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Look into the Federal Budget Republicans are divided on the budget approved in the Senate this past week. name: John James
subject: Our New Mission.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI 8050 Wolfson Lane, Grand Blanc, MI 48439
body:
| | | [](http://links.right-red.com/s/c/km76pzSQwtX7Ij_FF5NyzWn2PLICVBuDKFDEDjUSRUlUbJMPV160ssVAHkTQK0BLeQijd-mvyKtB-Fun_2NVZVQL52FNYVlSsdu5eJaqSoMYNO9C3AZZWIZtkKgO_Wxoc9awt5ELv1XR0Eu_Fy47U_m6sKZeG51ykp5ozZAoGK5a5zj5JSvfEGcvlQMOPQV7I7fXXguNSR6gDsbQwNHYlGfygThg45T4uBhbnji7rN6iK3UCiePRE62RTbd3DPai3nskQYkaUfccKals2gMdlr8NRIH4nmKUofFbmpcZVjB1Ph0KkTQ/jPjnzkPcpI8VY3OlpQ1FslnUmf5IfI7z/7)
---
Co-Pilot - **_Our mission to defend Michigan has a_**** _major development. _** I’m announcing **my intention to run for Governor at one of the most critical points in our nation’s history.** Under Joe Biden and Gretchen Whitmer, our economy, our industry, and our people have all suffered. Michiganders were fed up with the status-quo bureaucracy, and that’s why our state turned **RED** in 2024. I stood alongside President Trump on the campaign trail and spoke with him at rallies where we shared our vision for America. Our movement for strong, America First policies has gained momentum, and we need to carry it through to the midterms to ensure that Michigan can get back on track.
---
|
---
_**_Our Mission_**_ The first step towards fixing our state and our nation occurred on November 5th of last year when we elected President Trump, but the truth is, we still have work to do. We have 2 more years of Democrat obstruction and failed economic policies to endure in Michigan. That’s why it’s of vital importance to prepare NOW. **Our mission is twofold:**
---
1\. We are working **_to make life easier and more prosperous for Michiganders_** \- no matter what political party they are in - through pro-business, pro-growth and **PRO-WORKER** America First policies. 2\. We are working to **PREVENT** another 4 years of the same socialist policies that have hurt our state. **Neither of these objectives can be completed alone. That’s why I’ll need your support.** But, before I ask you to join us, I want you to know my story.
---
|
---
_**_My Story_**_ You’re going to hear a lot about me from the mainstream media over the coming months. I’m ready for the mud-slinging from the Democrat establishment, but I want to tell you who I am: \- First and foremost, I am a **God-Loving husband and father of three boys**. \- I am a **West Point graduate and a combat veteran** who commanded 2 Apache Helicopter platoons – logging over 750 flight hours to protect our freedom and defend the American Dream. \- I am the proud **son of two parents who were born and raised in the Jim Crow South**. They moved to Michigan, built a business, and watched as their son was sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives. **\- I am a businessman** with a background in the automotive and manufacturing sector. I**** understand how our economy works, how red tape and bureaucracy weighs down innovation and progress, and the tremendous responsibility that comes with being a job creator. \- I am a **public servant who represents the people of Michigan’s 10th Congressional District** and fights for them every day in Washington, DC. \- I am a**conservative warrior who has gone toe-to-toe with the Democrat establishment** **machine** time and time again. I am **prepared to lead our mission** to make Michigan the best place to live in the nation once more. But don’t let anyone tell you that this is going to be easy.
---
[**JOIN OUR MISSION**](http://links.right-red.com/s/c/teZIbteOikBeSY6nUGUqumYrdNdjJPz9MlW1I5zUthpswmoukyrTlrwWDg1zXxEiXAg53b3EzShVGJUeyvBT_Vi5JsTpiSsDy2v6KPASxGfLP9NWeH43edqMtHeavKdauFDJwEq0dUL54bBTiKpNxjMz95lQdpLvpPp5vhKGXg2mEinXKxf22zXQ76OkV5haoIVYCKAQcg7Waniev9MN2t_2VNLjOe0stmwzSDQa3TZsDRNeOZyMpbV_1xazcLi6fROb6MU5IMzdJx9CpoOl-LjcDlVqTnSc5xb5UVjHoTQ0jjdvZMU/JX4yk9YEGKr3OZsHyLpVyAVVdsi-fJMB/7)
---
[](http://links.right-red.com/s/c/Ol_6JLRp-bvbichQtvVLJ5lTeb_5o06Pi4CoDuP9ukGzG5YeywUK72ivRsUtRSXazfz313-XdGUe7msTHDHJqlimIfDaXeFnSmAE0kAEx7YcRMIgMbUu-i29-4lbQPGy3g9qDjXmUp98LC4rvlmACC1Js-ENMhVQV1V0MBYyvP1rlh8-NjbOlNJeKAzY9LjH_-7vc_D5JXqzl3gRowCQERHRJaUhL4nRsr6x_0nkTAEZpnB6OrcQqjGrMRGKm03nIjzrhoafUcLiUBKvibBBc5QdPjDezmgMa5TflAShwYEa5F8ATR8/HP-CPC-mVa8dsUrycLlDKIjKpNbYneWL/7)
---
|
---
_**_The Road Ahead_**_ \- Michigan will be the **most competitive swing state in the nation**. With open Gubernatorial and Senate seats on the ballot, all eyes will be laser focused on our campaign. \- Democrats have controlled Lansing for over 6 years now. Their **political and financial machine is entrenched** and ready to attack any person who tries to challenge them. **\- Midterms are notoriously difficult for the party in power nationally**. We are going to have to work twice as hard to share our message of economic prosperity and America First policies. \- This race will be on the **top of the list for every single Democrat Dark money SuperPAC**. For all of those reasons, this fight cannot be won alone.
---
|
---
__**Why I Need You On My Team**__ I need the support of patriots like you to have a chance to win this battle. I know the challenges ahead and I’m choosing to fight anyway. **_[**_Now that you know the stakes, are you willing to continue on this mission with me as my Co-Pilot? _**](http://links.right-red.com/s/c/fEd0QGinxsuUegXpry3uieJLXHx0RlJSt9DG-_cJUTgjbfb1MSwmn7UIflCGCRdC0lKwNuDAyC--cN53b7-daEL8Gl6a_L-0Y7VPhRECVGIdxL3p4rAkJY--i9Lzdsl2LfIb-xgx35zS8E6DxJWsfuSHunc2NfB8FW2mWnfC0lwvXrGYDrZIlPerocIr_nF-j0NPrEnjRkw1BiQhjnTtPID0A5kZ2zK_mbzpvE2plkZXs9zpvyx_JXai4kGl7Gyv6LvuXhvZAMBSTjOgt6a9skSSK6jAjJRJmuV-TttuemzRSnIq2uw/lwUACSP-P6bJZvqQn6xZ0ya3r1eS5_hx/7)_** **If you’re in, I humbly ask that you sign your name to become a founding supporter of my race.**
---
[**BECOME MY FOUNDING CO-PILOT**](http://links.right-red.com/s/c/hJdTIRSQsAqp9WDG4zdFUwuNsdOvax9kbUpinmoPLQ2cpWa7m0-gU4UvaxDqpBaduihtyqoB51Po5_089Q7_WnRYhCB_LphJPdMJOWg_Z9IE-DAFuDDrIy85gS67gYS_J09IcXJVjKrFOUTBLUnxap00ImRge0KIqikdILc87LmFHqpA3NLDbE_qyK4-S_P12lD9G6j1vsX7QX5XyjE4izOh1L-B-hWS7xBSIBAYgLAb5hGFrvGIpOpF2oAZmtp2r-J2mCwSMTYTbxLHAm_Q8bqqG9hZWbma7fPWlPXFzrkVTMj_Xcw/f54nkFtigScF22B5jMzHNSYx_5jI1VeM/7)

clean_body: | | | Co-Pilot - Our mission to defend Michigan has a major development. I’m announcing my intention to run for Governor at one of the most critical points in our nation’s history. Under Joe Biden and Gretchen Whitmer, our economy, our industry, and our people have all suffered. Michiganders were fed up with the status-quo bureaucracy, and that’s why our state turned RED in 2024. I stood alongside President Trump on the campaign trail and spoke with him at rallies where we shared our vision for America. Our movement for strong, America First policies has gained momentum, and we need to carry it through to the midterms to ensure that Michigan can get back on track. | Our Mission The first step towards fixing our state and our nation occurred on November 5th of last year when we elected President Trump, but the truth is, we still have work to do. We have 2 more years of Democrat obstruction and failed economic policies to endure in Michigan. That’s why it’s of vital importance to prepare NOW. Our mission is twofold: 1\. We are working to make life easier and more prosperous for Michiganders \- no matter what political party they are in - through pro-business, pro-growth and PRO-WORKER America First policies. 2\. We are working to PREVENT another 4 years of the same socialist policies that have hurt our state. Neither of these objectives can be completed alone. That’s why I’ll need your support. But, before I ask you to join us, I want you to know my story. | My Story You’re going to hear a lot about me from the mainstream media over the coming months. I’m ready for the mud-slinging from the Democrat establishment, but I want to tell you who I am: \- First and foremost, I am a God-Loving husband and father of three boys. \- I am a West Point graduate and a combat veteran who commanded 2 Apache Helicopter platoons – logging over 750 flight hours to protect our freedom and defend the American Dream. \- I am the proud son of two parents who were born and raised in the Jim Crow South. They moved to Michigan, built a business, and watched as their son was sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives. \- I am a businessman with a background in the automotive and manufacturing sector. I** understand how our economy works, how red tape and bureaucracy weighs down innovation and progress, and the tremendous responsibility that comes with being a job creator. \- I am a public servant who represents the people of Michigan’s 10th Congressional District and fights for them every day in Washington, DC. \- I am aconservative warrior who has gone toe-to-toe with the Democrat establishment machine time and time again. I am prepared to lead our mission to make Michigan the best place to live in the nation once more. But don’t let anyone tell you that this is going to be easy. | The Road Ahead \- Michigan will be the most competitive swing state in the nation. With open Gubernatorial and Senate seats on the ballot, all eyes will be laser focused on our campaign. \- Democrats have controlled Lansing for over 6 years now. Their political and financial machine is entrenched and ready to attack any person who tries to challenge them. \- Midterms are notoriously difficult for the party in power nationally. We are going to have to work twice as hard to share our message of economic prosperity and America First policies. \- This race will be on the top of the list for every single Democrat Dark money SuperPAC. For all of those reasons, this fight cannot be won alone. | Why I Need You On My Team I need the support of patriots like you to have a chance to win this battle. I know the challenges ahead and I’m choosing to fight anyway. If you’re in, I humbly ask that you sign your name to become a founding supporter of my race.** Let’s Fly! John James | | | Paid for by John James for MI 8050 Wolfson Lane, Grand Blanc, MI 48439. | | Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by John James for MI Use of John James’ military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans.

** [**PASS ROYCE AN ASSIST**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/KqXjRUQcNjSLnyaPr2q6KBmgUkgNzte0eBq0l-t5uDPg3p2VFUZgAKmfS-_kzMawv_CGNEfDKtk48lGbb_HBg2cVqUesaIrCmbUBCPAsP-gQzunY0w8bBBlzyz7XTGpp4Yv080NKdRBU4LbD4Ig4S0Y0W9_1keo5yx10auxkT4AudeW1TE4LWqgLAsT8Q_NtVvBwo73j_ZCmivURB0A1dLO8fuSgIwDMC-x47PCU_qXAgeySvj_7HmL4xwnWbBn8KezLw2EcwPXfc-fAcsKuWUrdEbbGvDsbTBqLbKaKlCX4WWZ4ircyONq_4-YAfo5cxU8cJ1-mr9a1LcY0rp0WWVsbZTrxmZq2dlJixvUlDwBMY5eDZTaFHZWxJOs9-ts1qPjYmlod87kE_Os/3PeWlUaXrScemgE4W4_KqfcMTypF6tCL/7)

clean_body: Game, Set, Match | Peter, After Amy Klobuchar backed away from facing my People-First Movement in 2026, there have been five likely contenders to emerge. I don’t care who I face; I know it’s GAME, SET, MATCH. But we need to start RIGHT NOW. From my days playing in Division 1 College Basketball and the NBA, I know the most important factor of success is KNOWING YOUR OPPONENTS and STUDYING THE FILM! So, let’s dive into each of these Radical Leftists... As the Governor of Minnesota, Walz has become one of the MOST RADICAL Leftists in American history. Just to name a few examples – he allowed Minneapolis to BURN DOWN during the BLM riots with ZERO consequences, expanded DEI throughout the state, and put illegals over Minnesotans. We all know how wacky and weird he is from his Vice Presidential run, and DON’T EVEN GET ME STARTED ON HIS WHITE LIBERAL WIFE! Ilhan Omar is a Leftist that I’m all too familiar with. I ran against her in 2022 for her Congressional seat, which was also my first-ever campaign. I could write a NOVEL about how TERRIBLE she is, but I’ll keep it brief. She consistently puts Somalians over Americans, called Republicans “stupid” and “idiots,” and is one of the founding and lead members of the most radical and progressive caucus – The Squad. I’ve learned A LOT about campaigning since I faced her, and I know she won’t win the rematch. From domestic abuse to borderline malpractice, Attorney General Keith Ellison has allowed Minnesota to become a waste haven of CRIME. Unlike me, Ellison has become a slave and servant to the Radical Left’s propaganda. His Deep State puppets tell him to jump, and he asks, “How high?” He was the Attorney General during the Minnesota BLM riots; that’s all you need to know (other than he domestically abused his ex-girlfriend). Congresswoman Angie Craig is a pathological liar who dissuaded voters into electing her in 2024, making them think she’s pro-Trump. She was at risk of LOSING to Republican Joe Teirab in a district that TRUMP WON! She temporarily turned her back on Minnesota Democrats in a desperate attempt to latch onto power, and she’s already back to opposing the America-First Movement. The Tulsi Gabbard wannabe won’t be able to use those same tactics against me. I’ll make sure ALL THE PEOPLE know where her loyalties really lie – with Barack Obama and his Radical Leftist clowns. Lieutenant Governor Peggy Flanagan’s role model is Pocahontas, AKA Elizabeth Warren. She’s a White Liberal Woman who claims Native-American descent in order to bolster her DEI standing in the Radical Left’s sphere of influence. She’ll be my EASIEST opponent to defeat. The picture above should tell you all you need to know. She was in line to assume the Governor’s Office if Kamala and Tim Walz won, and now she’s ITCHING for more power over Minnesotans. If she runs, it’s GAME, SET, MATCH. After running for office twice, I learned a lot about how these campaigns and elections work. The odds are stacked against me. The Left controls the Media and has billionaire Deep State donors to support them. I don’t care who I face; I’m confident I’ll win no matter what. Minnesotans are waking up. I may not be “electable,” but the word “electable” is a SHAM word. “Electable” Republicans have been trying to take down the Left in Minnesota for years, but it hasn’t worked. We need someone who isn’t afraid to mince words and hold back. We need a free-thinking Black Republican who will NEVER be a slave or servant to the Left. All I need now is your support. Godspeed, Royce White | Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. name: Team Bonta
subject: NEW lawsuit from the AG →
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
The Attorney General is once again taking Trump to court for illegally dismantling agencies that support our communities.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250408&t=1&akid=1727%2E1088799%2Ekftz-H)
Did you see Rob’s latest lawsuit against the Trump administration?
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250408?refcode=em20250408-1727&amount=5&refcode2=1727_1088799_kftz-H&akid=1727%2E1088799%2Ekftz-H)
President Trump issued an illegal executive order to dismantle multiple federal agencies, including the Institute of Museum and Library Services (IMLS), that provide crucial funding to **California’s libraries, museums, zoos, businesses, and more.**
Like many of Trump’s executive orders, this is _illegal_ : he does not have the power to shutter these agencies and cut their funding that was previously approved by Congress. **That’s why Rob filed his 12th lawsuit against this administration to stop it.[If he has your support, will you pitch in $5 now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250408?refcode=em20250408-1727&amount=5&refcode2=1727_1088799_kftz-H&akid=1727%2E1088799%2Ekftz-H)**
The AG’s lawsuit aims to stop this unlawful order, which would hurt many federal workers and the essential services they provide to support American families, businesses, workers, and our cultural heritage.
In California alone, we employ approximately 17,000 employees who staff 1,127 libraries and serve 23 million California library card holders across the state. **The end of the IMLS could mean the end to decades of funding it has provided for community services such as:**
* Support for tutors helping adults and children read, write, and learn English;
* Summer reading and activity programs, and services that help feed low-income children when school is out;
* Continuing education for librarians and library workers;
* A 300,000-title eBook library accessible to all Californians;
* Digital efforts to protect California’s cultural heritage and local history.

If Trump’s unconstitutional order stands, it would also threaten grants that support California's incredible museums, from the San Diego Zoo to the Exploratorium in San Francisco to Los Angeles' Autry Museum of the American West.
**Once again, the Trump administration is breaking the law by attempting to unilaterally shut down agencies the President doesn’t like — so Rob is taking him to court.**
**[Fuel his fight for the rule of law and our communities with a grassroots contribution of any amount today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250408?refcode=em20250408-1727&amount=5&refcode2=1727_1088799_kftz-H&akid=1727%2E1088799%2Ekftz-H)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250408?refcode=em20250408-1727&amount=5&refcode2=1727_1088799_kftz-H&akid=1727%2E1088799%2Ekftz-H)**
— Team Bonta
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250408&t=3&refcode2=1727_1088799_kftz-H&akid=1727%2E1088799%2Ekftz-H)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1727%2E1088799%2Ekftz-H)

Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026

1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: I’m running to fight for you in the U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I want to tell you a story. I never thought I’d be in politics. But after the 2016 election, like a lot of us, I was fed up.
| Peter,

**I’m launching my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the bullshit.**

[_**I’m going to share more about why I’m running. But before I do, if you’re like me and are done with the BS coming from Washington, please split a gift between our campaign and Fight for Progress now.**_](https://fight4progress.org/mcmorrow?t=oTyZPH62f2VV&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-08_1&amount=25)

Now I want to tell you a story. I never thought I’d be in politics. But after the 2016 election, like a lot of us, I was fed up. Politics should be about service, not self-interest. And not building up your own power by tearing others down. So I googled “ _how to run for office._ ”

Seriously.

I took on a state Senate race in Michigan no one thought we could win. I took on an incumbent state Senator who refused to do anything about the epidemic of gun violence, who sided with corporate polluters over protecting our clean water, and who didn’t represent us.

Democrats and Republicans counted me out because I was young. Because I had never run for office before. Because it “ _**wasn’t my turn**_.” But with the help of over 500(!) local volunteers, I swung a Republican-held state Senate seat 20 points and flipped a district that included Mitt Romney’s hometown. That victory sent me to the Michigan State Senate.

[_**My approach in the Michigan State Senate is the same approach I’ll take in the U.S. Senate: no bullshit.**_](https://fight4progress.org/mcmorrow?t=6lREe6zIaswn&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-08_1&amount=25)

Voters know BS. I’ve called BS out in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do as U.S. Senator.

Right now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to overwhelm us. That’s their plan; they want us to feel powerless. **But we are not powerless.**

The reality is there’s a lot in common between this moment today and that moment in 2016 when I googled how to run for office. But what that means is that we know exactly how to rise to this moment.

This is not a moment for weakness. This is the time to put our heads down and get to work. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. This moment, and what happens next, is on all of us. I will never try to convince you that I have all the answers. Just voting for the right person isn’t going to fix everything. But together, I know we can show Michigan — and the rest of the country — how powerful we really are. Let’s create the future we want to see, together.

[_**So please join me in building that future: make a contribution of whatever you can, split between our campaign and Fight For Progress to become a founding donor of my campaign for U.S. Senate.**_](https://fight4progress.org/mcmorrow?t=DH5N10FLTQa1&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-08_1&amount=25)
---
| [ BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR ](https://fight4progress.org/mcmorrow?t=3JgzsjuakG9a&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-08_1&amount=25)
---
Thank you,

Mallory
* * *
| | [

](https://fight4progress.org/wrapper?t=vEMHoB3yU3Hc&refcode=BLU_EM_FFP_2025-04-08_1&amount=25)
---

body:

| | | | [](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kV1v2yAUhn8NviPCB2yTC19kdTOt1aJNndbdWZiPmBYwirGz9NdXttzcvjzn8D4gfHTW3GpUfUMAvVUjAkD0gAAOv-H15Y9-1BU-wd8PLB7102k5hYcNneEOBynYz27k3_OXX-P_Q_NwJkU353c83aK-w9ulO-2FdUtaNZmqQXKQMtN1XjGWl4QWNOvrknPFDC9KXRW84KZTgnYdVGTPoMtNkdkaCBSEkT0hxT6HnQFORMklN2BypgrEyNWGnRqCcOotXSYfd3Lwmav7lOK4VjoiOI5aThe9u9pw0WohEBxXGgeR7DKN5eC9TUlr_GYkgqOLuDd41cBqOGssey3f8Qx4BESPU_Kt18pOHtFmky2XcBymi9SINi62Lra92XIpfBT2HBBtNinepiDbZffX6naEVq29Whe_5oaQdEiINotl0gjKNjirEG3K51Pz-u_2zNgarj9Mm5lWTz_Ix_49u9QqXq1zdiwrxMh5abk-z1zDZwAAAP__BoKpbQ)

Would you take a check, Friend? **_I’ll even sign it!_**
I’m proposing something completely unprecedented: **$5,000 DOGE DIVIDEND CHECKS!**
[TELL ME YOU WANT ONE](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kV2PnCAUhn8N3mHwgF8XXkzXte0m3bSZbXtpEHBkB5AoOt399Y3GmduX5xzeB7j1RvcfFcq_IIBByxkBIHpCAKdf8Pf8pp5Vjl_hzyfmz-rldTuFpwNd4QE7wdmPbi6-Juef879T_XQhabcmDzx8ePWAj0tjZbk2W5rXkaxAFCBEpKokZyzJCE1pNFRSUMFYTklSdpISUKLrRF72ORSSScojXQGBlDBSEpKWCcQ9FIRnhSh66BMmU8TITbtYjo4b-R6mxfpYjDYy1RCCn_dKDYJmVmKZVHzTblJyIxA0O40dD3qbxmK0VoegFH7vBYLGeDz0eNfAcrwoLAYlrngFPAOizRJsa5XUi0W0PmSzLZzHZRIK0dr41vh26I9ccOu5vjhE60OqaIMT7bb7vrqdoZV7r9b4-9zognIB0XqzDApB1jqjJaL1eSnh-u2Nsd97uP8wrVeav3wnn-U1mirpb9oYPWc5YuSytdyfZ63gfwAAAP__q4ep6Q)
It’s your money anyway, I’m just giving it back to you.
But just like anything that DOGE accomplishes, it’s being held up by radical leftists in Congress.

Peter,
Governor Walz is on the road again—this time with a stop in Lorain, Ohio— and the energy we saw at tonight’s event wowed us once again. For the second night in a row, Ohioans packed a town hall with Governor Walz, filling every single seat in the main room and the overflow space!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105457711/538434679/1426509062?refcode=body&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZDc5ZTExZi1kZjE0LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V3taognVlK9X-dPRvQcZUjwDwmjQxDhOkbIwebAxVVY=)

name: CA Dem Party
subject: Join Democrats in Anaheim for CA Strong Convention
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
cadem.org [cadem.org]
Democrats,
Join us to celebrate California's strength and chart our path forward at the 2025 California Democratic Party Convention in Anaheim from May 30 - June 1 . Together, we'll elect new Party Officers and Regional Directors, welcome new delegates, and begin the hard work of organizing for 2026.
VISIT THE CADEM CONVENTION WEBSITE [https://cdpconvention.org/]
Hotel Reservations
Hotel requests are now open to the public. You can request a room by using our housing request form [https://fs12.formsite.com/FRPDC/2025CADEMPublicHotel/index] .
Key Reservations Deadlines:
April 8, 2025 – Convention Hotel Reservation Request open to the public (non-delegates wishing to attend the convention can request a hotel room).
April 30, 2025 – Final day to submit a request.
May 10, 2025 – Hilton Anaheim sends final confirmations via email.
CADEM Statewide Officer and Regional Director Election
Candidate filing is open and will close by 5pm on Wednesday, May 14, 2025. You can read more about the Statewide Officer and Regional Director Elections here [https://cadem.org/officer-elections/] .
Convention Training Sessions
Join us at the Convention for Camp CADEM 2025: Rise & Organize!
Be in community with fellow organizers and activists as we prepare for the Midterm Elections. We will share key takeaways from the 2024 Election, dive into the organizing plan we’ve drawn out for 2026, and come together to develop the skills and strategies we need to win.
Camp CADEM will be held on Friday, May 30 from 11:00am to 4:00pm at the Anaheim Convention Center. Registration fees include lunch and a special edition “Camp CADEM 2025” t-shirt. Registration fee is $85 with discounted rates for DSCC Members and Young Democrats, and a limited number of scholarships are available. Registration is limited to 250 participants, so be sure to register here [https://cdpconvention.org/training/] today! Registration closes on May 9, 2025.
CDPCONVENTION.ORG [https://cdpconvention.org/]
The site contains everything you need to know for this year's convention, including the event agenda, key accommodation details, important deadlines and forms, and other pertinent information.
Don’t wait—register now and be an active part of shaping California’s future.
See you in Anaheim!
California Democratic Party
#CaliforniaStrong
https://cdpconvention.org/ [https://cdpconvention.org/]
Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www.cadem.org Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee.
California Democratic Party
1830 9th St
Sacramento, CA 95811
United States

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

# [Racist Democrats Finally Face the Music](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNjE5MjQsImV4cCI6MTc0Njc1MzkyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VEQSToI7TZbUEqhYETduU1gG6lia6eeL4c8TJ84iPaI)
### A scandal in Oakland City Hall exposed one of my critics, as well as the racism that infects journalism even in supposedly "liberal" cities
| | [Shahid Buttar](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---
| Apr 9| | | ∙| | Preview
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/@shahidbuttar)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0NDE2MTkyNCwiZXhwIjoxNzQ2NzUzOTI0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTAxODU5NyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.CVA45t5wYCbHdt8VIoJ66YHI7C_yU1zE2DC60xN9gSk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNjE5MjQsImV4cCI6MTc0Njc1MzkyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VEQSToI7TZbUEqhYETduU1gG6lia6eeL4c8TJ84iPaI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNjE5MjQsImV4cCI6MTc0Njc1MzkyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VEQSToI7TZbUEqhYETduU1gG6lia6eeL4c8TJ84iPaI)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/shahidbuttar/p/racist-democrats-finally-face-the?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

It's always nice to see justice, especially when it is delayed so long as to have been effectively denied. That said, watching one of my critics lose his position within a city government this week felt profoundly satisfying.
Even more satisfying is the revelation of bias among legions of professional "journalists" in the Bay Area who failed to scrutinize the scandal-plagued tenure of former Mayor Sheng Thao.
Racism extends well beyond Oakland City Hall, and infects the ranks of supposed journalists on both sides of the Bay who managed to cover up Harami's history for the past half-decade in order to protect their own reputations. These include prolific "progressives" in San Francisco such as Tim Redmond, Joe Eskenazi, and Stuart Schuffman, in addition to more mainstream journalists including the Chronicle's Joe Garofoli.
Oakland residents--and those of other cities served equally poorly by professional writers whose sustained failures rendered them complicit in white supremacy--deserve better.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! This post is public, so you can help inform your friends by sharing it with them._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNjE5MjQsImV4cCI6MTc0Njc1MzkyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VEQSToI7TZbUEqhYETduU1gG6lia6eeL4c8TJ84iPaI)
### **What happened**
City officials in Oakland, CA have recently set a new standard in public corruption.
Former Mayor Sheng Thao is [under federal indictment](https://substack.com/redirect/3cb51608-2673-4e7b-969a-7da359b2b2aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and facing a potential sentence of up to 95 years in prison for alleged bribery. Several [staff held over from her office were fired this week](https://substack.com/redirect/97e3c77e-d8ba-4bbe-8478-c1b64fcc90d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after public revelations of their racism. The most damning example was former Chief of Staff Leigh Hanson referring--in writing--to Black people as "tokens."
Initially, the only staffer fired was Hanson. But after the Oakland chapter of the NAACP [issued a statement](https://substack.com/redirect/b2796788-9cc2-46d2-9a85-d32d958d6239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) calling on interim Mayor Kevin Jenkins to also fire other officials with histories of bias, including community resilience director Brandon Harami, he thankfully responded.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ca66887-9c47-4f96-b135-1254728bc642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Brandon Harami
The other Oakland officials most recently fired included policy director Joe Genolio; and Brooklyn Williams, a staffer focused on public safety and education.
Beyond the saga that led to the overdue dismissals of Williams, Genolio, and Harami, the broader story is the sustained failure among journalists whose obliviousness reduced their own work to misinformation, and ultimately rises to the level of complicity in the corruption and racism they indulged.
_Chronicles of a Dying Empire is a publication supported by readers, rather than advertisers. To receive new posts, sign up for a free subscription! To support my work and enable more of it, please consider becoming a paid subscriber._
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..hr_wVGd8MTggwuuYHr_3HUJj4aufa2DbwcddMGyCqHw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160907259)
### **Why did accountability take so long?**
This is not the first time that Harami's racism has been [publicly documented](https://substack.com/redirect/4a9e385c-e41b-41af-a851-9cf93baedde5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). How was a climber with a history of embracing white supremacy allowed to serve in the office of the Mayor of one of the West Coast's most diverse cities?
The answer suggests that racism extends well beyond Oakland City Hall, and infects the ranks of supposed journalists on both sides of the Bay who managed to cover up Harami's history for the past half-decade in order to protect their own reputations. These include prolific "progressives" in San Francisco such as Tim Redmond, Joe Eskenazi, and Stuart Schuffman, in addition to more mainstream journalists including the Chronicle's Joe Garofoli.
It sadly also includes writers at national outlets (like [Ryan Grim and Akela Lacy at the Intercept](https://substack.com/redirect/339919ac-7b51-41b3-863a-73bfc3454274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) who investigated the false accusations fabricated to silence me in 2020, [discovered](https://substack.com/redirect/c70a6ac9-3e90-4081-9a6f-ebad1a0bdd7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) them to be based on a hoax, and yet [declined to observe the racism](https://substack.com/redirect/339919ac-7b51-41b3-863a-73bfc3454274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and white supremacy that allowed anyone to indulge them in the first place. Lacy remarkably included Harami as a source despite obvious conflicts of interest, while ignoring--and then mischaracterizing--whistleblowers, as well as the documentary evidence they presented.
Every one of these writers smeared me in order to prevent a public debate that, if allowed, would have allowed long overdue accountability for Democratic Party leadership that remains thoroughly and unapologetically corrupt. The world-historical [recent failures of the Democratic Party](https://substack.com/redirect/5152304c-a24f-4100-9e6b-7ae4c797f90e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that brought Donald Trump back to the White House were all enabled by preceding failures by legions of professional writers who get paid to mislead their audiences.
Each of them also ignored (or mischaracterized) Gloria Berry, an Afro-Latina Navy veteran, grandmother, and elected party official who came forward to [blow a whistle on the plot that my former staff tried to recruit her to join](https://substack.com/redirect/4a9e385c-e41b-41af-a851-9cf93baedde5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They also disregarded documentary evidence that she brought forward exposing that plot as orchestrated by Pelosi's political party and based on false pretenses. Most obviously, they ignored conflicts of interest among various accusers who were rewarded by the Democratic Party with jobs and appointments in exchange for their public racism and ignorant deployment of white supremacy to serve themselves and their careers.
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNjE5MjQsImV4cCI6MTc0Njc1MzkyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VEQSToI7TZbUEqhYETduU1gG6lia6eeL4c8TJ84iPaI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
### **Shooting the messengers**
Berry faced retaliatory smears as a result of speaking out. Harami falsely accused her of transphobia, and also started various false social media accounts harrassing her. I endured the same pattern at his hands, myself.
For the past several years, a steady stream of Black Oakland residents have come forward observing Harami's racism. They include community activist Seneca Scott, and Harami's former colleague, [LeAna Powell, who filed a state ethics complaint](https://substack.com/redirect/31634a4a-9475-4d13-a946-63b3004cc11c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in response to the hostile environment she encountered in City Hall.
Harami's counter-attack on Powell included several accusations. He accused her of aligning with the coal industry. He also outrageously accused her of stealing a laptop. White "journalists" at Oaklandside repeated his smears targeting Powell, even though those claims never had any grounding in reality.
Meanwhile, former Chief of Staff Renia Webb has launched [her own campaign for Mayor](https://substack.com/redirect/acaadb07-5449-4c84-b7e4-7294a5a62ae2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), after having been forced to resign from City Hall by former Mayor Thao's corruption. Webb has publicly reflected on the disgraced former Mayor's alleged bribery, as well as the illegitimate involvement of Thao's romantic partner, Andre Jones, in the work of the Mayor's office.
Somehow, these repeated pleas for accountability fell on deaf ears. With a single revealing exception, the whistleblowers were heeded only by Black journalists. [Zennie Abraham featured LeAna Powell's concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/30988421-bc6a-43f3-9f33-f84135d05a6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while the SFBayview was the only outlet to accurately [convey the experience of Gloria Berry](https://substack.com/redirect/4a9e385c-e41b-41af-a851-9cf93baedde5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The only white journalist on either side of the Bay to publicly reflect on Harami's racism over the course of five years was [Susan Dyer Reynolds from the Marina Times and the Voice of San Francisco](https://substack.com/redirect/1ee1cbcd-1811-4599-aac1-6e9447417746?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
How did every other journalist in the Bay Area manage to ignore Gloria Berry, LeAna Powell, Renia Webb, and me? I was hardly the only person of color marginalized by the biases they observed and tried to expose.
If racism has been so prolifically tolerated among Democrats in the nation's most supposedly liberal city, what might that suggest about the party generally? Democrats & their supporters are far less conscious--and far more racist--than their enablers seem to think.
_Having been silenced by racist Democrats and journalists when I ran for office and challenged an oligarch who continues to remain in office, I rely on readers to share my writing. Who do you know who could learn from this post?_
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQxNjE5MjQsImV4cCI6MTc0Njc1MzkyNCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.VEQSToI7TZbUEqhYETduU1gG6lia6eeL4c8TJ84iPaI)
### **The revealing words of a courageous whistleblower**
Speaking on [a podcast with Seneca Scott earlier this month](https://substack.com/redirect/693f3820-86c5-4941-9262-595a9355ce42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), LeAna Powell shared the following reflections (starting at 25:25) on the failures of news outlets and their complicity in the corruption and racism that pervaded former Mayor Sheng Thao's tenure:
> I'm a journalist myself. I used to write for [Oakland Voices](https://substack.com/redirect/f3b3fa71-28b9-426b-b67e-b4336245c2e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and that group was set up to diversify media...[N]ow more than ever, I am so grateful for the opportunity to become a journalist through Oakland Voices.
> But I see the need for programs like that and podcasts like yours so much more. Every single person that talked to me in regards to....this situation, I believe that everybody I spoke to was White, for one. And for two, people only were interested in the part of the story that they wanted to share....but nobody really told the story that shed light on what my plight was.
> I was hired in the wrong way. They hired me to use me. They hired me to use me as a pawn. They just did not expect that I would fight back. It really hurt me because it takes a lot of courage to speak up and let somebody know when something is going wrong.
> [W]hen I finally had the courage to speak up about it and go to the public ethics [commission], and go through multiple public ethics investigations, at least four [members] now on the public ethics commission [investigated].
> Nobody has gotten to the bottom of this case.
> _There have been multiple journalists that have reached out to me via email or by call. They have even done interviews with me and not put them out ...._
> They highlight a certain narrative, and it most often doesn't reflect if you're Black. You're dark Black like me? You don't get the justice. You don't get the story told that you seek to share. _I told each one of those people the majority of the story and not one of them put it out._
> It was the Black media...Zennie [Abraham]...who put out the entire interview. It was you [Seneca Scott] who allowed me to speak. None of those other media sources allowed me to share everything and when they did record it, they clipped it out.
> _It really made me not trust people anymore._
> I already didn't trust my elected officials that I initially did trust, but when I started seeing things unfolding and questioning things, I was getting harassed and pushed into a corner and I had nowhere to turn. Then when I thought I was going to media that would share my story, and I went to all the major ones, all the ones that you watch on tv and all the ones that you read online.
> They did not share my truth. The truth is I'm a Black woman who really believes in working in this city and being in the ground, in the mud, working for the people of Oakland....
Her reflections on her marginalization at the hands of white journalists is no less damning that the long overdue departures from City Hall of the figures indulged by those very same journalists.
It is a sad day when the party widely known as "the lesser evil" becomes a conduit for racism and bigotry, especially in smug liberal enclaves that falsely think themselves immune from those disturbing patterns.
_Paid subscribers can access a further section exploring the implications of this saga for the legitimacy of the federal courts..._

It's always nice to see justice, especially when it is delayed so long as to have been effectively denied. That said, watching one of my critics lose his position within a city government this week felt profoundly satisfying.
Even more satisfying is the revelation of bias among legions of professional "journalists" in the Bay Area who failed to scrutinize the scandal-plagued tenure of former Mayor Sheng Thao.
Racism extends well beyond Oakland City Hall, and infects the ranks of supposed journalists on both sides of the Bay who managed to cover up Harami's history for the past half-decade in order to protect their own reputations. These include prolific "progressives" in San Francisco such as Tim Redmond, Joe Eskenazi, and Stuart Schuffman, in addition to more mainstream journalists including the Chronicle's Joe Garofoli.
Oakland residents--and those of other cities served equally poorly by professional writers whose sustained failures rendered them complicit in white supremacy--deserve better.
_Thanks for reading Chronicles of a Dying Empire! This post is public, so you can help inform your friends by sharing it with them._
[ Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ0NzA4ODIsImV4cCI6MTc0NzA2Mjg4MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vhXkpvasa6LI35xz0_E8EN0y89QPQm73LF3Rs3lVvtY)
### **What happened**
City officials in Oakland, CA have recently set a new standard in public corruption.
Former Mayor Sheng Thao is [under federal indictment](https://substack.com/redirect/3cb51608-2673-4e7b-969a-7da359b2b2aa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and facing a potential sentence of up to 95 years in prison for alleged bribery. Several [staff held over from her office were fired this week](https://substack.com/redirect/97e3c77e-d8ba-4bbe-8478-c1b64fcc90d6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) after public revelations of their racism. The most damning example was former Chief of Staff Leigh Hanson referring--in writing--to Black people as "tokens."
Initially, the only staffer fired was Hanson. But after the Oakland chapter of the NAACP [issued a statement](https://substack.com/redirect/b2796788-9cc2-46d2-9a85-d32d958d6239?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) calling on interim Mayor Kevin Jenkins to also fire other officials with histories of bias, including community resilience director Brandon Harami, he thankfully responded.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ca66887-9c47-4f96-b135-1254728bc642?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Brandon Harami
The other Oakland officials most recently fired included policy director Joe Genolio; and Brooklyn Williams, a staffer focused on public safety and education.
Beyond the saga that led to the overdue dismissals of Williams, Genolio, and Harami, the broader story is the sustained failure among journalists whose obliviousness reduced their own work to misinformation, and ultimately rises to the level of complicity in the corruption and racism they indulged.
