### **Why did accountability take so long?**
This is not the first time that Harami's racism has been [publicly documented](https://substack.com/redirect/4a9e385c-e41b-41af-a851-9cf93baedde5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). How was a climber with a history of embracing white supremacy allowed to serve in the office of the Mayor of one of the West Coast's most diverse cities?
The answer suggests that racism extends well beyond Oakland City Hall, and infects the ranks of supposed journalists on both sides of the Bay who managed to cover up Harami's history for the past half-decade in order to protect their own reputations. These include prolific "progressives" in San Francisco such as Tim Redmond, Joe Eskenazi, and Stuart Schuffman, in addition to more mainstream journalists including the Chronicle's Joe Garofoli.
It sadly also includes writers at national outlets (like [Ryan Grim and Akela Lacy at the Intercept](https://substack.com/redirect/339919ac-7b51-41b3-863a-73bfc3454274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) who investigated the false accusations fabricated to silence me in 2020, [discovered](https://substack.com/redirect/c70a6ac9-3e90-4081-9a6f-ebad1a0bdd7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) them to be based on a hoax, and yet [declined to observe the racism](https://substack.com/redirect/339919ac-7b51-41b3-863a-73bfc3454274?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and white supremacy that allowed anyone to indulge them in the first place. Lacy remarkably included Harami as a source despite obvious conflicts of interest, while ignoring--and then mischaracterizing--whistleblowers, as well as the documentary evidence they presented.
Every one of these writers smeared me in order to prevent a public debate that, if allowed, would have allowed long overdue accountability for Democratic Party leadership that remains thoroughly and unapologetically corrupt. The world-historical [recent failures of the Democratic Party](https://substack.com/redirect/5152304c-a24f-4100-9e6b-7ae4c797f90e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that brought Donald Trump back to the White House were all enabled by preceding failures by legions of professional writers who get paid to mislead their audiences.
Each of them also ignored (or mischaracterized) Gloria Berry, an Afro-Latina Navy veteran, grandmother, and elected party official who came forward to [blow a whistle on the plot that my former staff tried to recruit her to join](https://substack.com/redirect/4a9e385c-e41b-41af-a851-9cf93baedde5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). They also disregarded documentary evidence that she brought forward exposing that plot as orchestrated by Pelosi's political party and based on false pretenses. Most obviously, they ignored conflicts of interest among various accusers who were rewarded by the Democratic Party with jobs and appointments in exchange for their public racism and ignorant deployment of white supremacy to serve themselves and their careers.
[Leave a comment](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=160907259&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYwOTA3MjU5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDQ0NzA4ODIsImV4cCI6MTc0NzA2Mjg4MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.vhXkpvasa6LI35xz0_E8EN0y89QPQm73LF3Rs3lVvtY&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment)
### **Shooting the messengers**
Berry faced retaliatory smears as a result of speaking out. Harami falsely accused her of transphobia, and also started various false social media accounts harrassing her. I endured the same pattern at his hands, myself.
For the past several years, a steady stream of Black Oakland residents have come forward observing Harami's racism. They include community activist Seneca Scott, and Harami's former colleague, [LeAna Powell, who filed a state ethics complaint](https://substack.com/redirect/31634a4a-9475-4d13-a946-63b3004cc11c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in response to the hostile environment she encountered in City Hall.
Harami's counter-attack on Powell included several accusations. He accused her of aligning with the coal industry. He also outrageously accused her of stealing a laptop. White "journalists" at Oaklandside repeated his smears targeting Powell, even though those claims never had any grounding in reality.
Meanwhile, former Chief of Staff Renia Webb has launched [her own campaign for Mayor](https://substack.com/redirect/acaadb07-5449-4c84-b7e4-7294a5a62ae2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), after having been forced to resign from City Hall by former Mayor Thao's corruption. Webb has publicly reflected on the disgraced former Mayor's alleged bribery, as well as the illegitimate involvement of Thao's romantic partner, Andre Jones, in the work of the Mayor's office.
Somehow, these repeated pleas for accountability fell on deaf ears. With a single revealing exception, the whistleblowers were heeded only by Black journalists. [Zennie Abraham featured LeAna Powell's concerns](https://substack.com/redirect/30988421-bc6a-43f3-9f33-f84135d05a6c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while the SFBayview was the only outlet to accurately [convey the experience of Gloria Berry](https://substack.com/redirect/4a9e385c-e41b-41af-a851-9cf93baedde5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The only white journalist on either side of the Bay to publicly reflect on Harami's racism over the course of five years was [Susan Dyer Reynolds from the Marina Times and the Voice of San Francisco](https://substack.com/redirect/1ee1cbcd-1811-4599-aac1-6e9447417746?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
How did every other journalist in the Bay Area manage to ignore Gloria Berry, LeAna Powell, Renia Webb, and me? I was hardly the only person of color marginalized by the biases they observed and tried to expose.
If racism has been so prolifically tolerated among Democrats in the nation's most supposedly liberal city, what might that suggest about the party generally? Democrats & their supporters are far less conscious--and far more racist--than their enablers seem to think.
_Having been silenced by racist Democrats and journalists when I ran for office and challenged an oligarch who continues to remain in office, I rely on readers to share my writing. Who do you know who could learn from this post?_

### **The revealing words of a courageous whistleblower**
Speaking on [a podcast with Seneca Scott earlier this month](https://substack.com/redirect/693f3820-86c5-4941-9262-595a9355ce42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), LeAna Powell shared the following reflections (starting at 25:25) on the failures of news outlets and their complicity in the corruption and racism that pervaded former Mayor Sheng Thao's tenure:
> I'm a journalist myself. I used to write for [Oakland Voices](https://substack.com/redirect/f3b3fa71-28b9-426b-b67e-b4336245c2e1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), and that group was set up to diversify media...[N]ow more than ever, I am so grateful for the opportunity to become a journalist through Oakland Voices.
> But I see the need for programs like that and podcasts like yours so much more. Every single person that talked to me in regards to....this situation, I believe that everybody I spoke to was White, for one. And for two, people only were interested in the part of the story that they wanted to share....but nobody really told the story that shed light on what my plight was.
> I was hired in the wrong way. They hired me to use me. They hired me to use me as a pawn. They just did not expect that I would fight back. It really hurt me because it takes a lot of courage to speak up and let somebody know when something is going wrong.
> [W]hen I finally had the courage to speak up about it and go to the public ethics [commission], and go through multiple public ethics investigations, at least four [members] now on the public ethics commission [investigated].
> Nobody has gotten to the bottom of this case.
> _There have been multiple journalists that have reached out to me via email or by call. They have even done interviews with me and not put them out ...._
> They highlight a certain narrative, and it most often doesn't reflect if you're Black. You're dark Black like me? You don't get the justice. You don't get the story told that you seek to share. _I told each one of those people the majority of the story and not one of them put it out._
> It was the Black media...Zennie [Abraham]...who put out the entire interview. It was you [Seneca Scott] who allowed me to speak. None of those other media sources allowed me to share everything and when they did record it, they clipped it out.
> _It really made me not trust people anymore._
> I already didn't trust my elected officials that I initially did trust, but when I started seeing things unfolding and questioning things, I was getting harassed and pushed into a corner and I had nowhere to turn. Then when I thought I was going to media that would share my story, and I went to all the major ones, all the ones that you watch on tv and all the ones that you read online.
> They did not share my truth. The truth is I'm a Black woman who really believes in working in this city and being in the ground, in the mud, working for the people of Oakland....
Her reflections on her marginalization at the hands of white journalists is no less damning that the long overdue departures from City Hall of the figures indulged by those very same journalists.
It is a sad day when the party widely known as "the lesser evil" becomes a conduit for racism and bigotry, especially in smug liberal enclaves that falsely think themselves immune from those disturbing patterns.
_Paid subscribers can access a further section exploring the implications of this saga for the legitimacy of the federal courts._
### **Racist courts**
At the moment, federal courts face an existential threat. Enraged by various rulings attempting to limit his administration, President Trump has publicly called for several judges to be impeached. His actions have drawn [a rare rebuke from Chief Justice John Roberts](https://substack.com/redirect/96ced083-4323-4a3f-8000-120cf862af65?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), whose stated concerns about judicial independence seem somewhat laughable in the context of his supine and deferential jurisprudence. Roberts has repeatedly proven complicit in empowering Trump, ironically enabling the threats he now fears.
Setting aside the drama unfolding in Washington between the executive and judicial branches, the recent scandals emerging from Oakland also hold implications for the judiciary.
In the wake of my character assassination enabled by [Brandon Harami's prolific self-serving lies](https://substack.com/redirect/c70a6ac9-3e90-4081-9a6f-ebad1a0bdd7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about me, I [sued the San Francisco Chronicle in federal court](https://substack.com/redirect/013e7e7f-fe09-4f9b-8212-ee6af5963ed5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), only for my claims to be dismissed without ever being the subject of a hearing. The trial judge ignored both substantive constitutional law as well as civil procedure, forcing us to appeal his decision to the Ninth Circuit, where a three-judge panel appointed by presidents from both major political parties eventually upheld the dismissal--again, without a hearing.
That, in a nutshell, is why I now DJ and teach snowboarding for a living.
How might one describe court rulings that ignore the law and defer to public racism? If it looks like a duck (i.e., defers to racist journalism despite legal limits upheld repeatedly by the Supreme Court), quacks like a duck (i.e., abandons election integrity and allows an oligarch to continue "serving" in a seat without an overdue public debate), and walks like a duck (i.e., invites racist legislative outcomes to continue, and priming the pump for the return of an authoritarian to the White House), it might be a duck.
I've known for years that our [courts can't be relied upon to defend democracy](https://substack.com/redirect/1e6f8183-22cc-4b1c-a1ed-dabf861ba979?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but their abdication of election integrity and First Amendment law forced me to add unfortunate personal experience to what before had been an intellectual critique.
In an earlier era, [Malcolm X told us](https://substack.com/redirect/e8ed7d4a-2e36-4afd-a926-b2b9c8aeb97a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that "If you're not careful, the newspapers will have you hating the people who are being oppressed, and loving the people who are doing the oppressing."
Less has changed in the era since Brother Malcolm's assassination than many seem inclined to presume.

But I see the need for programs like that and podcasts like yours so much more. Every single person that talked to me in regards to....this situation, I believe that everybody I spoke to was White, for one. And for two, people only were interested in the part of the story that they wanted to share....but nobody really told the story that shed light on what my plight was. I was hired in the wrong way. They hired me to use me. They hired me to use me as a pawn. They just did not expect that I would fight back. It really hurt me because it takes a lot of courage to speak up and let somebody know when something is going wrong. [W]hen I finally had the courage to speak up about it and go to the public ethics [commission], and go through multiple public ethics investigations, at least four [members] now on the public ethics commission [investigated]. Nobody has gotten to the bottom of this case. There have been multiple journalists that have reached out to me via email or by call. They have even done interviews with me and not put them out .... They highlight a certain narrative, and it most often doesn't reflect if you're Black. You're dark Black like me? You don't get the justice. You don't get the story told that you seek to share. I told each one of those people the majority of the story and not one of them put it out. It was the Black media...Zennie [Abraham]...who put out the entire interview. It was you [Seneca Scott] who allowed me to speak. None of those other media sources allowed me to share everything and when they did record it, they clipped it out. It really made me not trust people anymore. I already didn't trust my elected officials that I initially did trust, but when I started seeing things unfolding and questioning things, I was getting harassed and pushed into a corner and I had nowhere to turn. Then when I thought I was going to media that would share my story, and I went to all the major ones, all the ones that you watch on tv and all the ones that you read online. They did not share my truth. The truth is I'm a Black woman who really believes in working in this city and being in the ground, in the mud, working for the people of Oakland.... Her reflections on her marginalization at the hands of white journalists is no less damning that the long overdue departures from City Hall of the figures indulged by those very same journalists. It is a sad day when the party widely known as "the lesser evil" becomes a conduit for racism and bigotry, especially in smug liberal enclaves that falsely think themselves immune from those disturbing patterns. Paid subscribers can access a further section exploring the implications of this saga for the legitimacy of the federal courts. Racist courts At the moment, federal courts face an existential threat. Enraged by various rulings attempting to limit his administration, President Trump has publicly called for several judges to be impeached. His actions have drawn , whose stated concerns about judicial independence seem somewhat laughable in the context of his supine and deferential jurisprudence. Roberts has repeatedly proven complicit in empowering Trump, ironically enabling the threats he now fears. Setting aside the drama unfolding in Washington between the executive and judicial branches, the recent scandals emerging from Oakland also hold implications for the judiciary. In the wake of my character assassination enabled by about me, I , only for my claims to be dismissed without ever being the subject of a hearing. The trial judge ignored both substantive constitutional law as well as civil procedure, forcing us to appeal his decision to the Ninth Circuit, where a three-judge panel appointed by presidents from both major political parties eventually upheld the dismissal--again, without a hearing. That, in a nutshell, is why I now DJ and teach snowboarding for a living. How might one describe court rulings that ignore the law and defer to public racism? If it looks like a duck (i.e., defers to racist journalism despite legal limits upheld repeatedly by the Supreme Court), quacks like a duck (i.e., abandons election integrity and allows an oligarch to continue "serving" in a seat without an overdue public debate), and walks like a duck (i.e., invites racist legislative outcomes to continue, and priming the pump for the return of an authoritarian to the White House), it might be a duck. I've known for years that our , but their abdication of election integrity and First Amendment law forced me to add unfortunate personal experience to what before had been an intellectual critique. In an earlier era, that "If you're not careful, the newspapers will have you hating the people who are being oppressed, and loving the people who are doing the oppressing." Less has changed in the era since Brother Malcolm's assassination than many seem inclined to presume. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Shahid Buttar South Lake Tahoe, CA 96150 ? ?

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: No BS, I’m running for U.S. Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
My approach in the Michigan State Senate is the same approach I’ll take in the U.S. Senate
#
_You are receiving this email because of your past support for Democrats in competitive races. If you would like to unsubscribe,[please click here to opt out.](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee?t=1&akid=8874%2E614464%2EayqNCp)_
---
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250408-8874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8874%2E614464%2EayqNCp)
Peter,
**Last week, I launched my campaign for the U.S. Senate. Point blank, we need new leaders in Washington who will call out the bullshit.**
**[I’m going to share more about why I’m running. But before I do, if you’re like me and are done with the BS coming from Washington, please split a gift between our campaign and State Democrats Committee now.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250408-8874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8874%2E614464%2EayqNCp)**
Now I want to tell you a story. I never thought I’d be in politics. But after the 2016 election, like a lot of us, I was fed up. Politics should be about service, not self-interest. And not building up your own power by tearing others down. So I googled _“how to run for office.”_
Seriously.
I took on a state Senate race in Michigan no one thought we could win. I took on an incumbent state Senator who _refused_ to do anything about the epidemic of gun violence, who sided with corporate polluters over protecting our clean water, and who didn’t represent _us_.
Democrats and Republicans counted me out because I was young. Because I had never run for office before. Because it **_“wasn’t my turn.”_** But with the help of over 500(!) local volunteers, I swung a Republican-held state Senate seat 20 points and flipped a district that included Mitt Romney’s hometown. That victory sent me to the Michigan State Senate.
**_My approach in the Michigan State Senate is the same approach I’ll take in the U.S. Senate: no bullshit._**
Voters know BS. I’ve called BS out in the State Senate and that’s what I’ll do as U.S. Senator.
Right now, we’re at a crossroads. Donald Trump and Elon Musk are trying to overwhelm us. That’s their plan; they want us to feel powerless. **But we are not powerless.**
The reality is there’s a lot in common between this moment today and that moment in 2016 when I googled how to run for office. But what that means is that we know _exactly_ how to rise to this moment.
This is not a moment for weakness. This is the time to put our heads down and get to work. That’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate. This moment, and what happens next, is on all of us. I will never try to convince you that I have all the answers. Just voting for the right person isn’t going to fix everything. But together, I know we can show Michigan — and the rest of the country — how powerful we really are. Let’s create the future we want to see, together.
**[So please join me in building that future: make a contribution of whatever you can, split between our campaign and State Democrats Committee to become a founding donor of my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250408-8874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8874%2E614464%2EayqNCp)**
**[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/87635?refcode=em20250408-8874&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=8874%2E614464%2EayqNCp)**
Thank you,
Mallory

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=6&akid=8874%2E614464%2EayqNCp).

### 7 Mistakes When Choosing a Financial Advisor
Working with a financial advisor can be a crucial part of any healthy financial plan. But choosing the wrong one could wreak havoc.

SmartAsset’s latest proprietary model reveals that working with a financial advisor could potentially add from 36% to 212% more dollar value to investors’ portfolios over a lifetime, depending on multiple unique, individual factors.1 [Avoiding these 7 mistakes](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z03gpqo6lvjmd79b9nbed6df2i0so8lhl6tmi05g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o75cjh2bs) people make when hiring an advisor could potentially help reduce financial stress. Answer a few questions to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances.

body:
Democrats want to take DOGE to the woodchipper

---
**ELON MUSK’S MESSAGE TO EVERY AMERICAN ABOUT THE FUTURE OF DOGE THAT EVERY TRUMP VOTER HAS TO READ BEFORE THE DAY IS OVER:**
**_"All we're trying to do is restore the will of the people through the president. There's a vast unelected Federal bureaucracy that is opposed to the President and the cabinet. _**
**_DC voting is 92% Kamala, that's a lot. That's basically almost everyone. If the will of the President is not implemented, and the President is representative of the people, that means the will of the people isn't being implemented. _**
**_That means we don't live in a democracy we live in a bureaucracy. I think what we're seeing here is a thrashing of the bureaucracy while we try to reestablish democracy and the will of the people."_**
—---
Thank you for taking the time to read Elon’s message.
The heartbreaking fact is, even with the control of the White House & Congress, the entrenched federal bureaucracy is doing everything possible to take out Elon Musk for good.
A corrupt network of Obama-appointed activist judges has already ruled against President Trump’s most ambitious executive orders.
**_And now, Democrat members of Congress are calling for street violence against Elon Musk and EVERY Trump supporter._**
President Trump & Elon are doing everything they can, but the fact is, they can only do so much.
The real power lies with grassroots Patriots like you.
Your response - _right here, right now_ \- will send a message loud & clear that **WE THE PEOPLE** stand with President Trump & Elon at this critical moment in history.
But it has to be immediate, and it has to be massive.
Because anything short of an overwhelming response will be a failure.
**[So before Democrats levy their next round of attacks against DOGE, can we count on you to go on the record and say I STAND WITH DOGE](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zll7v11mvcv69jh7mvr40kuhq6e379b3c6u0jl7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o75c1h2bs)**

Please. This is the single most important thing you can do today.
Please don’t be silent at this most critical moment.[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb6qcbgtu637qvlndbsteugqht1el87qjov3eck0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o75c1h2bs)

name: Riley Gaines
subject: Can a red crayon become a blue crayon?
body:
Scholastic Book Fair is promoting books about gender confusion to kids in preschool!

|
---
| | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zf471q78e7r1oc8493ncnjtvab1rlgi0lacchjv0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs "SkyTree Book Fairs")
Friend,

Scholastic Book Fair is promoting books about gender confusion to kids in preschool!

In _Red: A Crayon 's Story_, one of the books that Scholastic markets, a crayon labeled as "Red" decides that he is actually "Blue." No matter how hard he tries to be red, he just can't! It's a story about "being true to your inner self and following your own path."
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6q4abnqd0ijpikklb3j3imc6b8fo2l1fijm4ego_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)
_Does this story sound familiar?_

It has eerie similarities to the narrative promoted by gender-transition advocates:

If you want it badly enough, if you declare it so, you can easily transition from boy to girl or girl to boy. It's a matter of feelings and not a biological reality. This kind of narrative is terribly confusing -- and even scary -- to kids whose brains are not mature enough to understand this line of thought.

This way of thinking also has real-world consequences. Consequences I am all too familiar with...

A _man_ who identifies as a woman stole my dream of winning the NCAA championship in _women 's_ swimming.

But don't worry, there's a solution! The solution is SkyTree Book Fairs.

Founded in 2023, SkyTree offers private AND public schools the opportunity to host a book fair that is 100% free from confusing, inappropriate, or otherwise adult-themed content.

The best part? They offer this extraordinary educational experience at zero cost to the schools!

[Want to make school book fairs innocent again? I'm asking you to join me today in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs. Donate $10, $35, $50, or even $500 today to help them fulfill the 150+ requests they received for book fairs. Click to make your tax-deductible gift and put a wholesome book into the hands of a child. >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8pmg4q7820prb48gencdpohir382acn875thl8g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)
[Donate](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpbsr2t2b29urdobjguj44o2299h8s4dl8q6psjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)
Imagine trying to decide which is worse - your child missing out on learning time in school or having to explain to your grade-schooler that, actually, Red Crayon can't just decide to be a Blue Crayon.

Well, that's exactly the dilemma parents, grandparents, and guardians across the country are facing right now.

Stories like _Red: A Crayon 's Story_ are so ubiquitous that many parents are choosing to keep their children home from school during book fair week rather than risk them being exposed to this type of confusing and subversive content!

SkyTree Book Fairs believes that every child should have the opportunity to develop a lifelong love of reading through stories that build strong moral character and **let kids be kids**.

They are wholly committed to providing a superior book fair alternative that matches and even exceeds the ease and quality of the traditional Scholastic book experience.

>From classics like _Anne of Green Gables_ to new favorites like _The Green Ember_ , every book in SkyTree's catalog is aimed at empowering children to dream big, build a strong moral character, and embrace the spirit of adventure and personal responsibility that makes America so great.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6p7un2muu89fecv9m4aqa6dntej76ndflkt9cr8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs) [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpe0gkthlo6gpriolpp0knj904ed444l3suag4tg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)
[I hope you'll join me today in supporting SkyTree Book Fairs! It has never been easier or more important to make a positive impact on a child's life through literacy! Click here to send your tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $250, or more, and help SkyTree bring 150+ book fairs to schools across the country. >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zsimfn67cd5st2haatcd2progff87n8du5nu9pto_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)
[Donate $10](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zq6pufnep7bekc7bag4bkhl70g3rd3jhcgu6hg7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)

[Donate $35](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zl35kbk24bkdoktrt0lmkateuv7icp4cor9rshn0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)

[Donate $50](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zhb6kivngrjqlb9bf10umig7nodbq5nbi13ctr40_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)

[Donate $100](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z283kgmk3v0nujq9svfnh34bueb45h3s5jggq868_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)

[Donate $250](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zte1k44vt8rtuq2dn5bm6iu5mr8tk6jl12edrtpg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zphkbq6db3uovv7sdjajta6oa2icke9mm2si32f8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)
Stories shape our souls, which is why it is CRUCIAL that America's kids have access to wholesome, age-appropriate, and uplifting stories that let their imaginations soar while being rooted in truth.

Thank you in advance for your support!

For the love of reading,

Riley Gaines

P.S. I would consider it a personal favor if you choose to support SkyTree Book Fairs in their important work of providing wholesome and inspiring books to kids across the country. [Please send a donation of $10, $50, $100, or even $250 today.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdnksp29v315cl0t2jq2pcbkai2300d3b7h4q7so_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)

I thought you'd enjoy this picture of kids enjoying their time at a SkyTree book fair.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztjrsk0q0s4g82ivc2qi8r4iqsd512gmjns5n2h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie4o76clh2bs)

From classics like Anne of Green Gables to new favorites like The Green Ember , every book in SkyTree's catalog is aimed at empowering children to dream big, build a strong moral character, and embrace the spirit of adventure and personal responsibility that makes America so great. Stories shape our souls, which is why it is CRUCIAL that America's kids have access to wholesome, age-appropriate, and uplifting stories that let their imaginations soar while being rooted in truth. Thank you in advance for your support! For the love of reading, Riley Gaines P.S. I would consider it a personal favor if you choose to support SkyTree Book Fairs in their important work of providing wholesome and inspiring books to kids across the country. I thought you'd enjoy this picture of kids enjoying their time at a SkyTree book fair. SkyTree Book Fairs is a 501(c)(3) not-for-profit organization. Copyright SkyTree Book Fairs, 2023. Pop Acta Media | 1600 Daily PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: Now Available: “Ancient Christianity”on DVD
body:
These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z88nttqva34fir29h2nmogh5145m3pq4ocm8ct0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie6ob6c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zb8o4bpgfp5te4p5pu4idf95j21dbcrb1fvt3v08_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie6ob6c5h2bs)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zep2hcmm46d048aocq14gatviafg72p85t9d6nco_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie6ob6c5h2bs)
**You can watch the video trailer for the course and get your copy of "Ancient Christianity" on DVD using the secure link below:**

[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp5v8e46ns14217a2g1h32su43mnvnj4g8phdtio_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie6ob6c5h2bs)**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/ancient-christianity-dvd-trailer](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8usj449feis7f8oi9mn3h91bk4pvc8jvdd9rogo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1chie6ob6c5h2bs)**

Thank you for your support in reaching millions of Americans with the story of the courage and faith of the first Christians.

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

name: The Liberty Ledger

body:
Will you take a minute to share your thoughts?

| |
---
| | | Hello -

The Democrat Party is mad as a hornet over D.O.G.E. and Elon Musk slashing waste, streamlining government systems, and exposing bureaucratic fraud.

Liberals are even saying that Republicans are starting to turn on their efforts.

That's why we're canvassing the entire country to see where everyday folks stand. **[Will you answer a few questions about D.O.G.E. and Elon Musk?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=62e20b1791694dc08faa058d607b1c7e&_e=zajk9X663KcMOb58kqRxUza8YVTz_HH7C1ZDb5Xpc_fjEODrlgg5fa6w1U8A3I4NKvLR-aLiY9m5ZgNCEWWqefVs6UBjGqHT4cSbM868XcCjZtlCHyMSZ4zKdKDjP2HgXz97tz9UpSGtpxroYlKQUVWwCAaplbvtp7099rCUguOEeN-WwTBrIxTlLB6KdVfCRIdI0aLwGwohyKp6RTTa3nMOe-6t49m12Z-I_XEtWsNHtaAaHyc-0QeYSv36-MLiYoIZKqBeV3aKPjW2vLuHHf69nodsKFMMFrwfw-Pl-VR8MKye-gHyelljPIvqtgZjeNGhimOwekhV806QCb4kNVXDDsSiz7kx0s9C1RNoIAWMiX52oKAyfk5SsyqVUSXqWFWPb0nJ2GTPeXV4VwP1a9KGY9vOIy96BSeW_pQOT28G1ld0Zp3HTVrW2GtMGDJ7QUOfSU1Wx63r96UnROftBzvvLhnaaBm4yK7xC6BmblE%3D "Will you answer a few questions about D.O.G.E. and Elon Musk?")**

# Wednesday, April 9, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1959, NASA introduced its first astronauts: Scott Carpenter, L. Gordon Cooper Jr., John H. Glenn Jr., Virgil "Gus" Grissom, Walter Schirra Jr., Alan Shepard Jr., and Donald Slayton. Selected from 32 candidates, these test pilots participated in the agency's first manned space program. ## Tariff Clock Ticks as Talks Advance
A [104% U.S. tariff on Chinese goods](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7tuhDAQheGnsbtF48GAKVykodu0KZEvY3Bi8AqstXj7iPTpjnSkT_q_nvPTxBT35dNspEvIMwJ2D5APGGdvYrpmyb0OREgtJy0GKcWISrV81WilB_RgnJe9CtIq0fY0OOw8OBUsj_rWQMIoAARi09pOWu-og1GJoIBJIB9LPprvHPeyUkhXftPRuLzxpNdSXidrPxhODKdaa2Otuz-G0071ZDiZo0SX6J7uZ-nEVQeAlPmh_avGlOLZD0zCspmY_tTyX-Vb428AAAD__1LcU2E) was set to take effect at midnight ET Wednesday, after Beijing refused to lift its retaliatory measures. As a result, market declines on [Tuesday were mild](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuhDAQBNCvMZ3RsjYYChdp6C5tSmS868M5cz6Bc4i_j0ifZpqR3mi-btPNxRSf90-3si0hTwjYStASholcTOekK7KBGVlVbBujdTNg36tqsYpUF8h46jscQoAZjSHqXDDs55ZcFe2lgYahAWgQazW3eibPLQx9E3oQGphiyVv9neOzLBzSmd-81T6vVbJLKa9dqA-Bo8DxOI7aP2d_lQLHixY4gr7CCBz3kv1Drm57cJElkztlim-WPy9yhfd6KWuqNkuvI6YU984IDffVxfS3Vv57_7b4GwAA___G9lue), with the Dow down 0.84%, the S&P 500 off 1.57% after surrendering early gains, and the Nasdaq falling 2.15%.
## 900,000 Migrants Lose U.S. Parole
President Trump has [revoked the legal status of 900,000 migrants](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z71uwyAUxfGngS0WXC4ODAxdvKVrR4uPS0JFgmsjW3n7yt27HelIP-n_dZtvvtTyun_6J7me2wwC9EXgRdg5-VLfM_LkMhGQ4uTkFVFaMEbxhxuNBwxpDFEnZbSMkHUIGEZtMmqreHGnJlBYKYQEGFTQGFIkLayR2QiGglLpbR2-W3n1B-X6bjutQ2xPXt2j92Vj6oPBxGA6jmMIIZ4fg-lFx8Zg8msvsdI54343hD-w2KXx1aXlKLWWbbwyFPenL_VP7f9V7g5-AwAA__8rTVNR) who entered the U.S. at the southern border and were seeking asylum under a program launched by former President Biden. Under that Biden-era program, migrants were allowed to stay in the U.S. for up to two years and granted parole from immigration laws. The Trump White House called for illegal migrants to self-deport, and announced plans to[ fine them $998 per day](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFurDAQRb_GdINsYxYoXOx7Ed2mSIqUaMDjxZGxkfGC9u8jNnWqGeleXemcr9twQ-dduL_jQjrbOEgua-AKeDcYdP45qMJoSySpKkiLRinRybatilkjN22nzAVHQ4LXspkarAhpbARX5iIKp881rngnOBdSltVYq9FMVPOuFbblTHEyLsdUfkcX8kzWP-NOqZziUng957xurLoy2TPZH8dRLls4MyZ7CvDYmOwDHed5_Tk9lhVWj2GDHMG6QLC4e8KQN-i6FhAMPsHGBPYX-6x5wp0AbaYEhtaYMmYXA8RkKDHZY4LrVfzfP-aVVX2cnGHV27_TGR3bJ6W1SNqsh_PebZeGKX5f0PkXQv5L6a7lTwAAAP__Lsh6RQ) if they fail to leave the U.S. after receiving deportation orders--a policy that could be enforced retroactively for up to five years and could involve property seizure for unpaid fines. Separately, the Supreme Court ruled that Trump can proceed with deporting Venezuelan gang members [under the Alien Enemies Act](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LFuqzAUxvGnMZuROTYEBg-5t_JQKV2qqiNy8CG4tTGyD0F5-yrdO3_Sp79-n5fxYn3w6-3NRtQ0pxEEtFwoLobRWR8eo6qcnhEBZYW6OSnVDND3slr0YE8o1aDcZFtxRdsA9j10UnQTdh32ldfPN6HE0AjRANTy2qqrm7AVQ9_MvWBKoPOUcv2V_EoLzuGR7pjrKcUq6IVoK0yeGRgG5jiOOpb1uTEwuPK9MDAxrfhgYBItmBmYsm8ZI_Ip7Zl4QCqc8h43XhC_ucMtZbLk01r4vjrM_LCZfEQe7MHA2MzP5-Y_fZRXJk2avGPy5d8TCI_yjnmrsnbb4UPwpTsxJW7R-vDbS3_53TX8BAAA__9zk3RG), though detainees must be granted due process to bring suit in the state where they're being held.
## Nightclub Cave-in Kills Over 60 in Dominican Republic
At least 66 people were killed Tuesday when the [rooftop of a packed Dominican Republic nightclub collapsed,](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMd1G9mKIKVz8DV3-9kpk7CX4tNgIO0F5-xPXXzPNSJ9G8_WYHi5yTM__biNblzyhxA6kBjlMwUX-TLoJdiFCahuy6q61GtCYtlmtVsb34R7UQh2hQTSG-qH3HXUGfTc00V6a1HJQUirEWzt3eg6eOjkYtRgptKQQaz5u3zmmutLCn_ym4-bz1rBda92LaP8JHAWO6bPnUq9K4HjBAkeprzACxzMfHCDRWQSOrgKTKxVUC4FcgHOlBEfOC_jM7PZCBVyFPe8vdgeEvMUUvUtw0P6aOXpI8blWz69Z4NgcNuxnZI6lvwstn5uL_Lux_vXZ2-JPAAAA__8-0W3H) including former World Series pitcher Octavio Dotel and former Washington Nationals player Tony Blanco.

At least 150 people were injured in the collapse and taken to local hospitals while the death count continued to rise through the day. Authorities said they were still [digging through the rubble](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L2OpDAQBOCngcyo3ZgZCBxcQjaXXoj80x76ZGxkPINmn37F5puV9EmlUv17LA_DkdPzr9lI15AXBBwEKAHT4g3Hz6JarwMRUt-Slnel5ITj2LerNjf0Ut76Eb2yoVcwhBAI7OTMfbBStqyvNlAwSQCJ2PV2UNY7GmAaZRihUUCeay7d_8yprhTiJ7-pdC5vbdRrrfvR9H8anBucz_PsknWJzuPyBucrXpBL9A3OsheejBcTiDUfO1cT-Yu8KDkH4fPGiZ1JotD-spGdcPFlhcsxmv2gQxSXDALIYWyL9vvJMfJxuzcKnpvh-LOp_vbRW-N3AAAA___XVGnJ) in search of survivors. The roof collapse at the renowned Jet Set nightclub in Santo Domingo came as popular merengue singer Rubby Perez was mid-performance. Perez also died in the cave-in, along with the band's saxophone player. The New York Mets honored former teammate Dotel with a [moment of silence](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuxCAQBNCvgc7WsuAYCoo0dJc2pQVmORPh42QTW5evj5w-zTQjvdF83qabzyU_7h9-JdtSnRBw6EB1YKboc3lNikebiJAkJytGpYRBrSVfLKjogeKQwgBeaim9N2IcRQg4G0rIs700UGAEgEDsZRhUiDMNYLRIGpgCirnVrf-q-dEWSuVVD9r6ua682KW1587kO0PH0J3n2bf15-oYuktm6EBdoRm6Ojd_5NrF2qh0awld23L4brQzdHyz8XnmUvL-NjIF99Xn8rfS_nt9WPwNAAD__0KvV40) before Tuesday's game against the Miami Marlins.

President Trump, speaking from the White House Tuesday, said the tariffs are generating $2 billion a day and encouraging companies to invest in the U.S. Here's a He also described a and suggested a trade deal is possible as Seoul prepares to send a delegation to Washington. As a result, market declines on , with the Dow down 0.84%, the S&P 500 off 1.57% after surrendering early gains, and the Nasdaq falling 2.15%. 900,000 Migrants Lose U.S. Parole President Trump has who entered the U.S. at the southern border and were seeking asylum under a program launched by former President Biden. Under that Biden-era program, migrants were allowed to stay in the U.S. for up to two years and granted parole from immigration laws. The Trump White House called for illegal migrants to self-deport, and announced plans to if they fail to leave the U.S. after receiving deportation orders--a policy that could be enforced retroactively for up to five years and could involve property seizure for unpaid fines. Separately, the Supreme Court ruled that Trump can proceed with deporting Venezuelan gang members , though detainees must be granted due process to bring suit in the state where they're being held. Nightclub Cave-in Kills Over 60 in Dominican Republic At least 66 people were killed Tuesday when the including former World Series pitcher Octavio Dotel and former Washington Nationals player Tony Blanco. At least 150 people were injured in the collapse and taken to local hospitals while the death count continued to rise through the day. Authorities said they were still in search of survivors. The roof collapse at the renowned Jet Set nightclub in Santo Domingo came as popular merengue singer Rubby Perez was mid-performance. Perez also died in the cave-in, along with the band's saxophone player. The New York Mets honored former teammate Dotel with a before Tuesday's game against the Miami Marlins. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I need to be honest
body:
I’m in a bad position right now and I need a helping hand.

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiUm/?__vbtrk=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Friend – I have always been upfront with you, and I’m not going to stop now.
_**The truth is that I am more vulnerable right now than I have been in a very long time and I need you to understand what’s going on.**_
I know you’re sick and tired of politicians reaching out to you and acting like it’s the end of the world if you don’t chip in to their campaign.
They’ll claim _anything_ and tell _any kind of story_ if it means they get a few extra dollars from you that they can throw on top of the cash they get from **corporate lobbyists** and **special interest groups** _._
I know you’re sick of the games from most Republicans – trust me, I am too.
I don’t take a dime from any of those groups... _**Believe me, they’ve offered.**_ Campaign finance reports are all public record, so you can believe me when I say _**I am funded by _you_ and _nobody else_.**_
But here’s what else that means: Every time fundraising reports come out, Special Interest Groups, swampy political consultants, corporate lobbyists, and the DNC go over mine with a fine-toothed comb trying to find any kind of vulnerability. And this time around, _**I’m afraid that they’re going to find one.**_
The first quarterly numbers of 2025 are coming in and I’ve been so busy fighting for President Trump’s agenda in the House that _**I haven’t had the time to fundraise the way I need to**_.
Other politicians don’t need to worry about that but** _I am funded 100% by grassroots donors like you_** so I very much do.
Once they see how little money I have on hand, and **_how difficult it would be for me to defend myself_ ,** they are going to smell the blood in the water and throw everything they have at me:**Legal battles** , **attack ads** , **billboards**... the whole nine yards.
I understand if this isn’t a time when you’re able to chip in.
But if you want to see me keep fighting in the House **_for _you__ , __your family__ , _the _Trump agenda__ ,** and _**_everything we believe in_ ,**_**then** __**[I’m asking my top supporters to chip in to this fight and help make sure that I’m able to defend myself](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiUm/?__vbtrk=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**.**
I'm not sure exactly what to expect, but I do know this:__**[I need to be ready](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiUm/?__vbtrk=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**.**
[CHIP IN NOW](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiUm/?__vbtrk=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Whether you chip in or not, I want you to know that I will never stop fighting, even if the fight needs to take a different form after this.
From the bottom of my heart - _**thank you.**_
_Yours,_
**Marjorie Taylor Greene**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiUm/?__vbtrk=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

_[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/aiUo/?__vbtrk=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=Mjg0NTU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=284554&trkid=650255370&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)
---
215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Floyd Brown, American Media Council
subject: Kari Lake is fighting in Washington
body:
Right now, Kari Lake is in Washington working alongside President Donald Trump and Elon Musk to Make America Great Again.

| | | Stand with Kari Lake and her fight to end government handouts to left-wing media outlets.
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Please sign and rush back your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note to show your support for her fight to end government handouts to left-wing media outlets.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/EAfK8ZWMeWJYoNkNhllHVN5oSj9vQ3HmsciCwpfAQ2AerjnZqVZuztT_cyKsJigPGqtBVJw5AkuEJhzxMJTYpGIjqcvLQpwROTjkqf607Gw4GIzDnRWqHFdkhohopLGZcMCsUTE64bZR2c07sWVeNpXa0p3ethwFpMApjmtKGJpAMbScXZuaJQBKygeJxyGOHH0JqoBb0hK9spsrAxVFyFrssvbJ6iF78PcsC7OXWS61jT9SdCKDxYiUZtt-NvuQW951Yxqfhsj0EIWIDxQgv8pX0-mxUjOih5b2RnDxShkw_m78xcyqoUF3LdEiPQT5radUF8bPLery98uR-C0JtvT1T5vLhQR7sIuxdFS9nvEHNpnbydIK4XeHcNr-tMUpGxDfV1XZHm_G4QflFqzppOBg5Uiaa_D11bTK9qT0pwI3a63az3Urf1VSP4bwqzXtFl5K2wbPtwNAAO3IzVBLAGakwatyo4g_1O8CE7Th/xRVZT9TlJPc7tFZ8J_MSFM6aq6L_SEJh/7)** Right now, Kari Lake is in Washington working alongside President Donald Trump and Elon Musk to Make America Great Again._And that’s painted a massive target on her back._ So today my goal is to get 50,000 signed “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Notes from patriots across the country and put them on her desk, and this campaign will be incomplete without your signed Personal Note today. President Donald Trump appointed Kari Lake as the Senior Advisor to the United States Agency for Global Media (USAGM).You may have never heard of the US Agency for Global Media before. Much like NPR, they push a left-wing agenda but to an international audience... on _your_ dime. President Trump knew that Kari Lake was the best person to go in there and blow the roof off their rampant waste, fraud, and abuse.But what she’s discovered so far is unacceptable.In fact, the agency is _so corrupt_ she called it “ _**NOT SALVAGEABLE**_.”
---
*** They funneled hundreds of millions of dollars into Fake News outletslike the Associated Press and Reuters. *** Leftist Senator Bob “Gold Bar” Menendez – who was recently _convicted_ of accepting bribes from Egypt and Qatar – used agencyfunding to sponsor a lavish and ineffective “non-profit.” *** They signed a quarter-billion-dollar lease for a fancy DC high-riseoffice building and paid $9 million in commission to a private realestate agent with insider connections – and the building isn’t evenequipped to broadcast the news!
---
My friend, none of this would have ever come to light without Kari Lake and her dedication to the truth.Kari Lake was a news anchor for 30 years. She’s an accomplished journalist who had the honor of interviewing both President Donald Trump and Barack Obama on their Presidential campaigns.I mention this because Kari Lake isn’t some “crazy extremist” like the left-wing media paints her to be.She’s a journalist who cares about the _TRUTH_.So it’s no wonder the radical Left sees her as a massive threat.She understands how the Left works. She watched from behind the teleprompter as the newsroom became corrupted by a radical agenda. And she refused to sit back and watch it happen, so she made the bold move of quitting her lucrative career to instead fight for the future of our country. Do you support her fight, my friend?Will you let Kari Lake know that you support her efforts to eliminate waste, fraud, and abuse – no matter what the radical Left throws at her? If your answer is Yes, **[then please take 1 minute to sign your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note to let her know that you have her back.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/s/c/8Mi1sFqxRZkKyc3MY6uddhbbt-fSM0fCXxWStFBOyiSWADJGLd-on8Bo4wOJUilfgfie9NN7qC2gOKu6wm4K9RF26pzONG1r6lgcZX-Ws-Wt2bfVQcJi78iVe3oEvAAUfm0cEIA0UR2g_u_r6hE87V9Kdx7xKSkxKwLhFdhejDowTjeJ1SjwwX13nDauXCn6qWZ6w7qZ2-L9TQEbOvnAkfmX_zUUxA6QXvUeIlwqIMIFkRgplqyi2uoXaSFWwq-1OWhRJ51uB6SFe6j3IOq1ktd24uIhn8CXaBGqSrR9F1l_tQT7Z72x5rBLll00W67ICgFHW5GBZ6bYFgcwS3sz2-hrDMJtBxC2GRtV_kYfXu83a0BqeTsXAv7Gf37Cch5WqTsEtqUXPI0iMzORZazsEZ6JDE-03D0gPEd-R93FZoJIrhJ8KeLX0krW37VBT01GqJ4m4OP_k_RYYYniL8Ue_Tv5i8LfU8cJq2me9Ez7/MpT6d0N9ds8EbBOUzkO-rMybcHPkHELo/7)** My name is Floyd Brown. I know exactly what the radical left does to conservatives they hate because my non-profit – the __American Media Council_ _– has stood by Kari’s side as they tried to bury her with never-ending lawfare.We helped her build a “First Amendment Fund” to cover her legal fees and rise above the left’s effort to bankrupt her. We did not waver in our support as they ran hit pieces to destroy her career, calling her “Crazy,” “Extreme,” and “Dangerous” while they defended a truly dangerous left-wing agenda.But now, the __American Media Council__ needs your help to support Kari Lake in her latest battle... A rogue activist Judge has _blocked_ her Trump-directed efforts to clean up the US Agency for Global Media, and Radio Free Europe is _suing_ her because she revoked their taxpayer-funded grant.I know Kari personally. I know how much of a fighter she is.So I can tell you right now that she’s not going to let anything stop her. If rogue judges try to block her efforts to revoke grants... _then she’ll go testify in front of Congress to get them to cancel funding._ If liberal activist journalists spread Fake News about her work... _then she’ll expose their lies and hold them accountable._ If leftist lawmakers in Washington use back-door loopholes to keep funding left-wing media... _she will root them out and shut them down._ But she can’t do any of this without your support.With the grassroots support of 50,000 Americans, Kari Lake will have the firepower she needs to stand up and say “No, this _is_ what the American People want!” Without your Personal Note of Support, she won’t have the numbers backing her up to demand Congress use their “Power of the Purse” to erase grants. She won’t be able to prove the liberal media wrong when they lie that “Nobody Wants” this funding cut. And she won’t have the grassroots army she needs to hold leftist lawmakers accountable for weaseling through their slush funds. name: History Facts
subject: George Washington's surprising hobby
body:
When he wasn’t busy winning the Revolutionary War and not telling lies, George Washington had a thoroughly modern pastime: reviewing American inns.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68epvzr5n9v3g2o2s9gtzu7gaj0nz5wbzyd5q3g6we89q3obyxahn6hlpnl4clnkzm1xg6diwbsxxd2ffk00rz2uupatvks6pw1vifm96md0oms7qoll4bmvml8yo05e1k9ptxwh5qs6hmljb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [George Washington wrote reviews of early American inns.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| W hen he wasn’t busy winning the Revolutionary War and not telling lies, George Washington had a thoroughly modern pastime: [reviewing](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) American inns. The founding father penned a series of these assessments early in his presidency, a time when he swore not to accept invitations to stay in his fellow Americans’ private residences while traveling. This was not because he didn’t enjoy home-cooked meals, but because he didn’t want to “incommode any private family,” as he [wrote](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) in a 1791 letter, and also to avoid any appearance of political favoritism. This necessitated patronizing inns during two major trips — one to New England and one to the South — as he got the lay of the land and greeted citizens, who he hoped would think of him as a man of the people.
---
Most of these accommodations, according to his extensive writings, were hardly five-star experiences. One he [described](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) as “not a good House” situated near an “intolerable” road, while at another “the entertainment was not very inviting.” Conditions were especially dire in the rural South, where, Washington [wrote](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), he failed to find “a single house which has anythg. of an elegant appearance.” He fared better in Boston, where he [noted](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) a widow kept a “very decent & good House” and [found](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) that Delaware’s Buck Tavern was “a better house than the appearances indicate.”
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---

## George Washington didn’t have children.
Despite being a founding father, the first U.S. president [never had biological children](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sug4t9&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) of his own. He and Martha Washington were married for 40 years, and together they raised her two surviving children from her first marriage: John Parke Custis and Martha Parke Custis. Martha also had four grandchildren in addition to several nieces and nephews who came to live with the couple at Mount Vernon. Five other presidents had no known biological children: James Madison, James Polk, Warren G. Harding, James Buchanan, and Andrew Jackson.

clean_body: When he wasn’t busy winning the Revolutionary War and not telling lies, George Washington had a thoroughly modern pastime: reviewing American inns. | W hen he wasn’t busy winning the Revolutionary War and not telling lies, George Washington had a thoroughly modern pastime: American inns. The founding father penned a series of these assessments early in his presidency, a time when he swore not to accept invitations to stay in his fellow Americans’ private residences while traveling. This was not because he didn’t enjoy home-cooked meals, but because he didn’t want to “incommode any private family,” as he in a 1791 letter, and also to avoid any appearance of political favoritism. This necessitated patronizing inns during two major trips — one to New England and one to the South — as he got the lay of the land and greeted citizens, who he hoped would think of him as a man of the people. Most of these accommodations, according to his extensive writings, were hardly five-star experiences. One he as “not a good House” situated near an “intolerable” road, while at another “the entertainment was not very inviting.” Conditions were especially dire in the rural South, where, Washington , he failed to find “a single house which has anythg. of an elegant appearance.” He fared better in Boston, where he a widow kept a “very decent & good House” and that Delaware’s Buck Tavern was “a better house than the appearances indicate.” | By clicking a link in this email, you're agreeing to our and . body:

| **** This Thursday, the U.S. House of Representatives will vote on one of the most important election integrity bills in decades: **The SAVE Act** --a critical piece of legislation that would require **proof of U.S. citizenship to register to vote in federal elections**.And right now, the Left is doing everything it can to stop it.
[In the latest episode of The Jenny Beth Show](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa6948ff/1edb9794aa68abde "In the latest episode of The Jenny Beth Show"), Jenny Beth sits down with **Hans von Spakovsky** , Senior Legal Fellow at **The Heritage Foundation** , to expose how left-wing groups are weaponizing the courts to block voter ID laws, keep non-citizens on the voter rolls, and destroy common-sense election safeguards.
👉 **[Watch the full episode now](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa6948ff/1edb9794aa68abe0 "Watch the full episode now")********** **__** **** ************
---
| **** ******** 🗳️ **It 's time for patriots like YOU to take action!****
**✅ **CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE TODAY** and demand they vote **YES** on **The SAVE Act** this Thursday.
📞 **[Use our action page](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794aa6948ff/1edb9794aa68abe2 "https://action.teapartypatriots.org/petition/save-act-2025")** to quickly and easily send your representative an email, and most importantly, be connected for a short phone call (phone script included, if you want to use it). Remember, phone calls are _very_ effective, so please make sure to call, whether you're calling Republicans or Democrats. In fact, it's just as important to call Democrats as it is to call Republicans!
Also on Thursday, **Jenny Beth Martin** will join **Speaker Mike Johnson** and other key leaders at a press conference in support of the bill. Visit our social media accounts on various platforms (Facebook, X, Youtube, Rumble) to watch. We have been leading the way on The SAVE Act --will you stand with us?
Let's make sure only **American citizens** are deciding American elections. ******** **** **__** **** ************
---
| **** **** For freedom,
**Kevin Mooneyhan**
Executive Producer, _The Jenny Beth Show_
Tea Party Patriots Action

"In the latest episode of The Jenny Beth Show", Jenny Beth sits down with Hans von Spakovsky , Senior Legal Fellow at The Heritage Foundation , to expose how left-wing groups are weaponizing the courts to block voter ID laws, keep non-citizens on the voter rolls, and destroy common-sense election safeguards. 👉 "Watch the full episode now"******** ******** | **** 🗳️ It 's time for patriots like YOU to take action!** ✅ CALL YOUR REPRESENTATIVE TODAY and demand they vote YES on The SAVE Act this Thursday. 📞 "" to quickly and easily send your representative an email, and most importantly, be connected for a short phone call (phone script included, if you want to use it). Remember, phone calls are very effective, so please make sure to call, whether you're calling Republicans or Democrats. In fact, it's just as important to call Democrats as it is to call Republicans! Also on Thursday, Jenny Beth Martin will join Speaker Mike Johnson and other key leaders at a press conference in support of the bill. Visit our social media accounts on various platforms (Facebook, X, Youtube, Rumble) to watch. We have been leading the way on The SAVE Act --will you stand with us? Let's make sure only American citizens are deciding American elections. ****** ******** | For freedom, Kevin Mooneyhan Executive Producer, The Jenny Beth Show Tea Party Patriots Action PS. We're in a fight for the future of our constitutional republic. Please take 30 minutes to get informed--and then share this episode with your friends and fellow patriots. | | | | | | | _This email list is a joint venture of the following separate organizations: Tea Party Patriots Action, Inc., Tea Party Patriots Foundation, and Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund. subject: Kari Lake is fighting in Washington
body:
Right now, Kari Lake is in Washington working alongside President Donald Trump and Elon Musk to Make America Great Again.

| | | Stand with Kari Lake and her fight to end government handouts to left-wing media outlets.
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Please sign and rush back your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note to show your support for her fight to end government handouts to left-wing media outlets.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/v8Djk8gJIlafv4azx3ryQgjGBCl-TpdjlxncWK-LlJq6V5h-8bTkk4AQsub0gkdSQlJebOaroAtvSvpIlASkle4d3K7MHjZhf5iCWQOvkhhr5Eg8Hb-VuouWK6oKPthY3IS1HI1IdSilplL66xKfg0fp24Mu260a30Byvdg019OX6qw_jLb_iK1UJZsuFWnSiyPjfegcAzldnhbZR6RWBCqLPvAP60eeAU-hXeYWakeJV6GWQ-lbTumg6m5mkljK9k660pkVsNgCcU2pZhnCT50RSeF6ZNlEvFIUKIE30nt2NrRCPHx8CPKm9k2KK5oJsAkgaZLrAidmiJsyUos87tf4Norkj1m_c2Y9dRzWXufbuLtxei-aL6DIYoYF7w-ZtuIdi9a80_I6Nn20DijhAjWlLCcb7A2ln_EQWcwgvAFDnWXMreTAEqbjsO2ojOra1zHpIWDz6a5uFjprAzqQISFp2RBlJvReS-xI-n6voA/NNz4-PjqXqZrzP9sO5pbBHqQonH3ak8k/7)** Right now, Kari Lake is in Washington working alongside President Donald Trump and Elon Musk to Make America Great Again._And that’s painted a massive target on her back._ So today my goal is to get 50,000 signed “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Notes from patriots across the country and put them on her desk, and this campaign will be incomplete without your signed Personal Note today. President Donald Trump appointed Kari Lake as the Senior Advisor to the United States Agency for Global Media (USAGM).You may have never heard of the US Agency for Global Media before. Much like NPR, they push a left-wing agenda but to an international audience... on _your_ dime. President Trump knew that Kari Lake was the best person to go in there and blow the roof off their rampant waste, fraud, and abuse.But what she’s discovered so far is unacceptable.In fact, the agency is _so corrupt_ she called it “ _**NOT SALVAGEABLE**_.”
---
*** They funneled hundreds of millions of dollars into Fake News outletslike the Associated Press and Reuters. *** Leftist Senator Bob “Gold Bar” Menendez – who was recently _convicted_ of accepting bribes from Egypt and Qatar – used agencyfunding to sponsor a lavish and ineffective “non-profit.” *** They signed a quarter-billion-dollar lease for a fancy DC high-riseoffice building and paid $9 million in commission to a private realestate agent with insider connections – and the building isn’t evenequipped to broadcast the news!
---
My friend, none of this would have ever come to light without Kari Lake and her dedication to the truth.Kari Lake was a news anchor for 30 years. She’s an accomplished journalist who had the honor of interviewing both President Donald Trump and Barack Obama on their Presidential campaigns.I mention this because Kari Lake isn’t some “crazy extremist” like the left-wing media paints her to be.She’s a journalist who cares about the _TRUTH_.So it’s no wonder the radical Left sees her as a massive threat.She understands how the Left works. She watched from behind the teleprompter as the newsroom became corrupted by a radical agenda. And she refused to sit back and watch it happen, so she made the bold move of quitting her lucrative career to instead fight for the future of our country. Do you support her fight, my friend?Will you let Kari Lake know that you support her efforts to eliminate waste, fraud, and abuse – no matter what the radical Left throws at her? If your answer is Yes, **[then please take 1 minute to sign your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note to let her know that you have her back.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/sG_c5lB6ZVqLLtyXOna-cnHtOtLPT2KBOvH69vPIFsuTnbISrcJgDJoVl1rXJSN_5tQW2P_DwF3AkuOhmG2mCeBUv1EhBrCsdyQlB62rYWqyCp1UByWnggWXGfgcki9jIBnw8elyLmd82NMx5kWjCoiwVoHcfhKWTSuW5_AJX4HtnT-upNdTcGaQPnKswXlotNoCJntGZcHf7WGnXmGn121sUv3rLWg7knpZJJwSUbv533sq0-erB3g1b-V_H8RhVv1_APlCsYo4fc7uUAinynLt9aeVXyXDDB5fntzI7JFmLj0NIGetzRSwdUijrN5HJ3avLqLalABOyz-OniENm915hY8c1CFsE4nEiBWbc7Oag-_S3gaxzrEABsNO482op56THIn_U4UQ-lBSDrG7ds6GYRL-_RwiyGyQZItGiCDfJrfTEVgM59Qc_Kewqbv1hKIkK8aLFeIzbwlJmgcZtZ-Nbn9Ujc9rstTkR5fwQw/Ps857QiRdqxO9Vu_W64K1I10gYzlQ8VW/7)** My name is Floyd Brown. I know exactly what the radical left does to conservatives they hate because my non-profit – the __American Media Council_ _– has stood by Kari’s side as they tried to bury her with never-ending lawfare.We helped her build a “First Amendment Fund” to cover her legal fees and rise above the left’s effort to bankrupt her. We did not waver in our support as they ran hit pieces to destroy her career, calling her “Crazy,” “Extreme,” and “Dangerous” while they defended a truly dangerous left-wing agenda.But now, the __American Media Council__ needs your help to support Kari Lake in her latest battle... A rogue activist Judge has _blocked_ her Trump-directed efforts to clean up the US Agency for Global Media, and Radio Free Europe is _suing_ her because she revoked their taxpayer-funded grant.I know Kari personally. I know how much of a fighter she is.So I can tell you right now that she’s not going to let anything stop her. If rogue judges try to block her efforts to revoke grants... _then she’ll go testify in front of Congress to get them to cancel funding._ If liberal activist journalists spread Fake News about her work... _then she’ll expose their lies and hold them accountable._ If leftist lawmakers in Washington use back-door loopholes to keep funding left-wing media... _she will root them out and shut them down._ But she can’t do any of this without your support.With the grassroots support of 50,000 Americans, Kari Lake will have the firepower she needs to stand up and say “No, this _is_ what the American People want!” Without your Personal Note of Support, she won’t have the numbers backing her up to demand Congress use their “Power of the Purse” to erase grants. She won’t be able to prove the liberal media wrong when they lie that “Nobody Wants” this funding cut. And she won’t have the grassroots army she needs to hold leftist lawmakers accountable for weaseling through their slush funds. I say all this to mean that your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note will do far more than just encourage Kari Lake to keep on fighting – although that itself is very important.Your Personal Note will be a critical tool in Kari’s arsenal she can use to prove that without a doubt the American people stand behind her, President Trump, and Elon Musk’s effort to end the left’s waste, fraud, and abuse. **[I hope you can see that it’s so important you sign and rush back your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note today – within the next 24 hours.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/s/c/hgD3bfy98M71OwpsF-RdXA7lxL4gwPIjsDZWJniSKGA3GXoA-qpuWCbEMf13u4etTDIemt3OxP4ttn3nk9bjrqmjvL2CG6FgtWx2fcMMSZAysu5OIJOGebtBJj_8-IC_Dw_kBcc67ufhlNHaQTJYVWISmiQ9kpmXcUgLRdkMQvAkZqloEAxWg0I-ffOzIsE1408BcNWKE1y0HaSyElSfwQzjBUc1ZaUH3FPSpaMxVRxBLh0ikbjt857VVVeW_tKm3pCuE9US13m5EXJWe31_BipX5vclXDGkAPJRtpNWuvjeTQ2dSaOci3J1Uo7DvWJhVyRDcBvge8bql6KZEQ24Fx-xIO-0pjjzAS-jjBe2lpbWOYhmyyBsgekLwHPmBoIGf7W0PceZ8pK1kFjYHZyCMP15dpKNXuvzdaVKIpeQwsNIOg724lphY-Nyaq1d1a5GZTm0N0jyLCNVo1REFHcyqPCpaouIeTPsJpxhUnX7mA/kSDCFwlPgRU3bDJtFg8iscFej4szC2S1/7)** And while you’re rushing that back, I must ask you to include a generous and tax-deductible donation of $28 to help me get 50,000 signed Personal Notes.I estimate it will cost $28,000 to print, mail, collect, and forward all 50,000 Personal Notes to Kari Lake’s office. Your $28 donation today will help us reach 16 more patriots for their signatures. And if you could send a larger donation today – such as $50, $100, $250, $500, or any amount that’s right for you – it will help us reach potentially hundreds of patriots! I know that not every person who signs their “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note will be able to give. It would take 1,000 patriots donating $28 to reach our goal. But your larger donation today will help us achieve it so much faster. And right now, Kari Lake is charging full steam ahead. She recently said the DOGE team members at the US Agency for Global Media are working 16-hour days.So she needs to know – right now – that you support her work and will stand with her no matter how difficult it gets. Thank you for your urgency.
---
For Truth,Floyd Brown
President, American Media Council
---

I know exactly what the radical left does to conservatives they hate because my non-profit – the American Media Council – has stood by Kari’s side as they tried to bury her with never-ending lawfare.We helped her build a “First Amendment Fund” to cover her legal fees and rise above the left’s effort to bankrupt her. We did not waver in our support as they ran hit pieces to destroy her career, calling her “Crazy,” “Extreme,” and “Dangerous” while they defended a truly dangerous left-wing agenda.But now, the American Media Council needs your help to support Kari Lake in her latest battle... A rogue activist Judge has blocked her Trump-directed efforts to clean up the US Agency for Global Media, and Radio Free Europe is suing her because she revoked their taxpayer-funded grant.I know Kari personally. I know how much of a fighter she is.So I can tell you right now that she’s not going to let anything stop her. If rogue judges try to block her efforts to revoke grants... then she’ll go testify in front of Congress to get them to cancel funding. If liberal activist journalists spread Fake News about her work... then she’ll expose their lies and hold them accountable. If leftist lawmakers in Washington use back-door loopholes to keep funding left-wing media... she will root them out and shut them down. But she can’t do any of this without your support.With the grassroots support of 50,000 Americans, Kari Lake will have the firepower she needs to stand up and say “No, this is what the American People want!” Without your Personal Note of Support, she won’t have the numbers backing her up to demand Congress use their “Power of the Purse” to erase grants. She won’t be able to prove the liberal media wrong when they lie that “Nobody Wants” this funding cut. And she won’t have the grassroots army she needs to hold leftist lawmakers accountable for weaseling through their slush funds. I say all this to mean that your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note will do far more than just encourage Kari Lake to keep on fighting – although that itself is very important.Your Personal Note will be a critical tool in Kari’s arsenal she can use to prove that without a doubt the American people stand behind her, President Trump, and Elon Musk’s effort to end the left’s waste, fraud, and abuse. And while you’re rushing that back, I must ask you to include a generous and tax-deductible donation of $28 to help me get 50,000 signed Personal Notes.I estimate it will cost $28,000 to print, mail, collect, and forward all 50,000 Personal Notes to Kari Lake’s office. Your $28 donation today will help us reach 16 more patriots for their signatures. And if you could send a larger donation today – such as $50, $100, $250, $500, or any amount that’s right for you – it will help us reach potentially hundreds of patriots! I know that not every person who signs their “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note will be able to give. It would take 1,000 patriots donating $28 to reach our goal. But your larger donation today will help us achieve it so much faster. And right now, Kari Lake is charging full steam ahead. She recently said the DOGE team members at the US Agency for Global Media are working 16-hour days.So she needs to know – right now – that you support her work and will stand with her no matter how difficult it gets. Thank you for your urgency. For Truth,Floyd Brown President, American Media Council P.S. Kari Lake is fighting in Washington to help President Trump and Elon Musk stop government handouts to left-wing media... but she needs your help. The radical left is attacking her at every turn. They’re using the left-wing media to spread lies about what she’s fighting for. Liberal politicians are using loopholes to shield their funding from getting cut. And worst of all, rogue activist judges are launching lawfare against Kari to stop her from saving your money. Kari needs to know that she has an army of grassroots Americans supporting her efforts. That’s why I’ve set the goal of collecting 50,000 “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Notes to put on her desk, and I need your signature to be one of our first. I know Kari will deeply appreciate your kindness and support. | | American Media Council** PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602 Pop Acta Media | Conservative Liberty Wire PO Box 1188 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

# **Trump Is Firing Public Health Workers in Mass**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x28lt-w65ilz-kyd76rh6/)
---
| | | | Dear friend, This is what Trump’s America looks like. **Over 10,000 federal health workers were fired last week.** Scientists, doctors, and public health experts at the **FDA, CDC, and NIH** had their entire lives turned upside down, many of them learning they were fired from security guards at the door. These weren’t bureaucrats sitting in offices doing nothing. These were **the experts keeping us safe from disease outbreaks, approving life-saving medications, and ensuring our public health system functions.** The very people we depend on to fight pandemics, regulate drugs, and protect our communities were **ripped from their jobs because Trump and his billionaire cronies want to gut the federal government.** The consequences are catastrophic. **Cancer researchers? Fired. The FDA’s top vaccine official? Fired. Experts responding to measles and bird flu outbreaks? Fired.** Trump and his radical allies are gutting our ability to respond to public health crises, all in the name of “shrinking government.” But let’s be clear: this isn’t about efficiency, it’s about **destroying the agencies that protect everyday Americans.** We cannot sit back and watch Trump dismantle the country. **No Dem Left Behind is fighting back, working to elect leaders who will protect our public health system, not tear it apart.** [**_Every dollar we raise fuels this fight to stop Trump’s dangerous agenda before it’s too late. Donate now to help us fight back before more lives are put at risk. We can’t afford to lose this battle._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x28lt-w65im0-kyd76rh3/)[**_Chip in today._**](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2x28lt-w65im1-kyd76rh4/) In Solidarity, The No Dem Left Behind Team

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1895, H-E-B founder [Howard Edward Butt](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FyhCAQQL8GOh3AFbWgSGN3aVM64K4HE05ucHPe_X3m0qd63Xvzvi7Lxaec9uunv5Hj51YWo0zfKGjUtKBP-bWARBcUTlqS0wOAnmyvQEYHOmjc1tWMdgq9HToK3aoDWRq1Hr2Syb1lCtSkVT_qru0gWDPgNq7UAwIJUISJS205EtPTH1t-lQfVdi03mV1kvh-i-xBmFmY-z7PlI_qy57RTW-pVmDn6HUMp38LMtHNNdAgzhx_mJpbTV2wI35DV4f1MOafDDgLU9eZT_qvwv9sPZ34DAAD__xtTW5g) was born in Memphis, Tennessee. His family moved to Kerrville when he was a child, and he became manager of his mother's small grocery store at the age of 16. A month after introducing "woolly mice," a Dallas startup announced the births of three dire wolf pups. Check out [the story](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9uwyAYxJ8Gb1gYMDYDQxdv6drR4s9H8qkEIoNC8vaVK3XsdDqd7nT6fV32i8WE-fpp72DaK5adMz5TJinTe7CY3rscgnEs6GkAMy1STlrNTA43o-MsnQIlmYIgFu9F5B5cjN5atQgxoDnHmGR6YvM6iVFIp_gS4uphlkECkQwCtnKM7QYNXrbG9C5POEZf7kMyt9YelYgPwjfCt977mJ0PsZ8x4VuGXk-xDUu2iWJucPw5wreAB9Be0hMqddZ_01ZowgjUl1RqtYk6LNUjZA-VBqDwapj92Sd8E-vEtF4J34bDhEfHlLCqhUh2vVtMvxfbv8yehv8EAAD__4mmcTI) in today's _Roundup_ for details and photos, and let us know what you think about the company's "de-extinction" efforts in our poll! We're sponsored today by [BOXABL](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtug0AQRb9m6UCzD17FFpEsOqdNiZadwYy0CwjWxv77CCdKl3bO6N6r83Xtr44Dz7dPF8mm57j0ClSZg8mh7dFxePUmQzsAtjIjK2tjZFuVYLLJeo9SE5Ze1oOGRjkPA40IykFTGhwztmcYGGgllI3UhTZDpWocG0-lQUPCACGnZSvSRImebh_Da3nQVvglZsFOKa270B9CdUJ1x3EUw_J0QzixUB3PD9qT0N09xX5f7psnoS8UHQehqvMYCfkehb6sjjFf3ZZm2vaJ11_uXVwd3-b3xx-UDeQG6v7HglQVgNJ101bZZnE9OATeq1oYuJ1V763pX3kPq74DAAD__8Yncd8), offering an opportunity to invest in groundbreaking building technology.
