## Paxton to Challenge Cornyn for U.S. Senate
Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton announced Tuesday he will challenge U.S. Sen. John Cornyn for the [Republican nomination in next year's U.S. Senate election](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0jz2PszAQhH-N6YzWy5qPwsXb0OVtr0QLXhLrHBNhX0j-_Yn0185o5tHzdZkuHGJI1_98F1de6zYhoNVAGobJc4jviSrvZvCDqcSZjsgMrQWqbk7YG2tsx72A4R7Rtz3xTGLn1QA3VXDnGRAMBmxvmrqhucXOr_0iljyJIhAfyrbX5SZFXpzX-N6estfLdq-iu5XyyKr5p3BUOB7HUS9zTnLks1c4fiYKxzNSOH5L0g9-lS1pSUX2rH-yzpK4iN55EYVjtTv_OEKMIbedIrjeOcQPrfyp_3T4GwAA___PWV24), citing the incumbent's "historic unpopularity amongst Republican voters." Cornyn was elected in 2002 and is running for a fifth term. Paxton, 62, was [elected the state's attorney general](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0zztuhDAQANDT2N2i8Xj4uHCRZptoo3QpkWEGsGQwAmvD3j5K-lzgSe_r0T9CTHGbP8IqvlxT7hGwvgHdwPUcYnr1pNkPwM5o8aYlMq6pgfTiecSGGEax1oppcTCdoQEdulZGdJ2O_hcDAmeg7oytLA0Ntjx1o9TEJIpAOJZ8VGWRIlc4p_TKTzmqMa86-aWU_VT2TeFd4X0IKeWyC8dQ5WNWeH-Xrf8MV8mbPjzv3zGleDatIpjXENOfUv5tPT3-BAAA__-ocE8v) in 2014 after serving in the Texas Senate for two years and the Texas House for 10 years. As attorney general, he initiated dozens of lawsuits against the Obama and Biden administrations over federal policies. In 2020, Paxton led an unsuccessful [challenge to the results of the presidential election](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOwyAQBb8Gd1gLXuO4oLjGXa690trAOkFHwDIkdv7-lPRXP70ZaX7O85lCDOn6TXe29VjyrEH3ElDCOHsK8TVj4-0F_KgatmpAVKPpAZubJXVxeDLox96B0b0zZLTSS0fYeTVAE-wbBgijgv6kurbDi9GDX06Oe_TIAoF9qHlr640rH1SW-MpP3lqX7020t1rXIrovoSehp33f2yUfiffy3oWe1hxDDa4IPX3ekq7yl5Nc6ag5SUopP5LjIrdHko8iCyeq3GzWr3uIMRQzCITrnUL8GOu_CZ5W_wUAAP__NY9fxg). In 2023, he was impeached by the Texas House of Representatives on charges he abused his office to benefit a political donor, but the Texas Senate acquitted him. Cornyn, 73, [served as Texas Attorney General](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z8FuhCAQANCvgduaAUbRA4emyR6abK89GnQGJUExSLbr3zftvT_wkvf1GB8-prgvn35jV18hjxp0ewO8wTCSj-kaUZKbgAYl2SmLqIauBZSrU2CV9aZvO6BpGkiDCdhbq1Uf2Mwko_vFAGFQ0PbKNAanTlsK_cwtErJAYIo1l6auXPnlz5Cu_OTSzHmTya21Hqcwb0Lfhb5PPqVcD6bom1wWoe8fed3H91z2a5fF0fEdU4pnZwXCsvmY_pj67-vp9E8AAAD___KxT58) from 1999 to 2002, on the Texas Supreme Court from 1991 to 1997, and as a state district judge in San Antonio from 1985 to 1991. Cornyn narrowly lost a bid to become majority leader following last year's election.
## Luka and Lakers Face Mavericks
NBA superstar Luka Doncic will [return to Dallas](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kD1vwyAQQH8N3i4CjL8Ghi7e0rWjdTZnmxpDxJE0-fdVund_enp6X9fpij74uH3iSbY81zRpqRuQBuQwOfThNZnK2Vm6QVVkVWeMGtpGmmq3SvfU6Lmbje6VXJSSi5Ro6hXbblb9UHn7lkkjByWbXtWX2syt7tzaL9QYZ0gYSc6XlC9lp0JP5DW80oPyZUlnFexeyo1F_SH0KPSIZQ8p8i3lwm9A6DHOKPQYEgPGjQIxBDwos9DjN3KKcHjngCk6hpOYcSMoCU58UPbLwbBiZJhpTZkg3A8El-LiF4ZM5Z4jbHhSla27_fgQPLedMHI70Ye_wvLvsofVvwEAAP___NRxQA) tonight for the first time since the Mavericks traded him to the Los Angeles Lakers for All-Star center Anthony Davis ahead of the league trade deadline in February. Mavericks general manager Nico Harrison secretly orchestrated the blockbuster trade with Lakers general manager Rob Pelinka, preventing other teams from making competing offers. Harrison suggested the Mavericks were [concerned about](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOqzAQheGngc6RMWPAhYvb0OW2WyLbM4TRGhzZXpK8_Sq79fafjo7-j-tydRz5uP13O9n6XNOipNJCgpBmQcfxtUCL1ks0XUu2GwE6M2gJ7WbNOA5q8uBpMOBhMkaRnoi0QVh7gJbte0yCNJ3UU9dfevCDGnGdAmlAoAYkIdeUL3WjSk9X1vhKJ-VLSHsb7VbrvTT9v0bNjZp9JBc2ypnuKdc3adTscuUQqTRqVrobYJRK_AJxcEhiczlzSYd4uCKQKuWdD0JRs0MS8evTCXcmRrG7s4iUPVc-bgLTETi02eL9wTFyGcYG5G13HH--1T9jnVZ9BwAA__8U3W5l) Doncic's salary, weight, and defensive efforts. Mavericks fans have protested the trade and called for Harrison's firing, and former owner Mark Cuban said he thought management should have gotten a better deal for Doncic. Yesterday, a Dallas sports writer [labeled the trade](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1urDAUhJ_GdAcZr_lx4WJ1Jbq9TYpIadABHxYrNka2gd23j0ifakYa6ZvRfD6GB1pn1-d_9KTzaw6D4KIGLoGrwaB170EWRo_cqKogXbVSVqqpuSwWbbAzpu7qpmlnabiahWpJTKLqlOFYi8LqC8YlVxWvu-pW3uTYiNbM3US1NJKY5GRsDrHMC2V6YZrdOxwUyyn4wukl5y2x252Jnon-PM_Sp_XKmOhphT0x0actxHwZ70Ymekzg9m-ESHmPa4IcAHECj0eCHPFpp0sMwYIJRpqCJzA2YcoUIcww4kgQ97xYXGGL4aLbsF4FGOF-r_4dXx--iNpsp3XOpqZlkj89Wvc7Ov_54qHFTwAAAP__qKd3Gw) a "disaster of Babe Ruthian proportions." Tickets for the [highly anticipated matchup](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGOgzAQRL_GdEbGLAYKF9fQ5dorke1dkhUmRLYvJH9_Iv21M3oz0vu5zBfHke_Xb7eRLa9ln7XSnVQg1Tij4_ieoULrFY5NRbbpAZrRdAqqmx2QvF5aQ2AI0Rnvl9CPHlXohsHosWJ7jilQY6O6oWnrFrzRPS5DoA4QSIAi5LKnutyo0MvlJb73J6U67FsV7a2URxbtl9CT0NNxHHXw-U5HPnuhpw8i9HRGQk-be1LisGYZ3Uopy6vbSMbf1Unc74GDLBxWKvKRONBJVMni4-AYOZtegLpujuPnvPxr42n1XwAAAP__Z3lkNw) start at around $200. Davis, who was injured during his first game with the Mavericks, [told a reporter](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OqzAQhZ8GuiDbjAEXLm5Dl9tuORrwEKwYHNlWCG-_Yrfe9vzp6Pu645188PvjP21sy2eJqITSNwE3YdCRDydC7ewknJE1W9kDSNNpAfVq58mZ2RlapBp01xqYZtFr0XZqASXJ1N5eYwKEkUIPsm1amDrVu2WYWYMDrkCw8yWmpqxc-EN5CWd8c2rmuNXBrqW8ctX-q9RYqfE4juak5CZKz99IpcZ9okqNlIqfA-dLiMhbLD7uGWkva9xPdPT2GROTO7FEXGhmDPHyHxw4Y6Anp6ucJcq-1RpBCWkGI-pk3evwIfjc9RWIx0Y-_Lwrf-J6W_UdAAD__6TpbvA) on Sunday that he has "no emotions" about facing Doncic and former teammate LeBron James.
## Dallas Startup Announces Dire Wolf Births
Dallas-based Colossal Biosciences announced the birth of [three dire wolf puppies](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLFuwyAURb8Gb1hAnh0zMHTxlq4dLQyP-KkYIkxD8veVu3e_9xzpfN2Wm6VI6f5pdzT1FfKihBq4AC704i3F9wKdN6vwWnZo5BVA6nEQ0G1mGoUeQI8oByeDXcM02clKPTp0CoLvyJwwAUJLMUzy0l9gHdXVh8nhAB6QgUBPNZe-bljxZY8Q3_mJpXd576LZan0c7PLB1MzU3FrrE7Yj2Uo5pdzOFVPz4QiTQ6ZmTwV5yzHwteSf-1b5at03DyXvHF-VkjufTM1dMf7RKEY6xisDcd8txT9p_bfC06jfAAAA___si2FS), marking the startup's latest achievement in its mission to revive extinct species. Using genetic material from a dire wolf tooth and skull fragment, the company [modified gray wolf DNA](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9uwyAYxJ8Gb1gYMDYDQxdv6drR4s9H8qkEIoNC8vaVK3XsdDqd7nT6fV32i8WE-fpp72DaK5adMz5TJinTe7CY3rscgnEs6GkAMy1STlrNTA43o-MsnQIlmYIgFu9F5B5cjN5atQgxoDnHmGR6YvM6iVFIp_gS4uphlkECkQwCtnKM7QYNXrbG9C5POEZf7kMyt9YelYgPwjfCt977mJ0PsZ8x4VuGXk-xDUu2iWJucPw5wreAB9Be0hMqddZ_01ZowgjUl1RqtYk6LNUjZA-VBqDwapj92Sd8E-vEtF4J34bDhEfHlLCqhUh2vVtMvxfbv8yehv8EAAD__4mmcTI) and implanted embryos into domestic dogs. Romulus and Remus were born on Oct. 1, and Khaleesi was born on Jan. 30. The pups already weigh 80 pounds and are expected to reach 140 pounds. The wolves will [live on a 2,000-acre preserve](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00DGvpCAUBeBfg901iKhDQTHZxGSL2XZLc5XLSB6CAWZ0_v2Lr3_VKU7y5eT8f0wPdN6F5z_cSJfTxklw0QGXwNVk0PnPJCujZ25UU5FuBikb1XdcVqterGlJEVdWWmPE0CozYN9zJdTci_lWOX1hXHLV8O7WtHUr514Mxt4W6qSRxCQn40pMdVmp0InZ-k98U6qXuFVer6XsmbV3JkYmxuM46i2Hq2NipACvzMQY6LgiWjsTFibGshIYlwiO6C24DDmmAtHCjMsX2BQ3oLO4sBQXAxj0HjPMmMlALpjKawc6d48uZLisDZ9uYWLEBPd78-cl_9oqabMfznuX-4FJ_tzQ-Z_N5dcT31p8BwAA__-GAXa0) enclosed by a nine-foot fence at an undisclosed location in the northern United States. A company representative said dire wolves won't be reintroduced into the wild until multiple generations of offspring are born and can survive without human intervention. Backed by celebrities like Peter Jackson and Tom Brady, Colossal Biosciences aims to resurrect the woolly mammoth, dodo bird, and Tasmanian tiger. clean_body: Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton announced Tuesday he will challenge U.S. Sen. John Cornyn for the , citing the incumbent's "historic unpopularity amongst Republican voters." Cornyn was elected in 2002 and is running for a fifth term. | | | | | | Wednesday, April 9, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1895, H-E-B founder was born in Memphis, Tennessee. His family moved to Kerrville when he was a child, and he became manager of his mother's small grocery store at the age of 16. A month after introducing "woolly mice," a Dallas startup announced the births of three dire wolf pups. Check out in today's Roundup for details and photos, and let us know what you think about the company's "de-extinction" efforts in our poll! We're sponsored today by , offering an opportunity to invest in groundbreaking building technology. Abilene ☀️ 90/56° | Amarillo 🌤️ 82/51° | Austin ☀️ 87/52° | Brownsville ☀️ 85/58° | Corpus Christi ☀️ 84/59° | DFW ☀️ 84/51° | El Paso ☀️ 89/48° | Houston ☀️ 81/52° | Laredo ☀️ 90/57° | Lubbock 🌤️ 88/50° | Midland ☀️ 90/51° | San Antonio ☀️ 88/51° | Tyler ☀️ 80/49° | Waco ☀️ 85/49° | Paxton to Challenge Cornyn for U.S. Senate Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton announced Tuesday he will challenge U.S. Sen. John Cornyn for the , citing the incumbent's "historic unpopularity amongst Republican voters." Cornyn was elected in 2002 and is running for a fifth term. Paxton, 62, was in 2014 after serving in the Texas Senate for two years and the Texas House for 10 years. As attorney general, he initiated dozens of lawsuits against the Obama and Biden administrations over federal policies. In 2020, Paxton led an unsuccessful . In 2023, he was impeached by the Texas House of Representatives on charges he abused his office to benefit a political donor, but the Texas Senate acquitted him. Cornyn, 73, from 1999 to 2002, on the Texas Supreme Court from 1991 to 1997, and as a state district judge in San Antonio from 1985 to 1991. Cornyn narrowly lost a bid to become majority leader following last year's election. Luka and Lakers Face Mavericks NBA superstar Luka Doncic will tonight for the first time since the Mavericks traded him to the Los Angeles Lakers for All-Star center Anthony Davis ahead of the league trade deadline in February. Mavericks general manager Nico Harrison secretly orchestrated the blockbuster trade with Lakers general manager Rob Pelinka, preventing other teams from making competing offers. Harrison suggested the Mavericks were Doncic's salary, weight, and defensive efforts. Mavericks fans have protested the trade and called for Harrison's firing, and former owner Mark Cuban said he thought management should have gotten a better deal for Doncic. Yesterday, a Dallas sports writer a "disaster of Babe Ruthian proportions." Tickets for the start at around $200. Davis, who was injured during his first game with the Mavericks, on Sunday that he has "no emotions" about facing Doncic and former teammate LeBron James. Dallas Startup Announces Dire Wolf Births Dallas-based Colossal Biosciences announced the birth of , marking the startup's latest achievement in its mission to revive extinct species. Using genetic material from a dire wolf tooth and skull fragment, the company and implanted embryos into domestic dogs. Romulus and Remus were born on Oct. 1, and Khaleesi was born on Jan. 30. The pups already weigh 80 pounds and are expected to reach 140 pounds. The wolves will enclosed by a nine-foot fence at an undisclosed location in the northern United States. A company representative said dire wolves won't be reintroduced into the wild until multiple generations of offspring are born and can survive without human intervention. Backed by celebrities like Peter Jackson and Tom Brady, Colossal Biosciences aims to resurrect the woolly mammoth, dodo bird, and Tasmanian tiger. Recently, the company announced the birth of | Flying together with our sponsor The father-son duo revolutionizing homebuilding For centuries, home construction has been slow, costly, and inefficient. So, in 2017, Paolo and Galiano Tiramani founded to change that, bringing factory-built efficiency to a nearly $5t industry. Where traditional homes take 7+ months to build, new homes can roll off BOXABL's assembly line nearly every 4 hours. Equipped with plumbing, electrical, and HVAC, they're ready to be delivered and lived in. They already have 190,000+ reservations from potential buyers. Now, where modules can be configured into larger townhomes, single-family homes, and apartments. . | ➤ Austin: A Texas House committee heard testimony Monday on two bills that would regulate the hemp industry. Senate Bill 3 would outlaw the sale of products containing THC, while House Bill 28 would ban edible products and limit purchases of hemp-infused beverages. () ➤ Houston: Gov. Greg Abbott scheduled the election to fill the late U.S. Rep. Sylvester Turner's seat for Nov. 4. The Democratic congressman passed away March 5. () ➤ Uvalde: Funding has been fully secured to complete a new elementary school that will replace Robb Elementary, which was closed after 19 students and two teachers were killed in a May 2022 shooting. Legacy Elementary School is expected to be completed this fall. () ➤ Austin: A bomb squad was called to a rental home Monday to deactivate decades-old construction explosives. Neighbors received an alert directing them to avoid the area until the crew had disabled the devices. () ➤ Kaufman County: Robert King, 35, has been charged for allegedly threatening to shoot federal immigration officials. He also said he hopes Gov. Greg Abbott "burns alive" and posted similar comments about President Donald Trump and Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem. "Somehow, the bird's nest caused a short circuit, and you know these things happen, " said a spokesperson. name: eastermeals@uso.org
subject: This Easter, help troops enjoy a warm meal
body:
A taste of home goes a long way
[](https://www.uso.org)
[DONATE TODAY](https://links.e.uso.)
---
[](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/2dpGh-ee_Atp/dWYxTXlyb21OQVB5UWNvb2RGMHMzYUlvYUFucTRaNkhNNmRVQ0ZXR1FGZmFpMmU0RkdMYzAyM2VtZHhJWXNFQWdncE5uRVg2bkg3ZU9TZ0ZqZnJtT0xnVzh0RkhISGQ1Y3BaLzZpd3lYcmc9S0/QW81eCtLSnhnRytxTnRMSUppTmFlQWhoYm4vdWhUd1Y5cyt0TDF2UldxTkdiRDJPM21mOXd5UEdxK3AzN0lPL2JjdDVlNC94UXF6OHlJYmFqK2htS0RseSt3aVFLQklyS0)
---
| [DONATE NOW](https://links.e.uso.)
---
Dear USO Supporter,
For our selfless service members deployed abroad, the special parts of springtime and the Easter season can feel far, far away.
Without the USO's programs, service members might find themselves in lonely barracks eating the same old mess hall food. But with your support, the USO is able to make home feel a little closer.
Our heroes sacrifice make unimaginable sacrifices in service of our country. **[Will you join us to brighten their day and help ensure they get a warm meal and other support for Easter and year-round?](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-ZZRetV/dWYxTXlyb21OQVB5UWNvb2RGMHMzYUlvYUFucTRaNkhNNmRVQ0ZXR1FGZmFpMmU0RkdMYzAyM2VtZHhJWXNFQWdncE5uRVg2bkg3ZU9TZ0ZqZnJtT0xnVzh0RkhISGQ1Y3BaLzZpd3lYcmc9S0/QW81eCtLSnhnRytxTnRMSUppTmFlQWhoYm4vdWhUd1Y5cyt0TDF2UldxTkdiRDJPM21mOXd5UEdxK3AzN0lPL2JjdDVlNC94UXF6OHlJYmFqK2htS0RseSt3aVFLQklyS0)** *
**[$18 can help provide 1 meal](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
**[$36 can help provide 2 meals](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
**[$72 can help provide 4 meals](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/E89~CyrrGYJ3/dWYxTXlyb21OQVB5UWNvb2RGMHMzYUlvYUFucTRaNkhNNmRVQ0ZXR1FGZmFpMmU0RkdMYzAyM2VtZHhJWXNFQWdncE5uRVg2bkg3ZU9TZ0ZqZnJtT0xnVzh0RkhISGQ1Y3BaLzZpd3lYcmc9S0/QW81eCtLSnhnRytxTnRMSUppTmFlQWhoYm4vdWhUd1Y5cyt0TDF2UldxTkdiRDJPM21mOXd5UEdxK3AzN0lPL2JjdDVlNC94UXF6OHlJYmFqK2htS0RseSt3aVFLQklyS0)**
---
**[Give another amount](https://links.e.uso.)**
---
At this time of year when service members may be deeply lonely or homesick, we set a goal to help fund 5,000 warm meals and other critical military support via email and text message through April 15.
As you can imagine, this is a difficult time to be far away from loved ones and cherished traditions. **[With your generous gift today, you can help provide a touch of home for service members serving abroad this Easter season and year-round.](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/mWbZT-ZZRetV/dWYxTXlyb21OQVB5UWNvb2RGMHMzYUlvYUFucTRaNkhNNmRVQ0ZXR1FGZmFpMmU0RkdMYzAyM2VtZHhJWXNFQWdncE5uRVg2bkg3ZU9TZ0ZqZnJtT0xnVzh0RkhISGQ1Y3BaLzZpd3lYcmc9S0/QW81eCtLSnhnRytxTnRMSUppTmFlQWhoYm4vdWhUd1Y5cyt0TDF2UldxTkdiRDJPM21mOXd5UEdxK3AzN0lPL2JjdDVlNC94UXF6OHlJYmFqK2htS0RseSt3aVFLQklyS0)**
Thank you for supporting our heroes in uniform when they need it most.
With gratitude,
The USO
*Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families.

clean_body: A taste of home goes a long way | Dear USO Supporter, For our selfless service members deployed abroad, the special parts of springtime and the Easter season can feel far, far away. Without the USO's programs, service members might find themselves in lonely barracks eating the same old mess hall food. But with your support, the USO is able to make home feel a little closer. Our heroes sacrifice make unimaginable sacrifices in service of our country. At this time of year when service members may be deeply lonely or homesick, we set a goal to help fund 5,000 warm meals and other critical military support via email and text message through April 15. As you can imagine, this is a difficult time to be far away from loved ones and cherished traditions. Thank you for supporting our heroes in uniform when they need it most. With gratitude, The USO Your contribution will be joined with the contributions of others and used where it is needed most to strengthen the well-being of the people serving in America's military and their families. United Service Organizations, Inc. (USO) is a nonprofit 501(ς)(3) organization (EIN/Tax ID: 13-1610451) and not part of the Department of Defense (DOD). The appearance of DOD visual information does not imply or constitute DOD endorsement. Photos by Staff Sgt. Alex Manne and the USO (C)2025 USO, Inc. | | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/s/c/ODIvklIO4VNdbcDpcecMvHf17mbgaP3rWRPkG5t8jCemd4zHyokdB3_c_xiBqrUTvn3b58zQpWqchi-Bl7iAlU0ElQJNXfRl-s3FiSiQPIeyQ3d1VfdN9nuzBDIV_jJrImvjiDNvEjClwaNu0LETtWa4njHuq94sOhrd-IVzxKtF5I18U6ZxrYlbMMZro8Gz_ByC_gUKMSzVEz-LLtWVluYdGeiRZGKmeFj6EN7d8fvze25nLs9M0SIoJcjolp2dJa8MVw-b5kywce_KTTVb6wulyZpLo8K53W8RZZOOExGgZ0JPWVcLYBXNjEOFyGCRunEmvb0rIN7Cgn9OoFmmfasXGPwct6qZlltwhiuWRnflFfaHCrh5TIw5c9E6Xtw3qF3dtDxDNF-MF_4gtkaCwO6ZvyhPj6PlnIJ63i5ijJw7VoGELv2qgr57EYdy6cPVHGcylGxDiuuWcoTIKkSkLKvzievlDmz3-tG_mSJYPal-OVwsDJdrjw6D1Q/DnZOf5ecdYV_nxbEHfwKqVZPIo8AVc6-/7)," now available on DVD.

In this course, Professor Kenneth Calvert is your guide through the first four centuries of Christianity as he explains the remarkable ways the new faith transformed the Roman world.

Would you help support this course so we can make it available to millions of Americans for free? As a token of our appreciation for your support, we'll send you a copy of our beautiful DVD Box Set for any donations of $100 or more.

| | Dear Friend,

Learning about how early Christians worshipped and prayed, faced persecution and hardship, and settled theological disputes enriches our understanding of the faith. These lessons are especially important today, as Christians face increasing opposition from the culture.

But, beyond reading the New Testament and some of the stories of early Christian martyrs, it can be daunting to figure out how to proceed. The complicated history of imperial Rome, along with the foreign names and locations featured in early Christian history, can make understanding the most important historical points difficult.

To uncover this fascinating history, we've produced our online course, "[Ancient Christianity](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/l1jmmDgkqx-U459ykGSUuhysI4W3UzvzNb6kRK7njOuZXrqalU85-Ksd3KHEvxqmaw86DJ7xQTRqTuBruSvKFJMwUNV1HVGE2Hrk8hIr8odFM-hd31RI-1uWB7b9wPAVKQWvSsDj_Nt8ssKxdlB673SG4AE_0Eec2X9fGxyk2fN7dzAj6BSSKkKHLLTLS-jwb3fZWinsngd26PKjKodJe9zXqnDPpYVw0pvhZycI7Xpsj5RKonXxYm2VZVdS-dhp23KSPLqQklFKcutEiZ4sk7oxXBeL-OPtJMSoMnk8x0_bkt6w9Go5881ps0X_VsoJsJ1eioIPWeWGBWIuZf3lnZz0WsvdsM3sXMkNpWpb5jRsG2u3V83SUtWvtJOBgF15IrogyBcdGWK5IKgakt9pfgKil3xs4RPnT1TUGGMN96GmPZD-1YcU8DPnWioqi9jn-KzUBD9YCINfmPDyF2HFMAP2VHQtFtzZkMRQg9UTkwvnKLncUCpScLcimw/QcO-nBWd06H2DM0EY3lXnMDzbrnx28OK/7)," now available on DVD.

* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/20987/6374453/744062e64df30c719dbe4fd547e979086ac7d022/4e5c896cc9845ffab9930757802e256b68effd9e)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 4/9/2025
body:
The fine print of SB25-063: Speak up about inappropriate books in schools, get doxxed
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s2r7d37ca55)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s2g5ac02ea3)**
| | Hi friends,
Listen to today's **Mountain Minute Podcast** [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s7n7bfc8b77), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s0ic05a469e) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/seo8b02e896)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Colorado’s Democrat-controlled legislature continues its controversial sprint, [advancing SB25-063](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sfv1071f6fe), which critics warn would expose parents to doxxing if they challenge sexually explicit content in schools.
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** A judge has halted Denver’s [Gross Reservoir expansion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sco28c80d40), risking water access for 1.5 million people. Downtown, two towers will become [700+ affordable apartments](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s4ie5276fe6), while Colorado’s DNA backlog leaves assault survivors waiting over a year for justice.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** In a major win for government accountability, the Supreme Court sided with the Trump administration, allowing the firing of thousands of [underperforming federal employees](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s8k6873f645), despite union protests. The ruling cuts through bureaucratic red tape and affirms the executive branch’s power to trim the bloated administrative state.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** Michael Hancock discusses Colorado's own Chris Wright, now serving as Trump’s Secretary of Energy, is calling for a [return to energy realism](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s5h6364ea9f)—slamming regulatory overreach and championing American oil, gas, and LNG exports to lower emissions and fuel prosperity.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, April 9, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[The fine print of SB25-063: Speak up about inappropriate books in schools, get doxxed](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s9na875cf0b)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s1kd8951e2b)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s2vdac8a4cb)
When Colorado lawmakers debated Senate Bill 25-063—titled the “Freedom to Read Act”—most eyes focused on the usual battle lines: controversial books, age appropriateness and the role of librarians. But tucked inside the bill is something less publicized—and more dangerous to parents who dare to speak up.
Under Section 4(f), any parent who requests that a book be reconsidered for a school library will have their name made public. That request becomes a CORA-able document, meaning it falls under the Colorado Open Records Act. And in today’s politically charged environment, that’s all it takes to make someone a target.
Rep. Ken DeGraaf, who opposed the bill during the April 3 House floor debate, warned that the measure gives activist groups a ready-made list of names.
“The CORA request is so that any parent who expresses a concern can be identified,” he said. He explained that the bill’s open-records clause functions much like a “doxx-like clause” that could be weaponized for political intimidation.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s4q765ab45e)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s4gf27d7be2)
|
---
**[Hancock: Chris Wright is the voice of energy sanity America needs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s4t6ee486a2)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sescd38b0b3)
* Michael Hancock writes a commentary about Chris Wright, now serving as Trump’s Secretary of Energy, promotes an “energy addition” strategy—expanding oil, gas, and LNG production to boost prosperity and reduce emissions without ideological restrictions.
* He opposes excessive regulations and climate alarmism, arguing they harm U.S. competitiveness and outsource pollution to less-regulated nations.
* Wright emphasizes education, transparency, and practical solutions over politics—calling for honest dialogue, smarter trade policies, and an energy policy rooted in economic and environmental common sense.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sdm39c3cb2d)**
|
---
**[Colorado’s backlog leaves sexual assault survivors without answers, without closure](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s4s0cf990dc)** [THE COLORADO SUN](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s1tf99d9f43)
* Colorado’s DNA testing backlog for sexual assault cases has grown to an average 18-month wait, leaving over 1,400 survivors—like Denver’s Miranda Spencer—without answers, arrests, or justice.
* The crisis stems from staff shortages, past misconduct by a forensic scientist, and rising caseloads; CBI now hopes to clear the backlog by 2026, with full staffing not expected until 2027.
* Lawmakers and survivors are demanding reform, funding, and accountability, with efforts underway to outsource testing and track kits more transparently—but victims say the damage is already done.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s3id5db73e8)**
|
---
**[Supreme Court allows Trump Administration to fire thousands of federal workers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s1mc1624364)** [NATIONAL REVIEW](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sat5933bc83)
* The Supreme Court lifted a lower court injunction, allowing the Trump administration to proceed with firing thousands of probationary federal employees across six major agencies.
* The ruling rebuked a lawsuit from the AFGE union, stating the plaintiffs lacked standing; liberal justices Sotomayor and Jackson dissented.
* The decision supports Trump’s efforts to overhaul the federal bureaucracy through the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), led by Elon Musk, and marks a major win against entrenched public-sector unions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sdh653a3465)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[One Sunday, four laws and the collapse of middle ground in Colorado politics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s5haec5d8e7)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s6v9a65f7bc)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| STATE | APRIL 7** _With the clock ticking on the legislative session, Colorado Democrats made their move—advancing four of the year’s most polarizing bills in a single day – Sunday._
**[Cole: HB-1312 turns pronouns into a weapon against parents and schools](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sere777cedb)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s8j05df1c62)****BY SHAINA COLE | COMMENTARY | APRIL 7** _Colorado House Democrats recently leveraged their legislative authority with a calculated one-two punch, invoking Rule 14 on April 4, 2025, to cap debate on House Bill 1312 (HB-1312), the “Kelly Loving Act,” at a scant two hours, then deploying Rule 16 over the weekend to stifle discussion entirely and push the bill to an immediate vote._
__
**[Enos: Abortion, parental rights and gun grabs—Colorado’s radical trifecta](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/s0u31c50b4e)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._ZeHg/sdiea7538fe)****BY COLLEEN ENOS | COMMENTARY | APRIL 7** _While continuing to grapple with Colorado’s $1.2 billion dollar shortfall, the state will be losing $250 million in pandemic-related federal funding for healthcare from the American Rescue Plan Act._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|

|
---

Lawmakers and survivors are demanding reform, funding, and accountability, with efforts underway to outsource testing and track kits more transparently—but victims say the damage is already done. | The Supreme Court lifted a lower court injunction, allowing the Trump administration to proceed with firing thousands of probationary federal employees across six major agencies. The ruling rebuked a lawsuit from the AFGE union, stating the plaintiffs lacked standing; liberal justices Sotomayor and Jackson dissented. The decision supports Trump’s efforts to overhaul the federal bureaucracy through the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE), led by Elon Musk, and marks a major win against entrenched public-sector unions. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ JEN SCHUMANN| STATE | APRIL 7 With the clock ticking on the legislative session, Colorado Democrats made their move—advancing four of the year’s most polarizing bills in a single day – Sunday. SHAINA COLE | COMMENTARY | APRIL 7 Colorado House Democrats recently leveraged their legislative authority with a calculated one-two punch, invoking Rule 14 on April 4, 2025, to cap debate on House Bill 1312 (HB-1312), the “Kelly Loving Act,” at a scant two hours, then deploying Rule 16 over the weekend to stifle discussion entirely and push the bill to an immediate vote. COLLEEN ENOS | COMMENTARY | APRIL 7 While continuing to grapple with Colorado’s $1.2 billion dollar shortfall, the state will be losing $250 million in pandemic-related federal funding for healthcare from the American Rescue Plan Act. Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🤔 DID YOU KNOW? Unlike future presidents, George Washington never campaigned for office —he was unanimously elected by the Electoral College in both 1789 and 1792, making him the only president in history to receive every electoral vote. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY “Happiness, like unhappiness, is a proactive choice.” –Stephen R. Covey | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Floyd Brown, American Media Council
subject: Kari Lake is fighting in Washington
body:
Right now, Kari Lake is in Washington working alongside President Donald Trump and Elon Musk to Make America Great Again.

| | | Stand with Kari Lake and her fight to end government handouts to left-wing media outlets.
---
| |
---
| |
---
Dear Fellow Conservative, **[Please sign and rush back your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note to show your support for her fight to end government handouts to left-wing media outlets.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zfn97jk4rh2i8s7mbambc06kfdtekpmgumsvtlf0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i62ob6c5h2bs)** Right now, Kari Lake is in Washington working alongside President Donald Trump and Elon Musk to Make America Great Again._And that’s painted a massive target on her back._ So today my goal is to get 50,000 signed “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Notes from patriots across the country and put them on her desk, and this campaign will be incomplete without your signed Personal Note today. President Donald Trump appointed Kari Lake as the Senior Advisor to the United States Agency for Global Media (USAGM).You may have never heard of the US Agency for Global Media before. Much like NPR, they push a left-wing agenda but to an international audience... on _your_ dime. President Trump knew that Kari Lake was the best person to go in there and blow the roof off their rampant waste, fraud, and abuse.But what she’s discovered so far is unacceptable.In fact, the agency is _so corrupt_ she called it “ _**NOT SALVAGEABLE**_.”
---
*** They funneled hundreds of millions of dollars into Fake News outletslike the Associated Press and Reuters. *** Leftist Senator Bob “Gold Bar” Menendez – who was recently _convicted_ of accepting bribes from Egypt and Qatar – used agencyfunding to sponsor a lavish and ineffective “non-profit.” *** They signed a quarter-billion-dollar lease for a fancy DC high-riseoffice building and paid $9 million in commission to a private realestate agent with insider connections – and the building isn’t evenequipped to broadcast the news!
---
My friend, none of this would have ever come to light without Kari Lake and her dedication to the truth.Kari Lake was a news anchor for 30 years. She’s an accomplished journalist who had the honor of interviewing both President Donald Trump and Barack Obama on their Presidential campaigns.I mention this because Kari Lake isn’t some “crazy extremist” like the left-wing media paints her to be.She’s a journalist who cares about the _TRUTH_.So it’s no wonder the radical Left sees her as a massive threat.She understands how the Left works. She watched from behind the teleprompter as the newsroom became corrupted by a radical agenda. And she refused to sit back and watch it happen, so she made the bold move of quitting her lucrative career to instead fight for the future of our country. Do you support her fight, my friend?Will you let Kari Lake know that you support her efforts to eliminate waste, fraud, and abuse – no matter what the radical Left throws at her? If your answer is Yes, **[then please take 1 minute to sign your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note to let her know that you have her back.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlfpbib5og9nnn4vcmf7nh72m47bneb1fptquqt0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i62ob6c5h2bs)** My name is Floyd Brown. I know exactly what the radical left does to conservatives they hate because my non-profit – the __American Media Council_ _– has stood by Kari’s side as they tried to bury her with never-ending lawfare.We helped her build a “First Amendment Fund” to cover her legal fees and rise above the left’s effort to bankrupt her. We did not waver in our support as they ran hit pieces to destroy her career, calling her “Crazy,” “Extreme,” and “Dangerous” while they defended a truly dangerous left-wing agenda.But now, the __American Media Council__ needs your help to support Kari Lake in her latest battle... A rogue activist Judge has _blocked_ her Trump-directed efforts to clean up the US Agency for Global Media, and Radio Free Europe is _suing_ her because she revoked their taxpayer-funded grant.I know Kari personally. I know how much of a fighter she is.So I can tell you right now that she’s not going to let anything stop her. If rogue judges try to block her efforts to revoke grants... _then she’ll go testify in front of Congress to get them to cancel funding._ If liberal activist journalists spread Fake News about her work... _then she’ll expose their lies and hold them accountable._ If leftist lawmakers in Washington use back-door loopholes to keep funding left-wing media... _she will root them out and shut them down._ But she can’t do any of this without your support.With the grassroots support of 50,000 Americans, Kari Lake will have the firepower she needs to stand up and say “No, this _is_ what the American People want!” Without your Personal Note of Support, she won’t have the numbers backing her up to demand Congress use their “Power of the Purse” to erase grants. She won’t be able to prove the liberal media wrong when they lie that “Nobody Wants” this funding cut. And she won’t have the grassroots army she needs to hold leftist lawmakers accountable for weaseling through their slush funds. I say all this to mean that your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note will do far more than just encourage Kari Lake to keep on fighting – although that itself is very important.Your Personal Note will be a critical tool in Kari’s arsenal she can use to prove that without a doubt the American people stand behind her, President Trump, and Elon Musk’s effort to end the left’s waste, fraud, and abuse. **[I hope you can see that it’s so important you sign and rush back your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note today – within the next 24 hours.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z4oq4auv6jlun0fej3k6jp03h845vp0hnasgb8a8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i62ob6c5h2bs)** And while you’re rushing that back, I must ask you to include a generous and tax-deductible donation of $28 to help me get 50,000 signed Personal Notes.I estimate it will cost $28,000 to print, mail, collect, and forward all 50,000 Personal Notes to Kari Lake’s office. Your $28 donation today will help us reach 16 more patriots for their signatures. And if you could send a larger donation today – such as $50, $100, $250, $500, or any amount that’s right for you – it will help us reach potentially hundreds of patriots! I know that not every person who signs their “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note will be able to give. It would take 1,000 patriots donating $28 to reach our goal. But your larger donation today will help us achieve it so much faster. And right now, Kari Lake is charging full steam ahead. She recently said the DOGE team members at the US Agency for Global Media are working 16-hour days.So she needs to know – right now – that you support her work and will stand with her no matter how difficult it gets. Thank you for your urgency.
---
For Truth,Floyd Brown
President, American Media Council
---
[ SIGN YOUR NOTE OF SUPPORT](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2znknlnsj5fqr1p7vme9vo69t8tqlku2hfv0cd24g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i62ob6c5h2bs)
---
P.S. Kari Lake is fighting in Washington to help President Trump and Elon Musk stop government handouts to left-wing media... but she needs your help. The radical left is attacking her at every turn. They’re using the left-wing media to spread lies about what she’s fighting for. Liberal politicians are using loopholes to shield their funding from getting cut. _And worst of all, rogue activist judges are launching lawfare against Kari to stop her from saving _your_ money._ Kari needs to know that she has an army of grassroots Americans supporting her efforts. That’s why I’ve set the goal of collecting 50,000 “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Notes to put on her desk, and I need your signature to be one of our first. **[Please, sign your “I STAND WITH KARI LAKE” Personal Note and rush it back along with a generous, tax-deductible donation of $28, $50, $100, $250, $500, or more today.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z34da949h560e293cldbmbatcvg05em8pam11cuo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i62ob6c5h2bs)** I know Kari will deeply appreciate your kindness and support.
---
| | **American Media Council** PO Box 96602 Washington D.C. 20090-6602
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zc4vasa1kc4ds4rqafr6hh4qtog5jmft3v81qh6g_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjklo72d1hekr76dtiesp7ad1hegqracjkmoq37djjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8ob2cdgmcor246h22sh2s8i6eob1c9i62ob6c5h2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zofbfokqm5s673ok9q9b8etqca5v0qu1av15ms2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i62ob6c5h2bs)_

[](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpclhrshvk220el27k9vdg9n4g38e9foojgt4nag_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28pr1c5h68ob1cpgm49fg)

name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: Republicans are trying to raise your taxes.
body:
Tariffs, Flat Income Tax, & A Bad Budget Resolution.

| | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us11.campaign-archive.com/?e=edbde6c9b1&u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=7fcfd93fee)
---
|
---
| Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate.
---
|
# Republicans are trying to raise your taxes.
---
| Trump put in place the largest tax increase on the American people late last week. At the same time, [Republicans in the House are approving budgets that will add $5 trillion to the deficit](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=716bc8b356&e=edbde6c9b1) and at our State House, [Republicans are debating ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0dcd256a7d&e=edbde6c9b1)[raising taxes for 60% of South Carolinians. ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=bef6d4cf79&e=edbde6c9b1)
This morning, Trump’s Trade Advisor Pete Navarro called the BMW plant in Spartanburg ["bad for our economics” despite BMW investing 14.8 billion since it came to Spartanburg in 1992.](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=994a35090c&e=edbde6c9b1)
It’s time for a Town Hall. And since our Congressman refuses to engage with his constituents, we’re honored to have Congressman Clyburn join us at Wofford on April 24.
---
[](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=19fa3f9462&e=edbde6c9b1)
| [Click here to watch my video outlining the Tariffs ](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6318719d68&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | South Carolina’s economy is built on the delicate equilibrium of international trade and domestic production. Trump is disrupting this successful balance — which could do anything and everything from raise prices, deter future investments, cause economic growth to suffer, reduce tax revenues, and cost hard-working South Carolinians their jobs.
Now is the time — speak up and run for something. If you're fed up with the people who are governing you, then change it. I'm hosting an info session **tomorrow** in Spartanburg, [join me](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=0848b950c6&e=edbde6c9b1) and let's do it together.
---
|
---
|
# Join us for an action-packed Spring!
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=c2520ddaf5&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | **So you want to run for office?****April 9th at 5:30pm at SPCDP HQ** Join Emerge South Carolina for an information session on what exactly it takes to run for office.
---
| [Click here to RSVP](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d2778699c1&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Town Hall with Rep. Clyburn****April 24th at Wofford College** Rep. Jim Clyburn is coming to the Upstate to host a Town Hall in lieu of our Republicans representatives refusing to hold one. Details are coming, please save the date.
---
| [More info to come!]()
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=996b0b139b&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | **A Candid Conversation****April 29th at 6pm Wofford College** Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster.
---
| [Click here to learn more](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d861f1abe9&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **Fight for Freedom Fundraiser****May 29th at 6pm, Chapman Center** Join us for a special evening featuring Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg Young Democrats and the SPCDP. The reception starts at 6:00 PM, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage.
---
| [Click here to buy a ticket](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=a50d2ce4a5&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
| [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=101904ffa4&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | **H.3927 (anti-DEI bill) Moves Forward to Senate**
* Last Wednesday, by a vote of 82-32, the House passed H.3927, sending it to the Senate to determine its fate. [**Check out ACLU SC**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=9d88fef64c&e=edbde6c9b1) for their excellent explanation of the bill's impact & what went down in the floor debate. Find out how to contact your state senators before it becomes state law [**HERE.**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=6242924ce8&e=edbde6c9b1)

**Republicans in the Statehouse want to Raise your Taxes**
* Last week, Republicans unveiled a ‘flat tax’ scheme that would raise state income taxes on 60% of South Carolinians. Led by Greenville’s Rep Bruce Bannister, the flat tax has stalled due to pushback this week, but they are determined to get it passed before the end of session. Let your reps hear from you NOW.

**House Debate on Paid Parental Leave**
* [**H. 3645**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=3e81273e87&e=edbde6c9b1) , a bill that would increase the number of weeks of paid parental leave from six to twelve for all state employees, heads to the House floor for debate. Urge your Representative to support H. 3645 and make paid family leave a priority. Click****[**here**](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=15dc2732c0&e=edbde6c9b1) to take action and help push this bill forward. Together, we can make 12 weeks of paid family leave a reality!

---
| | | | | | | | | | [](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=16c3417337&e=edbde6c9b1)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| **A Look into the Federal Budget**
* Republicans are divided on the budget approved in the **Senate** this past week. In a vote that ended early Saturday, Republicans hoped to leverage their position of power in Washington to enact as much as $7 trillion in tax breaks, boost border security for mass deportations and cut government funding — and do so “without one single Democratic vote,” said Sen. Lindsey Graham. Yet, debt is looming... Senator Rand Paul argued the budget plan would add $5 trillion to the debt over 10 years, echoing an assessment from the bipartisan Joint Committee on Taxation. [Learn more here](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=d11eb901b9&e=edbde6c9b1).

---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
| Y’all showed up on Saturday! Thank you to everyone who joined Resist Spartanburg at their Hands Off Protest in Downtown Spartanburg — there were over 300 protesters that showed up and stood up for what they believe in just Spartanburg alone. [We are making noise across the country and we can not stop now!](https://kathrynforcongress.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=25ba2d10590e10adb016803dc&id=866c72653d&e=edbde6c9b1)
Resist Spartanburg holds a protest EVERY first Saturday of the month at 180 Magnolia St. from 4-6pm. Please consider joining.
---
| This past Saturday in Columbia was a real treat! I had the opportunity to attend the first County Chair training since our county conventions. It was all about connection, collaboration, and strategizing on how to win up and down the ballot. Let’s do this!
---
|
---

clean_body: Tariffs, Flat Income Tax, & A Bad Budget Resolution. | | | | | | | | Welcome to Keeping Up with Kathryn Harvey. A weekly digest covering South Carolina politics and opportunities for engagement and action in the Upstate. | Republicans are trying to raise your taxes. | Trump put in place the largest tax increase on the American people late last week. At the same time, and at our State House, This morning, Trump’s Trade Advisor Pete Navarro called the BMW plant in Spartanburg It’s time for a Town Hall. And since our Congressman refuses to engage with his constituents, we’re honored to have Congressman Clyburn join us at Wofford on April 24. | | | | | | South Carolina’s economy is built on the delicate equilibrium of international trade and domestic production. Trump is disrupting this successful balance — which could do anything and everything from raise prices, deter future investments, cause economic growth to suffer, reduce tax revenues, and cost hard-working South Carolinians their jobs. Now is the time — speak up and run for something. If you're fed up with the people who are governing you, then change it. I'm hosting an info session tomorrow in Spartanburg, and let's do it together. | | Join us for an action-packed Spring! | | | | | | | | | | | | So you want to run for office?April 9th at 5:30pm at SPCDP HQ Join Emerge South Carolina for an information session on what exactly it takes to run for office. | | | | | | | | | | | | Town Hall with Rep. ClyburnApril 24th at Wofford College Rep. Jim Clyburn is coming to the Upstate to host a Town Hall in lieu of our Republicans representatives refusing to hold one. Details are coming, please save the date. | [More info to come!]() | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Candid ConversationApril 29th at 6pm Wofford College Join Trey Gowdy, political commentator and former Congressman for SC-04 and Bakari Sellers, political commentator and former SC Representative for HD 90 for a conversation moderated by Billy Webster. | | | | | | | | | | | | Fight for Freedom FundraiserMay 29th at 6pm, Chapman Center Join us for a special evening featuring Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee Three in support of the Spartanburg Young Democrats and the SPCDP. The reception starts at 6:00 PM, followed by a special program honoring our young change makers in the community and a keynote by Rep Justin J. Pearson of the Tennessee General Assembly at 7:00 PM. Tickets include food & beverage. | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | H.3927 (anti-DEI bill) Moves Forward to Senate Last Wednesday, by a vote of 82-32, the House passed H.3927, sending it to the Senate to determine its fate. for their excellent explanation of the bill's impact & what went down in the floor debate. Find out how to contact your state senators before it becomes state law Republicans in the Statehouse want to Raise your Taxes Last week, Republicans unveiled a ‘flat tax’ scheme that would raise state income taxes on 60% of South Carolinians. Led by Greenville’s Rep Bruce Bannister, the flat tax has stalled due to pushback this week, but they are determined to get it passed before the end of session. Let your reps hear from you NOW. House Debate on Paid Parental Leave , a bill that would increase the number of weeks of paid parental leave from six to twelve for all state employees, heads to the House floor for debate. Urge your Representative to support H. 3645 and make paid family leave a priority. Click to take action and help push this bill forward. Together, we can make 12 weeks of paid family leave a reality! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | A Look into the Federal Budget Republicans are divided on the budget approved in the Senate this past week. In a vote that ended early Saturday, Republicans hoped to leverage their position of power in Washington to enact as much as $7 trillion in tax breaks, boost border security for mass deportations and cut government funding — and do so “without one single Democratic vote,” said Sen. Lindsey Graham. Yet, debt is looming... Senator Rand Paul argued the budget plan would add $5 trillion to the debt over 10 years, echoing an assessment from the bipartisan Joint Committee on Taxation. . | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Y’all showed up on Saturday! Thank you to everyone who joined Resist Spartanburg at their Hands Off Protest in Downtown Spartanburg — there were over 300 protesters that showed up and stood up for what they believe in just Spartanburg alone. Resist Spartanburg holds a protest EVERY first Saturday of the month at 180 Magnolia St. from 4-6pm. Please consider joining. | This past Saturday in Columbia was a real treat! I had the opportunity to attend the first County Chair training since our county conventions. It was all about connection, collaboration, and strategizing on how to win up and down the ballot. Let’s do this! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | READ: Post & Courier: : Post & Courier: : Post & Courier: READ: OneSpartanburgInc: : SC Daily Gazette:: SC Daily Gazette: READ: BBC: : Greenville Online: : Teen Vogue: : ACLU SC: | | | | | | | | | | | | April 9 “So you want to run for office” with EMERGE SC. 14 Democratic Women of Greenville Monthly Meeting. name: Lindsey Graham
subject: ALERT: OFFICIAL MAGA ENDORSEMENT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
President Trump has officially ENDORSED my re-election to the United States Senate!

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zitdl8en4h2f1si4b4k6f1cc7d3nvfpcdb735638_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z32i84lolp0k5dfr077k6vum6ccd9l2l552gqeig_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)

Friend,

**[President Trump has officially ENDORSED my re-election to the United States Senate!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4pgpktij1s6khllgfnuv7qj7v9g4v46casnijf8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)**

Working with President Trump, we can change the course of history in ways very few have dreamed of -- and I am so excited for what we will accomplish. What President Trump is doing to make America strong and prosperous will benefit the entire world. Representing South Carolina has been - and will continue to be - the honor of a lifetime. With President Trump by my side, South Carolina and America's greatest days are ahead!

******************************************************[JOIN TEAM GRAHAM!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z4loek0fb4henal3v5dcatv6hn52q8iliosb24eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)******************************************************

**_[President Trump understands just how critical the 2026 election is.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zttk6m96gn9todn0hb5c44ndg7onj58cqip8old0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)_** With so much on the line to protect our Republican majority in the Senate, we need the unwavering support of every conservative grassroots supporter to ensure South Carolina remains in Republican hands.

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zj9kj8a9glmpioshnc2lpabc8sh7nvd3j06mlt2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)

Friend, President Trump has endorsed my re-election, and now, I hope you will join him in supporting me. **[Can I count on you to make a campaign contribution and join Team Graham today?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z2mu0jedclqhj5pidcb2ph732kmfc4rpkkipg0h8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)**

******************************************************[GIVE YOUR OFFICIAL ENDORSEMENT>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z03386oie9488hh3t7n2sdea7i3ti8h8tb6sele0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)******************************************************

Sincerely,
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3qfhhigu75n27cjacbt5ksa2cqr4pjfi3oah5q8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)
Lindsey Graham

******************************************************[JOIN TEAM GRAHAM!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqds3c98cbdtrjg1ie2nsefbsfsoq7a9d8di29io_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i66oj6cjh2bs)******************************************************

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Revelation was written as a blessing for you
body:
End-time resources you can’t miss!
Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return?
| | | [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee498bb8326a48558fb9ac225361b46b&_e=L6w2ncdCQOIoyF_g40UKuuvan9BERQeUxmfdtLJOv3zBrvqfWxhhZOnHzCx6mddLiDskM0sjBJQneIjVne4XNhYP0-0KlwQWqGuE5D-94Ss76piA-B6SLlXYphGA6TEtbXqG7cRZvE5JeFF-sjIxBft7ECtYu1v-x-EiXxpZitwbVvzv9BPJJmbp05BAlS1mc4ztOLGJfNQKMN5oQ3UCzCvdg3bh8RNZCiclCnPjYx7PF-tc9aMNyDLnyEToebMGUpyBji3qN8avFnD7ntqoDMH-sLOGesp6zLkv3lW55vWuQUKoE7jUSTRXL9w4f1WdWDqfOx-EKrA10WfNzF32G-w3zkYG8yTmpClgDqE6I9DX26QkRfE8JglDZLfT7tYFH6srhuNfy88qA7xQF05DWA%3D%3D)
---
Hello Fellow Christian, Do you ever despair that Jesus will never return? _When we all get to Heaven, what a day of rejoicing that will be!_ _When we all see Jesus, we’ll sing and shout the victory!_ The words of this old hymn say it perfectly ... Christ’s return is going to be glorious! **But between now and then, how should we live**? What does God’s Word say about end times? As the world grows increasingly sinful ... **what should our response be?**
---
| | When I have those kinds of questions, I turn to the book of Revelation, which I’ve found helps provide answers and strength in these dark days. And today, I’m pleased to offer you my verse-by-verse study of the book of Revelation entitled _Final Conquest._ Final Conquest is my first commentary on the book of Revelation. It’s all about the return of Jesus Christ, the most hope-filled event in human history. This book will help you face the future with confidence! God doesn’t want you to live in fear. Final Conquest will unpack God’s plan as never before — you’ll be encouraged!
---
| [](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee498bb8326a48558fb9ac225361b46b&_e=L6w2ncdCQOIoyF_g40UKuuvan9BERQeUxmfdtLJOv3zBrvqfWxhhZOnHzCx6mddLiDskM0sjBJQneIjVne4XNhYP0-0KlwQWqGuE5D-94Ss76piA-B6SLlXYphGA6TEtbXqG7cRZvE5JeFF-sjIxBft7ECtYu1v-x-EiXxpZitwbVvzv9BPJJmbp05BAlS1mc4ztOLGJfNQKMN5oQ3UCzCvdg3bh8RNZCiclCnPjYx4dU1YxxQeb2aC945uU9MANLB3A4NfBH74fUN-EQE74NL6PjGEFHQEq2V8TmrhfOuen17fw8iXCNUHos4HzjHzyHE5ffX2RwAsIzZCQAbkXhqX2lBXkPI9k_0o_WYHy9XjMjsKHUUyGO6c0rP_sOspLMyzicjSEh6cxsUgWZQaDMg%3D%3D)
---
| | With your generous donation to _Pathway to Victory_ \-- to help keep our ministry strong, for you and your family, and for listeners and viewers across the country--I will send you a copy of _Final Conquest_ for free! You can make your most generous donation here: [https://secure.ptv.org/final-conquest-generous-gift-kit-1](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=ee498bb8326a48558fb9ac225361b46b&_e=L6w2ncdCQOIoyF_g40UKuuvan9BERQeUxmfdtLJOv3zBrvqfWxhhZOnHzCx6mddLiDskM0sjBJQneIjVne4XNhYP0-0KlwQWqGuE5D-94Ss76piA-B6SLlXYphGA6TEtbXqG7cRZvE5JeFF-sjIxBft7ECtYu1v-x-EiXxpZitwbVvzv9BPJJmbp05BAlS1mc4ztOLGJfNQKMN5oQ3UCzCvdg3bh8RNZCiclCnPjYx6jmb22huw15dsp8s7hbGIpofH1lUcydxwmfK5J_qKXlm5CwCDbhsAhiMxPwZP4Pe4oLhD9K4iGgS1UWgynENutoac9sXO9-Mp6HRO7G-8uQjdvQn4NWQ9hdEdoYleRDGdcKQqvKHeLIBdFzWEW5hsKSFh0D2MidmsPb_T54ypsKQ%3D%3D) One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

You can make your most generous donation here: One day soon the darkness will pass...and our long-awaited King of kings and Lord of lords will return and make His final conquest. Until that moment, we are focusing our hope on Christ and working together to proclaim the gospel and expand His coming kingdom. Sincerely, Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas

body:
President Trump has officially ENDORSED my re-election to the United States Senate!

[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zpaq7u7b6aqhtqfghdcrq13ht3epf91rpc1d4mvg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs)

Friend,

**[President Trump has officially ENDORSED my re-election to the United States Senate!](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zttgd8rgoh7t7vuntsd0q1j5c4oj5dsl4o4941a0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs)**

Working with President Trump, we can change the course of history in ways very few have dreamed of -- and I am so excited for what we will accomplish. What President Trump is doing to make America strong and prosperous will benefit the entire world. Representing South Carolina has been - and will continue to be - the honor of a lifetime. With President Trump by my side, South Carolina and America's greatest days are ahead!

******************************************************[JOIN TEAM GRAHAM!](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zvt2h7lalkm6dpgfj7as7q2ftkvdlh6usr2q93n8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs)******************************************************

**_[President Trump understands just how critical the 2026 election is.](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zsc0cfgn1cpho09jc13bpk3joiruuorjcc0rvf3o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs)_** With so much on the line to protect our Republican majority in the Senate, we need the unwavering support of every conservative grassroots supporter to ensure South Carolina remains in Republican hands.

[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z44ufvlvtqrkikdbt4kearrc1fgft3drh2cvgqsg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs)

Friend, President Trump has endorsed my re-election, and now, I hope you will join him in supporting me. **[Can I count on you to make a campaign contribution and join Team Graham today?](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z0po3qgttpvll3h9tmaaof8vnn2ie0vi7cv38a7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs)**

Sincerely,

name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zoq681gupu503m14f5fro002o9lh1s9ln2opb6ng_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zaijgtnepigvip538du5cpe2dv7suimsnn0r13eo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z4dc870a4m2ggv922osmhbkpbl8m7lbcmqrpu0r8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvanlrif2bf4ekagh863hntl32t206up7aja1ld0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlqauuejur4pp1cps3nfmvolj5brob76evt4ndk0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zodvft0isgoqatdhv8c0djl67sedha9qahrij338_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrg4tobpebu3fahqe384q8vt25obbli6en375fcg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zel78g2id141d3mpl6d2ilicungccg7b500e90kg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zf55isthn3v7se31ud1jmobk6vpj9f5p6g2h8qlg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z85nou9h4k0gtk7t5ssvm1qv3nuc4va6t3o84900_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o34chh2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!

You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love. > We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals! There are no two ways about it. George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law. We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.And we only have 20 months to do it. On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.** And we would be honored to have you by our side.
