name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world –warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zfat36a270g3kku68vuvvj50imprtp5p89ik18so_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zc9m9pk2mg2njh9b7q3v8pdoojvr8kiar4s2lj0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zh2qds7v0s25lf1s93tdj33pado25vtul5d1ntu8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z869hkg61o7fn57qogrv3636tachkc9c69lrrc38_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z9mo6na5s6pv4q7o4a2r1bai8qcs8pm3g50ac33g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zce8clqau5qpkv9es0pj92mj48lgq593dqpad2dg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgt349aefnlq7srbnvmfjp31gbka4okdfjahcj80_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "PLEASE JOIN US")
---

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2ziv7vlpls7c93rkopoq67p1s68vur01jplpga42o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z8oitc49j0jupc394g486ekhn2lfnumqlvtlosa0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.
---
| | | [CLICK TO BEGIN](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zo2ntl2m8jkbrrlr6hnm52c0gqga65ai3o9bcr78_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61o30c3h2bs "CLICK TO BEGIN")
---

THE Church of England’s education office, the National Society, has updated its recent anti-bullying guidance for church schools to include a section on preventing and tackling race-based bullying in schools. name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
You’re one of America’s most informed seniors

| |
---
| | I’m writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6kmrbqqeqim3gv7j3pb40kjt6bnl8ded57asm60_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot,Today –- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message – will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zk1l027ulsg8raer0ifdptcjjpom72a7ols9g32o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs) ** You’re one of America’s most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system.And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal.>> George Soros’ push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York’s horrible Letitia James who’s now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants.It’s their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros’ native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the “Stop Soros Law.”The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn’t drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens.That’s exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It’s why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive – and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ziienk2qcqlngkk7qf53abqcgg806n01p5uv1b0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z39dksg4cg6f1qcocd88kjd0ileqh0llsqpv3vo8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we!After the “Stop Soros Law” passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted.And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...****...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did.**_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we’ll lose the House or the Senate –- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now.Great change comes from embracing great opportunities – and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zeg4gdt47vvoo1n7itv72cu7v33g5h5h2105mp00_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs) ****My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I’m the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** “AMAC” stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, “action” is what we’re known for.**With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we’re fighting against George Soros not alongside him.You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of “climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom” and their mission is “justice and equity.”You know that’s just globalist speak for ‘destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.’And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of “America’s Greatest Innovators” who’s**** “changing the world, $100 million at a time.” It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it’s under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation.But today, I’m not writing to those seniors. **[I’m writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z27lm20s4rk37nuhnmesvl7kqc3iuqj7nh68nmh0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs) **If the AARP wants to betray America’s seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ****And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we’ll need in the next 20 months.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znfr2mjqqbejb3vgnjl9vp93c62t1po7auva08mo_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn’t take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we’re certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation.Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America.We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you’re able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it.**[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4luu2i4stn507svqrdotm7439ree0q082eo1s9o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs) **Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrnvk3bs6pn4gi3asfj3g0sjkdmreshisecbiftg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a “Stop Soros Law” and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z61hfjcjearmhr5644r5m8hjrhkaj54inqu765pg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zu9sui30usl2o6oktiv8dv0jln3v0juejunfhc9g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zioj9afek7opt7l5i0o2ojrc963gmtp7a6di2m2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4kdal46tkadrb9nvdqiphtofkfchofsi07h1840_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9i61p74cjh2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---

Jasmine Crockett (D-TX) be the "faces" of the Democratic Party is a good idea, but whoever it is must be working for the Republicans. The more these two show their faces with their silly comments, the more people reject Democrats as [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/3XcwPo4qCac92Shop1wNda4xxaRztW84ExAVTw9tQoDq05gWTtVqKKr1T0zGuhrTYBWeuiQGIn3XFKhb3Zn2f3Gj9aaNiVrGPAN0K2uV6r16vGAoc-QjxI3G3_XZLMCAOv8mEFGmbrw7eZxW0wFDmu1z90v-mK_l9HG_ErJI8ym9ptyhv1Y611UGUIYCDfVwUL_WIVRvcbLf7Mg7WKdzYNKTPfAbZiZ5D3oh9gCH1FVxa6WM2EKsSrVuFPWHroxG1yKodCh2h4qrMrZmCvWhB448yYO49iG4XjtdzG7-Ch6Poh0RgCh1ms5e7tvJeW_iBJUEh3YlZ_8Vs4-Ef3f5vOoXuIMJ9_8LLDUrRL6hYGgT-QNL7Av3BJowMMKUnSLXYg_4zTLbUWCPF2eeyIH4-Zd47i3JzA/pf6XekrcerFFWDX7jNaoGNfRPTjD2iGl/7)

---

Republican Sen. John Kennedy made a pro-abortion Democrat lawyer, Hampton Y. Dellinger, **[nearly wet himself during questioning](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc57316-8bbb-4ea4-aff7-6fbb7babb438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by exposing his shocking past tweets in front of the nation.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc57316-8bbb-4ea4-aff7-6fbb7babb438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I wanna read you a tweet," Kennedy told Dellinger. "'There are some women GOPers and a tiny number of Democrats who want government, not women, to control women's bodies. But if there were not Republican men in office there would be no abortion bans,...' did you write that?!"
"Senator I cannot speak to that..." a nervous Dellinger replied.
"Then why did you say it?!! In front of God and country?!!" Kennedy shouted. "You said every Republican, except the ones that you like, have their position on abortion because they're misogynistic!"
**[Watch the anxious Democrat realize he is absolutely screwed:](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc57316-8bbb-4ea4-aff7-6fbb7babb438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/bcc57316-8bbb-4ea4-aff7-6fbb7babb438?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By Mode Mobile](https://substack.com/redirect/7d0e7259-13af-484b-86bd-faef82624764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Elon Musk Dreams, Mode Mobile Delivers**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d0e7259-13af-484b-86bd-faef82624764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As Elon Musk puts it, "Apple used to really bring out products that would blow people's minds." Those days are long gone, and a new smartphone company is stepping up to deliver the mind-blowing moments we've been missing. **[They've just been granted the stock ticker $MODE](https://substack.com/redirect/7d0e7259-13af-484b-86bd-faef82624764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by the Nasdaq, and you can still make an investment in their pre-IPO offering.
Turning smartphones from an expense into an income stream, Mode has already **[helped users earn and save an eye-popping $325M+](https://substack.com/redirect/7d0e7259-13af-484b-86bd-faef82624764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and seen an astonishing 32,481% revenue growth rate over three years. Uber did it to taxis, Airbnb did it to hotels...And now, Mode Mobile is doing it to the $1 trillion smartphone industry.
Don't miss your chance to invest in the next big disruption to smartphones. **[Join 30,000+ shareholders and invest at $0.26/share today.](https://substack.com/redirect/7d0e7259-13af-484b-86bd-faef82624764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/7d0e7259-13af-484b-86bd-faef82624764?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Republican brawler Markwayne Mullin CALLS OUT Jake Tapper's crap right to his face on CNN**
GOP Senator Markwayne Mullin **[refused to let CNN's Jake Tapper continue](https://substack.com/redirect/c737ad5a-2c43-4a21-b5e0-2f7cde7fdb4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to exaggerate and fear monger about President Trump's reciprocal tariff plan during a tense live interview.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c737ad5a-2c43-4a21-b5e0-2f7cde7fdb4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c737ad5a-2c43-4a21-b5e0-2f7cde7fdb4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"The truth is, these countries need us more than we need them!" Mullin told tapper. "If we are ever going to right this ship, this is the time to do it!"
"You know it's not just Democrats criticizing Trump on this," Tapper said, pulling up a clip of conservative commentator Ben Shapiro blasting Trump's tariffs as "a massive tax increase on American consumers."
**[Mullin assured Tapper](https://substack.com/redirect/c737ad5a-2c43-4a21-b5e0-2f7cde7fdb4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that a tax hike will not be the effect of the tariffs and that he trusts Trump to do right by the American people. "We're not going to be talking about this in 90 days. What we're going to be talking about is how many manufacturing jobs are coming back to the United States!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c737ad5a-2c43-4a21-b5e0-2f7cde7fdb4c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# DOGE crashes Democrat protest in Washington D.C., What happens next is disturbing...
Watch PolitiBrawl editor Matt Miller **[crash a massive anti-Trump protest](https://substack.com/redirect/c8465f66-aaff-4142-a980-450da2f29fa1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in Washington D.C. while dressed as a DOGE officer. "Is it fair for the taxpayer to want to eliminate fraud, waste and abuse in government?"
It did not go over well...

Friend, there's no way around it: **Donald Trump, Elon Musk and DOGE are coming after Social Security. **
This administration simply does not understand or appreciate the importance of this critical program.

Elon Musk recently called Social Security "the biggest Ponzi scheme of all time."
Howard Lutnick – Trump's commerce secretary and a _billionaire_ himself – recently said in an interview that if his mother missed a monthly Social Security check, she wouldn't complain. And that if someone in a situation like that _did_ complain, they're probably a "fraudster."
Let’s get serious: Contrary to what these guys say, Social Security is a bedrock of our society. The extent to which the Trump administration seems to be completely out of touch with the day-to-day realities of American life is absolutely astounding. They're either out of touch, or they simply don't care.
In any case, this much is clear: Trump, Musk and Republicans are not eliminating government waste. They are slashing and burning whatever they see. Often without even understanding whom they are firing. They're gutting crucial programs like Social Security to make way for another massive tax break for billionaires – all while the American people pay the price.
**Cuts to Social Security will cause real and lasting harm for millions of seniors. It's reckless. It's utter incompetence. It's a travesty and a tragedy. That's why we need to send a loud and clear message that the American people will not stand for it.**
**[Can I count on you to join me in speaking out against Trump, Musk and the Republicans who are trying to gut Social Security? Peter, I’m Wiley Nickel — and today, I’m announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate. I learned from my dad that when times are tough, you don’t back down — you dig in and fight harder. **And let’s be honest: North Carolina needs that kind of fighter right now.** The truth is, everyday North Carolina families are fed up and sick of politics. Fed up with a system that bends to Donald Trump and billionaires like Elon Musk and lets politicians like Thom Tillis skate by — while rigging the system to take away our rights, gut Social Security, and line their own pockets at our expense. **Washington’s been playing it safe for too long, and it’s not working.** Tillis won’t stand up to extremism — he does what he’s told by Republican leadership, no matter how much it hurts our state. I’m not here to protect the status quo. I can’t be bought, and I’ve never backed down from a tough fight — not when I worked as a White House staffer for President Obama, not when I won a tough Congressional seat, and not when I stood up for affordable healthcare and voting rights here in North Carolina. **I will always fight for what’s right — especially when the odds are stacked against us and the going gets tough.** This campaign is about delivering to North Carolina the leadership we deserve with real backbone to the Senate. I’m ready to take the tough votes and stand firm for our values. But I can’t do it alone, Peter. **We’re up against deep pockets and out-of-touch billionaires, including Elon Musk and mysterious unnamed super PACs who think they can buy this race. We need to build a people-powered movement to prove them wrong.** **[Will you be one of the first to join our fight? Here's a story you won't find in corporate media, and one the current regime will likely try to wipe from our history books. That's why it is that much more critical we preserve and document this history.
On April 9, 1865, exactly 160 years ago today, the Civil War ended. Sadly our country has returned to a point of Constitutional crisis and corruption that threatens to undermine our very Republic. But I believe in maintaining hope for a more perfect Union.
And to do that, today I share an inspiring story about the power of unity. A story that took place during the Civil War. The story of Private Mohammed Kahn, also known as John Ammahail, a Muslim immigrant and Civil War hero. At a time of rising anti-Black violence, anti-immigrant fascism, and anti-Muslim hate--Kahn's story rebukes such division and discord, and instead exemplifies the beauty of what this country can be. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sWMk2O-GlkqMQjSkcneqUGDTrOjL5hg8OuVJ7t0AnMw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160909138)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fcc761a9-6120-4cc4-b8f8-8c9ed10e9c89?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Private Mohammed Khan [PBS]
## Who was Mohammed Kahn?
Born in Persia, modern day Iran, in or around 1830, Mohammed Kahn was raised in modern day Afghanistan. He immigrated to the United States in early 1861, during the period of antebellum America. Also known as John Ammahail, Kahn quickly made friends upon arrival. Only two months after his arrival, the Civil War broke out in April of 1861. After a night out with his friends, Mohammed Kahn became Private Mohammed Kahn when he enlisted with his friends in the 43rd New York Infantry Regiment. The 43rd New York Infantry Regiment was an all white unit. Kahn was a person of color, yet evidently passed as "white enough."
This is where his story truly begins and becomes history.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/19cdff24-a0e5-4436-aebf-94c381d8b8f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Private Mohammed Khan's pension application. [National Archives]
## The Immigrant Muslim Enlists in the Union Army
Khan spent the first two years of the Civil War as a cook serving the Union Army. That all changed in July of 1863 when Private Kahn fought in the infamous Battle of Gettysburg. Mere days after the battle and due to the ensuing chaos, he was unfortunately separated from his unit. As he was not white, the Union guards who found him arrested him in Hagerstown, Maryland, and brought him before the Provost Marshall's headquarters to explain himself.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/64fc2fc0-854b-4e0b-991d-342f6a7bd89c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Battle of Gettysburg (1863), lithograph by Currier & Ives. Credit: Library of Congress, Washington, D.C. (LC-USZC4-2088)
Despite his best efforts, and perhaps due to his limited proficiency in English, Kahn was unable to convince the Union Army that he himself was in fact part of the Union Army, and part of the all white New York's 43rd Infantry. But because he was of color, and described as having dark complexion, and even though he had just fought in one of American history's most famous battles to end the scourge of slavery and white supremacy in America, they believed he could not be part of the white unit. Therefore, the Union Army held Private Kahn under military arrest.
As punishment, Kahn was sent to Philadelphia and put to work in a labor camp with recently escaped enslaved people. He spent the next ten months trying to find anyone who could vouch for him, reunite him with his New York 43rd, or even a member of the New York 43rd--but to no avail.
**If you find value in these critical updates that corporate media ignores, join our movement for justice and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..sWMk2O-GlkqMQjSkcneqUGDTrOjL5hg8OuVJ7t0AnMw?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=160909138)
## Private Kahn Escapes A Union Prison Camp
All that changed 10 months later in May of 1864. The Battle of the Wilderness was set to begin in Fredericksburg, Virginia between General Grant's Union Army and General Lee's Confederate Rebellion Army. Private Kahn, having learned that the 14th New York Infantry was taking a train down to partake in that battle, devised a remarkable plan. In his time in what was effectively a slave labor camp, Kahn had befriended an enslaved person, and conceived the plan with his support. His friend was tasked with distracting the prison guard, while Kahn prepared his escape. Kahn waited patiently and timed his escape with the departing train, and took off on foot.
Running as fast as he could, Kahn chased after the train at the Philadelphia station, and jumped on to it at the last possible moment before it was going too fast to catch on foot. By the time the prison guard realized what happened, it was too late. Kahn was already out of their grasp and on a train headed back into battle. As Kahn hoped, he found and remained with the 14th New York Infantry on this trip, that is, until Washington DC. From here, and with no meaningful provisions, he traveled nearly 70 miles by foot down to Spotsylvania, Virginia by following other squadrons.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2bb4d31b-d551-47ea-830d-0bc2fed54bd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The Battle of the Wilderness marked the first stage of a major Union offensive toward the Confederate capital of Richmond. Credit: History.com Getty Images
## Immigrant, Muslim, American, Civil War Hero
Private Kahn arrived at the Battle of the Wilderness on May 7, 1864, which was the last day of the battle. He remarkably found and was reunited with his 43rd infantry unit. Joining his brothers once more, Kahn reengaged his service and fight to help the Union Army win. Yet, only 15 minutes into the battle he was wounded with a gunshot to his left hand.
Kahn, an immigrant who arrived in the United States just months before the Civil War broke out, had now served as a cook, fought in the Battle of Gettysburg, suffered 10 months in a prison camp, escaped and found a miraculous way to reunite with his Unit, fought in another battle, and suffered a major injury. But at every obstacle that he could have used as an excuse to quit, he seized as an opportunity to fight onwards. This time was no different. Thus, far from using this injury as an excuse to exit the Civil War, and he certainly would have been justified, Kahn persisted.
Undeterred, he refused to leave the war, and took the time to heal. And after his hand healed, Private Kahn returned once more to the theatre of war, this time as a sharpshooter. Private Kahn would then serve through almost the entirety of the Civil War until it ended the following year on April 9, 1865, exactly 160 years ago today.
## The Legacy of Civil War Hero Mohammed Kahn
Private Mohammed Kahn was one of only 250 Muslim soldiers who fought in the Civil War. His story is even more unique, however, as he fought in the famous Battle of Gettysburg, is believed to be one of only two Muslim soldiers who received a pension, and may be the only Muslim soldier who was also an immigrant.
Private Kahn's pension application records in detail the battles in which he fought, the injuries he suffered, and the duties he performed both as a cook and as a soldier. Private Mohammed Kahn died on May 26, 1891 in Manhattan, New York. He was buried at Cypress Hills National Cemetery in Brooklyn, Kings County. His burial plot is 2, 5009. Pictured here is his gravestone.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7db037ae-d17b-46eb-a9d7-dbbd0e0e5c40?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Private Mohammed Khan's gravestone at Cypress Hills National Cemetery in Brooklyn, Kings County
## Conclusion
I first learned about Mohammed Kahn while researching for an opinion editorial on the vast contributions of Muslim Americans to our nation's history. Contrary to the popular perception that Muslims or Islam are new to America, Muslims have thrived in America since before America even existed, and have fought to defend this nation in every battle since the Revolutionary War, and to expand national participation in democracy.
Private Mohammed Kahn's story is about that power of perseverance to overcome obstacles, the power of good to conquer hate, and the power of justice to conquer injustice. And while this article is a heavily summarized story of his life, remarkably, there are no books on Private Mohammed Kahn. Meanwhile, his full and complete 209 page pension is preserved in the [US Government National Archives](https://substack.com/redirect/03f1341a-3f57-4d08-b0fc-d53a1abc903e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--which fortunately so far has not been removed by the current regime. Given the opportunity, perhaps I'll take the initiative to write this much needed book about a critical and precious story of American history.
For now, I hope you found value in this inspiring story of Private Mohammed Kahn, a hero of the American Civil War. Let this be a reminder that our nation has always strived towards justice when we embraced diversity, immigrants, religious pluralism, and the relentless fight to expand equal justice under the Constitution. Let us work with the same zeal for justice today in 2025, as Civil War hero Private Mohammed Khan did for our country in 1865.

clean_body: On the 160 year anniversary of the end of the Civil War, read this iconic story of an American Muslim Civil War hero (before it's wiped from our history books) | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? Thank you for being an awesome subscriber! When possible, I hope you'll consider upgrading to a $6/mo or $50/year subscription! On the 160 year anniversary of the end of the Civil War, read this iconic story of an American Muslim Civil War hero (before it's wiped from our history books) | | | Apr 9 | | | | | | | | | | | | Here's a story you won't find in corporate media, and one the current regime will likely try to wipe from our history books. That's why it is that much more critical we preserve and document this history. On April 9, 1865, exactly 160 years ago today, the Civil War ended. Sadly our country has returned to a point of Constitutional crisis and corruption that threatens to undermine our very Republic. But I believe in maintaining hope for a more perfect Union. And to do that, today I share an inspiring story about the power of unity. A story that took place during the Civil War. The story of Private Mohammed Kahn, also known as John Ammahail, a Muslim immigrant and Civil War hero. At a time of rising anti-Black violence, anti-immigrant fascism, and anti-Muslim hate--Kahn's story rebukes such division and discord, and instead exemplifies the beauty of what this country can be. Let 's Address This. I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. | | ---|---|--- Private Mohammed Khan [PBS] Who was Mohammed Kahn? Born in Persia, modern day Iran, in or around 1830, Mohammed Kahn was raised in modern day Afghanistan. He immigrated to the United States in early 1861, during the period of antebellum America. Also known as John Ammahail, Kahn quickly made friends upon arrival. Only two months after his arrival, the Civil War broke out in April of 1861. After a night out with his friends, Mohammed Kahn became Private Mohammed Kahn when he enlisted with his friends in the 43rd New York Infantry Regiment. The 43rd New York Infantry Regiment was an all white unit. Kahn was a person of color, yet evidently passed as "white enough." This is where his story truly begins and becomes history. | | ---|---|--- Private Mohammed Khan's pension application. [National Archives] The Immigrant Muslim Enlists in the Union Army Khan spent the first two years of the Civil War as a cook serving the Union Army. That all changed in July of 1863 when Private Kahn fought in the infamous Battle of Gettysburg. Mere days after the battle and due to the ensuing chaos, he was unfortunately separated from his unit. As he was not white, the Union guards who found him arrested him in Hagerstown, Maryland, and brought him before the Provost Marshall's headquarters to explain himself. | | ---|---|--- The Battle of Gettysburg (1863), lithograph by Currier & Ives. Credit: Library of Congress, Washington, D.C. (LC-USZC4-2088) Despite his best efforts, and perhaps due to his limited proficiency in English, Kahn was unable to convince the Union Army that he himself was in fact part of the Union Army, and part of the all white New York's 43rd Infantry. But because he was of color, and described as having dark complexion, and even though he had just fought in one of American history's most famous battles to end the scourge of slavery and white supremacy in America, they believed he could not be part of the white unit. Therefore, the Union Army held Private Kahn under military arrest. As punishment, Kahn was sent to Philadelphia and put to work in a labor camp with recently escaped enslaved people. He spent the next ten months trying to find anyone who could vouch for him, reunite him with his New York 43rd, or even a member of the New York 43rd--but to no avail. If you find value in these critical updates that corporate media ignores, join our movement for justice and subscribe. Private Kahn Escapes A Union Prison Camp All that changed 10 months later in May of 1864. The Battle of the Wilderness was set to begin in Fredericksburg, Virginia between General Grant's Union Army and General Lee's Confederate Rebellion Army. Private Kahn, having learned that the 14th New York Infantry was taking a train down to partake in that battle, devised a remarkable plan. In his time in what was effectively a slave labor camp, Kahn had befriended an enslaved person, and conceived the plan with his support. His friend was tasked with distracting the prison guard, while Kahn prepared his escape. Kahn waited patiently and timed his escape with the departing train, and took off on foot. Running as fast as he could, Kahn chased after the train at the Philadelphia station, and jumped on to it at the last possible moment before it was going too fast to catch on foot. By the time the prison guard realized what happened, it was too late. Kahn was already out of their grasp and on a train headed back into battle. As Kahn hoped, he found and remained with the 14th New York Infantry on this trip, that is, until Washington DC. From here, and with no meaningful provisions, he traveled nearly 70 miles by foot down to Spotsylvania, Virginia by following other squadrons. | | ---|---|--- The Battle of the Wilderness marked the first stage of a major Union offensive toward the Confederate capital of Richmond. Credit: History.com Getty Images Immigrant, Muslim, American, Civil War Hero Private Kahn arrived at the Battle of the Wilderness on May 7, 1864, which was the last day of the battle. He remarkably found and was reunited with his 43rd infantry unit. Joining his brothers once more, Kahn reengaged his service and fight to help the Union Army win. Yet, only 15 minutes into the battle he was wounded with a gunshot to his left hand. Kahn, an immigrant who arrived in the United States just months before the Civil War broke out, had now served as a cook, fought in the Battle of Gettysburg, suffered 10 months in a prison camp, escaped and found a miraculous way to reunite with his Unit, fought in another battle, and suffered a major injury. But at every obstacle that he could have used as an excuse to quit, he seized as an opportunity to fight onwards. This time was no different. Thus, far from using this injury as an excuse to exit the Civil War, and he certainly would have been justified, Kahn persisted. Undeterred, he refused to leave the war, and took the time to heal. And after his hand healed, Private Kahn returned once more to the theatre of war, this time as a sharpshooter. Private Kahn would then serve through almost the entirety of the Civil War until it ended the following year on April 9, 1865, exactly 160 years ago today. The Legacy of Civil War Hero Mohammed Kahn Private Mohammed Kahn was one of only 250 Muslim soldiers who fought in the Civil War. His story is even more unique, however, as he fought in the famous Battle of Gettysburg, is believed to be one of only two Muslim soldiers who received a pension, and may be the only Muslim soldier who was also an immigrant. Private Kahn's pension application records in detail the battles in which he fought, the injuries he suffered, and the duties he performed both as a cook and as a soldier. Private Mohammed Kahn died on May 26, 1891 in Manhattan, New York. He was buried at Cypress Hills National Cemetery in Brooklyn, Kings County. His burial plot is 2, 5009. Pictured here is his gravestone. | | ---|---|--- Private Mohammed Khan's gravestone at Cypress Hills National Cemetery in Brooklyn, Kings County Conclusion I first learned about Mohammed Kahn while researching for an opinion editorial on the vast contributions of Muslim Americans to our nation's history. Contrary to the popular perception that Muslims or Islam are new to America, Muslims have thrived in America since before America even existed, and have fought to defend this nation in every battle since the Revolutionary War, and to expand national participation in democracy. Private Mohammed Kahn's story is about that power of perseverance to overcome obstacles, the power of good to conquer hate, and the power of justice to conquer injustice. And while this article is a heavily summarized story of his life, remarkably, there are no books on Private Mohammed Kahn. Meanwhile, his full and complete 209 page pension is preserved in the fortunately so far has not been removed by the current regime. Given the opportunity, perhaps I'll take the initiative to write this much needed book about a critical and precious story of American history. For now, I hope you found value in this inspiring story of Private Mohammed Kahn, a hero of the American Civil War. Let this be a reminder that our nation has always strived towards justice when we embraced diversity, immigrants, religious pluralism, and the relentless fight to expand equal justice under the Constitution. Let us work with the same zeal for justice today in 2025, as Civil War hero Private Mohammed Khan did for our country in 1865. **## [Stop Religious Discrimination Against Faith-Based Charter Schools](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c6a3ebcb0144a2a9ee7be62903fabfc&_e=GrlR-W_w8IFMcK2uk52m0oEmBHlyvVJBna1kbDvbfpvp4Ygy3nnjSj9Z1uK8uAxUJdLhXbsWm6tlLN7nHTC60IAYS-84_Fo8S8v7bOSy2X8s1HVRG-Ov7amWVFzdQTct0U1ukIPLyoUoRgpBJT0tET0H8PlkeoMP5qITSMz3VLc4JjHOOFmG5TptePnxMyYxshP8oQPqLdfa97QgeHrZSlZn2w3w3KImuJ9f6lqti72w16hqKVoV6ps1txSq24fbM1SJCo4gjLKgehBZ8PKflPWDU-c3JXJTjxZoT8-z6qYZ7Fc7K-tH9ihwNrcZbb-k0SXrwteHf0Ok9LbP0OQSAwv2E3lKyRFUkMvnKRhOOaN0L3xje7Hg7grdalti5O6r)** Oklahoma actively discriminates against religion in its charter-school program.

St. Isidore of Seville Catholic Virtual School wants to be part of Oklahoma's charter-school program, and they're just as qualified as any non-religious charter school.

But because St. Isidore is religious, Oklahoma's Attorney General sued to force the Board to cancel St. Isidore's contract after the Board accepted its application. And the Oklahoma Supreme Court sided with the Attorney General.

That's why we're proud to defend the Board all the way to the Supreme Court.

We'll argue _Oklahoma Statewide Charter School Board v. Drummond_ this spring.

We're standing up to religious discrimination in Oklahoma to protect religious freedom in states across the country.

And we'd love for you to join us.
[ Give Now ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=7c6a3ebcb0144a2a9ee7be62903fabfc&_e=GrlR-W_w8IFMcK2uk52m0oEmBHlyvVJBna1kbDvbfpvp4Ygy3nnjSj9Z1uK8uAxUJdLhXbsWm6tlLN7nHTC60IAYS-84_Fo8S8v7bOSy2X8s1HVRG-Ov7amWVFzdQTct0U1ukIPLyoUoRgpBJT0tET0H8PlkeoMP5qITSMz3VLc4JjHOOFmG5TptePnxMyYxshP8oQPqLdfa97QgeHrZSlZn2w3w3KImuJ9f6lqti71wm-nDHhzmOL73YNctkFvruEdVcwrHMOs4GUfKxfsZm_Uv92u_awHExVCYNt3fTBbFQirrJ5t_DlvITTPJ8k6gS__S6wHLOyycm-ZGaJSZCqMORV9FZjfnQXaa1PudMsKK3bWTEg6zCS-zMTgvmQ6d)

| Hey, Peter! I’m Gianna Trocino Bonner, Maxwell’s new campaign manager. As a Florida native, I’ve spent my career fighting to give working people a voice—not just the rich and powerful. I’ve knocked doors, organized voters, and worked in the Florida Senate, where I helped pass major climate legislation and supported Floridians through a broken unemployment system. **I’ve spent my career electing leaders who stand up for working people.** That’s why I joined Maxwell’s campaign—this race isn’t just about keeping a seat in Congress. It’s about standing up to corporate greed and making sure Floridians—not billionaires and special interest groups—decide our elections. **What it takes to win is building lasting power through year-round organizing and making sure _everyone_ has a voice.** The billionaires and corporate PACs trying to take Maxwell down are pouring millions into elections across the country to protect their power. But we’ve got something they don’t: people like you who are proving our democracy can’t be bought. [**_That’s why I’m asking: Can you contribute $27 or whatever you can afford today to keep this campaign powered by people? body:
https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/april-doge-tracking-poll-/?utm_campaign=20250407&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A

Peter,

President Trump has made it clear that the work of DOGE will continue and that his cabinet secretaries will work to root out waste, fraud, and abuse throughout his term.

And with more than an estimated $140 billion in savings already cut from the federal bureaucracy, there is still much work to be done.

But through acts of domestic terrorism, radicals on the Left are trying to intimidate President Trump and DOGE leaders into stopping this important work.

This work is vitally necessary, and we cannot allow violence from the Left to silence us.

That is why I asked my staff to put together a short DOGE Tracking Poll. I want to know where you stand on DOGE and make sure that the Left doesn’t drown out your voice.

[So please take my official April DOGE Tracking Poll to make sure that my colleagues in Congress and I know exactly how you feel about the work President Trump is doing with DOGE.](https://secure.winred.com/crenshawforcongress/april-doge-tracking-poll-/?utm_campaign=20250407&utm_medium=email&utm_source=TLC_A)

body:
President Trump has officially ENDORSED my re-election to the United States Senate!

[](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zaojieicmjp4ua08cr4tf4euj4kqb0j4qk750k58_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs)

Working with President Trump, we can change the course of history in ways very few have dreamed of -- and I am so excited for what we will accomplish. What President Trump is doing to make America strong and prosperous will benefit the entire world. Representing South Carolina has been - and will continue to be - the honor of a lifetime. With President Trump by my side, South Carolina and America's greatest days are ahead!

******************************************************[JOIN TEAM GRAHAM!](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zlgl0mk6b3r5irhemp14sr7esklohg3s4uuvo7no_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs)******************************************************

name: Leader Scalise
subject: 3 pressing developments – I need to fill you in IMMEDIATELY:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This could be the tide that changes the fate of our fragile House Majority...

| |
---
| | | My stomach just dropped.

I have three pressing updates that warrant your immediate attention.

**DEVELOPMENT #1:** Liberals are building momentum after winning the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - multiple GOP House seats are now in jeopardy.

**DEVELOPMENT #2:** House Democrats have outraised us EVERY MONTH this year and have $11,000,000 prepped and ready to unleash against us.

**DEVELOPMENT #3:** Kamala Harris just held a surprise appearance to tease her political comeback.

---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zaqa0pjv19clk4h3eb9qdp3ca357h5re8dpcm98g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs "Kamala Harris: ")
---

Don't forget -

When Kamala Harris was on the ticket, Liberals raked in over a BILLION DOLLARS to defeat us. _And Lord knows they 'll do it again._

They're already laying the groundwork to seize control of our fragile House Majority.

The Trump-hating Media... Young radicals on college campuses... The holier-than-thou Hollywood elites... Democrat Super PACs... An army of megadonors... _**[They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zkbe3h55mrabi7djeofgc2la27i2sscfc07vl370_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs "They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.")**_

I cannot emphasize that last point enough.

They're gearing up to unload a king's ransom to humiliate us in the midterms, obliterate our Conservative House Majority, and install a complete Liberal blockade of the MAGA agenda.

**That 's why I'm rushing to you before it's too late. All I'm asking is for everyone reading this email to pitch in JUST five or ten bucks right here and right now. _[If we can get 100% participation from you and every other Conservative, we can make Kamala Harris' political comeback COMPLETELY BACKFIRE.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zektv7j7p2m8l8cshrq241ligm1333po3pik0310_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs "If we can get 100% participation from you and every other Conservative, we can make Kamala Harris’ political comeback COMPLETELY BACKFIRE.")_**

We defeated Kamala and the Democrat Machine together before. And I know we can do it again but ONLY if we work together. Can I count on you?
---
**[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9vhimo37pesahmuu875hovpub5nngera194p0qg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs)[**YES**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zi7o375fcvvd9vnvd26nsjdtqol6full9l9mq58g_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs) _[**NO**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zesdta31vj528jb5hqo0ons4oqnis8m8149ut0p0_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs)**
---
I'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford.

_Five or ten bucks is perfectly fine. If you can afford more - your impact will be even greater!_

If we fail, any chances we had at saving our Conservative House Majority will sink like a LEAD BALLOON. _I desperately need your help on this. Without it, we 're finished._

Thanks for all you do,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z46ukovnj1cvnko4dv3fr3rma61fuqi476kdard8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgu0ft3k7bk26uk8p5em7827pil9vpgo3kl0r278_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h64pb1chh2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

"They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat." I cannot emphasize that last point enough. They're gearing up to unload a king's ransom to humiliate us in the midterms, obliterate our Conservative House Majority, and install a complete Liberal blockade of the MAGA agenda. That 's why I'm rushing to you before it's too late. All I'm asking is for everyone reading this email to pitch in JUST five or ten bucks right here and right now. "If we can get 100% participation from you and every other Conservative, we can make Kamala Harris’ political comeback COMPLETELY BACKFIRE." We defeated Kamala and the Democrat Machine together before. And I know we can do it again but ONLY if we work together. Can I count on you? I'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. Five or ten bucks is perfectly fine. If you can afford more - your impact will be even greater! If we fail, any chances we had at saving our Conservative House Majority will sink like a LEAD BALLOON. I desperately need your help on this. Without it, we 're finished. Thanks for all you do, Majority Leader Steve Scalise | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to you because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z49tgm4i4hukjgecgh0vuvd6jba535l07p25eq2o_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h6cob6c3h2bs "Kamala Harris: ")
---

Don't forget -

When Kamala Harris was on the ticket, Liberals raked in over a BILLION DOLLARS to defeat us. _And Lord knows they 'll do it again._

They're already laying the groundwork to seize control of our fragile House Majority.

The Trump-hating Media... Young radicals on college campuses... The holier-than-thou Hollywood elites... Democrat Super PACs... An army of megadonors... _**[They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zj8ainlhkp4i2ds1lb0l4ppbp1n3meaum63sf358_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h6cob6c3h2bs "They are fully committed to destroying our movement and replacing EVERY LAST ONE OF US with a Liberal Democrat.")**_

I cannot emphasize that last point enough.

They're gearing up to unload a king's ransom to humiliate us in the midterms, obliterate our Conservative House Majority, and install a complete Liberal blockade of the MAGA agenda.

**That 's why I'm rushing to you before it's too late. All I'm asking is for everyone reading this email to pitch in JUST five or ten bucks right here and right now. _[If we can get 100% participation from you and every other Conservative, we can make Kamala Harris' political comeback COMPLETELY BACKFIRE.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zmp1b7ts5uq029ojqimasgtntaf12jcojfa4vm30_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h6cob6c3h2bs "If we can get 100% participation from you and every other Conservative, we can make Kamala Harris’ political comeback COMPLETELY BACKFIRE.")_**

We defeated Kamala and the Democrat Machine together before. And I know we can do it again but ONLY if we work together. Can I count on you?
---
**[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z885n2kv6egc7me5c3q65o59tahikrhpcp3i4cj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h6cob6c3h2bs)[**YES**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrbdu666f6jn8aifkq82lk8f8ee47jiqnikpsi50_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h6cob6c3h2bs) _[**NO**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z17kuvchuosnchr1n3dvmb75aneamkph2p57cjjg_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h6cob6c3h2bs)**
---
I'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford.

_Five or ten bucks is perfectly fine. If you can afford more - your impact will be even greater!_

If we fail, any chances we had at saving our Conservative House Majority will sink like a LEAD BALLOON. _I desperately need your help on this. Without it, we 're finished._

Thanks for all you do,
Majority Leader Steve Scalise

---

---

---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z083hapd804bus2pakgfqfan9jhtmt0ifcab0gso_rp22sh2s8i6eob1c9h6cob6c3h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

I just ask that you keep what I’m about to tell you between us, Friend.

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: My police officer husband was convicted by a BLM jury foreman
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFuozAQhp_G3ILGgzHm4MNmI1arVK2qnnI0tglO7QA2gebtq6RprjPfzP_pV2H0rrtKUm0JYu9MIoik-EMQp8Ma4uUU9v825u1kNhN_DeVti38f6IJP-KzV8XP7wSn8r1PJp_Rip_eFPvH5Oton_AjNbVDO36bVLjOy6AywzEpaMYYUOK-yXooWakEZZaBUrS3SkqlSKDDQKRAaMicRsAQGNWVlxVjeaYGojQDRdi2KmjC45-Qq2Oi0omleVYzDEHI9hMzLfp7HdBdrCDZrHPLzRXt7ST9neggEm4cywWYh2PCvZT6WsVYtKZp7acVuGe2hh9bvsyjNuDrvXeIVYXD8fZMtEr8DAAD__xmbbw4)
| | My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim.
---
| |
---
Friend, My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim. That's my husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, with our boys in this photo.
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuRENY2PMgcNSQlSVbtVstVVPyPgj8RYHYiDR_vsVEcrFkp95NO-80o-9s58FyUqCeHZ6IoiEvhDE67-7D8uH_3GI9a8PHV_5q0_XKX7b1Bs-5YuSp__lG0_gez6l_Do15vr7ljz1-XM0T3kL3RkvXb_SrIp0Qa0GFpkiyRjDBDjPonOh0NqUdkoBdoJDbjFnXa4NQgYSqYpcgYApMMgTlmaM7awSiEoLEJ3tUOSEwSNnJ70JTslkmu8yhGHwOzX4qC_O8zxOj8NqgvVk1BLMTl6MHubVIFj3pteWYG0ph5QBjS1NZcygy2JhrYiV6BJhASjL-LqF1svs22lYgjKEVmV1iI_7d4J8xd5ot3hCq_3PjcwmrP97SDagpB-lO10IrbZyoi2rQ9vsm6puX5u_Tdke9-_t25-XY7w-USj0eHd97yaeEQanR-G13q3ArwAAAP__ErmPow)
---
Right now the New Mexico anti-cop Attorney General and a BLM activist are doing everything they can to put him behind bars. And since I'm told you're a patriotic American who respects our men and women in blue, **[**I'm swallowing my pride and asking you for help to save my husband.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuRENY2PMgcNSQlSVbtVstVVPyPgj8RYHYiDR_vsVEcrFkp95NO-80o-9s58FyUqCeHZ6IoiEvhDE67-7D8uH_3GI9a8PHV_5q0_XKX7b1Bs-5YuSp__lG0_gez6l_Do15vr7ljz1-XM0T3kL3RkvXb_SrIp0Qa0GFpkiyRjDBDjPonOh0NqUdkoBdoJDbjFnXa4NQgYSqYpcgYApMMgTlmaM7awSiEoLEJ3tUOSEwSNnJ70JTslkmu8yhGHwOzX4qC_O8zxOj8NqgvVk1BLMTl6MHubVIFj3pteWYG0ph5QBjS1NZcygy2JhrYiV6BJhASjL-LqF1svs22lYgjKEVmV1iI_7d4J8xd5ot3hCq_3PjcwmrP97SDagpB-lO10IrbZyoi2rQ9vsm6puX5u_Tdke9-_t25-XY7w-USj0eHd97yaeEQanR-G13q3ArwAAAP__ErmPow)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, identified the armed suspect they moved to detain him. But the suspect became violent and tried to disarm his partner, eventually grabbing a taser and pointing it at the prone officer. Brad's training immediately kicked in. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect, and saving his partner's life. Maybe even his own. My husband did nothing wrong. After the episode, his department's internal investigation cleared him. AND the local district attorney was finishing the investigation to do so as well, but the Attorney General of New Mexico -- a woke, anti-cop politician funded by George Soros -- took matters into his own hands and charged Brad with Voluntary Manslaughter. Friend, I was so scared and didn't know who to turn to... ...the fight for my husband's freedom was going to be costly and I knew we didn't have the necessary funds. But as an answer to our prayers, we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, but when he was WRONGFULLY CONVICTED by a jury and sent to prison, they committed to doing whatever it takes to clear Brad's good name. But they can't do it alone. **[**That's why I'm humbly asking you to help LELDF fight for Brad by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, or any amount.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuRENY2PMgcNSQlSVbtVstVVPyPgj8RYHYiDR_vsVEcrFkp95NO-80o-9s58FyUqCeHZ6IoiEvhDE67-7D8uH_3GI9a8PHV_5q0_XKX7b1Bs-5YuSp__lG0_gez6l_Do15vr7ljz1-XM0T3kL3RkvXb_SrIp0Qa0GFpkiyRjDBDjPonOh0NqUdkoBdoJDbjFnXa4NQgYSqYpcgYApMMgTlmaM7awSiEoLEJ3tUOSEwSNnJ70JTslkmu8yhGHwOzX4qC_O8zxOj8NqgvVk1BLMTl6MHubVIFj3pteWYG0ph5QBjS1NZcygy2JhrYiV6BJhASjL-LqF1svs22lYgjKEVmV1iI_7d4J8xd5ot3hCq_3PjcwmrP97SDagpB-lO10IrbZyoi2rQ9vsm6puX5u_Tdke9-_t25-XY7w-USj0eHd97yaeEQanR-G13q3ArwAAAP__ErmPow)** And thanks to LELDF and Brad's attorney we've discovered the outrageous jury misconduct that occurred behind the scenes. The court not only made a mistake by dismissing and replacing two jurors without reason... But a Black Lives Matter activist neglected to disclose her anti-police bias to get on the jury. Worse, she became the jury foreperson, leading the deliberations and steering the case against Brad. My husband was denied a fair trial and spent 5 weeks in jail before the judge even heard his motion for a new trial! And we're still waiting to learn if there will be a new trial or if we'll have to file an appeal. I'd be lying if I said this entire situation wasn't overwhelming and terrifying. But I know it could be a whole lot worse. I've been to a few police officer funerals. My husband is alive. We can fight this and win. But the battle isn't finished and with six years in prison and no paycheck still hanging over Brad's head...I pray we raise the funds necessary to fight this to the end. **[**Will you please help LELDF fight for my husband -- for my family -- by donating $35, $50, $100 or more today?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuRENY2PMgcNSQlSVbtVstVVPyPgj8RYHYiDR_vsVEcrFkp95NO-80o-9s58FyUqCeHZ6IoiEvhDE67-7D8uH_3GI9a8PHV_5q0_XKX7b1Bs-5YuSp__lG0_gez6l_Do15vr7ljz1-XM0T3kL3RkvXb_SrIp0Qa0GFpkiyRjDBDjPonOh0NqUdkoBdoJDbjFnXa4NQgYSqYpcgYApMMgTlmaM7awSiEoLEJ3tUOSEwSNnJ70JTslkmu8yhGHwOzX4qC_O8zxOj8NqgvVk1BLMTl6MHubVIFj3pteWYG0ph5QBjS1NZcygy2JhrYiV6BJhASjL-LqF1svs22lYgjKEVmV1iI_7d4J8xd5ot3hCq_3PjcwmrP97SDagpB-lO10IrbZyoi2rQ9vsm6puX5u_Tdke9-_t25-XY7w-USj0eHd97yaeEQanR-G13q3ArwAAAP__ErmPow)** Your generous gift will be put to immediate use helping Brad and other wrongly accused officers win in court and move on with their lives as free men. If you're able to make a larger contribution, that would be an incredible blessing to our family and so many others. No matter what, please pray for Brad and our family. Our boys are little, and they need their dad. I need my husband. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Gratefully,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
P.S. After Brad left the Army and became a cop, he made me one promise -- he would always come home to me. To think he may spend the next six years in prison because he followed his training so that his partner could make it home to his newborn baby. **[**Please help the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund fight for my husband and other wrongly accused officers by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100 or more today.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuRENY2PMgcNSQlSVbtVstVVPyPgj8RYHYiDR_vsVEcrFkp95NO-80o-9s58FyUqCeHZ6IoiEvhDE67-7D8uH_3GI9a8PHV_5q0_XKX7b1Bs-5YuSp__lG0_gez6l_Do15vr7ljz1-XM0T3kL3RkvXb_SrIp0Qa0GFpkiyRjDBDjPonOh0NqUdkoBdoJDbjFnXa4NQgYSqYpcgYApMMgTlmaM7awSiEoLEJ3tUOSEwSNnJ70JTslkmu8yhGHwOzX4qC_O8zxOj8NqgvVk1BLMTl6MHubVIFj3pteWYG0ph5QBjS1NZcygy2JhrYiV6BJhASjL-LqF1svs22lYgjKEVmV1iI_7d4J8xd5ot3hCq_3PjcwmrP97SDagpB-lO10IrbZyoi2rQ9vsm6puX5u_Tdke9-_t25-XY7w-USj0eHd97yaeEQanR-G13q3ArwAAAP__ErmPow)** Thank you!
---
|
---
_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_ © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | [www.PoliceDefense.org](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j02PmzAQhn-NuRENY2PMgcNSQlSVbtVstVVPyPgj8RYHYiDR_vsVEcrFkp95NO-80o-9s58FyUqCeHZ6IoiEvhDE67-7D8uH_3GI9a8PHV_5q0_XKX7b1Bs-5YuSp__lG0_gez6l_Do15vr7ljz1-XM0T3kL3RkvXb_SrIp0Qa0GFpkiyRjDBDjPonOh0NqUdkoBdoJDbjFnXa4NQgYSqYpcgYApMMgTlmaM7awSiEoLEJ3tUOSEwSNnJ70JTslkmu8yhGHwOzX4qC_O8zxOj8NqgvVk1BLMTl6MHubVIFj3pteWYG0ph5QBjS1NZcygy2JhrYiV6BJhASjL-LqF1svs22lYgjKEVmV1iI_7d4J8xd5ot3hCq_3PjcwmrP97SDagpB-lO10IrbZyoi2rQ9vsm6puX5u_Tdke9-_t25-XY7w-USj0eHd97yaeEQanR-G13q3ArwAAAP__ErmPow)

clean_body: | | | My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim. | | Friend, My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now a Soros-prosecutor is making him a political victim. That's my husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, with our boys in this photo. Right now the New Mexico anti-cop Attorney General and a BLM activist are doing everything they can to put him behind bars. And since I'm told you're a patriotic American who respects our men and women in blue, Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, identified the armed suspect they moved to detain him. But the suspect became violent and tried to disarm his partner, eventually grabbing a taser and pointing it at the prone officer. Brad's training immediately kicked in. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect, and saving his partner's life. Maybe even his own. My husband did nothing wrong. After the episode, his department's internal investigation cleared him. AND the local district attorney was finishing the investigation to do so as well, but the Attorney General of New Mexico -- a woke, anti-cop politician funded by George Soros -- took matters into his own hands and charged Brad with Voluntary Manslaughter. Friend, I was so scared and didn't know who to turn to... ...the fight for my husband's freedom was going to be costly and I knew we didn't have the necessary funds. But as an answer to our prayers, we got a call from Jason Johnson, President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, but when he was WRONGFULLY CONVICTED by a jury and sent to prison, they committed to doing whatever it takes to clear Brad's good name. But they can't do it alone. And thanks to LELDF and Brad's attorney we've discovered the outrageous jury misconduct that occurred behind the scenes. The court not only made a mistake by dismissing and replacing two jurors without reason... But a Black Lives Matter activist neglected to disclose her anti-police bias to get on the jury. Worse, she became the jury foreperson, leading the deliberations and steering the case against Brad. My husband was denied a fair trial and spent 5 weeks in jail before the judge even heard his motion for a new trial! And we're still waiting to learn if there will be a new trial or if we'll have to file an appeal. I'd be lying if I said this entire situation wasn't overwhelming and terrifying. But I know it could be a whole lot worse. I've been to a few police officer funerals. My husband is alive. We can fight this and win. But the battle isn't finished and with six years in prison and no paycheck still hanging over Brad's head...I pray we raise the funds necessary to fight this to the end. Your generous gift will be put to immediate use helping Brad and other wrongly accused officers win in court and move on with their lives as free men. If you're able to make a larger contribution, that would be an incredible blessing to our family and so many others. No matter what, please pray for Brad and our family. Our boys are little, and they need their dad. I need my husband. Thank you in advance for your support. Gratefully, Lacy Lunsford P.S. After Brad left the Army and became a cop, he made me one promise -- he would always come home to me. To think he may spend the next six years in prison because he followed his training so that his partner could make it home to his newborn baby. Thank you! | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

Team, The United States Postal Service is a valuable resource for so many Americans. Millions of people across the nation rely on the USPS to deliver everything from prescription medications to their paychecks. But Donald Trump and his MAGA allies want to privatize this critical service – which will lead to higher costs for deliveries and increase delays in dropping off our packages. DOGE has already hounded the USPS into slashing more than 10,000 employees from the already understaffed agency! Let’s be clear: **Privatizing the Postal Service in the name of profit would hurt seniors, small businesses & countless others.** **Our government should be focused on supporting the American people, not on increasing profits.** I will join my fellow Senate Democrats in fighting back against any attempt to gut or privatize USPS, and protect other important agencies from DOGE’s disastrous cuts. body:

---

My federally-funded climate justice position was terminated Friday. The silver lining is that I'll have more time to write and [collaborate](https://substack.com/redirect/e55e3f96-ffd8-434e-a335-0a46c1cebcfd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) with others. To support me during this time, [subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/ec958737-6876-4541-a75e-c63eb7c6e52a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) or [donate via Paypal](https://substack.com/redirect/962e9aa4-44bf-4de9-914a-ea47fa0a398b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..oJ-4nv6t4DODWzYLx5an45zdC7gtkReULknkG21eEUc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=160942188)
* * *
My dad is just about as "Average American" as a person can get.
My father split his time growing up between northern Virginia (where his mom lived) and south Florida (where his dad lived).
While his father is wealthy today, his mom struggled to provide basic necessities. He lived one foot in complete poverty, and the other in relative comfort.
While by no means a star pupil, he earned a football scholarship to West Virginia University, but dropped out in the first semester.
I was my father's first biological child. He was 19 when I was born.
My childhood was rough. I've never shied away from that.
But my parents worked hard to ensure my three siblings and I had a better life than they did.
My dad worked in construction, at a sawmill, as a sheriff's officer, and briefly on off-shore oil rigs, before becoming a truck driver in 2009. He's been driving ever since -- thanks to an Obama-era policy that provided training to those who lost their jobs during the 2008 financial crisis.
By education, background, and income, my dad fits squarely in the "average" profile of a Gen X'er...

name: Brad Finstad
subject: The Left is Making a Play for Red Districts Like Ours
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40Agg6dk-n21LKpiJg0qd88kOhbbghNJzxuSoY_Wk8p041zfUltI)
---
| Dear Friend,
---
House Democrats are feeling bold and it’s showing.
After overperforming in two red Florida districts, the DCCC is now launching a coast-to-coast offensive, aggressively recruiting candidates and pouring money into traditionally Republican strongholds.
They’re not just defending their own seats anymore; they’re coming after ours.
Governor Tim Walz rallied the Left in our district, national Democrats are smashing fundraising records, and the Democrats' House Majority PAC has officially targeted this seat.
We must be prepared to hold our ground. **[So please make a contribution to help us stand strong for our values and protect this district from a Democrat takeover.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40Agg6dk-n21LKpiJg0qd88kOhbbghNJzxuSoY_Wk8p041zfUltI)****[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40AggvNg-1MB-GvR9b9dJYeZmklx-kYIQgxHC6FNwVl3HONZGhsY)**[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40AggvNg-1MB-GvR9b9dJYeZmklx-kYIQgxHC6FNwVl3HONZGhsY)

| [CONTRIBUTE $100 >>](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40Agg7dk-q7QwDO8P9Vr2RkEd--ce5PdGzOT7woxG8uOBSiefNeE)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE $250 >>](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40Agg7tk-jsgi4M3MAYAz3JAfSu1bC80pLVQfyk7SLZpTO0cD1wE)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE OTHER >>](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40Aggn9o-YGtwEkefyNdP1SyAKH1IA6n2F96yhwBirvOyztjn5Hk)
---
This is about momentum, and the Democrats believe they have it.
They’re using their special election overperformance in Republican held districts as proof that no Republican seat is safe, including ours.
They’ve got the headlines, they’ve got the money, and now they’re preparing to make aggressive plays into GOP turf. We must be ready for whatever comes next. **[So please make a contribution to help us stand strong for our values and protect our district from a Democrat takeover.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ680CGIy40Agg6dk-n21LKpiJg0qd88kOhbbghNJzxuSoY_Wk8p041zfUltI)**

subject: This Trump-appointed judge just stood up to Trump. Sign your name to thank him >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Thank this judge for standing up to Trump and protecting the First Amendment](https://default.salsalabs.org/T548a5868-81f6-4048-a48c-4b87d21a7986/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tba32f2e6-2621-4a5e-8260-301b51466040/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | In February, Trump banned Associated Press journalists from attending White House events because they wouldn’t use the idiotic term “Gulf of America” in their news coverage when referring to the Gulf of Mexico. This was a vindictive and blatantly unconstitutional move – and a federal judge agreed. Judge Trevor McFadden just told the White House to restore AP’s access because banning them for political differences is in violation of the First Amendment. This judge was appointed by Trump, so we applaud him for doing the right thing and not bending to Trump’s will. [Join us in thanking Judge McFadden for standing up to Trump and protecting the First Amendment >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te29106e5-9fa6-4c1c-bf44-01b3b5b9c812/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Steve Simon
subject: I’ve spent my career protecting elections. This bill does the opposite.
disclaimer_text: paid for by Simon for Secretary of State Committee
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105491777/538514199/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI3MzI3YzgtNTMxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=42KkQRwmd1rx5AfDaMlOZe875mXKz4LDFv-myr15xEM=) | **As Minnesota’s Secretary of State, I’ve spent years working to build one of the strongest election systems in the country—secure, accurate, and accessible.** **And I’m proud to say: we’ve done it.** But this week, the U.S. House could take up a bill that could threaten everything we’ve built. It’s called the **SAVE Act** , and it sounds harmless enough on the surface. But let me explain why it’s not. **The SAVE Act would require documentary proof of citizenship to register to vote.** That might sound like a simple safeguard. But in reality, it would create a massive barrier for **millions of eligible Americans** , including seniors, veterans, students, low-income voters, and natural-born citizens who simply don’t have the right documents on hand. I’ve joined Secretaries of State from across the country to speak out against this bill. [**But right now, we need more than statements. We need organizing, action, and grassroots support. We need another 2,000 people to join us this week. Will you chip in $10 or more to help us fight back against dangerous bills that turn voting into an obstacle course?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105491781/538514206/-1506296379?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250408&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmI3MzI3YzgtNTMxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=42KkQRwmd1rx5AfDaMlOZe875mXKz4LDFv-myr15xEM=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now.

clean_body: = | As Minnesota’s Secretary of State, I’ve spent years working to build one of the strongest election systems in the country—secure, accurate, and accessible. And I’m proud to say: we’ve done it. But this week, the U.S. House could take up a bill that could threaten everything we’ve built. It’s called the SAVE Act , and it sounds harmless enough on the surface. But let me explain why it’s not. The SAVE Act would require documentary proof of citizenship to register to vote. That might sound like a simple safeguard. But in reality, it would create a massive barrier for millions of eligible Americans , including seniors, veterans, students, low-income voters, and natural-born citizens who simply don’t have the right documents on hand. I’ve joined Secretaries of State from across the country to speak out against this bill. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | **********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** | ********=******** We’ve seen how this plays out. ---
_**When I say I 'm counting on you I truly mean it, Friend.**_

You've never shied away from lending me a hand when I needed it most.

And I certainly don't expect you to stop now.

Your support has always been critical for the future of our party and the direction we take to get there.

And I can't thank you enough for that.

Unfortunately, we need your help now more than ever before. As we speak, radical Democrats are mobilizing to sabotage the Republican agenda and turn our Senate Majority into a laughingstock here in Washington.

If I don't hear back from you soon, Democrats will snatch victory from the jaws of defeat and then our entire Congressional Majority will be all but a distant dream.
