name: Deb Haaland
subject: Thank you for believing in this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Thank you.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1230%2E400544%2EFI6A23)
**Thank you from the bottom of my heart.**
Because of grassroots supporters like you, we didn’t just reach our $250,000 online fundraising goal, **we _passed_ it!**
When we file our first fundraising report, we will show that we’re building a fierce campaign that doesn’t answer to billionaires or corporations. Instead, we’re powered by everyday people who believe in the same values that are at the heart of our movement: to address the cost of living that’s crushing our families, to care for each other, and to be good stewards of the Earth.
I'm grateful that so many New Mexicans have donated their hard-earned dollars to my campaign, and I’m committed to continuing my grassroots campaign, speaking truth to power, and making our shared vision for New Mexico a reality.
As someone who’s been through hard times, I know what it means to have a community behind you. This campaign is rooted in that same power of community, and I’m deeply grateful for your support.
**From me and the entire Fierce family: Thank you!** We’re just getting started, and I couldn’t be more proud to fight for all New Mexicans with you by my side. 💛
Be fierce and more soon,
Deb
**[P.S. If you’d like to help us get a head start on the next phase of this campaign, please chip in here. Your contribution will help us continue to fund our statewide organizing, travel, and voter outreach.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250409_1_thankyou?amount=5&refcode=em20250409-1230&refcode2=1230_400544_FI6A23&akid=1230%2E400544%2EFI6A23)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250409-1&t=2&refcode2=1230_400544_FI6A23&akid=1230%2E400544%2EFI6A23)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=3&akid=1230%2E400544%2EFI6A23)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=4&akid=1230%2E400544%2EFI6A23)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: John James
subject: Our New Mission.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI 8050 Wolfson Lane, Grand Blanc, MI 48439
body:
| | | [](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/laxx3u34vHXCbDMuad2xWrHMV_dardh1VJcIi5i-TJu-iG5TqVhOxbZoOmf6Y5hjFF02HZFktAhkGRXKgxv0-oIh_fKgxsah1vRH0g9gYESASBPUhmnGH1BR2bvuVwIbhwRWdYbT8URSILYGv8W2fKbDhP85aSCdxFviyidkAtRYMfyIzAKqxwjDwspCXkKquxyGLTlrT5QFeLJHKIS34Scn9c4_l9EeYlBnEPo0MlR4P9kod5sNGga_PrUwdP9TdE2qb0-h_ZWbObPdp1A3ceWQABNAURuuDfmcLjWtht4pPQOf9mnHnhusl4-RKcUVdt7nSwV1I6H5whx6MPTq8b0LJsde0fbsqTi1YSqM_JveSpSwGaeBONfdgXlt99nTsG-UAqEWs0__ZrtWdzyanKHOhOv4AhiMHJXVgCUJy-HSENVrKj9HMiZxTy7s-3W-yrbzxX_pvKWrb98chOcGSU23hagBK7SO-bU7LyilrSVyhwWgzpvAJ2c-Nj7xJg/m0fZkUasNDv9CRa9ehFqEhwGP-nnvdad/7)
---
Co-Pilot -
**_Our mission to defend Michigan has a_**** _major development. _**
I’m announcing **my intention to run for Governor at one of the most critical points in our nation’s history.**
Under Joe Biden and Gretchen Whitmer, our economy, our industry, and our people have all suffered.
Michiganders were fed up with the status-quo bureaucracy, and that’s why our state turned **RED** in 2024.
I stood alongside President Trump on the campaign trail and spoke with him at rallies where we shared our vision for America.
Our movement for strong, America First policies has gained momentum, and we need to carry it through to the midterms to ensure that Michigan can get back on track.
---
|
---
_**_Our Mission_**_ The first step towards fixing our state and our nation occurred on November 5th of last year when we elected President Trump, but the truth is, we still have work to do. We have 2 more years of Democrat obstruction and failed economic policies to endure in Michigan. That’s why it’s of vital importance to prepare NOW. **Our mission is twofold:**
---
1\. We are working **_to make life easier and more prosperous for Michiganders_** \- no matter what political party they are in - through pro-business, pro-growth and **PRO-WORKER** America First policies. 2\. We are working to **PREVENT** another 4 years of the same socialist policies that have hurt our state. **Neither of these objectives can be completed alone. That’s why I’ll need your support.** But, before I ask you to join us, I want you to know my story.
---
|
---
_**_My Story_**_ You’re going to hear a lot about me from the mainstream media over the coming months. I’m ready for the mud-slinging from the Democrat establishment, but I want to tell you who I am: \- First and foremost, I am a **God-Loving husband and father of three boys**.
\- I am a **West Point graduate and a combat veteran** who commanded 2 Apache Helicopter platoons – logging over 750 flight hours to protect our freedom and defend the American Dream. \- I am the proud **son of two parents who were born and raised in the Jim Crow South**. They moved to Michigan, built a business, and watched as their son was sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives.
**\- I am a businessman** with a background in the automotive and manufacturing sector. I**** understand how our economy works, how red tape and bureaucracy weighs down innovation and progress, and the tremendous responsibility that comes with being a job creator.
\- I am a **public servant who represents the people of Michigan’s 10th Congressional District** and fights for them every day in Washington, DC.
\- I am a**conservative warrior who has gone toe-to-toe with the Democrat establishment** **machine** time and time again.
I am **prepared to lead our mission** to make Michigan the best place to live in the nation once more. But don’t let anyone tell you that this is going to be easy.
---

clean_body: | | | Co-Pilot - Our mission to defend Michigan has a major development. I’m announcing my intention to run for Governor at one of the most critical points in our nation’s history. Under Joe Biden and Gretchen Whitmer, our economy, our industry, and our people have all suffered. Michiganders were fed up with the status-quo bureaucracy, and that’s why our state turned RED in 2024. I stood alongside President Trump on the campaign trail and spoke with him at rallies where we shared our vision for America. Our movement for strong, America First policies has gained momentum, and we need to carry it through to the midterms to ensure that Michigan can get back on track. | Our Mission The first step towards fixing our state and our nation occurred on November 5th of last year when we elected President Trump, but the truth is, we still have work to do. We have 2 more years of Democrat obstruction and failed economic policies to endure in Michigan. That’s why it’s of vital importance to prepare NOW. Our mission is twofold: 1\. We are working to make life easier and more prosperous for Michiganders \- no matter what political party they are in - through pro-business, pro-growth and PRO-WORKER America First policies. 2\. We are working to PREVENT another 4 years of the same socialist policies that have hurt our state. Neither of these objectives can be completed alone. That’s why I’ll need your support. But, before I ask you to join us, I want you to know my story. | My Story You’re going to hear a lot about me from the mainstream media over the coming months. I’m ready for the mud-slinging from the Democrat establishment, but I want to tell you who I am: \- First and foremost, I am a God-Loving husband and father of three boys. \- I am a West Point graduate and a combat veteran who commanded 2 Apache Helicopter platoons – logging over 750 flight hours to protect our freedom and defend the American Dream. \- I am the proud son of two parents who were born and raised in the Jim Crow South. They moved to Michigan, built a business, and watched as their son was sworn into the U.S. House of Representatives. \- I am a businessman with a background in the automotive and manufacturing sector. I** understand how our economy works, how red tape and bureaucracy weighs down innovation and progress, and the tremendous responsibility that comes with being a job creator. \- I am a public servant who represents the people of Michigan’s 10th Congressional District and fights for them every day in Washington, DC. \- I am aconservative warrior who has gone toe-to-toe with the Democrat establishment machine time and time again. I am prepared to lead our mission to make Michigan the best place to live in the nation once more. But don’t let anyone tell you that this is going to be easy. | The Road Ahead \- Michigan will be the most competitive swing state in the nation. With open Gubernatorial and Senate seats on the ballot, all eyes will be laser focused on our campaign. \- Democrats have controlled Lansing for over 6 years now. Their political and financial machine is entrenched and ready to attack any person who tries to challenge them. \- Midterms are notoriously difficult for the party in power nationally. We are going to have to work twice as hard to share our message of economic prosperity and America First policies. \- This race will be on the top of the list for every single Democrat Dark money SuperPAC. For all of those reasons, this fight cannot be won alone. | Why I Need You On My Team I need the support of patriots like you to have a chance to win this battle. I know the challenges ahead and I’m choosing to fight anyway. If you’re in, I humbly ask that you sign your name to become a founding supporter of my race.** Let’s Fly! name: Ken Martin (via Democrats.org)
subject: A real fight
body:
---
Derek, This is a longer message, but I wanted to share an update on what we’re seeing from Trump and what Democrats are doing about it. (And no, I will not be making a fundraising request at the end). Here’s what’s been going on: Last week, Trump’s erratic, nonsensical tariffs went into effect. This guy ran on the promise that he was going to help Americans afford their lives, but from day one, he‘s done the complete opposite. In fact, his actions are going to make people’s lives much more expensive, destroy retirement accounts, and threaten jobs. Confidence and certainty are two of the biggest things that fuel our economy. Under Trump, there’s little confidence and even less certainty. Now, we’re seeing buyer’s remorse. We’re seeing people who voted for Trump that feel like he betrayed them. And that’s because he did. Donald Trump and the Republicans are leaving Americans behind — and it sure doesn’t seem like they even care. **This is an opportunity for us as Democrats to get off the mat, get back in the fight, and show families what we stand for.** One of the reasons we’ve lost so much ground over the years is because people don’t feel like the Democratic Party is fighting for them. This is our opportunity to change that — when it’s clearer than ever that Trump and Elon Musk don’t give a damn about anybody other than the billionaires who can weather his economic meltdown. I’ve been traveling across the country nonstop since I started this job, and what I hear over and over is this: Americans want us to fight back against Trump’s lies. They want us to offer a better alternative. So that’s exactly what we’re doing. While Trump has stacked his cabinet with out-of-touch billionaires, we’ve launched a People’s Cabinet, which is made up of experts, leaders, and community voices around the country who will cut through the lies to bring you reliable and accurate information. We’ve also launched a new DNC War Room to put Republicans on the defense every single day, compete in new information spaces, and proactively challenge what Trump is doing. And third, we’re focused on organizing everywhere. I’ve said from day one that if we organize everywhere, we can win everywhere. And that’s exactly what we’ve done. Democrats have overperformed in 17 of the 18 elections since the inauguration, with big wins in places like Pennsylvania and Wisconsin. Our momentum is growing. **We have to keep up this fight, Derek.** And we have some great fighters on our side. You saw that just the other day when Cory Booker took to the Senate floor and held it for 25 hours, in one of the most courageous moral statements I’ve seen in years. Showing up for the American people. That’s what we need to be doing. With your help, that’s what we will continue to do. Thank you for taking the time to read this message, and I’ll have more updates to share soon. Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-april-2025?amount=3&refcode=em_20250409_3166_fr&refcode2=3172_22930333_npH8qy&akid=3172%2E22930333%2EnpH8qy)
---

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Voter Action Project Team
subject: Sour grapes caused this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Popular Information: The five-month campaign to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat| | | **The new mantra of the vote suppressors is "_if you can't beat 'em,_ " Team, "_just try and get their votes thrown out_ ". **By waiting until after Election Day and the recounts, it's clear that the challenger's campaign only sued to get these votes tossed out because he lost. clean_body: Popular Information: The five-month campaign to steal a North Carolina Supreme Court seat| | | The new mantra of the vote suppressors is "if you can't beat 'em, " Team, "just try and get their votes thrown out ". By waiting until after Election Day and the recounts, it's clear that the challenger's campaign only sued to get these votes tossed out because he lost. The scarier part is that -- if Judge Griffin's shameless crusade is successful and these votes get thrown out \-- opponents of voting rights will absolutely try and do this in every other election around the country. | | | | | The end game is finally coming in this case in North Carolina, Team,** and we're heading for election theft in plain sight.The backstory: The North Carolina state supreme court stepped in to stop the certification of the election for a justice on their court, which is a huge breach of power and a clearly partisan action in a state where judges are affiliated with political parties. Back on Election Day 2024, incumbent Justice Allison Riggs (D) was reelected by a slim margin of a few hundred votes. Her disgruntled opponent, GOP Judge Jefferson Griffin, sued for and received two separate recounts -- both of which increased Riggs' lead. Now, a panel of the North Carolina Court of Appeals ruled in Griffin’s favor, deciding that 60,000 ballots must be recounted and verified. The ruling states that all 60,000 people must be notified and given 15 business days to provide proof of identity, or their vote will be thrown out. This ruling will disenfranchise tens of thousands of people without showing any proof that any of these voters are actually ineligible. “ The Court of Appeals’ ruling is destined to disenfranchise thousands of North Carolinians, denying them due process and equal protection under North Carolina law ” Justice Riggs’ lawyers wrote in their appeal to the state supreme court -- the same body she should already be back serving on. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Now listen, Justice Riggs could still win on appeal. However, without her on the court, as she recuses herself, Griffin's fellow Republicans hold a 5-1 majority on the court in a case that is clearly about partisan election interference. What's really at stake here? If Judge Griffin's campaign thought the registration process was legally flawed, he should have challenged it before the election.** This is a blatant attempt to change the rules just because he lost. And his partisan cronies are going along with it to protect their power and their majority on the court. Opponents of voting rights are blatantly trying to steal this election in plain sight. And you can bet they're going to try to do it in the 49 other states once they get away with it here. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

body:
Trump is destroying our savings, driving up our prices, and creating a Depression | | |
---
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38peowJInzAd3BIg73nmw4WaxcHcKZBmjtJEi_yluiiuHeqU3c3x17EFL8QBBHK96BDKAALsIjDQxOVAFpqLi-5mmV0EjvipOaohAYHeoqEcE79k7y1k2A1CDIKKLJq6i6PTassTx0eyuW9BMEV8jkQ5w8AjpHxC76YbdAGI7BKwFBvVPTty8IX9fKdITzB1h3vu8BUfrO9Le-g8Q0assSKESAYvyHw_KBuwaRlM8uvcMGsEY_0KFCGUpY6gDEJqL9rdhReJcWsp-Qsqo8qJKNGtTQ49rmwWWPJt6bzhnz3rQ/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h0/h001.Zt8MnQyAT4Bh0RqvIdh5Cc-wLT_1umkbTFHUESDP9Eg)Hi Friend, **Trump's massive tariffs have crashed the markets and destroyed $10 TRILLION in wealth.** [Today, Democrats are pushing Republicans in the Senate and House to repeal Trump's tariffs](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVJSKUzxedFyrIW1z9Yf4tTguwWhRLe5B7pfVSteyvhjjsF9_W3dkOWRs76ahZmCkKoaTdXPTy28lyvXP8SNP_N5YUjsdjZjL7Bf-5eU2-s_6FdVg47fKkWM8nCFcUoA3vP8UWtvMMemX5lp8FeUSz9s-pbl4BLF_1c_HyHMLdcUPV_OVe0NK_9jnZbQopdnMzdLQrxcKbjjd2pB0gSZIOjQicMegVDkMCX4guPdeImtceySlE6A-onAHlT4enWQ3H0QETI7ofLlFfCLHTgtWwhXuTosVYoDTHfBIHBV0YXYC5vdGiU92S7e_pAqQD1fAp1CfkPnSBOQX3j5Ty3jxyZuh736qYlQKwPTm4v5a1Ro1o5ssEUOs_yYQzqKLL76Tjk/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h1/h001.zp-eMT3DpRKkQPlt2Dx_M-zY2LvdGZH55i8cJahMAU0). **We have already sent nearly 50,000 letters to Congress - please help us reach 60,000!** [Tell Congress: Repeal Trump's Tariffs!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38peowJInzAd3BIg73nmw4WaxcHcKZBmjtJEi_yluiiuHeqU3c3x17EFL8QBBHK96BDKAALsIjDQxOVAFpqLi-5mmV0EjvipOaohAYHeoqEcGh62Y4s5VInEnrfryPAg5tCWMjydKZUPBz4yBfMsrgDg0g-3AJPJm6xBC8r-HGnoXT0hZnS746BAVgSqLkU47tuLwNZ93cu3C22oCDSlGmwoo7g07v9LBhbeCgtlZp2vR7R_bONHMtToi9D6c8xyv5t3lv763qU6vhAusofzPKot9JJa1JMGNZk-cHW3XEPDg/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h2/h001.UeCMce1GsgjI_kFEYQSeqipe8dycuVeZG9LfVUwFTls)
Trump promised "pain" - and this is one promise he's keeping. Our retirement funds are not the only casualty. **Trump's tariffs will _increase_ the cost of everything we buy: food, housing, medicine, clothes, electronics, cars, housing, and more. **It's a[ national sales tax that will cost every American household $4,200 per year.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfF5X7cN-ykzuKqMRAE46Iihmq2NMfXVsb3ZT4ar09IOgPx5QE0jAruuews7cFopH1bmu4G1YSDOPyM7f7NUT2W3o2EMdkN6ajhtKG53dIIv-7vhPYan-8GWF8P31h1H2dzVnitsPVWkW7vYxpBRX8uuwS90GMdu9rYdG3zqokHm3RYLR07y4ZO7sMVQEeUTeN0XwJQCZdlfAtYfehMu_y-PX68S9sUCnWVpU3dbH7BeU98X5xP_P8IcfgvcDKymY1EzQ9J04KHJlAP0DH80QHkjareZiTYZavQCFjuY0C6TgA3bXkWwRBNTsgZ9BjJXOeGnMBbq6zO_GcedTy1ur7veA9AFVK4_mgtwLRAdym4TULTTiG559qXIWz6fYiCCkNMmHzYDoj_-6kn0vSWFwQc/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h3/h001.HGYL-EhpF6GUkSXC3Dh8WM7Z07fOO9_Ik_jyorL6v60)
These price hikes will caus a **recession** because consumers will buy fewer products, so businesses will make fewer sales - which will force them to **slash jobs**. And our trade partners have retaliated with tariffs against American products, so **export-led jobs in manufacturing and agriculture will be slashed as well**. Trump's trade war could cause a **global depression like the 1930's**. **But here's the good news: Congress can repeal Trump's tariffs this week!** [Tell Congress: Repeal Trump's Tariffs!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38peowJInzAd3BIg73nmw4WaxcHcKZBmjtJEi_yluiiuHeqU3c3x17EFL8QBBHK96BDKAALsIjDQxOVAFpqLi-5mmV0EjvipOaohAYHeoqEcC9gOeHsvzCCE2nyW8RpP4tXn9LOWnHdClt_93vmjsaREJhUoZjtAoazUi2T9HhTGYZ1DojSPozNGRHbvno0fSwN2DhJ2clphFCGoTAph4sdx3k39Y3ko3SHDE8R9fS8Be8kFNaJmfI-qsc92mOANnyVyAekCOerJhBHLC-eY_B4g0c42Uva5QmKnfwMNIG-IQ/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h4/h001.t1cHTbQWTLUXYnuBEi2b2W2iBUKicbgKWEBwkmmzLEo)
Last week in the Senate, **[47 Democrats and 4 Republicans voted to repeal Trump's tariffs on Canada](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbHQPX4zlW5LTF7Twtz6WVI-Ljijtbq1_k-4m0VXx-QjbPKbfJaF49aJbZh_N6IYhkMVwxIS49ZBX6g66W1fhcGQ2YiZPuh_OIhl4FU3MLgjbadtiEnjLzVytmq_mUc4rFmkRXXIpqyiDagn0f7O778SEzZMaavhEjoxihJAi_1_NTnrI3ZXw3_9TP4NbKlOelekMErgpeuskc3P2TcbhTuZO-7ALNVS4AIUvfrEt9YoolL1LLU5WWvzazpuFuue2ulgaynJ1Z6fniok4fX6oDZ7wwQn7DJINXDXJ8rlEHoM46TrRVDnf8nyOaGbuViQS3ywooZOrwe18HZei_LKO8MU9LmGWST1tzafxsaeLOQnga_MNtK1c4cuQYPqFwpUUcjS6pWmnbjlZx4e0lu7S5VlhhoHmdXhlMkBdGE0-ePk/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h5/h001.BWY-qeXfinOd9RO2jEEB3ZoNLDzN-7uNr_T5dasB9Dw).** How? Simply by **repealing the fake "emergency"** Trump used to impose the tariffs. **Now Senate and****House Democrats are also pushing Republicans to repeal Trump's fake "emergency."** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMfiB1ExDwZ0B3wtLLr_KGVVlw2yd-6fLj6Jx9q446IyQ7wHgZI4HOA5UqrsJ_g-raQrRi3XhbG08LGlyo2dw1c_51T3bYb5aURTzPFdtOX67Rm-A_W0cUX-qHx9XMqtf_ZyQxNE3pY4oqyFYJukAZ3ehYnCt9g3znZO2zPcBcWektT3NHLmkQ0oz4K1N2uuxgz63ORcIUd2Xyt3ddi3EynaUJVnMQkJvDvBPM4QmOjhNTfDEchiNe6dnUX-5Sji44wRqZKXdY6pTGpNrV9gKmgeUSBJz1fR1voKcmIXID96K0tnGhrTTtOKRmusX_weWZhCI7ZfJRobiiIlCQMuZV30v-9rtrsIBfMDCTwDyK3PyPSX0jK9v55NS2jABgjH1ww/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h6/h001.ocXdnpdsCVkm673wFx7RsR7SzJqp8NT0dV9_LPLDJcI)And **Republicans are running scared** because voters are already furious over Elon Musk's devastating cuts - resulting in **angry town halls** and **near defeats** in two Florida House special elections. [Tell Congress: Repeal Trump's Tariffs!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38peowJInzAd3BIg73nmw4WaxcHcKZBmjtJEi_yluiiuHeqU3c3x17EFL8QBBHK96BDKAALsIjDQxOVAFpqLi-5mmV0EjvipOaohAYHeoqEcHjHk8Y7-iZfOMiYbvSgzjDAGROb3_ln2bfY_46PyjYll1eP_sc4On5ALkneclSryB_4_Qlgm4TZiK1Bz27UlpHx-aDz63Dzpjs-bBAPCEh_D4LtpUCpCSsqBDLgBz7vxKuosq_GsNtS6LHhy9jUgdZj_31CI47RvnaQsN-fsuzeCyZsoDQ_49X2GJbv7UBS-g/4fi/GtImmVDYSv-AnFCgjA73GQ/h7/h001.8mBxqGYI3BV4ZSuMhrr4kih4JTJCR0Zu8PUR-E8YZK8)
Thanks for all you do! Bob Fertik, President

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: The Trump Tax
disclaimer_text: paid for by the American people
body:
These tariffs will drive up the cost of everyday goods and put even more stress on our household budgets
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1581%2E791427%2EHslgQw)

Friend — Trump’s reckless tariffs are threatening a full on recession.
I’m sure we’ve all watched over the last week as the stock market has reacted to the prospect of huge tariffs on literally every single country around the world.
He calls the day that he announced these tariffs “Liberation Day” — **the only thing Trump is “liberating” is YOUR money from YOUR wallet straight into the economic dumpster fire he’s creating.**
Because it’s not just about the stock market and investments. These tariffs will drive up the cost of everyday goods and put even more stress on our household budgets. They’re effectively a huge tax that will be paid for by the American people. _A Trump Tax._
Listen, we should absolutely be investing more in American manufacturing, infrastructure, and the workers who make that possible. We should be building more things and creating a prosperous, fair economy.
**But these tariffs are not the way to do that. Not even close.**
Trump’s trade war proves that he and the far-right have no real agenda to help the working class. He ran on bringing down inflation, and now he’s driving up the cost of everything from your coffee in the morning to the bed you sleep on at night.
If he really wanted to help the working class, he would rollback these tariffs, stop collaborating with billionaires like Elon Musk to gut public services, and work to bring down the largest costs that working people face, such as housing, healthcare, education, and childcare.
Friend, we’re only three months into this administration and we’re already talking about a historic economic crisis. We must keep pushing to expose Trump and rally support for our alternative vision of the future where everyone can prosper, without chaos and panic.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
* * *

Before you go...
We know times are tough for many right now, so we’re asking those who can spare $5, $10, or even $25 to chip in today and help keep our movement for progress pushing forward. **[Can you make a contribution and be part of our grassroots team as we take on the Trump administration and their reckless agenda?**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250409-1-150&t=2&akid=1581%2E791427%2EHslgQw)
**[CHIP IN](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250409-1-150&t=3&akid=1581%2E791427%2EHslgQw)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=1581%2E791427%2EHslgQw)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=5&akid=1581%2E791427%2EHslgQw)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=6&akid=1581%2E791427%2EHslgQw)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=1581_791427_HslgQw&akid=1581%2E791427%2EHslgQw)**.

name: Travis Tazelaar, VoteVets
subject: In case you missed it: Trump’s Military Parade is Back
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
He wants to throw it as a 79th birthday present to himself, as if the four day weekends golfing while the economy burns down weren’t enough.
#
Hey, it’s Travis again, following up from yesterday.
Message acknowledged. **More than 10,000 of you signed our petition yesterday to stop Trump’s birthday parade.** We’ve got two months to raise hell on this, and that’s what we’re going to do.
Like I said yesterday, the odds are against us this time — but we’ve got to try.
[**If you haven’t signed our SAY NO TO TRUMP’S PARADE petition yet, join those 10,000 and add your name here.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250408_vv_em_no_parade?refcode=em250409-1-120&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za)
| [NO PARADE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250408_vv_em_no_parade?source=em250409-1-120&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za)
---
[**Or, if you’ve already signed and you want to do more — chip in to VoteVets by using this link. We’ll put it straight to work on ops like this aimed at combatting Trump and his administration.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250409-1-120&t=1&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za)
| [CHIP IN HERE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250409-1-120&t=2&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za)
---
Be back with more soon.
Until then, Semper Fi.
Travis Tazelaar
Political Director, VoteVets
USMC Veteran

* * *

[](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-april25.G9aCQU&refcode=em250409-1-120&t=3&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za)
Hey Peter, it’s Travis from VoteVets.
You probably remember back in 2018 when Trump wanted to throw a massive Military parade in DC. You probably also remember that he ended up pulling it down — and VoteVets was a big reason why. We gave him and his administration hell for it, we got enough people speaking out, and we got him to cancel.
Well, bad news: The parade is back. He wants to throw it as a 79th birthday present to himself, as if the four day weekends golfing while the economy burns down weren’t enough.
A parade like this would degrade Military readiness at a time when we’ve alienated our allies and pissed off our adversaries. It would cost a ton of money, probably over $100 million, and is a logistical nightmare. Beyond all that — we’re a democracy. These parades are what dictators do to project strength and distract the public.
And that’s exactly what Trump’s doing here. The stock market is crashing, his administration is forcing through trillions in tax breaks for billionaires, and they’re gutting services millions of Veterans depend on. No better time for a massive, expensive, ridiculous parade.
**Not on our watch.** The odds are against us this time — Trump’s fired everybody who disagrees with him. He’s firing principled Military leaders, too. And his Department of Defense is full of “Yes Men.” But what we do still matters. If enough people come together and speak out against this, we might just stop it (again).
[**I’m asking you to join VoteVets today and speak with one voice: SAY NO TO TRUMP’S PARADE. It might seem like a small action, but when thousands of people join you it sends a big message.**](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250408_vv_em_no_parade?refcode=em250409-1-120&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za)
| [NO PARADE](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250408_vv_em_no_parade?source=em250409-1-120&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za)
---
Thanks a lot,
Travis Tazelaar
Political Director, VoteVets
USMC Veteran

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=34329%2E3013755%2E7yK-Za).

subject: I was one of millions who said “Hands Off”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, While Donald Trump and Elon Musk take a sledgehammer to our government to line their own pockets, the American people are standing up against their billionaires-first agenda. On Saturday, **millions of Americans gathered at an estimated 1,000 rallies across the country to send a message to Trump and Musk:** _**Hands off our government.**_ I was proud to join tens of thousands of New Yorkers eager to stand up and speak out against Trump and Musk’s efforts to demolish our government for their own gain. clean_body: | Peter, While Donald Trump and Elon Musk take a sledgehammer to our government to line their own pockets, the American people are standing up against their billionaires-first agenda. On Saturday, millions of Americans gathered at an estimated 1,000 rallies across the country to send a message to Trump and Musk: Hands off our government. I was proud to join tens of thousands of New Yorkers eager to stand up and speak out against Trump and Musk’s efforts to demolish our government for their own gain. = Peter, Donald Trump and Elon Musk are coming after Americans’ health care, jobs, and essential benefits that hard-working people nationwide have earned and depend on — all to make room for their tax breaks for the ultra-wealthy. In order to stop their assault on everyday Americans, it will take all of us — together — to make our voices heard in every way we can. It has worked already. And with such a slim majority in the House, New York Republicans must know that a vote to cut Medicaid for their constituents is a vote that will lose their seat in 2026. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

I’m so proud to fight alongside my new colleague in Congress, Emily Randall.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105494503/538522501/2145945666?refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.09_Balint1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjMxMjlhYy01NzE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TCMPjKRVI_gU12vVwR_hvmoi1gqUrohlaGn6d2c-jg=&emci=7be25b84-2808-f011-90cd-0022482a9fb7&emdi=5f3129ac-5715-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=23483442) | Peter, I don’t have to tell you the urgency of this moment. It calls for fresh, bold, courageous leadership. **That’s why I’m so proud to fight alongside my new colleague in Congress, Emily Randall.** Since her swearing-in, Emily has been unstoppable: From rallying against Elon Musk’s corruption at the Treasury to defending Medicaid on Capitol Hill. In just a few short months, Emily has established herself as a hardworking, dedicated representative for working people who isn’t afraid to speak truth to power. [_**If you agree that we need more leaders like Emily fighting Trump, please split a donation between our campaigns today →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105494504/538522502/-795924919?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.09_Balint1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjMxMjlhYy01NzE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TCMPjKRVI_gU12vVwR_hvmoi1gqUrohlaGn6d2c-jg=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105494505/538522503/-795924919?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.09_Balint1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjMxMjlhYy01NzE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TCMPjKRVI_gU12vVwR_hvmoi1gqUrohlaGn6d2c-jg=) Emily and I made history by becoming the first LGBTQ+ people to represent our states in Congress. But that’s not all we have in common. We both understand what it’s like to come from working-class households, pay our own bills, and help family members navigate the healthcare system. We both understand that Trump and Musk’s cruel cuts aren’t just numbers on a page — they have direct, damaging effects on the lives of our neighbors. And we both understand that we have a duty to fight like hell for the people who elected us, not for billionaires and big corporations. [_**Together, we’re working on two fronts: Blocking the worst of the Trump-Musk agenda and organizing early to elect more bold Democrats to Congress. Can you split a donation of $5, $25, or any amount to fuel these efforts and send a message about the kind of leadership we need in D.C. right now?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105494506/538522504/-795924919?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.09_Balint1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjMxMjlhYy01NzE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TCMPjKRVI_gU12vVwR_hvmoi1gqUrohlaGn6d2c-jg=) [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105494507/538522505/-795924919?amount=25&refcode=RS_EM_FR_2025.04.09_Balint1_Actives&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1ZjMxMjlhYy01NzE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TCMPjKRVI_gU12vVwR_hvmoi1gqUrohlaGn6d2c-jg=) Thank you so much for your resilience in this difficult time. ---
_**When I say I 'm counting on you I truly mean it, Friend.**_

You've never shied away from lending me a hand when I needed it most.

And I certainly don't expect you to stop now.

Your support has always been critical for the future of our party and the direction we take to get there.

And I can't thank you enough for that.

Unfortunately, we need your help now more than ever before. As we speak, radical Democrats are mobilizing to sabotage the Republican agenda and turn our Senate Majority into a laughingstock here in Washington.

If I don't hear back from you soon, Democrats will snatch victory from the jaws of defeat and then our entire Congressional Majority will be all but a distant dream.

MAGA loyalists are standing with Trump by introducing a bill to amend the Constitution and allow him a third term. And Republicans have even made a backup plan that includes JD Vance running for President with Donald Trump as his Vice President! Trump’s first 100 days have been CATASTROPHIC: they’re defying the Constitution, they’ve mishandled senstive information, and they are actively tanking our economy. We can't let Trump have a chance at a third term, so we need to act now. [Do you support Trump’s third term? | | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tac97d96f-4382-4d68-85d3-091bdabd5099/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

body:
| | | | | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDiY8W1fqivkuLaagzseQzA2LKa1T6J0CETCyNMowqH7vl4BKSiI1DSlKLiltj1URptUBdLpwIHOoUlanMdAtwzbl0BsgN0K6ZjWBUwjvCwo9&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==)
---
| |
---
| Greater Georgia Newsletter April 9, 2025
---
| The 2025 legislative session has come to an end, and the difference between the left's fixations and conservative achievements is clear.
While state liberals spent the session grandstanding -- even storming out over a vote to ban taxpayer-funded sex changes for prisoners -- real conservative leaders championed results for Georgia families. From $1 billion in tax savings and additional rebates to fully funding Promise Scholarships and passing protections for girls' sports, Georgia leadership delivered conservative victories.
This contrast makes plain what's on the line for the conservative movement as we prepare for next year's legislative session and gear up for next year's midterm elections.
The focus now shifts to educating voters about what these policies mean to them and engaging with voters in their communities. Our team and volunteers have been working nonstop to educate diverse communities, register voters, and monitor legislation that directly impacts your family.
---
| |
---
| 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION
---
| | [](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDlzjzEfcBJXvpVXmHm8xgP4qnpRBlb2cS-bvle8Op8K_v47ZLdvHGUX0w9pKcaR4_wJhYWZ1XfCTIHbVmStTQ9CYTOdokOJgv-F6dfuF3cQgJm5z1UNC0AWdhbKws8m6bh7_aLfgHHv1NvwI5dqZTMsb2mv5P1g1NgjymDkhJqOJDvWtMxj3yEiP_5rQgq_7AiwdVqKWlVVZ&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==)
---
| The Georgia General Assembly's 2025 legislative session has officially come to an end. Our team has been tracking legislation that is important to Georgia taxpayers and families. Below is an update on some important bills that we are monitoring as they head to Governor Kemp's desk:
Legislation Passed:
Taxes & Government Spending
* [HB 111](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWdvES1tZH0ONWBHkP4YgYEQKXauXNguT55NiN0xGfYHfFRQMOVWwv-nsELcTacSGFUnozwtuISCkHFxuceQzJQPU9TK2RsKWJm6flOiSL-ggzNIY-gHzWkw==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Sweeping income tax cut for Georgia families; returning more than $800 million to Georgia taxpayers.
* [HB 112](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWpwh42QIPtRwaGtJ1EX9T2HCYKui2Yc3S6bbrHdDuQ_rdZwmiWYrkfwV5gywAA9AcFJC7SJVtABqzQuRvq6JuZxBAdDdshsQChUdfpgXMIMyHEQRzxPPffA==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Returns $250-$500 to every qualifying Georgia taxpayer.
* [SB 68](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWahfPIzZ1hq9OsqhxQ2uMsIlpeIPGb4KKpQxapOf3YfFHO2E_Hc4y2e_Dsmoftn_b8T0Wv6k62GtpQ1ZH30a4hHGepo4j3NfR9EzmsKgzoPwYZI4tlNEe9w==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Protecting victim rights and avoiding crippling lawsuits to support Georgia businesses.
* [SB 69](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWjG7YksbFj8AkoUmf4q-5YMu4vLyZ8g5BgpvbzDSBB1NFmlfosWjBUHCVB8Aed4GObNPfh2io4hX5xpLX5Arf6Ijr4LAT8cbziZdwSlnk1ccSmv1vFtFhdQ==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Limits third-party litigation funders, requiring them to register and limiting foreign influence.

Education & Student Safety
* [HB 268](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWJTadOfJnPUP79g1O-aZwx_tsMRM-N77o-bkr03hZbMS_PoAyS-dok3P9GbjoXM8vGkSf7xZJ6RPp2gcqDRZWyThh_0MsNjL4E-xyvXpnHFccmJWU1anLsQ==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Implements new safety protocols and tougher penalties to mitigate threats against school children.
* [HB 340](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWK1VZOZ0vvObuZRUQVArpReUZaAWq4ptdil58efrBEgCnStf8qH7ZQYq2y9C2xLNh9HB6eEjVATsAORGdfyw0FAw34cq-08DpcaKYlHo0WQF05qSyFZRqpA==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Bans the use of cellphones, smartwatches, and tablets for K-8 grades, ensuring students have distraction-free learning environments.
* [HB 68](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWiMUeH-Z4VYXyRuKRMza5ID4u9TG21vDgOyXntgFP4qW_jG4EN1AfOHvueKsdFRWszphde3k28UNMwG8nQ8I1yw3yqFuLdpMDqTio264txDYFAtGsgLxsVQ==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Fully funds the Georgia Promise Scholarship.

Veterans & Military Support
* [HB 182](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWcPjPoFAofLDSV23zRKQT_2GVX0EypUlja7pCfJzUgFLsIUpWYW1vJEEAjsUT3ZAS9SkFq9qY6-ZVzvn4fgfn_40ffxyemw1IqYXK5-6LHohwDco5jKNziA==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Prohibits life insurance companies from denying claims made by families of Georgia veterans.
* [HB 266](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWDkswlWH_IRIQgGuxUUOAdyVqeTOchY0b3kmVgYr6lg2eSXybBXeRxlpNUt-ZXwTQW-nys6ak4oTC9ML5qOfo02klHJS8BIq25W3PO7HI7QiOMow07lyHKQ==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Exempts full-time active duty military income from the state income tax.

Family Values
* [HB 428](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWt_T_qjmLXkaBfF6gjejROs5xPrAtPHyy7CyOIyKnaLAJn4HukpVSBan5ttkNYM2ECbvXk0W7UazNRNaCskGDsMHm8Pc7vDYeiHUFJy3z7Nit24WiesL1yg==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Protects individual rights to IVF.
* [SB 1](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWyxNZ6dbR-lxrNn82CzlMPzJEI99W6lqeLjimjz7eRi4au-XqdTOCHBBpQU-iakvC-qK_aFjbdAIyE6ayMINl4yr1jXFEpFJBNcsyjTZzBap7Mcx5SXzbFw==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Prevents biological males from competing in women's sports.
* [SB 185](https://fsdy8nbbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jSRgd0zUm-pRAzsZnFGwaTt1Ky_VdA6pNM8yebLcIe85b5ZD8DGBDmmjJXJSDKoWjfGT95mX8woRkVAjv8NEwEwofaoc4rF7VXmjfWqqeoxhkQ5rYH4VAy1jgH8VydUZOFCIsyR3Xr62-DxOvAGbyCddOWS2OBIUAjOs_mh9z3VOOMXEsMFbEQ==&c=KdAFaAbNjPR0Lp2Pxmgpnp3QgY8HmDh3irqBHb6yUWm80m2jKOJ_Mw==&ch=3LBgETFquQNEieMUuoXyJvTbEUWSRefAjDheEFaB7ttlaYX2xtexGg==): Bans taxpayer funds for sex change procedures of inmates.

| 2024 Greater Georgia Annual Report

clean_body: | | | | | == | | | Greater Georgia Newsletter April 9, 2025 | The 2025 legislative session has come to an end, and the difference between the left's fixations and conservative achievements is clear. While state liberals spent the session grandstanding -- even storming out over a vote to ban taxpayer-funded sex changes for prisoners -- real conservative leaders championed results for Georgia families. From $1 billion in tax savings and additional rebates to fully funding Promise Scholarships and passing protections for girls' sports, Georgia leadership delivered conservative victories. This contrast makes plain what's on the line for the conservative movement as we prepare for next year's legislative session and gear up for next year's midterm elections. The focus now shifts to educating voters about what these policies mean to them and engaging with voters in their communities. Our team and volunteers have been working nonstop to educate diverse communities, register voters, and monitor legislation that directly impacts your family. | | | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION | | == | The Georgia General Assembly's 2025 legislative session has officially come to an end. Our team has been tracking legislation that is important to Georgia taxpayers and families. Education & Student Safety ==: Implements new safety protocols and tougher penalties to mitigate threats against school children. ==: Bans the use of cellphones, smartwatches, and tablets for K-8 grades, ensuring students have distraction-free learning environments. ==: Fully funds the Georgia Promise Scholarship. Veterans & Military Support ==: Prohibits life insurance companies from denying claims made by families of Georgia veterans. ==: Exempts full-time active duty military income from the state income tax. Family Values ==: Protects individual rights to IVF. ==: Prevents biological males from competing in women's sports. ==: Bans taxpayer funds for sex change procedures of inmates. | | | 2024 Greater Georgia Annual Report | | | Each year, Greater Georgia releases an annual report highlighting the work our team accomplished during the past calendar year. clean_body: | | | Y'all -- I won't waste your time: If you wanna prevent Trump from having another four years to do whatever the heck he wants, we've gotta take back the Senate ASAP. And how do we do that? By making sure every Democrat's on board and ready to roll. But I just talked to the folks at the DSCC, and they said your membership hasn't been activated yet for April! We have 'til midnight to reach our membership goal. If we fall short, defending reproductive rights, Medicare, Social Security, and DEMOCRACY ITSELF gets that much trickier. So I need to ask you now: | Thanks for taking a look at your DSCC membership, y'all. We're gonna get this done. body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

body:

| Peter,
---
There’s a lot that goes on behind the scenes in Washington that the American people don’t see.

**_But you’ve proven to be a trustworthy America First patriot, so I’m going to entrust _YOU_ with information that I can’t divulge publicly. _ **

I just ask that you keep what I’m about to tell you between us, Peter.

name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: ICYMI: Governor Braun Leads GOP Governors in Support of President Trump’s Budget Framework Passed by Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
<>

IN CASE YOU MISSED IT

Governor Braun Leads GOP Governors in Support of President Trump’s Budget
Framework Passed by Senate

April 7, 2025

President Donald J. Trump

The White House

1600 Pennsylvania Avenue, NW

Washington, D.C. 20500

Dear Mr. President,

As the Governors of States, we write to express our gratitude for your support
of the Senate’s amendment to the House Budget Resolution.

As you know, this budget resolution, which has now passed both chambers and
awaits final consideration in the United States House of Representatives, is a
preliminary step to unlocking a reconciliation bill that delivers on all of the
promises every Republican made to the American people.

On behalf of the citizens of our states, we also thank you for the immense
amount of work you and your administration have undertaken to reverse the
tremendous hardship endured by our citizens due to President Biden’s failed
policies. Your promises to reinstitute fiscal sanity, fight against the
weaponization of the justice system, secure our borders, and achieve energy
dominance are unmatched. As we have all seen, promises made, promises kept.

We, like you, understand that more must be done to fully implement the agenda
for which

millions of Americans voted to see realized. In particular, Congress must
deliver to your desk a reconciliation bill that reinforces your executive
actions and codifies in permanent law policies to secure the border, unleash
American energy, restore military supremacy, fight wasteful spending, prevent a
debilitating tax hike on working class Americans, and prevent a debt default.

We are on your side in supporting the Senate amendment to the House budget
resolution because we know that failure cannot be an option. The Democrats’
open border policies created a deadly flood of illegal immigrants in all our
states. Inflation and punishing energy regulations have siphoned money from the
pocketbooks of families. Without an extension of your Tax Cuts and Jobs Act,
taxpayers will suffer a multi-trillion-dollar tax hike.

We believe this budget resolution sets a strong foundation on which to build.
It provides

congressional Republicans with the tools they need to enact the entire Trump
agenda.

Again, we thank you for supporting this budget so Congress can start putting
pen to paper on the one, big, beautiful bill that will Make America Great Again.

Sincerely,

GOVERNOR MIKE BRAUN - Indiana

Governor Kay Ivey - Alabama

Governor Mike Dunleavy - Alaska

Governor Sarah Sanders - Arkansas

Governor Brian Kemp - Georgia

Governor Brad Little - Idaho

Governor Kim Reynolds - Iowa
Governor Jeff Landry - Louisiana
Governor Tate Reeves - Mississipi

Governor Mike Kehoe - Missouri
Governor Greg Gianforte - Montana
Governor Jim Pillen - Nebraska

Governor Kelly Armstrong - North Dakota
Governor Kevin Stitt - Oklahoma

Governor Henry Dargan McMaster - South Carolina

Governor Larry Rhoden - South Dakota
Governor Bill Lee - Tenessee
Governor Greg Abbott - Texas

Governor Spencer Cox - Utah
Governor Glenn Youngkin - Virginia
Governor Patrick Morrisey - West Virginia

Governor Mark Gordon - Wyoming

PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE.
NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. WWW.INDIANA.GOP.

101 W. OHIO ST., SUITE 2200 INDIANAPOLIS, IN 46204

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.email.in-gop.com/s/u/Ir3MJSrufWr6xzzcRwdVCcj93mS0PugBbV3V8cn6N0fz4q6RY4855gB6qQcQv7WMvysVtrbtdzm-HDiQniOX7TsRA8bFkL-MSs5uVT6omC_XhMY8Y2UKzi1Vm2axKk3y9EhAzaf4QDZKLqf-jjnUYjJVEWCG1UEsZsqdkiCWxBBBl2Dg6zroTH8g/w1XAUilPlt_ymi0Mwsklna3IzV64Jyi6/7>
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com <mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com>.
Don't want to receive these emails anymore?Unsubscribe

name: Care in Action
subject: Share a message of support for care workers!
body:
We need your voice.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105496924/538529552/664783965?ms=040925_powercapsule_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWRhNTViMC01YjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVXVZdAVIqoOyDMahU8OeB8cpwlGCPvjxtjaZsaFYjA=&emci=638f148c-ad14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=59da55b0-5b15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)
This week, thousands of care workers and advocates from Care in Action and our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance (NDWA), are coming together for the **[**_We Power Care 2025 Assembly._**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105496929/538529566/-1492286519?ms=040925_powercapsule_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWRhNTViMC01YjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVXVZdAVIqoOyDMahU8OeB8cpwlGCPvjxtjaZsaFYjA=&emci=638f148c-ad14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=59da55b0-5b15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)**
The Assembly is a powerful moment to celebrate the collective strength of care workers, strengthen our shared vision, and fuel the momentum of the care movement we’re building together.
**You can be a part of this celebration, no matter where you are in the world, by adding your voice to our _Power Capsule._**
The Power Capsule is a time capsule that will be opened five years from now — a lasting reminder of the wisdom, support and care that fuels our movement. We’re inviting our community to help fill the capsule with messages of hope, encouragement, and reflection for care workers.
**[**_Can you take a minute to add a message of encouragement to care workers into our _Power Capsule?__**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105496944/538529576/-1052118215?ms=040925_powercapsule_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWRhNTViMC01YjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVXVZdAVIqoOyDMahU8OeB8cpwlGCPvjxtjaZsaFYjA=&emci=638f148c-ad14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=59da55b0-5b15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)**
**_**********__[Add your message](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105496959/538529601/-1052118215?ms=040925_powercapsule_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWRhNTViMC01YjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVXVZdAVIqoOyDMahU8OeB8cpwlGCPvjxtjaZsaFYjA=&emci=638f148c-ad14-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=59da55b0-5b15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=864787)__**********_**
Your voice and your support for care workers truly matters – each message we receive will help us demonstrate the strength of our movement and the vital role of care workers in our society.
In this time of growing threats to workers' rights, impending cuts to Medicaid, and attacks on immigrant communities, our community is more important than ever. By sharing your message today, you will be showing care workers that you have their backs and that, together, we will continue to fight and win a future where every care worker is fully seen, valued, and respected.

clean_body: We need your voice. This week, thousands of care workers and advocates from Care in Action and our allied organization, the National Domestic Workers Alliance (NDWA), are coming together for the The Assembly is a powerful moment to celebrate the collective strength of care workers, strengthen our shared vision, and fuel the momentum of the care movement we’re building together. You can be a part of this celebration, no matter where you are in the world, by adding your voice to our Power Capsule. The Power Capsule is a time capsule that will be opened five years from now — a lasting reminder of the wisdom, support and care that fuels our movement. We’re inviting our community to help fill the capsule with messages of hope, encouragement, and reflection for care workers. ************ Your voice and your support for care workers truly matters – each message we receive will help us demonstrate the strength of our movement and the vital role of care workers in our society. In this time of growing threats to workers' rights, impending cuts to Medicaid, and attacks on immigrant communities, our community is more important than ever. By sharing your message today, you will be showing care workers that you have their backs and that, together, we will continue to fight and win a future where every care worker is fully seen, valued, and respected. ** ************** Thank you, Care in Action

→ If passed, this bill would force all Americans to **prove** their citizenship in person to be able to vote—making it harder for millions to vote.

**→ It would eliminate voter registration by mail, end voter registration drives, and end online registration overnight.

→ It would disenfranchise millions of Americans who live in rural areas, who do not possess a passport, and women who took their spouse’s name.**

The GOP’s goal is clear: They want to roll backvoting rights and undermine our democracy. But we won’t back down without a fight.

**[We need your help to push back against this dangerous agenda. Can you sign our petition to say NO to the “SAVE Act” now to protect the right to vote? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105497274/538530406/-1756948306?refcode=NDCAF_20250409_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Nzg0YjVkYS01YjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rCIbdeGlrmE-ZkB-F-097FcRuMUDuaOCYiBGaAdzj6Q=&emci=0e1782ca-9014-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=7784b5da-5b15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=48524772)**

clean_body: Say NO to the “SAVE Act,” protect the right to vote >> | = This is outrageous: Republicans are rushing the SAVE Act through Congress in an attempt to prevent millions of eligible American citizens from exercising their right to vote! ** | → If passed, this bill would force all Americans to prove their citizenship in person to be able to vote—making it harder for millions to vote. → It would eliminate voter registration by mail, end voter registration drives, and end online registration overnight. → It would disenfranchise millions of Americans who live in rural areas, who do not possess a passport, and women who took their spouse’s name. The GOP’s goal is clear: They want to roll backvoting rights and undermine our democracy. But we won’t back down without a fight. We need all hands on deck! FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a
"polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness.

Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter
storms.

_AND THEN BOOM!_

_DEMAND SURGED AND 4PATRIOTS SOLD OUT._

Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were

thanking their lucky stars.

Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling

Those who acted fast and got their 4PATRIOTS SOLAR GENERATOR
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/67fc3d2cf52a49b9bb515f7868259b61-c01154b8c27d4532a06f000bab62ab6b/63]
had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space
heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and
freezers.

Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights
came back on soon.

BUT THAT'S NOT WHY THIS GENERATOR IS GOING VIRAL...

NATIONAL SECURITY EXPERTS FEAR IMMINENT THREAT TO OUR POWER GRID

Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only
threat to our nation's crumbling power grid...

Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our
nation's power grid!

And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical
substations could trigger...

A NATIONWIDE BLACKOUT THAT COULD LAST UP TO 18 MONTHS!

A former CIA Director warned that an attack on America's
infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other
life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9
out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_

Despite this clear and present danger...

OUR GOVERNMENT IS WOEFULLY UNPREPARED

They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our
vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse
(EMP) and cyberattacks...

And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family.

IMAGINE A BLACKOUT LASTING NOT DAYS, BUT WEEKS OR MONTHS.

Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power
fails. An entire country plunged into darkness.

Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would
be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer – spoiled.

Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you
don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink,
cook or clean with.

This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat.

THAT'S WHY MANY AMERICANS ARE TAKING MATTERS INTO THEIR OWN HANDS AND
ARE SECURING THEIR OWN SOLAR POWERED GENERATOR.

Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless
supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most – and

POWER GENERATOR 2500X
[https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/67fc3d2cf52a49b9bb515f7868259b61-c01154b8c27d4532a06f000bab62ab6b/63].

NEVER NEEDS GAS, EVER.

[Patriot Power Generator 2500X]

With this NEW Patriot Power Generator 2500X...

* You get MORE power...

It was designed to safely and dependably meet your power needs. And

UNLIKE OTHER GENERATORS, YOU'LL NEVER RUN OUT OF GAS. You'll have a

You can take the Patriot Power Generator 2500X with you if you are

Even your coffee maker... power your cell phones, computers, radios...

NO DEADLY FUMES, AND SILENTLY STEALTHY

The PATRIOT POWER GENERATOR 2500X

CUSTOMERS LOVE THEIR PATRIOT POWER GENERATORS!

"My Patriot Power Generator arrived four days before Ian "the beast"

_BOB A.
"Could not be happier! Generator works flawlessly, solar works
flawlessly, plus all the other goodies in the package are amazing!
Would definitely recommend 4Patriots for all your generator and other

professional!"_

_CARLA U.
"The ice storms in February left us without any type of electricity
for a solid week. If it wasn't for the solar generator, my husband
wouldn't have been able to sleep with his CPAP and we would have been
in the dark for a week. It was very helpful and very convenient to be
able to keep it charging continuously by day in the sun. It's well
worth the money. Get off the fence and order this for the safety and
security of your family!"_

_BERNICE L.
"Don't wait to add this vital piece of equipment to your preparedness
arsenal! We were able to keep our lights on and our electronic
equipment charged for 5 days when the power went out last year. As
soon as we could, we purchased another generator!"_

_PATRICIA T.
"This is great not just emergencies, but everyday help as well! I
needed to repair my shed, but there's no power out there, and most of
my tools are plug-in electric. I was unhappily thinking about running
150ft of extension cords, then remembered my 4Patriots Solar
Generator! Worked like a charm. Utterly reliable and easy to use.

subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=22bddedfa94a46948fbc2b4fbbbfadf9&_e=ZZ6-DBgTtm-bWd4CLVpmyp15qTrw5V7JtkaboMU3tpqhqN6vwsbBW6GdfXdA6Nk06vB8oZoJF42S73j-PT1lziQHfDl8TKBXmncE3SaCR8vnqk3Ivv0mRhOPyB8AOAXT3_3beB2b6jQ5t4hxrtcAcBX5lD4BoPRzOGmuZAMVLV3RMNglvIebHv3RzIYgtp2GMe44PIk3qPzYSFY4HpI8Qntj5b1WjccUOZP6mdS9jbJWc8oO48hWwLdOBLHfnkp5KKs29uyiF5Xd7kimqXrqeKVDuKfa3LJ7ggRxV7JeKCldGwen7tFkeRqFQ5owOUK8WncnmmIDWnSkVbR_zFW3NIX7fG5ZAr_1RZ_1SmljoHNeWLakCjVj6G0O2VTgVxvt-1-Sf7IsYmtTSsAmAkqJ8epUsneeO3VXO8IfAHdaj5eDZ-cET1Cr8q8rMsgCGP88dUmj1FPD3ALlBokHNFJ21Q%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=22bddedfa94a46948fbc2b4fbbbfadf9&_e=ZZ6-DBgTtm-bWd4CLVpmyp15qTrw5V7JtkaboMU3tpqhqN6vwsbBW6GdfXdA6Nk06vB8oZoJF42S73j-PT1lziQHfDl8TKBXmncE3SaCR8vnqk3Ivv0mRhOPyB8AOAXT3_3beB2b6jQ5t4hxrtcAcBX5lD4BoPRzOGmuZAMVLV3RMNglvIebHv3RzIYgtp2GMe44PIk3qPzYSFY4HpI8Qntj5b1WjccUOZP6mdS9jbJWc8oO48hWwLdOBLHfnkp5KKs29uyiF5Xd7kimqXrqeKVDuKfa3LJ7ggRxV7JeKCkLCMakHB-I7Y_uY0lqG_lcFqloD4AWWHGR8z8qYobwkcYiNJ5jujYrm3RqWcQEj6CL1bL8Ga9EZ_O2SOHeBPSdGaa8QkM7DbdcFCi9OLGUikzJkhrzDzpDhyhQ6_JCEkR4r7Ld0IBZ8il2wgL4CSrL3g0eG8iPCeiXYrlepdnVmQ%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=22bddedfa94a46948fbc2b4fbbbfadf9&_e=ZZ6-DBgTtm-bWd4CLVpmyp15qTrw5V7JtkaboMU3tpqhqN6vwsbBW6GdfXdA6Nk06vB8oZoJF42S73j-PT1lziQHfDl8TKBXmncE3SaCR8vnqk3Ivv0mRhOPyB8AOAXT3_3beB2b6jQ5t4hxrtcAcBX5lD4BoPRzOGmuZAMVLV3RMNglvIebHv3RzIYgtp2GMe44PIk3qPzYSFY4HpI8Qntj5b1WjccUOZP6mdS9jbJWc8oO48hWwLdOBLHfnkp5KKs29uyiF5Xd7kimqXrqeKVDuKfa3LJ7ggRxV7JeKCmE97Exw53VxZq3ezH_-LpyiiGnCFdDvr1oHIkC2nbQ5DE-TsKOWPcnNQuq6tVdjfydAAuD3TKobxvYUN5LYsoTM8OmbmkYKSyPNTDof5MfYUpIOTojPmlztIImh653C_VlwqobKj1z9djE0FJGKTalr5HOr9uKnOwQAPbI8FV_sg%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=22bddedfa94a46948fbc2b4fbbbfadf9&_e=ZZ6-DBgTtm-bWd4CLVpmyp15qTrw5V7JtkaboMU3tpqhqN6vwsbBW6GdfXdA6Nk06vB8oZoJF42S73j-PT1lziQHfDl8TKBXmncE3SaCR8vnqk3Ivv0mRhOPyB8AOAXT3_3beB2b6jQ5t4hxrtcAcBX5lD4BoPRzOGmuZAMVLV3RMNglvIebHv3RzIYgtp2GMe44PIk3qPzYSFY4HpI8Qntj5b1WjccUOZP6mdS9jbJWc8oO48hWwLdOBLHfnkp5KKs29uyiF5Xd7kimqXrqeKVDuKfa3LJ7ggRxV7JeKCngcbc7BxkptpAkXG7o8ItMUWU8rshG3ZKG8pAfEizf8hV5pXPsxfvXXfa_hVJRa8OickxVQ-_sjZGf8mBYdW8WJMC3jinSontMD0-kzXV_njniTT3el__M-4hUYgq8bNsBOMgTaG2YtWXUhI0ICyaYjeSmsQp0ZnPcD0VI_1kNnA%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=22bddedfa94a46948fbc2b4fbbbfadf9&_e=ZZ6-DBgTtm-bWd4CLVpmyp15qTrw5V7JtkaboMU3tpqhqN6vwsbBW6GdfXdA6Nk06vB8oZoJF42S73j-PT1lziQHfDl8TKBXmncE3SaCR8vnqk3Ivv0mRhOPyB8AOAXT3_3beB2b6jQ5t4hxrtcAcBX5lD4BoPRzOGmuZAMVLV3RMNglvIebHv3RzIYgtp2GMe44PIk3qPzYSFY4HpI8Qntj5b1WjccUOZP6mdS9jbJWc8oO48hWwLdOBLHfnkp5KKs29uyiF5Xd7kimqXrqeKVDuKfa3LJ7ggRxV7JeKCk2vBr-QSJbfFVOMOtspO7ae1XRC_vaC2O5DTCSI3mldFHsafUwqi7MVv9QF2Z634r7cC7CSKkzNDduWTlbNovj-ui6K8LqI6hBTxrWtZuupEMj-3CMZcptB1tXdb3qN8R_eOFcB-KDhPDRuBiFHV__DGnnE27ugoOiAssJdmF_uA%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=22bddedfa94a46948fbc2b4fbbbfadf9&_e=ZZ6-DBgTtm-bWd4CLVpmyp15qTrw5V7JtkaboMU3tpqhqN6vwsbBW6GdfXdA6Nk06vB8oZoJF42S73j-PT1lziQHfDl8TKBXmncE3SaCR8vnqk3Ivv0mRhOPyB8AOAXT3_3beB2b6jQ5t4hxrtcAcBX5lD4BoPRzOGmuZAMVLV3RMNglvIebHv3RzIYgtp2GMe44PIk3qPzYSFY4HpI8Qntj5b1WjccUOZP6mdS9jbJWc8oO48hWwLdOBLHfnkp5KKs29uyiF5Xd7kimqXrqeKVDuKfa3LJ7ggRxV7JeKCl8ihYEiVHLy6Fq9_Nn4r_3iqfN88ZQB1fPmg1F6PtWsxbXwqsXrDV9mX6v8VZVHIhzpw8lej-67UVuI7gnndmJWwSb0J0qwT2f0C5_l__Pv5BcMuzsKh-F1ezH1e6JbbMYhq3qiq-ngHsf-VqYTUBi952v64FwPqjLAdIirVYHmQ%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=22bddedfa94a46948fbc2b4fbbbfadf9&_e=ZZ6-DBgTtm-bWd4CLVpmyp15qTrw5V7JtkaboMU3tpqhqN6vwsbBW6GdfXdA6Nk06vB8oZoJF42S73j-PT1lziQHfDl8TKBXmncE3SaCR8vnqk3Ivv0mRhOPyB8AOAXT3_3beB2b6jQ5t4hxrtcAcBX5lD4BoPRzOGmuZAMVLV3RMNglvIebHv3RzIYgtp2GMe44PIk3qPzYSFY4HpI8Qntj5b1WjccUOZP6mdS9jbJWc8oO48hWwLdOBLHfnkp5KKs29uyiF5Xd7kimqXrqeKVDuKfa3LJ7ggRxV7JeKCmu-_4-zV5ftfGcl2GTWKxeRuK5vBNZUT5wvd-oScRy8l5_yyn-CsuohAfh9TgYBOZw7YVK6ntkZAFydNRiuprazE1OxuJt4_M3qYjBN1nfr83uVJEjCXttE8SEQgpUMjO-9gTtyDWsfR0NJF630uCL7ZOqqkn0wOusBpWyrPt3rA%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")

---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my "First 100 Days Survey"** so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first. | | | "CLICK TO BEGIN" - STEVE SCALISE | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105498741/538535913/-785282667?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc1MDdjOC01ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XOzkWSJD7sQrFY0v_fTYvQdjkfFKgYm1Vv_kP47tGE=)
