Peter, I don’t have to tell you the urgency of this moment. It calls for fresh, bold, courageous leadership. **That’s why I’m so proud to fight alongside my new colleague in Congress, Emily Randall.** Since her swearing-in, Emily has been unstoppable: From rallying against Elon Musk’s corruption at the Treasury to defending Medicaid on Capitol Hill. In just a few short weeks, Emily has established herself as a hardworking, dedicated representative for working people who isn’t afraid to speak truth to power. **[If you agree that we need more leaders like Emily fighting Trump, please split a donation between our campaigns today →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105498745/538535918/-1293125989?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc1MDdjOC01ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XOzkWSJD7sQrFY0v_fTYvQdjkfFKgYm1Vv_kP47tGE=)** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105498748/538535921/-1293125989?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc1MDdjOC01ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XOzkWSJD7sQrFY0v_fTYvQdjkfFKgYm1Vv_kP47tGE=) Emily and I made history by becoming the first LGBTQ+ people to represent our states in Congress. But that’s not all we have in common. We both understand what it’s like to come from working-class households, pay our own bills, and help family members navigate the healthcare system. We both understand that Trump and Musk’s cruel cuts aren’t just numbers on a page — they have direct, damaging effects on the lives of our neighbors. And we both understand that we have a duty to fight like hell for the people who elected us, not for billionaires and big corporations. **[Together, we’re working on two fronts: Blocking the worst of the Trump-Musk agenda and organizing early to elect more bold Democrats to Congress. Can you split a donation of $5, $25, or any amount to fuel these efforts and send a message about the kind of leadership we need in D.C. right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105498752/538535925/-1293125989?refcode=AU_RAB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc1MDdjOC01ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3XOzkWSJD7sQrFY0v_fTYvQdjkfFKgYm1Vv_kP47tGE=)** Thank you so much for your resilience in this difficult time. In service, — Becca

clean_body: The fundraising freeze is over and we need your help. $5. That’s what we’re asking from you today. Now that the legislative session is over, we need to hit the ground running to stay in the fight for Wes’s vision for Maryland. Your contribution of $5 — or more — will directly power our work. $5 today will help prepare us for anything that might come our way. $5 today to get us back on track with our opponents who have been able to raise money while the governor has been hard at work. $5 to continue fighting to protect workers across the state, invest in safer communities, improve access to health care, and more. We’re still short $6,000 of our $10,000 end-of-freeze goal and need your help. If everyone reading this chipped in $5, we’d make up that gap instantly. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for all that you do, Team Wes Moore

subject: Wiley Nickel is the leader North Carolina needs
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04092025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email04092025&amount=25]
Peter,
We wanted to share some exciting news out of North Carolina.
Wiley Nickel is running for the United States Senate!
North Carolina needs bold, new leadership. Wiley will fight hard for working families and won’t shy away from the tough battles — not billionaires and special interests putting all of their energy every day of this administration into robbing from the poor to make the rich richer.
We have a golden opportunity to flip North Carolina's Senate seat by defeating one of the most at-risk Republicans, Thom Tillis. That means your support plays a pivotal role in the outcome of this race.
As a state senator and United States Congressman, Wiley has a proven track record of working to secure a better future for North Carolina — and now, we need him to fight for us in the U.S. Senate.
But we have our work cut out for us, Peter. This race is critical to our fight to win the U.S. Senate majority, and Thom Tillis’ Republican megadonors are committed as ever to trying to stop Wiley in his tracks.
Here’s where it gets interesting: Ineffective, tired politicians like Thom Tillis are underestimating what we can do when we put our weight behind Wiley. When he was elected to Congress, he did it by flipping a Republican stronghold seat blue, so he knows firsthand that it takes a dedicated grassroots movement to win tough races. He’s lived it. That’s why he’s counting on us to help elect him to the Senate any way we can.
We need all hands on deck to help Wiley retire Thom Tillis, win North Carolina’s Senate race, and do our part in the fight to win a Democratic Senate majority in 2026. Will you help his campaign hit the ground running by pitching in a split donation today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/emgotvpacnickel26?refcode=emgotvpacnickel26&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Thank you,

Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.

subject: Judicial Watch Update: New Numbers Show Over Five Million Names Cleaned from Voter Rolls Nationwide
body:
Judicial Watch announced that its analysis and use of voter
registration lists has led to lawsuits and legal actions under
the National Voter Registration Act (NVRA) that have resulted in the
removal of five million names from voter rolls in nearly a dozen
states and localities over the last several years.

name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/VCSTPkNnmsGlg84Pa3ldpYfE_0-_FvLdxWQWdIvMC38rkRBmCDIfcmp3VbKj924CU1PegeQ4hZDyQ8BW4X-KctNaJBSTZ2MlDEEbBZfIkkc1V7nxIYBKLuGAwAV1SZ04T5n2gg6vrd5zWesij_16m7mmGF8ZAKVxfrSAqPvaO4FqFG8U9ol-JCTgpSqLOcUhRPI3_zWtj87l4aew7i4R1nS0Ot5DIENmn4RbAr2N0CATNjMqjZ2KVNCnxs6RlXdXkxFefb_z-bZVBF4pFa_kUmZw4GY144Ix0E6DgFyV7kgN2hH6YNcizExMTEjYMxv3eK2pUXs8thlx7EladuKVSOU4eXNQarn6xJMr6pg1LwpR4uLsr1PbiUkCSJjFi5nk__87UZqj_gP0k4_9FM_QaUkQehyBFzTKvsG8Fy9CIOZaAWezJuS__sLMOCrOXYxC9v3NmlzhE8yb6eknI_glE6sOZXcO5-iBBOkWq0qAhkAVVLmd81TcuYd3f72k9g/N1o6wkR-o6ArW6xBGi_jiHfJzsfrH5b0/7 "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/tw9Ld1WqC4YlGyK-CK98kCuD1PNuQnmdaYJVdd1nU7dTwvfyd3wQ37hys9k-v0tLZR5oT3vdgTdd4JO6v7P2os9Pfl9Ibym-Y4g6ToTjDqpeDyxvEnj1ZxZajN4JV9wWqQQrAvLbneLVM9R8tq1brRNF9iZ-VtI_Nbc0WqeeAxdE1gWKC6qDqWp6Gd3YpgBw6VJpYrFv2JvpVmC7fAYIdBRi48Ew96zVBuHgt1pfEu-jF6G7jd4ITtTfJnibyApWm0HET-XkhtLqyTwa60ZzhnkGbqkXURDu_6k3MMEd6VXRaz7nO8O1Yeh6FkNUuN9h3aV63xyFGysm536yAGnX7i91G6UQrCmE1tJ7YSGTjxKTyMDoHDnEE9MHgKRp9I9jVwUGgLJDw6SBCV4TlHYufaDrQbm-S-X3Hy5MhtFtFaMx8NhZ9x6ugSrCRhYCcl5y1Cd37h7ZdioZ_iHb9wm6a7IPyP4V8MzbInGIWUR6jEoVPd8STOPFNoMaOs58IA/tqtx2yAZFyt3TJIav6oqMYPUqmEiRgyQ/7 "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/Ymy36oBymXfac67VNnxWjGHtY8ONhmzSkTeIcJeWMActjSri6E8EEA9YeAprxjVYtLQL1EpCExh3_M_qrXU_2i__22jX3xPSI35Lt8bWyP72_BraPxPVxJh6PFVDYSdAxWDatrkrvf1JQdVzdZJN01Q4rAYFNhheuu0GK-2toTSPFyDh55XDgRSIuDCL6Tqi_jk5dk6xPVPThFUe85lMhzSndVwNwk0HcVCPXAYHElLSZA68HOnQMab98wny6jbvpPIctVVuEere3fKBO8rXDvqQZxjDX0Y4dumnLXadQ6fvip9YaDKapJn4LPNVAV8ubcn54ubv9VnQPfhxNHQ0gpeMWrp1yhsjG3sTK2HYYitbIPEUrUadUFLlF6yg8fPnsXwjlsxCM4rpcsnR6i-oE7UI0MZAayKppDucaLsyKDE2W7NTqd7R3VdRApb_xYZzKMOhmB8-iVZ7q9mhpZCrQZZmmLVty80qwi8VwS2zEE5J50ZE8-Op1wRSG9ZkCA/DRd4oMdABTMfF1S88mo3YXs9sJxdwV9M/7 "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/W4VpT4cHqEbEb0q6o200mosgzopJ3D1Hx3oHakoC12W3g9y9uQhmS6_-TjUGoTTJ5-cTlblibKY1t2UcUZExI4n27iSjtzjkcGopLSECN6igQV5b6dvcc16nL0Ed8-HD7kVJuzJEp3Yh17uYcJllQWnMSfzVzMG69Ye43AGhj2me_4KwJBXHKHPRxitdRb0Tn2f-VXDHW6K74HXvb2wBOfM44dfskN3bdjjtUZkCLA0TbfXQxnKsE8mkTPbp0dSeR_pCWGmHZ3XBPPM5W7g289lIiRYYB4o6Padc81JR7neg1jq_cDzHM5lpdjNU5gg3vH_ZHV4NJbx0Nz15z5dXoi_IXEzEtckjworC-IjlholISx_fNwu0kZj1gby6AaCTwtu9HumhCp2GcFUB_BaK_bOqGLwhSAVICpbs9Giaddzn2ZqNgqmKLM-tpkeqAHmszh6iH9GpiB4CwkpQOt0sySa6cdhQcidHlt7szW-6m8iOtQCd3331H7-eB6ZPnQ/Fgj5ec0OYIrGt09qJYceE6OFvpBMyfaN/7 "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](https://links.conservativesgive.com/s/c/6Pl9stW29GowmCSJs5CNKqar_ZIlLLRXu-WSFI4iiuOXkYVmx8g7rUzE_JYHQZ9ot2yMUwWTynWjD-6Og2vuHVNs2oXL79Bli2WbRsro6D6_ale-M0eYVxrC8vk1T5zaCCu64kCq4i8VemIOFLY21hEKXm42o5Cg6jo1BKvJmXLnVnF8nMKooRfbHaaqcnMEbRvRO0Gb6spRBVD8kUsvEKTKH_X-edqC_NgNTKnl39yv4dD8u46DQxsBw5os_9aV5UKa4rLpTlilC7VQG29UyoQIXsgEk-YMK6qyZ5NDdZo56aYznvDCLqRVwdHvVbBiby0sYysFOcpIbu8NtskK0fvPdSa63f_SGFpGxqS4KkkgJGEJ0ba6tiWI6VL8-JzJZrFb7-UVEEWWuag8EhvVdDt2kLqY49LBieXf0tueeG2BywC1OW1zhCmUKz87JbA5ctL1hxecGLQ7ANB_uo2Y_8qz1Jq22EcvoqqU668Jik566tjapcuHY_fKwZjW4Q/hvH2n_3gEmuDOPAqvEPvAGVzQ0Ygu5FH/7 "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. Donald Trump has been on a reign of terror since he re-entered the White House three months ago.

→ He **pardoned** every single January rioter.
→ He **froze** funding for Medicare, Social Security, and more.
→ He **handed** over power to his “Co-President” Elon Musk to gut the federal government and essential institutions.
→ He **imposed** economic tariffs on key American allies like Canada, Mexico and the European Union

But now, Democrats are ready to draft articles of impeachment!

Just look at what Jamie Raskin said:
[]()
[Can you imagine what a THIRD Trump term would look like?? **WE DON’T WANT TO FIND OUT!** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60502?t=8&akid=22985%2E4449941%2EsN-21e)

So, please, don’t waste another minute without signing...

name: Tim Scott
subject: Thom Tillis will ALWAYS put America First.

body:
Help us keep North Carolina red.

Friend,

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, I'm committed to growing our Senate majority in 2026--and that starts with defending key seats like North Carolina.

Thom Tillis is a proven conservative fighter who has stood on the frontlines with me for years. Together, we've worked tirelessly to lower taxes, secure our border, and push back on the radical Left-wing agenda.

I'm proud of all we've accomplished, and there is so much more to do--especially now that President Trump is back in the White House.

body:
Thank you to everyone who responded to our 2025 Strategy Survey. | | | **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105500670/538542484/-1836761232?refcode=header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGIxZWM3Yi02MjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTH1BD7AK-Wi_GNkdQs1sFtUm-BL-byCpPHqDV-s_4E=)**
---
Peter, Thank you to everyone who responded to our 2025 Strategy Survey. We compiled a report based on the hundreds of responses we received, and we wanted to share some of the key findings with you. **What keeps you up at night? **
Nearly every survey respondent shared deep concerns about the impact of Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s reckless actions. You highlighted rising costs, threats to our democracy, and eroding access to health care as urgent threats. Many of you also expressed concerns about how Musk’s cuts have cost your hard-working friends and neighbors their jobs. **Where do we go from here?**
Respondents said we should fight back against the Trump administration, sharpen our messaging and communication, and harness nontraditional media to reach young people. You want our party to speak louder, reach further, and organize earlier—and we’re ready to rise to that challenge. **What gives you hope?**
Many respondents said they’re proud to live in Minnesota—a state that protects our rights, values democracy, and welcomes people of all backgrounds. Your neighbors, your communities, and our state’s resistance to the Trump-Musk agenda are a source of strength and inspiration. **Let’s turn hope into action.**
An overwhelming **92.8 percent of respondents** said they’re ready to support our work in 2025 beyond. With your help, we can turn that energy into action. While there are many ways to support the DFL, making a donation is one of the easiest and most effective ways to strengthen our team and support the work we do across Minnesota. Our records indicate that you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, which allows Minnesotans to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our party and receive a full refund from the state. **[Peter, will you make a fully refundable $75 contribution today to help us stand up to the Trump administration and fight for our shared values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105500702/538542543/-998596068?refcode=body&amount=75&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzU5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGIxZWM3Yi02MjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GTH1BD7AK-Wi_GNkdQs1sFtUm-BL-byCpPHqDV-s_4E=)** | | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Thank you to everyone who responded to our 2025 Strategy Survey. | | | = Peter, Thank you to everyone who responded to our 2025 Strategy Survey. We compiled a report based on the hundreds of responses we received, and we wanted to share some of the key findings with you. What keeps you up at night? Nearly every survey respondent shared deep concerns about the impact of Donald Trump and Elon Musk’s reckless actions. You highlighted rising costs, threats to our democracy, and eroding access to health care as urgent threats. Many of you also expressed concerns about how Musk’s cuts have cost your hard-working friends and neighbors their jobs. Where do we go from here? Respondents said we should fight back against the Trump administration, sharpen our messaging and communication, and harness nontraditional media to reach young people. You want our party to speak louder, reach further, and organize earlier—and we’re ready to rise to that challenge. What gives you hope? Many respondents said they’re proud to live in Minnesota—a state that protects our rights, values democracy, and welcomes people of all backgrounds. Your neighbors, your communities, and our state’s resistance to the Trump-Musk agenda are a source of strength and inspiration. Let’s turn hope into action. An overwhelming 92.8 percent of respondents said they’re ready to support our work in 2025 beyond. With your help, we can turn that energy into action. While there are many ways to support the DFL, making a donation is one of the easiest and most effective ways to strengthen our team and support the work we do across Minnesota. Our records indicate that you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, which allows Minnesotans to donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our party and receive a full refund from the state. = | | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = Thank you, Darwin Forsyth Communications Director Minnesota DFL ** | = = = Monthly supporters are the backbone of all we do. name: Leader Scalise
subject: We need to talk about last week's election…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race – the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE | |
---
| | | We need to**** talk about last week's election...

First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. _**[Now I need to level with you for a moment. That's why I'm coming to you with three pressing updates:](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=f5b695f778dc42ca9437a7bdc7d4d427&_e=ff7La4Ei6_2vLVwLXdd1IYpG34rjcGyfRmamWMw-OHqKqCTuDTcjN3sqFTpV1PCDwh61FdP2xx752kVAf9os18Zyuo4lbDNczXIwEOucq6_bPG_D__tZep-sSq-c_dp-0EnrYXIX27828PaDX91IvKx7IspMhdS8NsjCG6xy1TcJqH1yQCHkTYjoWE1TD9Fq8ZDzN4fWtJy_BJszUli0df5tg8Xu3rqTeSrJ-uar_pgNw18zkh-kVhJtlP6112I2zNIEBtx5qY1KHcXktdNabpAvD_rQXRq53H-Ugw28n0AyoOxlCSmsp_8S83KsvYeCddShx6DgMYyEAc_Ca7cIiD_NHjUYeGrYK_eS18nKGtRdRBLJ7TT-FMdqMPflupuv0zNlGTQjO0qTqlbKrfKZ4HJU5x7DyMjHcwzROI8-DlU%3D "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:")**_
1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE
2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already
3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE

I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here.

_President Trump 's entire legislative agenda comes to a SCREECHING HALT if this keeps happening._ We have the better ideas, we have the better candidates... but none of that matters if our message is drowned out by a wall of false and misleading Democrat attack ads.

We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we've worked so hard for.

So that's why I'm doing something I've never done before.

I'm setting up an emergency one-million-dollar fundraising blitz between now and the end of the week. I'll need your help to get there. It's an ambitious goal but I have faith in this team. **This will help send badly needed reinforcements to the key races in Wisconsin AND fortify our defenses in other must-win races too.**

"Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:" 1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE 2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already 3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here. name: Tim Scott
subject: Thom Tillis is a conservative you can trust

body:
Help us keep North Carolina red.

Friend,

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, I'm committed to growing our Senate majority in 2026--and that starts with defending key seats like North Carolina.

Thom Tillis is a proven conservative fighter who has stood on the frontlines with me for years. Together, we've worked tirelessly to lower taxes, secure our border, and push back on the radical Left-wing agenda.

I'm proud of all we've accomplished, and there is so much more to do--especially now that President Trump is back in the White House.

**[But make no mistake: The liberal establishment is coming for this seat, and every dollar will make a difference in this critical race.](https://links.fullmagnews.com/s/c/vlGACnSmHEgFJ_lZ11CVW3CywcnShcpzQoHLNjJ_HdRQv5UcWeG_0a51s6d6dpfD7-HgHvYK5YLrObpR_jl9s32bzI6QEDAKnYw5z6JHC0SIY0hE8sLdQ_39sGJtfAjwrzyaJ8BbbYKyHh6DHl-TnwaWZVyJtD2OcPKbVq779BMtLWvnqeD8YipUmCvEe69Oi-4a3cKi5acwxwOZ5e-fgHOEqXTd-W-FP2G-twnZ0r8aXQU_O_H3_AJ3BvE06o9M66zgCmNH2OK6FZMkXj7b8USLNdv-YYihSyiLJ9o3G3gT6d7vWfaQ2aI10ec_z2v1Py61E7gnjkVBky1A2pgpIJctneeFLxYksLRomtXgYnEOBYpEh2_0kc_AwQmWFv46Vr0oVDNt8t1H0NyKrB9MESVbYbBdWsoobt3axaThmdN2Ran2jbzOnShh_fRht8or_fknbZWs_psoNuR13kBf_sj3zTOkE56yvT9d61iWqjQqaGvtSzgD2AOjH6gCESn7v5XCn7b53h5OibYMm3X1tHcvurtWDIn5SeNBhXwZ/1IrBwBDFKvuy0SbsYrpxlhkz9HPiARDg/7)**

clean_body: Help us keep North Carolina red. Friend, As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee, I'm committed to growing our Senate majority in 2026--and that starts with defending key seats like North Carolina. Thom Tillis is a proven conservative fighter who has stood on the frontlines with me for years. Together, we've worked tirelessly to lower taxes, secure our border, and push back on the radical Left-wing agenda. I'm proud of all we've accomplished, and there is so much more to do--especially now that President Trump is back in the White House. ****************************************************************************************************** We're not just fighting to hold the Senate--we're fighting for a stronger, more conservative future. Your support will ensure we have the resources to take on the Left, expand our majority, and keep delivering real results for the American people. Let's keep Thom where we need him most: fighting for North Carolina in the U.S. Senate. Thank you, Senator Tim Scott (R-SC) ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Pop Acta Media | Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

name: Mark Warner
subject: Fired up.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
I got a little fired up in my hearing yesterday

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105502798/538549818/1894416887?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_USTR_250409_T1_1_a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjg4YjhhZS02NjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TuuAi2MSbY8ELsQ-5yUL1VTXhfLwm0eQ7VLRZMjTXE4=) Derek, yesterday in a Senate Finance Committee hearing, I got a little fired up.

I couldn’t help it. After experiencing the fallout of Trump’s tariffs, I was determined to get answers for Americans on these _disastrous_ policies. Why are we putting our economy in hospice over trade policies that the administration KNOWS don’t make any sense?

Unfortunately, when I questioned Trump’s top trade rep, Jamieson Greer, he didn’t have any real answers. **He couldn’t even defend the policies. He only gave me excuses.**

That’s why I told him _he’s a much smarter person than the answers he gave me._ But that’s exactly the problem, Derek. **The people Trump selected to help him run our government? They’re not serious people. They’re not qualified for these incredibly important jobs. If they were, they wouldn’t let Trump make these sloppy, chaotic mistakes.**

I’m not afraid to fight back against every ridiculous, dangerous policy the Trump administration brings forward – because I’ll always speak up when they make you less safe, healthy, and free. But that means they’ll do whatever it takes to defeat me – and with Elon Musk on their side, they’ve got the money to do exactly that.

[_**So I’m asking: will you pitch in to my reelection campaign so I can keep fighting for folks like you in the name: America250
subject: What Does America Mean to YOU? Submit Now for a Chance to Earn an Epic Field Trip!
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj1lmujogdcxrt9zffy4n5b34sea938okbohj504j5z7pujezgz51rkyxrwphja0ji2i99m6ej869j0ynz1bp&__stmp=sugoma&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sugoma&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkvto0d2ir32z4rysw9phdxic8433kam4rpgxsryq25054lqf9ta18gt3u9z84w9co14f36im3eyf6xhi8ulgsm3q7ansz5mdjgc2lu0flg7xi5mg1mwy7akb45wb66x7jra0tyvwn62ueynmqxp&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sugoma&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sugoma&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sugoma&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sugoma&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6dkvto0d2ir32z4rysw9phdxilh6vncy4ioxmmyf9wqcglrbovt4g7emlm1poablny93sfyydodyk5mncbpyht2vg34tmpxsmaabwjtuz6rhbifgthkq797n8q1ru5lc5w750ek9vrohe0tby831t&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sugoma&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sugoma&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: Jay Jones
subject: Our families are paying the price
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=other]
Folks – the job of Attorney General isn’t about politics. It’s about upholding your sworn oath to the Constitution of the United States, the Constitution of Virginia, and protecting the people of Virginia.
But here in Virginia, Attorney General Jason Miyares prioritizes his allegiance to Donald Trump over the people, leaving our families and communities vulnerable to far-right attacks.
If you’re ready to retire Virginia's MAGA Attorney General, can you rush a special contribution right now to fuel this grassroots campaign? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025]
Attorney General Jason Miyares is failing us. When asked if he would take action to protect Virginians from Trump’s reckless decisions, he shrugged it off, saying, “That’s just not what we do.”
When Virginians were illegally purged from the voter rolls last year, Miyares didn’t just ignore it — he actively defended the voter purge in court, siding with those trying to make it harder for people to vote. Protecting Virginians’ fundamental right to vote? That’s just not what he does.
When Trump froze federal loan and grant funding, putting thousands of small businesses, law enforcement jobs, and healthcare providers at risk, attorneys general across the country took action. Miyares, once again, stayed on the sidelines. Protecting Virginia’s economy? That’s just not what he does.
When the Trump administration fired thousands of federal workers overnight, 20 attorneys general went to court to stop him and protect their citizens and Miyares had every opportunity to join the fight to protect them. Instead, he stood by while Virginians lost their jobs, their paychecks, and their ability to provide for their families. Standing up for Virginians in the face of Trump’s political games? That’s just not what he does.
And this negligence isn’t an isolated failure — it’s a pattern.
As Virginia’s next Attorney General, I won’t sit back while Virginians are under attack. I’ll fight for Virginia workers when their jobs are on the line, protect small businesses from reckless economic policies, and stand up for Virginia families when MAGA extremists try to take away their rights.
But we need a strong group of grassroots supporters on our side to defeat Jason Miyares. Please chip in $10 or whatever you can spare to help uplift our campaign >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_em_q22025?amount=10]
DONATE $10 → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VQlnDTm9bUaZLp5Kq5T65A2]
DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT → [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VQlnDTm9bUaZLp5Kq5T65A2]
Thank you,
Jay Jones

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/YqPmCIa7-kyhl9zzn7GjiQ2?unsubscribedata=Gsb4gVw6TaPPIYt3gj7m%2BHlx6kBdpDmFRsgi50ATtsnqxQqM79KBGfl%2FrHB3lay%2ByeRo77q0956q30e9j7zQJ7VzZ20WzazSdaHKlpYcoZqff7EUx0NJvNiPq42Q7caruiP2CX%2BFFGlVA5J2OZG5W0pHwIur%2BlM2xkApZtzJoZJA%2BO6b%2BhyLgLVSt3rQ7NCzbHhDUyLb1oA%2BWaEKKs1XC9uIkgi4Y9e5juIlc%2F2TrJW5TWbVV1MD3sDn3p%2Fv7%2BpvOmynAjuT%2BAM1E6DKKiNVFA2VYb%2B48pIa%2FzpOfMSEMH1EHSfPvwhMf9U0UDrDSFQ5lVks9u8whiCjdts64Te8X8ycwctqVigHX5C4IkYhxnj1jS5ckmoGqCwPlo7Dd%2BXC1P%2FuuSCOkmrEa3%2BZuD4UuW8UnhMQnl%2BFkVa9yVdhAVfDCvaMZATJ92%2BqHeW5w5Hx .

name: Democracy On The Line
subject: We can flip North Carolina blue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
|
---
Peter,

With a president who’s trampling the Constitution, an unelected billionaire wreaking havoc on our government, and a spineless Republican senator bending the knee to Trump, North Carolina is in dire need of bold, new leadership. Our friend, Wiley Nickel, is the leader we need at this moment. We know he will fight for working families. But that’s only if we do our part.

This election presents a unique chance to unseat one of the most vulnerable Republicans, Thom Tillis, and flip North Carolina's Senate seat blue. That means your donation could have an outsized impact in securing a Democratic majority. That’s why we’re excited to share that Wiley Nickel is running for the United States Senate!

**[Wiley has the vision to make real progress for North Carolina and the courage to fight for what’s right. Before we tell you more about him and this race, will you join us in support of his campaign by pitching in a split donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105503468/538552133/-1690804306?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250409_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ODkxYTY3LTY4MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dZpbqGn8NuYuEZJ91kpIuQxg-ez5-NoLNECxpzAru8U=)** | **[CHIP IN $7 NOW](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105503469/538552134/-1690804306?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250409_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ODkxYTY3LTY4MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dZpbqGn8NuYuEZJ91kpIuQxg-ez5-NoLNECxpzAru8U=)**
---
Thom Tillis has served in the Senate for more than 10 years, and if there’s one thing he’s proven, it’s this: When the chips are down and things are tough, he will always side with the billionaires and extremists who are actively working to make life harder for North Carolina’s working families.

Wiley does things differently. He has a proven record of standing up for hardworking North Carolinians and families across the state. From serving in President Obama's administration, to representing North Carolina for two terms in the State Senate, to flipping an ‘unwinnable’ district to serve in Congress where he fought to make life more affordable and end partisan gerrymandering — Wiley is the real deal.

Now, he’s not just ready — he’s fired up to take his fight to the United States Senate.

This election will be a battle between change vs. more of the same. Wiley knows that business as usual in Washington right now is simply not working, and he can bring the bold leadership that North Carolina and our country is counting on for a better future with more rights, not fewer.

**This race represents one of the best chances we have of flipping the Senate blue in 2026,** and we need all hands on deck to make sure Wiley can hit the ground running in his fight to win this seat. He needs our help to reach voters across the state with his message of hope and a game plan to shake things up and make our government work for the people again.

[**So Peter, are you ready to retire Thom Tillis, elect Wiley to the United States Senate, and put us one step closer to securing a Senate Democratic majority? If so, please split a donation between Democracy On The Line and Wiley Nickel so he can bring his fight to the Senate →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105503470/538552135/-1690804306?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20250409_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ODkxYTY3LTY4MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dZpbqGn8NuYuEZJ91kpIuQxg-ez5-NoLNECxpzAru8U=)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Wiley Nickel and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately:
****[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105503471/538552136/-1690804306?amount=10&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,250,500&express_lane=true&refcode=DOTL_20250409_EMSPL_E2_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQ3ODkxYTY3LTY4MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dZpbqGn8NuYuEZJ91kpIuQxg-ez5-NoLNECxpzAru8U=)****

clean_body: | Peter, With a president who’s trampling the Constitution, an unelected billionaire wreaking havoc on our government, and a spineless Republican senator bending the knee to Trump, North Carolina is in dire need of bold, new leadership. Our friend, Wiley Nickel, is the leader we need at this moment. We know he will fight for working families. But that’s only if we do our part. This election presents a unique chance to unseat one of the most vulnerable Republicans, Thom Tillis, and flip North Carolina's Senate seat blue. That means your donation could have an outsized impact in securing a Democratic majority. That’s why we’re excited to share that Wiley Nickel is running for the United States Senate! = | = Thom Tillis has served in the Senate for more than 10 years, and if there’s one thing he’s proven, it’s this: When the chips are down and things are tough, he will always side with the billionaires and extremists who are actively working to make life harder for North Carolina’s working families. Wiley does things differently. He has a proven record of standing up for hardworking North Carolinians and families across the state. From serving in President Obama's administration, to representing North Carolina for two terms in the State Senate, to flipping an ‘unwinnable’ district to serve in Congress where he fought to make life more affordable and end partisan gerrymandering — Wiley is the real deal. Now, he’s not just ready — he’s fired up to take his fight to the United States Senate. This election will be a battle between change vs. more of the same. Wiley knows that business as usual in Washington right now is simply not working, and he can bring the bold leadership that North Carolina and our country is counting on for a better future with more rights, not fewer. This race represents one of the best chances we have of flipping the Senate blue in 2026, and we need all hands on deck to make sure Wiley can hit the ground running in his fight to win this seat. He needs our help to reach voters across the state with his message of hope and a game plan to shake things up and make our government work for the people again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Wiley Nickel and Democracy on the Line will go through immediately: **= = = = Thank you, Peter, your support goes a long way toward ensuring working families can get ahead, not fall further behind. body:
This could be the tide that changes the fate of our fragile House Majority...

| |
---
| | | My stomach just dropped.

I have three pressing updates that warrant your immediate attention.

**DEVELOPMENT #1:** Liberals are building momentum after winning the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - multiple GOP House seats are now in jeopardy.

**DEVELOPMENT #2:** House Democrats have outraised us EVERY MONTH this year and have $11,000,000 prepped and ready to unleash against us.

**DEVELOPMENT #3:** Kamala Harris just held a surprise appearance to tease her political comeback.

When Kamala Harris was on the ticket, Liberals raked in over a BILLION DOLLARS to defeat us. _And Lord knows they 'll do it again._

I cannot emphasize that last point enough.

They're gearing up to unload a king's ransom to humiliate us in the midterms, obliterate our Conservative House Majority, and install a complete Liberal blockade of the MAGA agenda.

**That 's why I'm rushing to you before it's too late. All I'm asking is for everyone reading this email to pitch in JUST five or ten bucks right here and right now. _[If we can get 100% participation from you and every other Conservative, we can make Kamala Harris' political comeback COMPLETELY BACKFIRE.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/E8bPv6OX95FI-ppBgGTCcw~~/AARclBA~/7jfUWuZh3OvTXjMTqF5q8u6twJXldWpYHbQd4YM6TTWSOU-i2eUpF8Kd84cUClf2XnARima_YGuoqPGexItYiZBVQf24494hhEZFjXvbV9GKazgBsbiLMH43buHlfAzNj9yI4yH7kmSYekFSPQ-56JJDU1bX-gL0yHjxl9jGxXg7QTm8CWNZiQoMGmuFZRYXyqiKwXr2Eap3JLhD-EHM8PuybJ958I0tD9UzpQiXh3UZu575vr4J2ck4RF8mP7IlzleuD_Pjk3FJsftrxhvbCkFyY_MIg7BAjCkwaXaCS8KgJLHYtT4RBSDxkOITUrq5fVQ0xExxCpqPuwHF5oSU9Jc_HLPFc-BtyKIoALSIl0M~ "If we can get 100% participation from you and every other Conservative, we can make Kamala Harris’ political comeback COMPLETELY BACKFIRE.")_**

We defeated Kamala and the Democrat Machine together before. And I know we can do it again but ONLY if we work together. Can I count on you?

I'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford.

_Five or ten bucks is perfectly fine. If you can afford more - your impact will be even greater!_

If we fail, any chances we had at saving our Conservative House Majority will sink like a LEAD BALLOON. _I desperately need your help on this. Without it, we 're finished._

Majority Leader Steve Scalise

### **America Wasn 't Some Global Patsy--We Set The Price & Charged Admission**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e08f4ccc-0b78-4156-9f0f-c2a5769307e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**Trump, destroying our prosperity & security in one fell swoop. Impessive**
Let's clear up a little historical amnesia making the rounds on the mongo MAGA circuit and during right-wing-media-incel-mating calls: _After World War II, America didn 't get suckered into some globalist group project. We built the postwar order_--from scratch--like the bossy valedictorian of international diplomacy you know today. Bretton Woods? Yeah, that was our idea.
We summoned the world's economic minds to New Hampshire and laid down the rules: the U.S. dollar would reign supreme, international trade would be stabilized, and America would sit at the head of the table eating the biggest piece of cake. This wasn't charity--it was chess, and we were Bobby Freakin' Fischer. We just happen to currently have a President who gets flummoxed by tic tac toe.
Then there's NATO, another thing Trump loves to screech about like someone just told him McDonald's stopped serving hamberders. We _chose_ to pay more, not because we were suckers, Trump, you lummox, but because _we wanted to lead_. You don't get to be the CEO of the Free World by splitting the bill evenly. _We underwrote peace in Europe_ so it wouldn't turn into a World War sequel trilogy. _Another way to protect economic growth via stability for, you guessed it,**US**_!
It gave U.S. corporations open access to global markets, allowed democracy (mostly) to flourish, and--this is key--kept the tanks out of Paris and Berlin. It was _profitable_ to be the grown-up in the room. Now I know it's more fun to be the mangy toddler--which has, dishearteningly, served both Elon & Trump well in the past (thanks corporate-media fluffers!). But now we're at the big boys table, and we need to act like it.
**Blue Amp 's a simple idea: Insiders turned fearless outsiders **_**telling you what others won 't**_**. We 're un-bought; We Need Your Support.**_**Please become a paid subscriber!...**_

|
---
## Colorado Democrats Choose Criminal Aliens Over Public Safety
|
---

Last night, Colorado Democrats passed SB25-276 — a dangerous piece of legislation that further shields criminal illegal aliens from accountability and blocks local law enforcement from cooperating with federal immigration authorities. Former ICE Field Office Director and SAFE Colorado Co-Founder John Fabbricatore testified forcefully against this bill, which was introduced at the last minute with virtually no public input. [SB25-276](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTUxMjI1OTI5NDc2MDgxNDM1LFwiclwiOjE1MTIyNTk0MjIyNzgxNDM3OH0iLCJzIjoiMDQ1YjBjMjkwM2EyZDk1OCJ9) prohibits probation officers from sharing information with ICE about convicted aliens and even seeks to vacate guilty pleas — reclassifying crimes as minor misdemeanors — all to protect criminal aliens from deportation. In his testimony, Fabbricatore made the stakes crystal clear:
> “This is a reckless piece of legislation born out of open-border extremism from Democrat lawmakers who have chosen foreign-born criminals over the safety of United States citizens.
> And I ask you, how many more United States citizens have to die? How many more crimes must be committed against our people before you acknowledge the consequences of these policies?
> I fear the answer is none — because your goal isn’t the safety of the citizens of this country. Your goal is to make Colorado the epitome of a sanctuary for illegal immigration, regardless of the cost.”
>
**Watch part of John's interaction with Senator Matt Ball here** : [https://x.com/johne_fabb/status/1909786623706800182?s=46&t=w...](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTUxMjI1OTI5NDgxMzI0MzE2LFwiclwiOjE1MTIyNTk0MjIyNzgxNDM3OH0iLCJzIjoiZDk5NTAyOTUzOTE1Y2UzYyJ9) After hours of testimony (mostly in support of the measure) the bill passed on a strict party-line vote. The people of Colorado deserve better than lawmakers who put political ideology over public safety. SAFE Colorado will continue to stand for the rule of law and the safety of our communities. **We’re not backing down — and we need your voice.**

|
---
| | [ **SIGN THE PLEDGE** ](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTUxMjI1OTI5NDg1NTE4NjIxLFwiclwiOjE1MTIyNTk0MjIyNzgxNDM3OH0iLCJzIjoiNjIwYTM4NzZkZjYwZDg4ZiJ9)

To learn more, please visit [www.SAFEColorado.org](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/tl/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTUxMjI1OTI5NDg5NzEyOTI2LFwiclwiOjE1MTIyNTk0MjIyNzgxNDM3OH0iLCJzIjoiYjEyOGQ2Mjc5NWM5ZTM3ZiJ9)
Thank you for standing with us for a safer Colorado. John Fabbricatore & Steven Monahan

name: SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD (via VPP)
subject: re: Hakeem Jeffries Challenges Mike Johnson to a DEBATE!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’ve reopened our letter!
| **HAKEEM JEFFRIES CHALLENGES MIKE JOHNSON TO DEBATE, DEMANDS HE ANSWER FOR TRUMP'S CRUEL BUDGET CUTS** Leader Jeffries is FIGHTING BACK against the MAGA mob — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88966?t=6&akid=19496%2E878179%2E-2gFCk) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88966?t=7&akid=19496%2E878179%2E-2gFCk) | [**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/88966?t=8&akid=19496%2E878179%2E-2gFCk)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: The stock market is tanking, and Trump is talking about... the size of my neck
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8459%2E5257348%2E8EBnEx ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

Last night at a fundraiser for congressional Republicans, Donald Trump
spoke at length about...

The size of my neck. I kid you not.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&t=1004&akid=8459%2E5257348%2E8EBnEx ]Donald Trump insulting Adam on stage

The stock market is tanking. People are losing their jobs. Our allies are
becoming our enemies. The cost of living is skyrocketing. And he’s worried
about my neck size and calling me schoolyard names.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1005&akid=8459%2E5257348%2E8EBnEx ]If you think he should be focused on more important things, send
$10 to
help me fight back.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8459%2E5257348%2E8EBnEx ]DONATE

I was on Meet the Press this weekend talking about the damage Trump was
doing to the country with his ill-conceived tariffs.

And I said the most enduring image of his presidency may be the scenes of
him riding around in his golf cart bragging about his golf scores while
Americans were suffering.

He must have been watching and was... not pleased. These attacks against me
are his way of trying to silence me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q22025_abs_em.gs9A_9&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=1007&akid=8459%2E5257348%2E8EBnEx ]But I won’t be silenced. Send
$10 and
let Trump know you will have my back every time he goes after me.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

| | For the second time, Republicans pushed through their budget resolution in the dark of night last week to double down on their mission to slash programs that help families thrive to bankroll massive tax breaks for billionaires. The Republican budget bill will also pile on over $37 TRILLION in new debt. That's more debt created by a SINGLE BILL than created in the entire 249-year history of our country. I put forward an amendment to block their debt explosion. Guess what? **The Republicans tanked it.** Democrats kept fighting back with amendment after amendment to lower the cost of groceries, safeguard Medicaid and Social Security, and make it easier for ordinary families to make ends meet. **And every time, Republicans sided with billionaires over working Americans and voted down these amendments.** The Republican billionaire tax giveaways will kick millions of Americans off their health insurance, gut education funding for children in need, raise everyday costs for working families, and add trillions of dollars to the national debt. **Their plan: billionaires win, families lose.** This is the Republicans' great betrayal of working families, and I will continue to fight against it. subject: The Texas GOP’s Big Bads

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. If you’d like to unsubscribe, click here. # [#]
Hey Peter, it’s the team here at TOP PAC. We wanted to give you the rundown of all the Big Bads we’re dealing with in the Texas GOP. Help TOP PAC engage and mobilize Black and Latino voters with a donation today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em] , and read on for our full Republican Round-up!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em]Governor Greg Abbott
Of all the Republicans in Texas, Appalling Abbott might just be the worst. From publicly saying he would shoot immigrants if it weren’t illegal, to accepting the largest single political donation in Texas history ($6 million!) from a school-voucher-supporting GOP megadonor, one thing’s for sure: Greg has got to go. Donate now to help us fight back against Appalling Abbott! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em]Lt. Governor Dan Patrick
Nicknamed “the king of right-wing talk radio” for his extreme anti-LGBTQ+ and anti-immigrant rhetoric, Dan Patrick’s long history of pushing conspiracy theories on national television almost rivals that of Donald Trump. On top of that, he accepted a $3 million contribution from Defend Texas Liberty, a PAC tied to white supremacist Nick Fuentes. Rush a donation now to help us get rid of Dirty Dan! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em]Attorney General Ken Paxton
Ken Paxton stood trial for impeachment in the Texas Senate for abusing the powers of his office. He also made a name for himself as the man who viciously targeted Dallas mom Kate Cox and personally took away her right to receive a potentially life-saving abortion for a nonviable pregnancy. When Ken is not attacking our reproductive rights, he travels the country seeking medical records of children who have been forced to leave Texas to receive gender-affirming treatment due to the statewide ban on transgender care for minors. Will you donate now to help us defeat his extremist agenda? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em]

Together, we can chip away at the GOP’s hold on our state, elect candidates up and down the ballot who will truly represent our Black and Latino communities and build the Texas we deserve. All we’re asking from you is a donation of any amount: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sbd-top-fr-apr25-em]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Donate now to help us fight back against Appalling Abbott! [] [. Governor Dan Patrick Nicknamed “the king of right-wing talk radio” for his extreme anti-LGBTQ+ and anti-immigrant rhetoric, Dan Patrick’s long history of pushing conspiracy theories on national television almost rivals that of Donald Trump. On top of that, he accepted a $3 million contribution from Defend Texas Liberty, a PAC tied to white supremacist Nick Fuentes. Rush a donation now to help us get rid of Dirty Dan! [] [ General Ken Paxton Ken Paxton stood trial for impeachment in the Texas Senate for abusing the powers of his office. He also made a name for himself as the man who viciously targeted Dallas mom Kate Cox and personally took away her right to receive a potentially life-saving abortion for a nonviable pregnancy. When Ken is not attacking our reproductive rights, he travels the country seeking medical records of children who have been forced to leave Texas to receive gender-affirming treatment due to the statewide ban on transgender care for minors. Will you donate now to help us defeat his extremist agenda? [] Together, we can chip away at the GOP’s hold on our state, elect candidates up and down the ballot who will truly represent our Black and Latino communities and build the Texas we deserve. All we’re asking from you is a donation of any amount: [] If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. Fellow activist,

Following the massive win in Wisconsin last week, all eyes are now on Pennsylvania as we gear up for our own critical Supreme Court retention elections. That is why we are reaching out today, because we are going to need your help.

According to _CBS News_ , the Wisconsin Supreme Court race was **the most expensive judicial election in American history.** As billionaire Elon Musk funneled millions into supporting a Trump-endorsed candidate, it was an incredible early indicator of where voters stand. And they made it abundantly clear that they would not stand for our voting rights being eroded, our judicial independence being threatened, and disinformation undermining trust in our institutions.

Next up is Pennsylvania, where our state’s richest man, **Jeffrey Yass, has already invested more than a million dollars to influence this year’s judicial elections, and we expect similar investments from Musk. **

There is no denying it: _**Our democracy is under attack**_. Now, more than ever, we must take a stand to defend the fundamental pillars of our democracy. Can we count on you?

**We are thrilled to announce that we have an angel donor who is willing to match all donations up to $50,000, meaning anything you donate today will be doubled. **

**[**As we prepare for the critical year ahead, where we need to stand together to ensure our democracy remains strong, voting rights are protected and expanded, and our state and federal judiciary remain fair and independent, will you rush a donation of $25 or more today and have DOUBLE the impact?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR2PjhMhFF1pkT23Jh3-2B8slMM0j8iWseBJFEYdbe5DlSzr7H-2B39trsUXN-2B8h2veqnP60wKeqp3MFDar-2Bk40p-2B9T8-3DAgVW_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYqDF3RpYQbSwvIr34epv1BXaWMQff-2B0Rx2vsl-2FVtwMHzJHAIjvl5t9dts9PeBPQoGfKgn-2FEL1igrmlNXX2290lkuWcM0lytfFUli-2BIZwR8-2F4jb1GhCyQYhoJ3Mo-2Bz9CqI157lZWwwt-2BsRVXVcLKQCkXVROldD7ACyIK6TCRkb1uGMYsIYuGLOdaRBFqWTlegp)**

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Following the massive win in Wisconsin last week, all eyes are now on Pennsylvania as we gear up for our own critical Supreme Court retention elections. That is why we are reaching out today, because we are going to need your help. According to CBS News , the Wisconsin Supreme Court race was the most expensive judicial election in American history. As billionaire Elon Musk funneled millions into supporting a Trump-endorsed candidate, it was an incredible early indicator of where voters stand. And they made it abundantly clear that they would not stand for our voting rights being eroded, our judicial independence being threatened, and disinformation undermining trust in our institutions. Next up is Pennsylvania, where our state’s richest man, Jeffrey Yass, has already invested more than a million dollars to influence this year’s judicial elections, and we expect similar investments from Musk. There is no denying it: Our democracy is under attack. Now, more than ever, we must take a stand to defend the fundamental pillars of our democracy. Can we count on you? We are thrilled to announce that we have an angel donor who is willing to match all donations up to $50,000, meaning anything you donate today will be doubled. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Democracy thrives when we fight for it. Let’s stand together to protect our rights and institutions. Join us in this movement and double your impact today! Thank you, Team NPP Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 193814126996771 | | | |

| | Peter, I've been overwhelmed at the positive response I've been hearing about my new book. This is something that I have been working on for several years and I'm so hopeful that it can inspire others to take action to heal our communities and our country! If you are interested in learning more, we have a couple of exciting events this week that I wanted to invite you to attend:
---
**Instagram Live Discussion:**
---
[](http://links.heavenhelpusbook.com/s/c/vYMPdG428sVjTPB4UhTIIVewgoDUAxtBh9ASPOA1HiRtvSkDEAj7xQkE9E4yg5LJGGhCEAymejT6O8PpFsKY182koXBby8iHifd-DxTYBezqXbX0i0Qn1Cj1HMMDo4r_xpoUpV_SbwP5m7JQNAJLkn5AezvPOQH1yEfM09QuXkeRaYiTYllztzwk8FQ4MGMbUh1nFDOTMha7EA-NEAtwLuqnBZ71-e9ObT3kycP91QkHP_2dk2D8OElJPzbhFdcwuO0T412rCyohFrMBibicv9SUZuDUOz438hFjplqA9L9WqZfFKkvFZIqZoCifognotR5Jb7mA9NBzj3cCccnCgRGqr4erancwnA/CQyKlB4PlXXoKQRZMHxZAuWkizzSH2Ni/7)

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: The cost of living is too damn high. Here’s how I’m fighting back.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JANELLE BYNUM FOR CONGRESS
body:
Every day, my office fields hundreds of calls from constituents across every corner of Oregon’s 5th District. And can you guess what one of the most common things we hear is? The cost of living is too damn high.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105506486/538562405/476240568?amount=10&refcode=em_eng_2025.04.09_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzMWZiNDItNmUxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a2yQ6-hls0mXNo4eY7Gryjl6YpkagMw_g719xTYthOM=)
Every day, my office fields hundreds of calls from constituents across every corner of Oregon’s 5th District. And can you guess what one of the most common things we hear is?

_The cost of living is too damn high._

I couldn’t agree more. Whether it's the cost of groceries, the price of healthcare, or the rising price tag on rent, it feels nearly impossible to even afford the necessities these days.

And not only is the President failing to address the problem... he’s making it a whole lot worse.

**That’s why I stepped up and introduced the _Protecting Families from Inflation Act_. **This legislation would require the Federal Reserve to examine the impact that Trump’s tariffs have on everyday families and small businesses.

[**I’m not going to sit by as Donald Trump jacks up the cost of living for families like yours and mine. If you agree it’s finally time to lower costs and hold the Trump Administration accountable, I hope you’ll become a citizen endorser of my bill.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105506487/538562406/-1055135605?refcode=em_eng_2025.04.09_b1_jb_all&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjkzMWZiNDItNmUxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a2yQ6-hls0mXNo4eY7Gryjl6YpkagMw_g719xTYthOM=&emci=513d3c26-5315-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=f931fb42-6e15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=14434323)

Thank you!

Janelle

**Janelle Bynum represents Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation.

Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive seats in the country. clean_body: Every day, my office fields hundreds of calls from constituents across every corner of Oregon’s 5th District. And can you guess what one of the most common things we hear is? The cost of living is too damn high. = Every day, my office fields hundreds of calls from constituents across every corner of Oregon’s 5th District. And can you guess what one of the most common things we hear is? The cost of living is too damn high. I couldn’t agree more. Whether it's the cost of groceries, the price of healthcare, or the rising price tag on rent, it feels nearly impossible to even afford the necessities these days. And not only is the President failing to address the problem... he’s making it a whole lot worse. That’s why I stepped up and introduced the Protecting Families from Inflation Act. This legislation would require the Federal Reserve to examine the impact that Trump’s tariffs have on everyday families and small businesses. | Thank you! Janelle Janelle Bynum represents Oregon's Fifth Congressional District. With a reputation as a tireless champion for real progress, Janelle has worked in the State Legislature to safeguard our rights, lower costs, and create pathways to success for the next generation. Oregon's 5th District is one of the most competitive seats in the country. Will you make a grassroots donation today? | = | Janelle Bynum represents Oregon's 5th Congressional District. name: Leader Scalise
subject: We need to talk about last week's election…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we’ve worked so hard for. | |
---
| | | We need to**** talk about last week's election...

First off, I want to personally welcome MAGA warriors Jimmy Patronis and Randy Fine to our House Republican ranks. They will play an essential role in passing President Trump's agenda. _**[Now I need to level with you for a moment. That's why I'm coming to you with three pressing updates:](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fad3e80093642a682533808440acabf&_e=N74W8aB4bFO-lRi_pr8FQ6qq3X2VkcEPqiYz2zAxZu4eE10BP2hzCltv77B0Y_sLUkpgVnB_K6r3qPp9SwYwS-sdqQmsopcrnf-kXCtWq60Fkq3yDeZz7xD2J_eu57tY9dn1ldtg0wVhWBrW-XEAUlnPMR3kpPaFkvoGfzFAn4BAkOQnC8DaI0wbvso5Htikf56kHQUpIQw7t-cOUfSPqBh5toYOX_aLqV82QbV9L0cRNNOiLPFLmRLsYfozPvalS-0brZ_ECmv_lr4eKnX2bl34Z2uphFkwgd5-FaCa8vGZxXDPWKvWNBSnkY13bYlw57e1Y0i1lxAYLd1ILq6jDjtoJX7BHcLNuWPdUkJik5X4gqIGVzLafyCHmHFGkKKuJp_k5UAjCiIBBpqTTsEt8MVkRmPnnKTAYbVY3vLF5N4%3D "Now I need to level with you for a moment. That’s why I’m coming to you with three pressing updates:")**_
1. We got shellacked in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race - the Liberal outspent the Conservative candidate by DOUBLE
2. Multiple House seats in Wisconsin are now in serious jeopardy - our Conservative Majority is barely hanging on already
3. The Florida Special Elections were sobering - the Democrat in FL-06 outraised us TEN-TO-ONE

I'm not making a mountain out of a molehill here.

_President Trump 's entire legislative agenda comes to a SCREECHING HALT if this keeps happening._ We have the better ideas, we have the better candidates... but none of that matters if our message is drowned out by a wall of false and misleading Democrat attack ads.

We either rise to the occasion right now or we give up and let the Democrat Machine steamroll everything we've worked so hard for.

So that's why I'm doing something I've never done before.

I'm setting up an emergency one-million-dollar fundraising blitz between now and the end of the week. I'll need your help to get there. It's an ambitious goal but I have faith in this team. **This will help send badly needed reinforcements to the key races in Wisconsin AND fortify our defenses in other must-win races too.**

**[All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of last week's elections pitches in SOMETHING!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fad3e80093642a682533808440acabf&_e=N74W8aB4bFO-lRi_pr8FQ6qq3X2VkcEPqiYz2zAxZu4eE10BP2hzCltv77B0Y_sLUkpgVnB_K6r3qPp9SwYwS-sdqQmsopcrnf-kXCtWq60Fkq3yDeZz7xD2J_eu57tY9dn1ldtg0wVhWBrW-XEAUlnPMR3kpPaFkvoGfzFAn4BAkOQnC8DaI0wbvso5Htikf56kHQUpIQw7t-cOUfSPqBh5toYOX_aLqV82QbV9L0cRNNOiLPFLmRLsYfozPvalS-0brZ_ECmv_lr4eKnX2btCNnJto8Mb1_QmTYhiVlAL_R6tMEgc6xHrAvvYGN2CiNSIpHhhA3XQBlsaFnCE38KjGOrx-NGQtcDasTF2Lex2BAedv4i6Rr473wGwJQBhD81CG4ZLCr7h2QhgnodMHOr6-U4VVkThTPNhOztJ4lBY%3D "All I ask is that EVERYONE who recognizes the seriousness of last week's elections pitches in SOMETHING!")**

Look:

If we let the Democrat Fundraising Machine keep outraising and outspending us, we're finished. It's over for our House Majority.

President Trump's ENTIRE legislative agenda hangs in the balance so I'm not holding anything back._That 's why I'm personally asking for your support today._

Unfortunately, this can't wait until next year - it can't even wait until next week.

**[Last Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. Can you please save the day?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fad3e80093642a682533808440acabf&_e=N74W8aB4bFO-lRi_pr8FQ6qq3X2VkcEPqiYz2zAxZu4eE10BP2hzCltv77B0Y_sLUkpgVnB_K6r3qPp9SwYwS-sdqQmsopcrnf-kXCtWq60Fkq3yDeZz7xD2J_eu57tY9dn1ldtg0wVhWBrW-XEAUlnPMR3kpPaFkvoGfzFAn4BAkOQnC8DaI0wbvso5Htikf56kHQUpIQw7t-cOUfSPqBh5toYOX_aLqV82QbV9L0cRNNOiLPFLmRLsYfozPvalS-0brZ_ECmv_lr4eKnX2bjJOjGtOY_npTJ2a6Kqk1yTEpPHtxIlz2GzjtgX6iE7aW9uwW-Vl0yYDWHX5nHEPQkjEKDi0RGNoE6KnPJTsV-KOcYuqb6JpmRpWDrC-4oEZSeSO4Q5mhROBzHXgoi3n34bbSQqe8R4vKpFtsf5zdYU%3D "Last Tuesday was a wake-up call for our Conservative movement so we need to move right here and right now. I sincerely hope so.

Thanks for all you do,
- _Steve_

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: Exciting news out of North Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
| Hey Peter — it’s Ritchie Torres. I wanted to share some exciting news out of North Carolina.

**Wiley Nickel is running for the United States Senate!**

North Carolina needs bold, new leadership. Wiley will fight hard for working families and won’t shy away from the tough battles — not billionaires and special interests putting all of their energy every day of this administration into robbing from the poor to make the rich richer.

**We have a golden opportunity to flip North Carolina's Senate seat by defeating one of the most at-risk Republicans, Thom Tillis. That means your support plays a pivotal role in the outcome of this race.**

As a state senator and United States Congressman, Wiley has a proven track record of working to secure a better future for North Carolina — and now, we need him to fight for us in the U.S. Senate.

But we have our work cut out for us, Peter. This race is critical to our fight to win the U.S. Senate majority, and Thom Tillis’ Republican megadonors are committed as ever to trying to stop Wiley in his tracks.

Here’s where it gets interesting: Ineffective, tired politicians like Thom Tillis are underestimating what we can do when we put our weight behind Wiley. When he was elected to Congress, he did it by flipping a Republican stronghold seat blue, so he knows firsthand that it takes a dedicated grassroots movement to win tough races. He’s lived it. That’s why he’s counting on us to help elect him to the Senate any way we can.

[We need all hands on deck to help Wiley retire Thom Tillis, win North Carolina’s Senate race, and do our part in the fight to win a Democratic Senate majority in 2026. body:
The Georgia GOP is already enacting their plan to suppress voters in the 2026 elections.

If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/502xl98alkm3J5MS-c04xA2?unsubscribedata=sRWiJlsayo8%2F%2B%2F%2FWPUIWflubxpPo1LlF9%2B7%2FKtsDUCRCzSR4Cl3L%2FG0ag8pdL0FNbR%2B1Q4H0HFhyUT3my%2FJbqTLigkjPXeA8bMLapBGOJ1ugRFEc0Kcpfp3kURHcQ3huRF0K9b2VHVmZvnoAphXNt%2BsjWmv%2FCHgXqbwnyBSe%2F13iw8RPXS3x%2FlXTZYI308Aoepmno6Xy5oBNULNp86ZPPJNp4r8bc4w2Xd9h6Aku3WsJnUt5wKOYaIiHoFn6rEOzAyadlAgdQhZ7mHVEHDJC6JpSeArSuTCfkLc0IOhuQRUY%2BFXoiDRZtOKaj1h%2F%2BKqZ%2BHsKPeKL%2FV4s7OcuAVPiNNR96%2FqkOfHvQZfTk%2BWmHJH8GrXPAJBxiJy9GLhu%2FnS5MtMaJzCUhSxllkx8%2FMfNcztw7oXcLGTLfrfJhILQH59ERdR5rn6ctnm3n6raVtTi)
