name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: God led me to share my story with the world – warts and all
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish:
| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0f65cb26c6248e0b0cd1188694650fb&_e=p2p2OV49A4fpZODDjxC5buUUsrdvtzMDfBmZowsPpMZbryo6A9b5GMYtEKjMrcgx2X-adDQvItpu6u9KVLw3i8GUmsyYoc1-icAn8i90tOOvPrAyHuMrbsrdzdJdz1-bZ3s6eahDeA7MMZJaaaCkQjDYnvmHLM91KtYygn1IEWB3bsl-F0v5A2A4AQzkK6ld6m8X8qQq0kiTyaahsuTY_EnieW9sF1LADmDCcwsmhncywRvEL9k9Qmz-Fl5wPo-ZSZb31yCqd0g2Nje50K7VeP_AhgDS3cd7qHo4NMF8X8gZPVCDREQLSGq9o2LLAkFLRCDl82aVMaVpmKuks7cHaAJ0LoL4cUwZ6jcV3RdPwNr1dQGaHYZXbCVP_gM3Jixhf1Gp5M39Fx5BY2aD6Djw3A%3D%3D "Vice President JD Vance")
---

My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance.

_**[This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0f65cb26c6248e0b0cd1188694650fb&_e=p2p2OV49A4fpZODDjxC5buUUsrdvtzMDfBmZowsPpMZbryo6A9b5GMYtEKjMrcgx2X-adDQvItpu6u9KVLw3i8GUmsyYoc1-icAn8i90tOOvPrAyHuMrbsrdzdJdz1-bZ3s6eahDeA7MMZJaaaCkQjDYnvmHLM91KtYygn1IEWB3bsl-F0v5A2A4AQzkK6ld6m8X8qQq0kiTyaahsuTY_EnieW9sF1LADmDCcwsmhnflOr_YEKOY_bH7OltvM7RL39kkgWtpr8wLQNtGzqyz3cyguF32tDK7pVY7cWkOWDLzEmkrgiBN-AVAWLuXIPujHMl1ru34e96HkfRbCK-Jz5glyNW0jnzgPV2i6EsRzVd07n_nPUwkOPy5lIqVFXtb9dlv2D8EL2vT_TreQiQ0gA%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish.")**_

It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.

It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.

**But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all.** I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.

_As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. _

I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.

I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.

_**[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0f65cb26c6248e0b0cd1188694650fb&_e=p2p2OV49A4fpZODDjxC5buUUsrdvtzMDfBmZowsPpMZbryo6A9b5GMYtEKjMrcgx2X-adDQvItpu6u9KVLw3i8GUmsyYoc1-icAn8i90tOOvPrAyHuMrbsrdzdJdz1-bZ3s6eahDeA7MMZJaaaCkQjDYnvmHLM91KtYygn1IEWB3bsl-F0v5A2A4AQzkK6ld6m8X8qQq0kiTyaahsuTY_EnieW9sF1LADmDCcwsmhne0LARnAOfqXDX6xGEYMH9ZqATMkQoJ2OVGud6BGLgGPxaeAFH7q8wA343ScRBmSH0pTbmWdk0a_XwxVTck26KgmFBta2zUPpnwHUw0yJS9htxI5-2eWowkfUqC4i1hcZRKmfgnCQEaACnQT33sFC8yLXKfq7YrcwadWM1NA6xPfQ%3D%3D "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.")**_

We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.

So now we're forced to rebuild.

The Democrat Machine is **ALREADY** crushing us in fundraising, **ALREADY** outspending us in key races, and **ALREADY** building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.

At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.

So here's my final pitch to you:

_**[I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise - for the FIRST TIME since the election - to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0f65cb26c6248e0b0cd1188694650fb&_e=p2p2OV49A4fpZODDjxC5buUUsrdvtzMDfBmZowsPpMZbryo6A9b5GMYtEKjMrcgx2X-adDQvItpu6u9KVLw3i8GUmsyYoc1-icAn8i90tOOvPrAyHuMrbsrdzdJdz1-bZ3s6eahDeA7MMZJaaaCkQjDYnvmHLM91KtYygn1IEWB3bsl-F0v5A2A4AQzkK6ld6m8X8qQq0kiTyaahsuTY_EnieW9sF1LADmDCcwsmhnc0yyg2qbRK5y4Mz6wdUOT3g9Frb0X2ydrYzxj7t4Gv4ffY4C28YBtc_qEsE-OZBMpMohpTd8I1SnhQHeswWKc_zD14HYjNRYDB0ukLa0B-9AIJuQnKN-mCIcjfcS2tQXU3fDmibuWSIR-VPIx-RGOX6vh2iOE5fHp1tw1TCT9zhQ%3D%3D "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.")**_ I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win.

Do you think you can help us get there?

_Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up:_
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0f65cb26c6248e0b0cd1188694650fb&_e=p2p2OV49A4fpZODDjxC5buUUsrdvtzMDfBmZowsPpMZbryo6A9b5GMYtEKjMrcgx2X-adDQvItpu6u9KVLw3i8GUmsyYoc1-icAn8i90tOOvPrAyHuMrbsrdzdJdz1-bZ3s6eahDeA7MMZJaaaCkQjDYnvmHLM91KtYygn1IEWB3bsl-F0v5A2A4AQzkK6ld6m8X8qQq0kiTyaahsuTY_EnieW9sF1LADmDCcwsmhnePbceEg8rGyw5nLIPfE8KDKpc0-WFNsND_caO176B_xAscM9KIcIfKYWMlIlXOn_Snu5M6E8jQqj9CURTFOcUY1UJYuw6pYfrRGEzrqQnYp4VM1UTD6-23RAb6ALa1Kcq6ogWl_vZsvNkZ-ckgd0Pkp1C2KhpPwWlg2T03Mpoi7g%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")
---
Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point.

If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win.

_**[I don't ever want you to donate more than you can afford - but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0f65cb26c6248e0b0cd1188694650fb&_e=p2p2OV49A4fpZODDjxC5buUUsrdvtzMDfBmZowsPpMZbryo6A9b5GMYtEKjMrcgx2X-adDQvItpu6u9KVLw3i8GUmsyYoc1-icAn8i90tOOvPrAyHuMrbsrdzdJdz1-bZ3s6eahDeA7MMZJaaaCkQjDYnvmHLM91KtYygn1IEWB3bsl-F0v5A2A4AQzkK6ld6m8X8qQq0kiTyaahsuTY_EnieW9sF1LADmDCcwsmhnfYaAkIKH7WF1SP55MB9OTSVYtLSZzrfqqSz_GO2FAas01mrhdLflvvrvHlFm0TYMQyohFtTk6O3lv6nIbjAG9JzGSWhDh8URV0PYMcLAs257l1Ctlrsxl9UMcNVttR1-_XicuMIGC-qZ2UoNJst8GYLIWopG1SCSY83ap2ub_zqg%3D%3D "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated.")**_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
---
| | | [PLEASE JOIN US](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e0f65cb26c6248e0b0cd1188694650fb&_e=p2p2OV49A4fpZODDjxC5buUUsrdvtzMDfBmZowsPpMZbryo6A9b5GMYtEKjMrcgx2X-adDQvItpu6u9KVLw3i8GUmsyYoc1-icAn8i90tOOvPrAyHuMrbsrdzdJdz1-bZ3s6eahDeA7MMZJaaaCkQjDYnvmHLM91KtYygn1IEWB3bsl-F0v5A2A4AQzkK6ld6m8X8qQq0kiTyaahsuTY_EnieW9sF1LADmDCcwsmhndHyTUl92ia8KbN-Tqu3IelTTTPRb4P7SLYSg_u8rKZPO2PKybm5MLj-sWL_457eJnWtassCtJOUKGDrUc70UMvaVIRWq0x1fegFr3gC65x4s4ZFHaM6z6DRX9eOMPxFsZWgJGgDQF0Lz_l6k647qKv6JtbmFGo8p5Iy4xttXrFsA%3D%3D "PLEASE JOIN US")

clean_body: This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | | | | | | "Vice President JD Vance" My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. "This is a longer email but I respectfully ask you to read it from start to finish." It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up poor, raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt called to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I think millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. "Which brings me to the purpose of my email today." We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: "I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise – for the FIRST TIME since the election – to raise a million dollars by the end of the month." I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it 's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. "I don’t ever want you to donate more than you can afford – but if you can spare ANYTHING, even a few bucks, it would be tremendously appreciated." Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | | | "PLEASE JOIN US" | | | "First 100 Day Survey" It 's Majority Leader Scalise. We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. Our children are getting sicker. Unlike RFK Jr., the Trump administration and the politicians who are determined to put children’s health at risk, pediatricians like me are on the frontlines, working with sick kids every day.

My fellow South Carolina pediatricians and I took a stand on the State House steps, demanding action on the growing measles outbreak, the mental health crisis, the sad decline of our kids’ nutrition, and the need to protect children’s healthcare. It’s time for something to be done.

**_[Take a stand with South Carolina pediatricians who are fighting for children's health and well-being in this state and across the country. Sign the petition today>>>](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38JPTfzAR6OyMWxfgxuEbxcT_6abeL47WykQ5eGcVgsdeGHYTvIsDVtMDJxZPDmVVouh3v_kCXOyPeBAYCASEFIEC4e2UcKC_F6foeXHBC8U9-R6xOJOmaKW4RsKkD__pWTPLC4OcI5WwLMjRrfS-ksLb36VZYHIavBYRLDj83OqvK4G5HQjoBFK7DCMnt_fT-NOptkklMmVw0BR6vEFVSNYbpTxawY_mLzTk02ZH5BcXze4f95D_5N3JBq5iH-omtatZUXy1XENtTRIh6xFCOI6Tr2XVIcPoJRHrvIDngYqDRf2yV_hi7FexIZYANPgCj2jrx9QHAD1RAHfIASKYzz/4fi/0SZHY5gZRHiPP1Z8DuRRxg/h1/h001.3uOVUPSHLtCjHQdXc8hLFYnzoCsmOyF-IA0abVwyMPQ)_** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38JPTfzAR6OyMWxfgxuEbxcT_6abeL47WykQ5eGcVgsdeGHYTvIsDVtMDJxZPDmVVouh3v_kCXOyPeBAYCASEFIEC4e2UcKC_F6foeXHBC8U9-R6xOJOmaKW4RsKkD__pWTPLC4OcI5WwLMjRrfS-ks7Pz2lkiIdbU7snUUPi5grtp0sptJrUL6jH_Mx6_jXwWuus_Zt9jQZOZDucJ5CqF_MJaERin8ORXcASgvwB4SK_HI0fn4ZyrdE1FZ6dspT1baanqAlJSJfK371grajW4tOP92jOfd03yDzn4CtZgxgob7QXhimNC-n7C2A9iSqEfEg1GLvvHM7tCUxk1h_hej/4fi/0SZHY5gZRHiPP1Z8DuRRxg/h2/h001._MFnVuuGrmSk8vQ6WMjuj9jFRrzuosUOHSeLVUEwDu8) | | [Fight for Children’s Health](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38JPTfzAR6OyMWxfgxuEbxcT_6abeL47WykQ5eGcVgsdeGHYTvIsDVtMDJxZPDmVVouh3v_kCXOyPeBAYCASEFIEC4e2UcKC_F6foeXHBC8U9-R6xOJOmaKW4RsKkD__pWTPLC4OcI5WwLMjRrfS-ks1lKbUU-6-dObZyxt3v4LX5SZe3evujACe_n6HhcQvFhI2oY_VSHdBgQwcc_rgbcAsdx3rFEYszFInCP7AgBxTQ-TiLYP51xy7rt-MhxDxCi2ay2ZIEwMea3p208aMsz11Plu8hOaIQtI3pFAslwL0hlnQT_pQZsFBl4PKbtV0_H6OJ6Per7n5NPqUQ4NBuou/4fi/0SZHY5gZRHiPP1Z8DuRRxg/h3/h001.fge1HLCRb5Y6huys6lSWdXixE6HH4qqAlaYeSA3budw)
---

From slashing funding for pediatric research to giving anti-vaccine RFK Jr. a megaphone to spread misinformation, this administration is out to destroy children’s health from all angles.

Children deserve to receive the care and support they need. As a pediatrician and co-founder of Their Future PAC—the FIRST & ONLY PAC for kids—I cannot stand by while Trump’s administration assaults kids’ health and well-being without a fight.

**_[If you agree, will you sign my petition today to fight for the future of children’s health and wellness?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38JPTfzAR6OyMWxfgxuEbxcT_6abeL47WykQ5eGcVgsdeGHYTvIsDVtMDJxZPDmVVouh3v_kCXOyPeBAYCASEFIEC4e2UcKC_F6foeXHBC8U9-R6xOJOmaKW4RsKkD__pWTPLC4OcI5WwLMjRrfS-ksNhdnbmSyR7trK5HTDlDyE_ATzpd5s1bzSuRDxXF68cLDZKMkgHTC9eY67BPF4Yo03_72a24ms9XzU1e3Jhxuctiy4xNBzPLZFBKNB6XJDtpEVqhAmhfv3OhC2Wi1Ji_wVHWQP2-ZLuAhrvchlV6O0F3XderYaI1tGXDdMmICF2vhrcSPi9qC-HhwSpzGfOLZ/4fi/0SZHY5gZRHiPP1Z8DuRRxg/h4/h001.nQuhZ-dDe8kfiKcAXLU3mgv7EXXuPlMXX3NEuQP-Mac)_**

Until the kids are alright,

Dr. Annie Andrews

body:
As we head into the second quarter of 2025, it’s crucial for me to understand what issues are most important to you. With everything happening in Virginia and Washington the last couple of months, I want to make sure my campaign reflects your concerns, hopes, and priorities as we move towards November.

| Peter,

As we head into the second quarter of 2025, it’s crucial for me to understand what issues are most important to you. With everything happening in Virginia and Washington the last couple of months, I want to make sure my campaign reflects your concerns, hopes, and priorities as we move towards November.

Every season, my team and I take a moment to check in with you, gathering feedback about the issues that are most important to you. And with the election just around the corner in November, it’s more important than ever to hear from you this spring. Because at the end of the day, I’m running for Governor to deliver good policy once we win.

Throughout my travels across Virginia, I’ve had the privilege of speaking with many of you about the topics that are top of mind as we head into this important election. But I want to make sure everyone has a chance to have their voice heard.

[_**By taking a few minutes to fill out our Spring 2025 Priorities Survey, you’ll help me better understand the issues affecting your community as we look ahead.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105512424/538582743/-1472364425?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGVjNDc1NmQtODAxNS1mMDExLThiM2QtMDAyMjQ4MmE5ZmI3IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=cpA-M5R8-DJXj7N1F22ZBPnyjF14iR6N5rLOgmlcw3o=&emci=c7c4756d-8015-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=dec4756d-8015-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=8470899)

**We’re aiming for at least 50 responses from residents in your town, and your feedback will play a key role in shaping our campaign’s focus.**

clean_body: As we head into the second quarter of 2025, it’s crucial for me to understand what issues are most important to you. With everything happening in Virginia and Washington the last couple of months, I want to make sure my campaign reflects your concerns, hopes, and priorities as we move towards November. | = | Peter, As we head into the second quarter of 2025, it’s crucial for me to understand what issues are most important to you. With everything happening in Virginia and Washington the last couple of months, I want to make sure my campaign reflects your concerns, hopes, and priorities as we move towards November. Every season, my team and I take a moment to check in with you, gathering feedback about the issues that are most important to you. And with the election just around the corner in November, it’s more important than ever to hear from you this spring. Because at the end of the day, I’m running for Governor to deliver good policy once we win. Throughout my travels across Virginia, I’ve had the privilege of speaking with many of you about the topics that are top of mind as we head into this important election. But I want to make sure everyone has a chance to have their voice heard. We’re aiming for at least 50 responses from residents in your town, and your feedback will play a key role in shaping our campaign’s focus. | Thank you, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

Dear Friend,

I recommend you take a little time to start our free online course...

**[Totalitarian Novels](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/NjchEEjtomedsJaP_ckJvaX_DPKc71avNQtFNRDgA97eyBppL3Q8TwrIiWsWpsagy7ldoLvQG5utlNH5LQpD3aWWGFJWTVLjTRVSJhWJ8HoP2tcF3zCCO0oJWiQsEv-3T1NLUmLUkR77GFW4vrJ2Vsd8m8IGZlrg1q8ewZbr7t6Y56fD36Oq8wT9wuslGNTidShjZdQXNubZZO3fWQqfGffYh-INSKqEDyNWJxYh-ncY_QIvhBc6tYO3LkuZwq0Cy3ggQ8iUsUClVKTVJLLaeqrs6wJtwprVYhlH9PFDZc0EQIjq7A7oDUZ8ScrgrOxmnG-A0r6Ia_iJWIj5zApM0YsRC_RJJZcXzC8sWAyySZ7bkgyFew9cjNV0e38ax7kD4lNSGpYbHQeZlpWyo4V0RrL2mwBa8F2kGPHLy5FY9dpH4NKhGwpM_j2dpmjySzPdoJTABPEZQKi7e8iEMBQ/drMO-0DyaXI9hR2IX0TwGlR8iJVIQQZo/7).**

You'll be able to learn from my boss--and Hillsdale College President--Larry P. Arnn as he teaches this course through [four novels: George Orwell's _1984_ , Aldous Huxley's _Brave New World_ , Arthur Koestler's _Darkness at Noon_ , and C.S. Lewis's _That Hideous Strength_ (my personal favorite of these four)](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/2Qvn_5GuMDn7GPDWGHXRvKs3I4pIoK22ivYuanQVphqhe1Fpj5_DSA_yW1y1gp_wdEiQpwCk1QdQU3qLypmK8iIYaHExEAEuekLZmNnQTvaQRoj7aX1c987MR360YW43XCXlsq8neVBa_VhCYxV_rI8udVVS1mrYBg9lJTdgoXY_-FRnNJOme8ITXVpPAJO1IK5uYo_hSg5smnLxNOuR-WCj9ip5ZTy6emFwmDkF6P5VazuQBr9FeetejojtGznTh_tXpNxqAnDP6K7sMtQFPaNSl31li0uErcfIvCnIOZss2cQPrH4hZUoUb4J7dHyQAkF4s3CDw9Iycl20V64XZYucbHEtN9FhqJXhUCmpOHCmbfSjehREaykUa6jLcSjiuL7OJVdnTn7kUGEj8wP2aTcwwr56TOqZpsb_hHBCzVDBU2wPxmHWZQVcO32-QSysaRMess1zkKpz6UAx9jY/eRtRyk_VcOSYPmDDNusm_EcWOAZuPMVf/7).

**You 'll find the worlds of these novels are eerily familiar...**

* Endless wars, a surveillance state, and the distortion of history and truth by the media define not only Oceania--the dystopian world of _1984_ --but also contemporary America.
* The drugged and pleasure-obsessed inhabitants of _Brave New World_ reflect a troubling reality in modern America, where addictions to alcohol, fentanyl, pornography, food, gambling, and even social media are on the rise.
* A country stages a show trial for a political figure who fails to conform to ideological orthodoxy--a theme central to _Darkness at Noon_ and a striking parallel to the events of the past several years in American politics.
* If you've heard experts throw around the phrase "Trust the science," you may recognize the bureaucratic despotism of N.I.C.E. (National Institute of Co-ordinated Experiments) in _That Hideous Strength_.

We're at a turning point in our nation's history. After decades of far-Left despotism, the American people have said, "ENOUGH!"

**And that means --we can stop the totalitarian trends and ideologies in our country before they are entirely and utterly irreversible. **

I saw a T-shirt one of our Hillsdale students was sporting this fall, with the clever slogan, "Make 1984 fiction again!" I don't know about you, but I wholeheartedly agree with that sentiment.

That's why we need you to make this course available to as many Americans as possible. It will be one of the most important ways you can recognize the far-Left's totalitarian tendencies.

**[You can do that by supporting"Totalitarian Novels" after you sign-up for the free course today](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/Y4WpOEicujk0gp9qxl4b2adsjboOlPfhqL7h8vOuhC_2SNY17n0VXigJ44UYfQCXijXR0s8ucJO2Q1JSDQUtHtK6tyh8JKITTuDadNBEeI7OD0m5rXwv2Zv3PEaRzdIx8yywdKYR9qmFqsgjXWSPhIr8cm05W9COgug8htjOTGfuK9EmWcAFJOtU5Z-7S344YxcDgHn0cCR0vplNxxm-fk2OVJ72WayGcM_LzItKn4vRbtbQEu6Y_B9-MQBqwpCnQgX-ebyFog9e6taqxmRIa8P4BDFGIOpieKNqyANWl_QbyxxM6ZmRFrRRaTs0nxX4uxTFOHQX9yNn22zGbjOMWKJUOQ3R_r4ow7GrDnuShc2hhRsqbmamv79eSVKEDVUEsiA_7mAJoTXYtjJsDHpBtnMtb6ROeZKyQgjU5o-tAdNcaOysF6-dryf5MGKoDg5YQeJTLitLZKa6HCpyqQA/_MqztKgEAngMPBjZbt8_YTCV1HzQj8I4/7).**

>> For your gift of $100 or more, you will receive a video boxset of "Totalitarian Novels" from Hillsdale College. It's one small way we can say "thank you" for your support of our educational outreach.

Your support will help promote this course and sign up as many people--especially young people!--as possible. And you will help us continue to expand our educational outreach even further.

The more people who understand the nature of totalitarianism, the less likely it will gain a foothold in America.

**Will you join us in helping promote this free online course?** You can click on the secure link below to sign up for the course and make your tax-deductible gift:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/IMYjvfzxeCKFa79dGLIAdRVuKDnu6tcigIiVReGpPstP6vnrenEd1WS3neQKkdVz2zlh1fmGVaM0VSxfOBd74QTj1IIJx-t13X0vA_fWmQsqNdvt2f0gf_AM7dpPbijIhbtdqAMDiUO7NLuoCgCmywqkl3rCF_suQKXbReTMqTEuhlkRr-fUJ6z_Mro6999pUo2trdvDVBKAyGEcbcqbgY93KD0ccG7QJTWTHS4KltT6IWtqVy3I9WzAdDER9daNrdBC223id7AifL0ezybTHQcazzSAEz5JrDvja1-8Fl-pUghM49KIooMsODhYsCG3irDl2XfKJlJJUaVQc9QMUcroXi1M3o8sqav89xmrbkeVILYIgUkqkvKgTnDtGJgyQAU6KoS7ykPJH3yAhtOBV2BwRg3PjzgbHm92GRt_o29PEclL3U-5dVsSNIv8MhgV2nu8_hdReyHiLKlf8o0/QHlWHHwFG73CIJxQQXin97MTFSVrQars/7)

Whatever your gift is, the most important thing is that I hear back from you right away so that we can promote this course far and wide, especially to our youth.

As our country reverses course AWAY from totalitarianism, Hillsdale's "Totalitarian Novels" free online course is more urgent than ever. By taking it and supporting our efforts to promote it you will help Americans understand the nature of this terrible way of governing and how to stop it from ever happening here.

Warm regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

P.S. **We 've released our free online course..."Totalitarian Novels"!** You can sign up for the course and help us promote it at the secure link below:

[**https://online.hillsdale.edu/courses/register/totalitarian-novels**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/bMzFkK_JlkISxxPX4TpYE7A4yjtKV_hn9GaHtv0NMLwse4hyOaCM4cjUu5RFwlYWX3525IzOaHJtC--PzVXtFXM9423nKrB2aEdIRvt7ssKUoy2O9WUl3Z7tuZ9ZokRhKsaFSTA1ybd_zrBrY3mfC8NMMR5Gzcg_bWhOEvhZ8yj8Tp5m97t09G_e7_eQeDQ5khPwqDbZhDSbpNLsBLCdBDw_sLEhIofBkPzt1rXsCtCo2eIW3Nn7_lrXjwr5FLIZpcl6NnRojbq0N5W7jj6kuE_T4u_kp60COidgOiiASpJvhkgWEhaFR2i6gr2r4LtsjjaLQ8MUdO_Hrd9c3H_uFaEV2vwzSowOfM3H-g1ZXICv_snoOuMWjUPYrwTyeIJBjvb88dAgEEKmLgb0I1-eBJI40zpQ3mzHeb77zNjg86mvLph1VkejC_T0FxKDL1CsivMKTEZ5y0tO13w0xvs/Y5uLYkLRGJJZuKd7SIJrUGwjQjpv6nJo/7)

This course is essential for helping Americans understand the nature of totalitarianism and preventing it from taking root here, which is why I have a special offer for you today.

For your gift of $100 or more, you will receive a Blu-ray edition of "Totalitarian Novels" from Hillsdale College. It's one small way we can say "thank you."

**Please reach and teach more Americans about the dangers of this regime by helping us promote this free online course today!**

body:
| | | **I am fighting to defend the right to bodily autonomy.** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqeoZfkhx0rJYxvzeQyPAOXxPzaHpN7uxnA66Ao0W-7EqZyFw6iLW1nc6uNsMh9U_6E3r-8BahUSFbwOkWs5ux9uHYLhNTsN9kaIrf60Bueyl_tQ2CnczxIpmWNbaFSEzRssnrv9v7VWaCvVX6pZRyM3jK5KpYR3k2COuEoOOVBnzB8pT3_c1QTzvF32p1U85YW7IG2kPh2oAWwpnmjSveZmcK0pbYkIgrPJGL8DUl2x2o4Q0ca_VXL_EaYqavmL7HI5N5CYvf_32qhSt2ek6b2qgCoFs9PGlge5wXslhTVEt/4fi/hoZakud8SHygGLjuAtvdmw/h0/h001.THJqUJit70VfuESCbuaRTTU-VLECV7Jo3VpfLrE3I_0)
** [**Will you pitch in to help me defeat my anti-choice opponent and codify our right to choose in Virginia?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3DcwO3FPpifEsk6R5UXJAqV4L1yibpnnxAqS2wxuS2391adw55EaVet93JJXLwbcl4Y2X2ny7zvNHM4TiWSkviGD0mMOw0bwi-xezY7v7Np7V6rHoi5NJg7QYh1hSbKMuFczdljc4b8Amx_S5gG8P62D2I0zgpg5Wz7W4JfmxDxb7qKoI1_xiQajK6aG6j2Q44Olx-ZYQTpkLmR4m6VFt2yMKmj00914Cvmz8BGe4oZ0wS3Uqqia7bzuyRq7BHVfhy9HI75fRNk8Iz2D_Zh0rxPpyP6tqME_Y-4T1ZRIe9qcDPAA9gheNYBfUWTqiAzIB/4fi/hoZakud8SHygGLjuAtvdmw/h1/h001.VfIME1n-SmtV00eOPfztIBm1v6O3Hvxs1NW8tEsygTo)
* * *
I’m excited to announce my endorsement from EMILY's List, a powerhouse focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women who drive real change. Since 1985, they’ve been champions for women's rights, reproductive freedom, and economic equality, helping countless women rise to public office. Virginia stands as a crucial stronghold for reproductive freedom in the South. It’s urgent that we secure a constitutional amendment to protect a woman’s right to make her own healthcare choices. _While my opponent has voted against contraception and abortion rights, I am unwavering in my commitment: I will fiercely defend a woman’s right to control her own body._ Across the South, anti-choice extremists are pushing harmful bans, but in Virginia, we’ve held our ground. With EMILY's List by our side, we’re poised to flip HD-22 and safeguard these vital rights for generations to come. Join me in this fight! **Electing Democratic pro-choice women is essential to preserving and advancing these rights.** [**Will you join the fight by making a donation to my campaign? clean_body: | | | I am fighting to defend the right to bodily autonomy. I’m excited to announce my endorsement from EMILY's List, a powerhouse focused on electing Democratic pro-choice women who drive real change. Since 1985, they’ve been champions for women's rights, reproductive freedom, and economic equality, helping countless women rise to public office. Virginia stands as a crucial stronghold for reproductive freedom in the South. It’s urgent that we secure a constitutional amendment to protect a woman’s right to make her own healthcare choices. While my opponent has voted against contraception and abortion rights, I am unwavering in my commitment: I will fiercely defend a woman’s right to control her own body. Across the South, anti-choice extremists are pushing harmful bans, but in Virginia, we’ve held our ground. With EMILY's List by our side, we’re poised to flip HD-22 and safeguard these vital rights for generations to come. Join me in this fight! Electing Democratic pro-choice women is essential to preserving and advancing these rights. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support. -Elizabeth Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: Prudent Politics
subject: Dueling Populisms—Urban Equality vs. Rural Liberty—free report
body:
@media (max-width:520px){.row-content{width:100%!important;}.column .border,.mobile_hide{display:none;}table{table-layout:fixed!important;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}.mobile_hide{min-height:0;max-height:0;max-width:0;overflow:hidden;font-size:0px;}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{display:table!important;max-height:none!important;}}META TAG (title): @media (max-width:520px){.row-content{width:100%!important;}.column .border,.mobile_hide{display:none;}table{table-layout:fixed!important;}.stack .column{width:100%;display:block;}.mobile_hide{min-height:0;max-height:0;max-width:0;overflow:hidden;font-size:0px;}.desktop_hide,.desktop_hide table{display:table!important;max-height:none!important;}}

Please read the following message.

Dear Friend,Populism is a word often used to describe emerging political trends around the world. But populism isn't just a modern phenomenon — it goes back centuries. Traditionally described as a battle between Left and Right, political differences are actually far more complex. What we are witnessing today are two distinct populist movements challenging party establishments across the West. Remarkably, these tensions can be traced all the way back to Roman times.This is why I'm reaching out to you today. I want to offer you a free copy of one of our most insightful eBooks: Dueling Populisms by Victor Davis Hanson. Hanson, a Hoover Senior Fellow and acclaimed historian, provides a unique perspective that I believe you'll find incredibly valuable.In Dueling Populisms you'll discover:
• What to expect from a political landscape dominated by movements that oppose both the establishment and each other.• The striking similarities between ancient populist movements and today’s progressive and conservative populisms.• Insights into what the future holds for America as we navigate these revived ancient tensions in our modern culture.This eBook is especially relevant as we face increasing political polarization and try to anticipate and understand election outcomes. By understanding the historical context of these populist movements, you’ll gain a clearer view of our current environment and the potential paths forward. Hanson's expertise will help you see beyond the surface of today's political debates and grasp the deeper currents at play.Don't miss out on this opportunity to deepen your understanding of today's political dynamics. Get your free copy of Dueling Populisms using this secure link: Get Your Free eBookI hope that it helps equip you to understand and participate in the civic discourse in the coming months.Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford UniversityWith its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

PrudentPolitics.com

525-K East Market Street # 114
City: Leesburg
State: Virginia
Zip Code: 20176
You can read our Privacy Policy by clicking here

name: Jahana Hayes
subject: SNAP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Jahana Hayes
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105513209/538585483/-1295403277?refcode=AU_JH_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODk4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDJhMzdjOS04MzE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kfdm_xmhyL17nmIrDlz20NEmfTq3ZTRq4qgoOXa_zlA=&emci=a2e83ec3-8315-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=602a37c9-8315-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=15529135) | Team, Yesterday, the Agriculture Cmte held our first SNAP hearing of the year. In March House Republicans passed a budget resolution that called on our committee to cut **$230 billion** from programs under our jurisdiction. This cannot happen without cuts to the **Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP)**. SNAP is by far our most effective anti-poverty tool and is a vital safety net for families across the country. Any cuts to this program could put the health of Americans in jeopardy, increase hunger, and worsen hardships for millions of families — including those with children, seniors, and people with disabilities. In Connecticut, the estimated economic loss from the proposed SNAP cuts will reach a staggering $256 million. This is irresponsible and wrong. I refuse to stay silent as Republicans use their majority to scrap a program that helps millions put healthy food on the table for their families. So yesterday, I spoke up about the devastating effects of cutting SNAP. I will continue to speak out tirelessly to protect this vital program from being defunded. _“In 2023, more than 47 million Americans experienced food insecurity... While unemployment rates dropped, participation in the programs did not. It’s because the people who are benefiting from SNAP, for the most part, already work multiple jobs. I was one of those people — working two jobs and still qualified for SNAP benefits. So if my Republican colleagues want to have a real conversation, I’m introducing a piece of legislation to raise the federal minimum wage from $7.25 so if people are working two jobs, they can have a living wage.” _ At every opportunity, I will raise my voice to defend the interests of working families. **I am here and staying in this fight. ** **[Now, I am asking you to join me. clean_body: | | Team, Yesterday, the Agriculture Cmte held our first SNAP hearing of the year. In March House Republicans passed a budget resolution that called on our committee to cut $230 billion from programs under our jurisdiction. This cannot happen without cuts to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP). SNAP is by far our most effective anti-poverty tool and is a vital safety net for families across the country. Any cuts to this program could put the health of Americans in jeopardy, increase hunger, and worsen hardships for millions of families — including those with children, seniors, and people with disabilities. In Connecticut, the estimated economic loss from the proposed SNAP cuts will reach a staggering $256 million. This is irresponsible and wrong. I refuse to stay silent as Republicans use their majority to scrap a program that helps millions put healthy food on the table for their families. So yesterday, I spoke up about the devastating effects of cutting SNAP. I will continue to speak out tirelessly to protect this vital program from being defunded. “In 2023, more than 47 million Americans experienced food insecurity... While unemployment rates dropped, participation in the programs did not. It’s because the people who are benefiting from SNAP, for the most part, already work multiple jobs. I was one of those people — working two jobs and still qualified for SNAP benefits. So if my Republican colleagues want to have a real conversation, I’m introducing a piece of legislation to raise the federal minimum wage from $7.25 so if people are working two jobs, they can have a living wage.” At every opportunity, I will raise my voice to defend the interests of working families. I am here and staying in this fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = There is no shortage of obstacles ahead of us, team. But as I continue to speak out against these harmful policies, it is a privilege knowing that you have my back. Thank you, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. Michigan, Minnesota, Georgia, and now New Hampshire are all winnable seats for Republicans to flip, BUT WE NEED TO ACT QUICKLY to fund these races. - Important: Open Senate seats are the best opportunity to hold and grow our Republican Majority so we can continue enacting the Trump agenda. We have 'Open Seat Funds' already set up to support the eventual Republican nominees in many states. Please donate right now to KEEP THE SENATE RED! We can't let Democrats derail the historic and Nation-saving work Republicans are doing in the United States Senate to support and protect President Trump and his administration. If we lose the Senate, President Trump's term effectively will be cut in half. Thank you! We can't waste this HUGE opportunity. ********************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************************** For Liberty, Ted Cruz | | | Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate** | | 815 A Brazos, PMB 550, Austin, TX 78701 | | | |

name: Bonta HQ
subject: Trump is targeting 500,000 immigrants seeking refuge
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
When Donald Trump picks a fight with California residents, Rob won’t back down.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250409&t=1&akid=1730%2E1088799%2E-39v0N)
**President Trump plans to revoke legal status from over 500,000 immigrants from Cuba, Haiti, Nicaragua, and Venezuela by April 24th,** ending their work permits and exposing them to risk of deportation.
These immigrants are here legally under a Biden-era program because it is not safe for them to return to their home countries, where they could face violence and authoritarianism.
We’re talking about more than 500,000 people who live, work, and contribute to the economy here in California and across America, and don’t deserve to be treated this way. **[Oppose Trump’s cruel attack on immigrants seeking refuge in the U.S. now!](https://act.robbonta.com/go/742?t=3&akid=1730%2E1088799%2E-39v0N)**
After already rolling out mass deportations, revoking student visas and detaining immigrants legally allowed to be here over their involvement in college protests, and sending over 200 immigrants to a mega-prison in El Salvador without due process and against a judge’s explicit orders, Trump’s coming for immigrants living here legally under humanitarian programs.
If he’s allowed to get away with this, his plan will turn families' lives upside down and hurt vulnerable communities.
Look: when Donald Trump picks a fight with California residents, Rob won’t back down. He’s fighting to protect our loved ones and neighbors from this administration’s unlawful actions, but he needs your support.
**[Will you sign this petition denouncing Trump’s attacks on immigrants fleeing authoritarianism and violence? We can send a powerful message to this administration, but only if we speak out together.](https://act.robbonta.com/go/742?t=4&akid=1730%2E1088799%2E-39v0N)**
**[Sign the Petition »](https://act.robbonta.com/go/742?t=5&akid=1730%2E1088799%2E-39v0N)**
Thank you for standing with us,
– Bonta HQ
* * *

subject: Reflections from Pete: Buds of hope starting to spring
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIzNTA1MzES1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIwMDEzODI5MAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Hello Peter, When I think about this past week, it feels like spring’s first thaw after a
very bleak winter. Our movement is demonstrating resolve and bringing forth a new season of hope.
I’m most encouraged to see people from all backgrounds, parts of the country,
and political affiliations come together to say “Enough is enough!” This past weekend, over 3 million took to the streets across the country to
protect our democracy, public lands, clean air and water, clean energy, and our
environment. I was honored to speak at the DC Hands Off! rally and say “hands
off!” to Trump and Musk on their front doorstep. Climate champion Cory Booker gave the longest speech in Senate history —
highlighting the terrible damage Donald Trump and Elon Musk are doing to our
democracy, our climate, and our communities — and demonstrating the need for a
government that focuses on people first. Urge your senators to follow his example and fight back against Trump and Musk’s policies. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~ And in the recent Wisconsin Supreme Court election, the people voted against a
Trump/Musk agenda that’s raising costs, killing jobs, and making us sick. Elon
Musk tried to buy this election, spending millions of dollars in an effort that
the people of Wisconsin flatly rejected. We the people decide elections, not billionaire donors. We demand lower costs,
more clean energy, and a healthy, functioning democracy. And we’re making that
known to anyone and everyone that is trying to undermine our future. There’s an energy in the air; our movement has momentum. I’m not blind to the
challenges we face or to the tough road ahead — we'll need to continue to bring
this level of energy to make a difference. But these wins and actions show us
that we have the power to fight back and win. I’m excited for all the work we’ll do together. I hope you are, too. Onward, Pete Maysmith
Incoming President

League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12350531&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIwMDEzODI5MAS2&spReportId=MjIwMDEzODI5MAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12350531&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIwMDEzODI5MAS2&spReportId=MjIwMDEzODI5MAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-LXrBz_

name: Kevin Roberts
subject: Goodbye DEI
body:
Do you have the courage to stand up to the radical Left’s Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) regime?

| | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | Dear Fellow American,

Do you have the courage to stand up to the radical Left's Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) regime?

DEI is inherently anti-American. As Americans, we believe people should be judged on the content of their character, not the color of their skin.

Back in my days as a full-time historian, I specialized in African American history, and I know that this DEI cult is completely opposed to Martin Luther King Jr.'s ideals.

[**That 's why I invite you to sign The Heritage Foundation's Stop DEI Declaration.**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/yhyptJ-bw32Y6VXBwXwnP14Wn-iNjHyGePzsTd4IuxCKwUC_zbA4zGaW2eS-KAmGXiJoRCujw7RXtVgSLaAuocxYFUmLlJ046IoHeN41ZPwu5wkTeIfXX_sE5mOpMaqSqcROZ3q_iXMeMZHsdrYB1DBfbJJAKJylMThuJU6klbKbj9hs-wWoB5v8D_ZxDBxUdLxOYb_hRO8SNRyE357tBHuCnCj3FTF-UuyGNAcJr6XS0F1pBWeLul0Jq7fTqoS5XtTqYWCOWTnDfl_U7lfuzI_VSPYMiGp1DoF1RFIiWqZEX5AEPKYVvZT0YihbPU-Nxb3RUCYvInCXGLOtKY4mxcaPc5dIs95Q5VR2iUGLlsXOQU5VowIC-WKFyO0W3T6Gxxd6SrwlgjBBIIYr8RKvOQ/x8uxMP0xkRFtQ4aOPr8uiCYCMtSw4zDk/7)

Your signature will prove that you, and patriots across the country reject DEI and want to return to treating our fellow Americans based on the content of their character, not the color of their skin.

And you will show policymakers in D.C. that patriots across the country oppose this wicked ideology.

**Sign the Stop DEI Declaration today using the secure link below.**

[**https://secured.heritage.org/stop-dei-declaration/**](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/Ow4OhoY_DfnfybS--_dc__g1RxSGt0170-Eu316h_y981RnJXYuEoZKifh-PEGnx76r8l6Cj7DzuMl53dhaVNg8b7IXF9I8gkcjBVrQdixunBGCN-wIoTSLMvSzpL-rWsvW-LMdCMsSK-v3N_QZ6AdCeDjIIfgu0S5-TaffsEutmacDTDVn5O29WJJYAJkG5fPzm4s7Wm3s3GzlCykfWFsFNhYprRmTZ1dZi-DzLA87Nd86xjS435KhOe_Sowbw86Yk2Hqom3tzjCUs1WveqTS5tjAddM1nyGSjp71exCaoh1JqjuanYYW6tEE9dyvkxWVGM-9nLCU_torsGO00XjcZbrZH4b-m4Ex9VbxeYdRPw7fB3OMHv4yycBUENEC5spsaaLmdc-IHhZq9CvsfDPQ/uM-IsWZdSGL68iI6yo0Hw331-F6gvPYt/7)

Thank you for taking this stand against DEI.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

**P.S. Declare your opposition to DEI today by signing The Heritage Foundation 's Stop DEI Declaration using this secure link: [https://secured.heritage.org/stop-dei-declaration/](http://links.liberty-pulse.com/s/c/s2EF8v492ZDUUpYHY1JIh3mRg2-MeLPp_O02OgRc9eKXD92mRjXbB72aRtW38Dd3z5nU__vsyQjsPBAUXB4keTHDxSqcnJrvb1WnP4GcmpEBj-xd47UCHF_C5RLdXVjUoyPff2vQQwFJhotmg5jMlrOCM_rC9ao-QqYE8xNREmX6uxfKzVB3fYFKwdBNDOguacg3xkUxY_Qygtk6VNtlORUkAZVTpId0Ldd51t3Nkt6ULJOYooox7XJRvfLiMwrbOWs12IzytwZWT9A6BP8S6plXg4bzUKj163VeadOKU5xtw3BKvwLmxqonhU54m5OcNXliX4wvfoSt2-upbEWj945dOvtyYOdVMQtDARiEYJxjPG4jTyvpYVkcLWIqdfJZQMFfWgnkx5MQVbOEJ4xZkA/LgTjAyhfO3s9vjVL8Q7t5p1kdgGJXU65/7)**

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Help federal workers stand up to Trump!
body:
This is about more than just one executive order. It’s about Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the billionaire class trying to crush workers' power and give bosses total control.
#
Peter, **Donald Trump declared war on working people** by signing an illegal executive order to strip collective bargaining rights from over one million federal workers.
**[Sign the grassroots amicus brief supporting federal workers standing up to Trump’s executive order now!](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140703?t=2&akid=36571%2E1203867%2EEDzT2E)**
Under the bogus guise of national security, Trump ordered the government to cancel union contracts, end grievance procedures, and continue his mass firings – _directly violating workers' hard-fought bargaining agreements._
Why? Because unions had the courage to stand up for workers in the face of Trump gutting the civil service. Now, Trump is acting like a tyrant by going after anyone who gets in his way.
This attack doesn’t just impact over a million federal workers. It threatens all of us by attacking labor rights and weakening the services we rely on: Social Security, the VA, and more.
This is about more than just one executive order. **It’s about Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the billionaire class trying to crush workers' power and give bosses total control.**
But working people will never stop fighting for our labor rights. That’s why we aren’t waiting for a court to stop him – we’re fighting back right now.
**[Will you stand with our grassroots movement by supporting the federal workers standing up to Trump’s illegal attacks? It’s important to stand together because when they come for one, they come for all.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140703?t=3&akid=36571%2E1203867%2EEDzT2E)**
**[Add Your Name](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140703?t=4&akid=36571%2E1203867%2EEDzT2E)**
In solidarity,
Justice Democrats

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250409-36571-footer&t=5&refcode2=36571_1203867_EDzT2E&akid=36571%2E1203867%2EEDzT2E)**

name: Ashley Floyd
subject: The best way to fight back 💪
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emerge America
body:
Under Donald Trump's leadership, MAGA extremists are pushing extreme policies that are willfully tanking the economy and threatening the livelihood of hardworking families.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105514753/538590935/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1ZjdjMGQ1LTg3MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aezXsqIDTyBdnJNx9tCyAvO_h-ws4PU9dqJTaQoB250=)
---
| Peter,

Under Donald Trump's leadership, MAGA extremists are pushing extreme policies that are willfully tanking the economy and threatening the livelihood of hardworking families.

Millions of people from across the country took to the streets to send a clear message to Trump and his allies to keep their hands off of our most fundamental freedoms and rights. The grassroots energy on the ground is incredible, and more people than ever are eagerly looking for ways to get involved.

Here at Emerge, we know the best way to fight back is by electing even _more_ women. [_**Your support today will help us tap into this incredible energy so we can recruit and identify strong women leaders to run, win, and fight for their communities.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105514754/538590936/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1ZjdjMGQ1LTg3MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aezXsqIDTyBdnJNx9tCyAvO_h-ws4PU9dqJTaQoB250=)
---
| [ACTIVATE YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105514755/538590937/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1ZjdjMGQ1LTg3MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aezXsqIDTyBdnJNx9tCyAvO_h-ws4PU9dqJTaQoB250=)
---
For the last 20 years, our team at Emerge has been working to build up power for the New American majority by identifying and training strong women leaders from across the country who are part of the fabric of their communities to win critical elections.

Our alums are on the front lines against Trump’s dangerous agenda, and the next class of Emerge women will join our alums to help build an even _stronger_ firewall in 2025 and beyond. But to continue empowering women across the country to lead their communities and stand up to Trump, we need your help to stay ready for the tough battles ahead!

The investments we make today will allow us to identify and train the next generation of women leaders who are committed to safeguarding our rights, protecting our Democracy, and fighting for our future. [_**Can we count on you to activate your 2025 membership and renew your support for Emerge today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105514756/538590938/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1ZjdjMGQ1LTg3MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aezXsqIDTyBdnJNx9tCyAvO_h-ws4PU9dqJTaQoB250=)
| [ACTIVATE YOUR 2025 MEMBERSHIP ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105514757/538590939/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1ZjdjMGQ1LTg3MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aezXsqIDTyBdnJNx9tCyAvO_h-ws4PU9dqJTaQoB250=)
---
Thank you,

Ashley Floyd
Senior Development Director, Emerge

* * *
| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105514758/538590940/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-04-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY1ZjdjMGQ1LTg3MTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aezXsqIDTyBdnJNx9tCyAvO_h-ws4PU9dqJTaQoB250=)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: super high contribution limits
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
no corporate money for us
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39624%2E3422442%2EvcJCpp)
Dear Derek,
Every race Katie’s ever run has been 100% funded by grassroots donations, and this campaign for governor is no different. **Katie Porter rejects contributions from corporations and their PACs, lobbyists, and executives at Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Big Banks.**
**_[Can you chip in $5 to power our grassroots movement?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250409_1_ak?refcode=em20250409-39624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39624_3422442_vcJCpp&akid=39624%2E3422442%2EvcJCpp)_**
In gubernatorial races each state has different contribution limits, and **California has one of the highest limits in the country** , with individuals (or even a corporation) able to donate almost $40,000 to a single candidate in both the primary and general election.
Here’s what that means for us: we need even more donations from everyday folks to keep pace with candidates who take corporate money.
Katie’s never been for sale, and she never will be. When we say we’re running a people-powered campaign, we really mean it.
**[Will you chip in to our campaign so that we can elect Katie Porter as California’s next governor?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250409_1_ak?refcode=em20250409-39624&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39624_3422442_vcJCpp&akid=39624%2E3422442%2EvcJCpp)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250409_1_ak?refcode=em20250409-39624&refcode2=39624_3422442_vcJCpp&akid=39624%2E3422442%2EvcJCpp)
—Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250409-39624&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39624_3422442_vcJCpp&akid=39624%2E3422442%2EvcJCpp)**
---

Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: ICYMI: A Call to Defend Public Education and Honor Dr. King"s Legacy
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169827.172272.141&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169827.172272.141&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169827.172272.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14250)
# **ICYMI: A Call to Defend Public Education and Honor Dr. King 's Legacy**
Last week, on the anniversary of Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.'s assassination, Senator Hughes led a powerful [press conference](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169827.172272.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14251) at Martin Luther King High School to denounce federal efforts to dismantle public education.
* * *
**We came together on this day, the anniversary of the assassination of Dr. King, because we should not lose this moment or this day in American history. Dr. King fought for equality and justice, and we are raising our voices today to stand up for the same things.** **We are fighting against the elimination of the Department of Education and public education funding, and at the same time calling out the need for more investments in our public schools and the education of our young people.** **\- Senator Hughes -**
* * *
Senator Hughes, joined by federal, state, and local elected officials, civil rights advocates, and education leaders, called out President Trump's executive order to dismantle the U.S. Department of Education and the funding and support the Department provides. The speakers highlighted the need for every community member to do their part. We cannot forget that we can be the difference, especially when it comes to making change at the local level. Kathryn Epps, President and CEO, of [the Fund for the School District of Philadelphia](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169827.172272.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14253), encouraged leaders and community members to donate to [Martin Luther King High School](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169827.172272.141&gen=1&mailing_linkid=14254). She noted that we, the people, can help support educational programs, extracurricular activities, and essential educational resources at the high school. The U.S. Department of Education provides billions in support to Pennsylvania schools--including funding for low-income schools, special education, vocational training, teacher development, and higher education aid. Without these resources, countless families would not have access to a high quality education. This moment is a critical inflection point for civil rights, justice, and the future of America's youth. It's important for everyone to acknowledge the threat to public education and act. Call Senators Fetterman and McCormick, and your US Representative and tell them to stop any cuts to public education.
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes
---
| | |
---
District Office
2401 North 54th Street
Philadelphia, PA 19131
Phone: 215.879.7777
Fax: 215.879.7778
| |
---
Harrisburg Office
Senate Box 203007
Harrisburg, PA 17120-3007
Phone: 717.787.7112
Fax: 717.772.0579

name: Team Tina
subject: Donald Trump signed an executive order attempting to close the Department of Education

body:
|
#
---
Peter, **President Donald Trump recently signed an executive order attempting to close the Department of Education — which could potentially impact 88,000 Oregon students with disabilities and drastically alter their education and care.** In the wake, The Oregon Department of Education had to shut down five fundamental literacy programs after losing $2.5 million in federal funding. The future of Oregon's children is at a crossroads, and Governor Kotek is acting swiftly to protect our students. Tina is committed to standing firm against these attacks. As she put it, _"One of our most fundamental duties as elected leaders is to provide our young people with a quality public education and to protect their wellbeing, no matter who they are or where they live. This reckless decision is a dereliction of that duty."_ We believe in an Oregon where every child's potential is realized, and we know you do too. name: Team Lateefah
subject: We won’t let Trump distract us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lateefah for Congress
body:
https://www.lateefahsimon.com [https://www.lateefahsimon.com]
Friend,
As impossible as it sounds, Donald Trump is getting even more out of control.
He’s not just talking like a dictator—he’s governing like one. And unless we act now, our democracy, our rights, and our futures are in serious danger.
Let’s break down just some of what Trump is trying to get away with right now:
🚨 He signed an Executive Order ending collective bargaining for 1 million federal workers—a third of whom are veterans. This is a direct attack on workers, unions, and the labor movement that built this country.
🚨 Trump’s Health and Human Services department is reportedly laying off 10,000 public health workers without congressional approval in the middle of multiple disease outbreaks. This includes researchers working on life-saving cancer treatments.
🚨 And he’s pushing for tariffs that threaten one in six jobs in California—jobs that depend on global trade and fuel our local economies. They aren’t “liberating,” they’re devastating.
It’s not hyperbole to say that people will suffer if we don’t stop him.
Trump wants to hand over every last one of our rights to corporations and billionaires like Elon Musk, who is bankrolling Trump’s extremist agenda.
But Lateefah is fighting back. She’s working around the clock to reject this dangerous, dystopian vision and build a government that works for us, not the ultra-rich.
As a lifelong organizer, Lateefah knows that real power comes from the people—from workers, caregivers, neighbors, and voters. And that’s exactly who she’s fighting for in Congress. We won’t let Trump distract us with every outrageous thing he says. We’re staying focused on our goal: pushing back on his extremist agenda and holding him and the Republican Party accountable in 2026.
If you believe in a future where care is prioritized, unions are protected, and our government puts people over profits, chip in today to support Lateefah’s campaign >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_las_email-25q2?refcode=x_250409_distractions_act]

clean_body: [] Friend, As impossible as it sounds, Donald Trump is getting even more out of control. He’s not just talking like a dictator—he’s governing like one. And unless we act now, our democracy, our rights, and our futures are in serious danger. Let’s break down just some of what Trump is trying to get away with right now: 🚨 He signed an Executive Order ending collective bargaining for 1 million federal workers—a third of whom are veterans. This is a direct attack on workers, unions, and the labor movement that built this country. 🚨 Trump’s Health and Human Services department is reportedly laying off 10,000 public health workers without congressional approval in the middle of multiple disease outbreaks. This includes researchers working on life-saving cancer treatments. 🚨 And he’s pushing for tariffs that threaten one in six jobs in California—jobs that depend on global trade and fuel our local economies. They aren’t “liberating,” they’re devastating. It’s not hyperbole to say that people will suffer if we don’t stop him. Trump wants to hand over every last one of our rights to corporations and billionaires like Elon Musk, who is bankrolling Trump’s extremist agenda. But Lateefah is fighting back. She’s working around the clock to reject this dangerous, dystopian vision and build a government that works for us, not the ultra-rich. As a lifelong organizer, Lateefah knows that real power comes from the people—from workers, caregivers, neighbors, and voters. And that’s exactly who she’s fighting for in Congress. We won’t let Trump distract us with every outrageous thing he says. We’re staying focused on our goal: pushing back on his extremist agenda and holding him and the Republican Party accountable in 2026. If you believe in a future where care is prioritized, unions are protected, and our government puts people over profits, chip in today to support Lateefah’s campaign >> [] If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] In solidarity, Team Lateefah [] Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. Now, as a 25-year veteran organizer and nationally recognized advocate for civil rights and social justice, she’s fighting this fight from the Capitol. In Lateefah, CA-12 has a proven champion. To learn more about Lateefah, visit LateefahSimon.com [] DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] [] [] [] Lateefah for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 United States Paid for by Lateefah for Congress If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: George Whitesides
subject: I’ll never stop showing up and speaking out
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105515592/538593628/1606932672?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA1YjkxMS04YTE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8A-8xdDB8RZl8qIXwntFa37KN3XJ9XuupDh7q-cHoY=)
Peter,

This past weekend I took part in the “Hands Off” rally in Santa Clarita. I stood shoulder to shoulder with neighbors who are sick and tired of the dysfunction perpetrated by this administration.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105515593/538593629/2123953302?refcode=em-4.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA1YjkxMS04YTE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8A-8xdDB8RZl8qIXwntFa37KN3XJ9XuupDh7q-cHoY=&emci=9563800b-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0805b911-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=36198509)
I was blown away by the thousands who took part in demonstrations across the country. We are united in our resolve to stand up for our democracy.

There’s an incredible amount at stake: Protecting Social Security and Medicaid, defending veterans’ benefits, making sure CA-27 gets its fair share of resources – and with this administration’s recent actions, the list grows by the hour.

I’m fighting hard in Washington against Trump’s corruption, and making sure I’m listening to your voices back at home through town halls and public comment. I was elected to do right by our communities, and I never stop showing up and speaking out with our democracy on the line.

While I’ve gotten a lot of good feedback, it’s impossible for me to connect with everyone on the ground. **[That’s why I’m asking you to complete our quick survey today – we can’t let up in this fight, and it starts now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105515594/538593630/2123953302?refcode=em-4.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA1YjkxMS04YTE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8A-8xdDB8RZl8qIXwntFa37KN3XJ9XuupDh7q-cHoY=&emci=9563800b-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0805b911-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=36198509)**
| ****[Begin the survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105515595/538593631/2123953302?refcode=em-4.9.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE1MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODA1YjkxMS04YTE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-8A-8xdDB8RZl8qIXwntFa37KN3XJ9XuupDh7q-cHoY=&emci=9563800b-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=0805b911-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=36198509)****

Thank you,

George

name: Trump Tank Parade Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Stop Trump’s Military Parade through D.C.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

BREAKING: Sources are telling journalists that Trump is planning a massive
four-mile-long military parade through the streets of Washington, D.C. on
his birthday—under the pretext of honoring the 250th anniversary of the
U.S. Army.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24894?source=email-20250409&t=1011&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Headline about Trump planning an expensive military parade through D.C.

This isn’t about patriotism. It’s about power. This is how dictators
celebrate themselves. Tanks, armored vehicles, missile displays,
flyovers—this is authoritarianism flexing its power.

We cannot allow Donald Trump to turn the Capitol into a backdrop for
authoritarian pageantry - and because of the millions it’d cost, Congress
has a say. [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24894?source=email-20250409&t=1012&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Tell Congress: Stop Trump’s military parade. Block funding.
Deny permits. Raise hell.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24894?source=email-20250409&t=1013&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]ADD YOUR NAME

In 2019, Trump spent millions rerouting Pentagon money to stage his
“Salute to America,” featuring tanks and fighter jets and VIP bleachers
for political donors. Now he wants to go bigger—and he’s chosen his
birthday as the centerpiece.

This isn’t just vanity. It’s propaganda.

In authoritarian regimes from Russia to North Korea, military parades
aren’t celebrations—they’re threats. They tell the public, “We have the
weapons. We have the power. Obey.” That’s what Trump is trying to do in
our name.

In 2018, Trump was forced to cancel due to the enormous cost and the
public outcry because, despite what he thinks, Trump can’t do this on his
own. Congress can block funding. D.C. officials can refuse permits.
Pentagon leaders can refuse the outrageous misuse of military might. And
if we make enough noise, they will.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/24894?source=email-20250409&t=1014&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Tell Congress: No tanks on Trump’s birthday. No military parade for
would-be dictators.

This isn’t just about stopping a parade. It’s about stopping a movement
toward fascism that’s getting louder, bolder, and more dangerous by the
day. If we let this happen without a fight, we normalize it—and
normalization is how democracies die.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20250409.DOSInu&t=1007&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20250409.Yw806O&t=1008&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20250409.tMzNqk&t=1009&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20250409.RWS5nz&t=1010&akid=8147%2E5885482%2EGCLpat ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:

subject: A humble request on behalf of Mark Kelly
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
When Elon Musk singles you out for punishment, it means his hundreds of millions of followers do the same. And with Elon running Trump’s White House, he brings the entire MAGA Right with him, too.
#

Friends — we’ll keep this short.
We’re writing to humbly ask if you will make a donation to Mark Kelly’s campaign today.
Mark’s been under relentless attack for months now, and donations from supporters like you are how he raises the resources he’ll need to fight back.
When Elon Musk singles you out for punishment, it means his hundreds of millions of followers do the same. And with Elon running Trump’s White House, he brings the entire MAGA Right with him, too.
But Mark’s not afraid, and you shouldn’t be either. Because together, we’re stronger than them. He can’t do this alone, though. And that’s why we’re asking:

Hours after I touched down in West Michigan last week, I headed into back-to-back town halls and community events. We had over 1,000 people show up in person, and close to 5,000 tune in via livestream to express their concerns.

**I know that people are tired, angry, and scared. That’s why I wanted to show up for my community—the only member of Congress from West Michigan holding in-person town halls right now.**

While Republicans refuse to host town halls and discriminate based on political affiliation, I’m showing up here in West Michigan and in Congress for everyone.

_This is what I signed up for, and it’s more important than ever to have folks who are willing to do this job._

**But I can’t hold this seat alone. House Republicans have a narrow majority and are more emboldened than ever to gain more ground in 2026. name: The Long Run PAC
subject: [Response Needed] Take Our Survey!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Take just a couple minutes of your time today and make your voice heard
#
Friend — With Trump’s presidency now more than two months underway, we want to check in with our supporters and gauge your priorities.
[**Head to our April 2025 issue survey here and let us know how you’re feeling at this important time for our nation >>**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/survey_em_april2025/?source=em250409-1-300&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8)
[TELL US WHAT YOU THINK](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/survey_em_april2025/?source=em250409-1-300&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8)
The first two months with Trump in office have been even more chaotic than we expected.
First, Trump let Elon Musk — an unelected billionaire — make illegal cuts to the federal budget, fire thousands of crucial federal workers, and shut down entire agencies that serve people in need.
Then Trump worked with Republicans in Congress to push through a budget that gives more power to his White House and lays the groundwork for cuts to Medicaid, Medicare, and Social Security.
Now, Trump is unleashing havoc on our economy with reckless tariffs that will raise the cost of goods for regular folks and have sent the stock market spiraling.
And that’s not to mention the continued attacks on our democracy and undermining of the Constitution — ignoring federal court orders, disappearing college protesters, and deporting migrants to a foreign super prison without due process, to name a few.
We’re going to have to work together, as a movement, to fight back and lay the groundwork for a progressive political comeback. And in order to do that, we need to know where our grassroots supporters stand and what we can do together in the coming days and months.
[**So please, take just a couple minutes of your time today and fill out our April 2025 issue survey. Mandela and our entire team will be checking this link to see how folks respond.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/survey_em_april2025/?source=em250409-1-300&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8)
[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/survey_em_april2025/?source=em250409-1-300&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8)
Thanks so much for providing your feedback. We look forward to reading your responses.
The team at The Long Run PAC

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=3&refcode2=5518_196590_Sxiku8&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=4&akid=5518%2E196590%2ESxiku8)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

GOP Rep. Wesley Hunt **[fired back at ultra-woke Democrat Jasmine Crockett](https://substack.com/redirect/327875c1-4a89-418c-890a-4339189b5e5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after she belligerently insulted Trump and his entire administration.
"Everything they touch turns to SHIT!" she snapped during a Wednesday hearing.
**[Watch Wesley Hunt take her down...](https://substack.com/redirect/327875c1-4a89-418c-890a-4339189b5e5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

What they do is take a wide sweeping brush, and they decide that the enemy is going to be immigrants!"
Hunt was **[ready to absolutely wreck her for the insulting comment.](https://substack.com/redirect/327875c1-4a89-418c-890a-4339189b5e5a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** "The question must be asked; Do the Democrats hate Trump more than they love this country and more than they love the safety of my fellow Americans?" he said.
"This might explain why they are willing to defend members of Tren de Aragua and MS-13 rather than stand up and clap for a child with a terminal brain cancer illness,... Trump Derangement Syndrome is REAL!"

# Today's Big News:
# Trump announces 90-day pause on tariffs, raises Chinese tariffs to 125%
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8eee2ba5-8c45-49ef-8d4b-bdd4f7c639f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump showcased the art of the deal Wednesday, announcing a 90-day pause on tariff hikes for most countries while ramping up pressure on China with a 125% tariff rate, after more than 70 countries agreed to come to the negotiating table with the U.S. on existing trade imbalances.
Trump made the **[surprise announcement on Truth Social](https://substack.com/redirect/8334310d-fb5c-4792-b445-069cdb25599c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , explaing that he will dial back tariffs to a modest 10% for most trading partners, giving American businesses and consumers a well-timed breather after a week of market jitters.
Meanwhile, Trump's decision to hit China harder--up from 104%--sends a clear message to a rival that's been flexing its own trade muscle with an 84% tariff on U.S. goods.
"Based on the lack of respect that China has shown to the World's Markets, I am hereby raising the Tariff charged to China by the United States of America to 125%, effective immediately," Trump wrote. "At some point, hopefully in the near future, China will realize that the days of ripping off the U.S.A., and other Countries, is no longer sustainable or acceptable."
The markets loved it, with the Dow jumping over 7.8% as investors cheered Trump's willingness to ease up on allies while keeping the heat on China. After the S&P 500 shed nearly $6 trillion amid trade war fears, this pivot proves Trump's got an eye for the big picture--stabilizing the economy while racking up leverage for future deals.

| | ALERT: the House of Representatives is about to vote on the most dangerous voter suppression bill we’ve seen yet, and millions could be disenfranchised. The SAVE Act would unnecessarily force all Americans to prove their citizenship _in person_ — with documents like a passport or birth certificate — every time they register to vote or change their registration, even if you move. **This would disproportionately keep eligible young Americans, low-income Americans, Americans of color, American women who’ve changed their names after getting married or divorced, and rural Americans from registering to vote — potentially silencing 21 million voices in our democracy.** No passport? Birth certificate with an old name? No time to drive hours to an election office? You could be unable to vote. The legislation would also compel problematic voter purges, functionally end mail-in and online voter registration as well as third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration. **This harmful bill is the latest in an onslaught of new restrictive legislation, disinformation, and coordinated attacks on our elections and our democracy.** [**And we need your help as we fight back.
