**The SAVE Act would especially target:**
* Black and Latino voters, who disproportionately register to vote through third-party registration efforts
* Young voters, who are less likely to have the forms of ID required by the bill
* As many as 69 million women nationwide who’ve changed their names and can’t use their birth certificate to prove their citizenship

**We’re calling the SAVE Act what it is: an attempt to legalize voter suppression.**
While disproportionately hurting voters of color, the legislation also stokes racial prejudice and discriminatory fears of unwanted individuals voting. Republicans claim they need to pass this bill to prevent people who aren’t citizens from voting in federal elections — _which is already against the law. _
Under this legislation, we could see mass voter purges used to prevent access to the ballot box. Furthermore, the SAVE Act does not require voters to be notified before they are removed from voting rolls — rolling back one of the essential protections of the National Voter Registration Act.
**The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy. Our elected officials should be working to protect this right, not restrict it.**
**So we’re rallying Americans to tell their lawmakers to vote NO on the SAVE Act, and we’ll continue working to prevent voter suppression.**

clean_body: We must stop the SAVE Act to protect the freedom to vote. | | | ALERT: the House of Representatives is about to vote on the most dangerous voter suppression bill we’ve seen yet, and millions could be disenfranchised. The SAVE Act would unnecessarily force all Americans to prove their citizenship in person — with documents like a passport or birth certificate — every time they register to vote or change their registration, even if you move. This would disproportionately keep eligible young Americans, low-income Americans, Americans of color, American women who’ve changed their names after getting married or divorced, and rural Americans from registering to vote — potentially silencing 21 million voices in our democracy. No passport? Birth certificate with an old name? No time to drive hours to an election office? You could be unable to vote. The legislation would also compel problematic voter purges, functionally end mail-in and online voter registration as well as third-party registration drives, and upend automatic voter registration. President Trump slapped China with additional tariffs, raising the total to 104 percent. This ignited an immediate response by China with 84 percent tariff on imports of U.S. goods. This forced Apple to fly plane loads of goods to the U.S. before the tariffs struck to avoid the price hike. The Apple iphone may jump up to $2500 when it's all said and done if the countries don't come to the table to negotiate. China relies heavily on the U.S. market and has used and abused the rules of the WTO for years. President Trump is the first to put his foot down in the unfair practices China has employed for decades. President Trump also signed executive orders reinvigorating the coal industry. He lifted the Biden era restrictions on clean coal plants and is accelerating permitting and funding on new coal projects which will allow the coal industry to flourish. Mick Mulvaney is the former Director of the Office of Management and Budget as well as the former White House Chief of Staff. Mulvaney walks us through the current climate on global trade and tariffs. Are the tariffs more effective as a negotiating tool or a real source of income for the United States? Can domestic industries that have been squandered be brought back to life? Mulvaney gives us insight as to what to expect at home and abroad. China must be dealt with separately for geo-political reasons. China has abused the WTO rules, stolen American IP and failed to act like a leading industrial nation. Mulvaney says we treat China like a Communist nation, which is what they are.
Featuring:
**Mick Mulvaney**
Former Director of Office of Management and Budget
Former White House Chief of Staff
Former Congressman | South Carolina, District 5

clean_body: Watch now (48 mins) | President Trump slapped China with additional tariffs, raising the total to 104 percent. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more | | | | | Apr 9 | | | | | | | | | | | | President Trump slapped China with additional tariffs, raising the total to 104 percent. This ignited an immediate response by China with 84 percent tariff on imports of U.S. goods. This forced Apple to fly plane loads of goods to the U.S. before the tariffs struck to avoid the price hike. The Apple iphone may jump up to $2500 when it's all said and done if the countries don't come to the table to negotiate. China relies heavily on the U.S. market and has used and abused the rules of the WTO for years. President Trump is the first to put his foot down in the unfair practices China has employed for decades. President Trump also signed executive orders reinvigorating the coal industry. He lifted the Biden era restrictions on clean coal plants and is accelerating permitting and funding on new coal projects which will allow the coal industry to flourish. Mick Mulvaney is the former Director of the Office of Management and Budget as well as the former White House Chief of Staff. Mulvaney walks us through the current climate on global trade and tariffs. Are the tariffs more effective as a negotiating tool or a real source of income for the United States? Can domestic industries that have been squandered be brought back to life? Mulvaney gives us insight as to what to expect at home and abroad. China must be dealt with separately for geo-political reasons. China has abused the WTO rules, stolen American IP and failed to act like a leading industrial nation. Mulvaney says we treat China like a Communist nation, which is what they are. Featuring: Mick Mulvaney Former Director of Office of Management and Budget Former White House Chief of Staff Former Congressman | South Carolina, District 5 Today's show is sponsored by: Delta Rescue Delta Rescue is one the largest no-kill animal sanctuaries. Leo Grillo is on a mission to help all abandoned, malnourished, hurt or suffering animals. He relies solely on contributions from people like you and me. If you want to help Leo to continue his mission of running one of the best care-for-life animal sanctuaries in the country please visit Delta Rescue at: American Made Goods If you're looking for American made household goods that are SAFE and NON-TOXIC then you should join me by texting 276-500-1185! From cleaning supplies to detergent to make-up, this American company has everything you need and it's all made right here in the USA. Just text 276-500-1185 today! body:
Did you see our announcement? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105516606/538597010/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VlZWZmNy04ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQ2Cmybjk7IOD_Af1gYL0CYH5AuZyg77PrQY9KgjxaA=)

Peter, We wanted to make sure you saw our earlier message: Wiley is officially running for the U.S. Senate in North Carolina — and we need you on this team. The old playbook isn’t working. While many in Washington avoid the tough fights, Wiley has NEVER backed down. He’s not running to play it safe — he’s running to shake things up and fight for the bold, people-first change North Carolinians deserve. Thom Tillis and his billionaire backers won’t make this easy. But if we build a grassroots movement fueled with the energy and urgency this moment demands, we can win. **We win by building a people-powered movement — that includes you — from day one.** **[Will you be one of the first to stand with Wiley? Add your name to be a founding supporter of his Senate campaign and his fresh vision for North Carolina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105516607/538597011/-50785987?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VlZWZmNy04ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQ2Cmybjk7IOD_Af1gYL0CYH5AuZyg77PrQY9KgjxaA=&emci=3bd267fc-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=23eeeff7-8d15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=28008880)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105516608/538597012/-50785987?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VlZWZmNy04ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQ2Cmybjk7IOD_Af1gYL0CYH5AuZyg77PrQY9KgjxaA=&emci=3bd267fc-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=23eeeff7-8d15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=28008880)

Thanks,
Wiley Nickel HQ

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Wiley Nickel** <info@wileynickel.com>
Date: Wed, Apr 9, 2025 at 10:00 AM
Subject: I’m running for U.S. Senate.
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Hi there,
I’m Wiley Nickel — and today, I’m announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate.
I learned from my dad that when times are tough, you don’t back down — you dig in and fight harder. **And let’s be honest: North Carolina needs that kind of fighter right now.**
The truth is, everyday North Carolina families are fed up and sick of politics. Fed up with a system that bends to Donald Trump and billionaires like Elon Musk and lets politicians like Thom Tillis skate by — while rigging the system to take away our rights, gut Social Security, and line their own pockets at our expense.
**Washington’s been playing it safe for too long, and it’s not working.**
Tillis won’t stand up to extremism — he does what he’s told by Republican leadership, no matter how much it hurts our state.
I’m not here to protect the status quo. I can’t be bought, and I’ve never backed down from a tough fight — not when I worked as a White House staffer for President Obama, not when I won a tough Congressional seat, and not when I stood up for affordable healthcare and voting rights here in North Carolina. **I will always fight for what’s right — especially when the odds are stacked against us and the going gets tough.**
This campaign is about delivering to North Carolina the leadership we deserve with real backbone to the Senate. I’m ready to take the tough votes and stand firm for our values. But I can’t do it alone, Peter.
**We’re up against deep pockets and out-of-touch billionaires, including Elon Musk and mysterious unnamed super PACs who think they can buy this race. We need to build a people-powered movement to prove them wrong.**
**[Will you be one of the first to join our fight? Add your name to become a founding supporter to my campaign for the U.S. Senate and help bring bold, principled leadership to North Carolina.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105516609/538597013/-50785987?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VlZWZmNy04ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQ2Cmybjk7IOD_Af1gYL0CYH5AuZyg77PrQY9KgjxaA=&emci=3bd267fc-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=23eeeff7-8d15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=28008880)**
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105516610/538597014/-50785987?refcode=AU_GWN_EG_LAU_PET_AC_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2VlZWZmNy04ZDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zQ2Cmybjk7IOD_Af1gYL0CYH5AuZyg77PrQY9KgjxaA=&emci=3bd267fc-8a15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=23eeeff7-8d15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=28008880)

— Wiley

name: History Facts
subject: What is the biggest blizzard ever?
body:
When blizzards come at full force, they’re certainly nothing to sneeze at.

| W hen blizzards come at full force, they’re certainly nothing to sneeze at. In the most extreme cases, waist-deep snow and whiteouts bring entire cities — and sometimes entire regions — to a standstill. Here are five facts about some of the biggest blizzards in history.

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Our voting rights are under attack
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
I won’t let anyone silence me or the voices of millions of citizens who deserve to be heard.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=188%2E181023%2ElAUvgb)
Team,
As Donald Trump and his Republican allies try to deny Americans their right to vote, here’s my message to them:
**I won’t let _anyone_ silence me or the voices of millions of citizens who deserve to be heard. **
**[I’ll explain more, but first: Will you stand with me in support of voting rights and against Trump’s harmful _SAVE Act_ by signing my team’s petition today? ](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/save-act/?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=188%2E181023%2ElAUvgb)**
The President recently signed an executive order that would deny citizens the right to vote. And his Republican allies in Congress are trying to fast-track a bill that would block millions of Americans from casting their ballots in future elections.
The _SAVE Act_ would strip millions of Americans — including Black Michiganders, active-duty troops, and the more than 2.2 million women in Michigan whose married names are not the same name on their birth certificates — of their right to vote by:
* Requiring voters to register in person with their birth certificate, U.S. passport, or naturalization certificate.
* Eliminating a voter’s ability to register to vote online or by mail.
* Forcing voters to go to an election clerk’s office every time they update their registration or change their address.

Protecting the right to vote has been one of my top priorities as Secretary of State. Under my leadership, we held the highest turnout and most secure elections in Michigan’s history.
But the President and his allies are trying to undo all of our progress — **not because they care about improving elections but because they want to rig the system and make it easier for them to win.**
**[I’m someone who stands up to bullies, and I will take on anyone who tries to take away our constitutionally guaranteed rights and freedoms. Join me in fighting against the _SAVE Act_ by adding your name to my petition today >> ](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/save-act/?refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&email=&akid=188%2E181023%2ElAUvgb)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/save-act/refcode=AU_JMB_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250409_PM1_V1_S1&email=?akid=188%2E181023%2ElAUvgb)**
As the next Governor of Michigan, I can promise you that I will always fight to defend our rights from the billionaires and bullies trying to take them away.
Thank you,
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-jbmi/?t=2&akid=188%2E181023%2ElAUvgb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/signup/update-your-information-jbmi/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=3&akid=188%2E181023%2ElAUvgb)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

23133 Woodward Ave, Number 116,
Ferndale, MI 48220

name: Team Deb Haaland
subject: RFK Jr. is spreading conspiracy theories here in New Mexico
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is in New Mexico this week.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1240%2E400544%2Eu1vdht)
**Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. is in New Mexico this week. And as usual, he’s spreading misinformation that will make our communities less healthy:**
[](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250409_2_rfk?source=em20250409-1240&akid=1240%2E400544%2Eu1vdht)
RFK Jr. is in New Mexico after he announced that he’s cutting 10,000 full-time employees across health agencies, including staff that help navigate Medicaid coverage, monitor infectious diseases, and support critical medical research.
The health care system in this country was already broken, and spreading conspiracy theories and firing employees who help New Mexicans get Medicaid is only going to make things worse.
**RFK Jr. is doing Trump and Musk’s bidding, and it’s having devastating consequences.**
[**Will you add your name to call on RFK Jr. to keep his misinformation out of New Mexico and reverse his harmful cuts to health agency staffing?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250409_2_rfk?source=em20250409-1240&akid=1240%2E400544%2Eu1vdht)
**[Add your name »](https://act.debhaaland.com/sign/em_ms_dh_20250409_2_rfk?source=em20250409-1240&akid=1240%2E400544%2Eu1vdht)**
In solidarity,
Team Deb Haaland

Because this everyday drink contains shocking levels of a toxic mineral that's present in nearly 98% of Alzheimer's patients' brains... Can you guess which one it is? Studies show that this toxic mineral builds in our brains over time... Killing off an important molecule that’s key for keeping our precious memories intact. Which not only leads to forgetfulness and “senior moments” as you age... But it’s also a shocking newly discovered root cause of Alzheimer’s disease. If you think it’s the drinks that contain alcohol... You might want to think again. This will surprise you! .

body:
I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

|

| _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/lo2KMG8QhiTRnP869SWoumrtfyYNqLk-Vi05kuFmJgxHws6SDhMY-9JIryEs1dEG70cn4siEevzmGOMBk10qV9k7p08xuuSL56q1dkc0vCL0r8HArMRdHiiI-HJSy6_FqIH4Lk6gxj5l0p18s1czfZ5gcqBG0PbOeVNnimy0JItHcTEZrgLswEDV/QmojkbsHGxCMDh1ty70l03XMW6zFW9LN/7)_

| | Dear Fellow American,

I'm glad you opened my email today! I have something urgent to ask you that will shape the future of our families, communities, and country.

[**Will you take our National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory (CRT)?**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/qGmFc5pHbOme_VEobiY9_TxkPVyJzcauaJWv1RX0PTkKdWWC6Q7iszCS51WMk2dsaBeQ0-jXB3Ayr9v5o1zxzSwFgaSYzNOdEg4DwE0J83Xm8cufBkMCNMG_8O8j9fzQ4vC2tOWquMsCLh4rJAHpwEOjO0siHgqCTslcyBJi2JsgJuI9lRjCGLrueX2_ABhW5il6zfFWYG_0hpLmeW-ZxHmYCXPBuT9Mvy4Sw7xkhyOGoFf7YTpL33XvCvahvX271U4fOaZBcbskR8LsRUgenT9AlwQNOZRcT6T5IGdfstrItpe0hk00xguZPIiZJRBMLIREljBI_O29dxRXU1Hbn9Iqb6tWgc7dytdWTOO_7l1nMNR-dZ4OmVzGnu28DA8MAgKCrCDB6RAvS0mc0mBan3LWJptkpaZKVfnndYh4SixYNoM/7ImANmQFG2yCtdIUjgnfPhPlEy9jRjxr/7)

Your participation will help us understand and address many Americans' concerns about CRT's influence on our society.

This survey will only take just a few minutes.

But in those few minutes, you'll help us gather important insights to defend America's founding principles of liberty...

...and ensure a bright future for our children and grandchildren.

**You can share your thoughts on CRT in the National Opinion Survey on Critical Race Theory Survey here:**

[**https://info.hillsdale.edu/crt-survey/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/zR7nW21W8Vju80adfXbw-Wsg976itO8cQLJvn9r4czeP746vkjade_HsjCAr5V16AJCpisJFH68m6vkp_KTGuiLra4ocZ3z4Y-CwJlZ4CFZ68ryKOsSZOtAYgr3OP-K8URlSI1XxxmmrnRdnDm5xLbp1ahxTg4qvSKcN8NEbN6MJ_aHo41leieuJqeaezCuJ955g2cnYSrEaffpUTmd4fB3ztPGITV0SW6qRTNLN-CvXiFt9UTMuOUVxP-QTxro3IAQlEaKq_inHnRH4h-uF63i_aJtW30q7t_1gu6RyVzpVhbeWfOJiAhV9SCInIrBlZuVK0H5tnHRSPZnwmpW7ZNZ1CBTqeFlj3N08kh4iFsFHihfprM-N5cH8lJHHVIMchg9eGz_qxEvI7YTnqLyStOYrJcGU2QEKmbtcpxISPF7Qvq0/jIGUA_-MeZ370ZGMC11VG3O6sf8uAn35/7)

Sharing your opinion is an important way you'll combat the spread of CRT in our schools and workplaces. Together, we can preserve the constitutional and free-enterprise principles that made our nation so great and so free.

Thanks in advance! I look forward to seeing your response.

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
Institutional Advancement
Hillsdale College

name: Shontel Brown
subject: Working people can’t afford Trump’s tariffs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518306/538602488/1806897946?refcode=EM_F_250409tariffs_N_SB_90DO_5_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYWE5NDcyYy05MjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u2OyF8vYWFXRyQfdjwg9--9qLk04fdW47X9aYR0rglk=) Peter,

With his tariffs, Trump isn’t just jeopardizing an otherwise healthy economy. He’s threatening to enact the largest middle-class tax increase in 50 years.

**Working people can’t afford Trump’s tariffs.**

We are continuing to get whiplash as Trump puts massive tariffs in place and then subsequently walks them back. This is no way to govern, and make no mistake: **his chaotic tariffs are going to have devastating impacts.**

**Let’s be clear:** As Trump continues to play games with our economy, the impact of these policies will be rising costs for our families and communities, making essential items even more expensive. This includes everything from cars and homes to groceries and beyond.

[**Donald Trump is being reckless with our economy, and the hardworking people of our nation will be the ones to pay the price. I am doing everything I can to fight back, but I cannot do it alone. clean_body: = Peter, With his tariffs, Trump isn’t just jeopardizing an otherwise healthy economy. He’s threatening to enact the largest middle-class tax increase in 50 years. Working people can’t afford Trump’s tariffs. We are continuing to get whiplash as Trump puts massive tariffs in place and then subsequently walks them back. This is no way to govern, and make no mistake: his chaotic tariffs are going to have devastating impacts. Let’s be clear: As Trump continues to play games with our economy, the impact of these policies will be rising costs for our families and communities, making essential items even more expensive. This includes everything from cars and homes to groceries and beyond. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Shontel Brown Shontel Brown is proud to be elected as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District. subject: Don’t mess with USPS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand with Sanchez
body:
The USPS belongs to the American people—not to Donald Trump.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518316/538602527/-107464461?refcode=BLU_EM_SAN_2025-04-09_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODMyZmE0Zi05MjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gnnFnqrbNxEK7oxID2EWY7Gy9JsGBWLESZ9kS7G4H24=)
---
| Peter,

Donald Trump is at it again. His latest scheme? A **hostile takeover** of the U.S. Postal Service (USPS)—one of our nation’s most trusted institutions. Trump and his hand-picked Commerce Secretary, Howard Lutnick, are floating a reckless plan to merge the USPS with the Commerce Department, stripping it of its independence and paving the way for privatization.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518317/538602528/1192887793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODMyZmE0Zi05MjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gnnFnqrbNxEK7oxID2EWY7Gy9JsGBWLESZ9kS7G4H24=&emci=6032fa4f-9215-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6832fa4f-9215-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6681226)
Trump’s push to use postal workers for the 2030 Census is just the tip of the iceberg. His real goal?

**📪 ****Weaken the USPS**
**🗳️ ****Undermine mail-in voting**
**🫰 ****Sell off our postal services to corporate interests**

This is a blatant attack on working families, rural communities, and the democratic process itself.

I’m fighting back. I proudly cosponsored H.Res.70, a bipartisan resolution making it clear: the USPS must remain independent and never be privatized.

The fight to protect the USPS is far from over. Trump and his allies are determined to push their radical agenda, and we need the resources to stand up to them. That’s why I’m asking for your help today.

[_**Can you show your support to help us stop Trump’s takeover of the USPS?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518318/538602529/1192887793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODMyZmE0Zi05MjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gnnFnqrbNxEK7oxID2EWY7Gy9JsGBWLESZ9kS7G4H24=&emci=6032fa4f-9215-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6832fa4f-9215-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6681226)
| [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518319/538602530/1192887793?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ODMyZmE0Zi05MjE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gnnFnqrbNxEK7oxID2EWY7Gy9JsGBWLESZ9kS7G4H24=&emci=6032fa4f-9215-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=6832fa4f-9215-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6681226)
---
The USPS belongs to the American people—not to Donald Trump. Let’s keep it that way.

In solidarity,
Linda

| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=22986%2E4449941%2EaNQkqq) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=22986%2E4449941%2EaNQkqq) Hey there,

We're currently working on updating our voter records after last November's presidential election and we have no idea if Democrats in your state voted!

[**_So, we need you to confirm your voter status before 11:59 PM: _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60513?t=3&akid=22986%2E4449941%2EaNQkqq) | [**Did you vote in the November Elections? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60513?t=4&akid=22986%2E4449941%2EaNQkqq) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60513?t=5&akid=22986%2E4449941%2EaNQkqq) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60513?t=6&akid=22986%2E4449941%2EaNQkqq)

name: DNC HQ
subject: What’s happening in North Carolina:
body:
Republicans are attempting to overthrow an election decided by voters in November.
---
Derek, We know there’s a lot going on, but we wanted to make sure you saw what’s happening in North Carolina right now: **North Carolina Republicans are attempting to overthrow an election decided by voters last November.** Despite multiple recounts confirming that Justice Allison Riggs won her November election to the North Carolina Supreme Court, her Republican opponent and state and national Republicans have spent the last few months filing repeated, baseless legal actions in an attempt to overthrow the results. Then, last week, the state’s Court of Appeals ruled that _more than 65,000 eligible voters_ who cast ballots in North Carolina’s Supreme Court race last year face their ballots being thrown out, and lawful voters have 15 days to “prove” their eligibility. **North Carolinians’ voting rights are under attack, and Democrats are fighting back. The DNC is ready to help mobilize thousands of voter protection volunteers based in North Carolina, so that an army of volunteers is ready to deploy to ensure no voter’s voice is silenced.** [**Ensuring all voices are heard and taking on the Republicans in court will be a costly process. It’s more important than ever that North Carolina Democrats have the resources they need to scale up their on-the-ground work and defend our democracy. You can use this link to support them by splitting a contribution between the North Carolina Democratic Party and the DNC:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-nc-split-april-2025?amount=10&refcode=em_20250409_3167_fr&refcode2=3167_22930333_BYjVqx&akid=3167%2E22930333%2EBYjVqx) _If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your split contribution between the North Carolina Democratic Party and the Democratic National Committee instantly:_ | | | **[Donate $10](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-nc-split-april-2025?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em_20250409_3167_fr&refcode2=3167_22930333_BYjVqx&akid=3167%2E22930333%2EBYjVqx)**

clean_body: Colin Allred has what we don’t – the Hollywood elite lining his pockets. We need to start building our war chest NOW if we have any shot at keeping this Senate seat. | Fellow Patriot, let's talk about Colin Allred. He is “seriously considering” throwing his hat in the ring for ANOTHER senate run in 2026 - this time waging competition against Texas Senator John Cornyn. In his 2024 run against Senator Ted Cruz, Allred raised over $93 million. He kept Democrat billionaires like George Soros in his back pocket - continuously outpacing and outraising Ted Cruz. We can't let him have another close call. Why? Because Colin Allred is dangerous. In Congress, he repeatedly voted AGAINST the interests of Texas, aligning with radical Democrats who favor open border policies. He voted AGAINST the POLICE Act, which proves he does not care about those who lay their lives on the line on a daily basis for the safety of American citizens - but rather illegal immigrants carelessly committing murder. Allred was also IN FAVOR of ALLOWING illegal aliens to vote in U.S. elections. If his past actions prove anything, it is this - Colin Allred DOES NOT CARE about Americans like you, fellow Patriot. We MUST ensure our war chest is filled and READY for when he formally announces his intent to run. There's no way that Senate Republicans will stand a chance against his fundraising again - with billionaires like Soros in his corner. Senate Republicans desperately need patriots like YOU to step up NOW. We cannot allow another close call like the one we saw in 2024. Senate Republicans need these seats to continue pushing the MAGA agenda - not Leftist ideologies that Colin Allred would attempt to pass. Thank you, Senate GOP If you want to help Republicans KEEP THE SENATE MAJORITY, text WIN to 55404 to receive mobile alerts! Message and data rates may apply. name: Team Fetterman
subject: John will ALWAYS stand up for the Union Way of Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50678?t=1&akid=10029%2E434096%2Ei7qA_H)
| | |
---
Hi Derek, Team Fetterman here with a heads up: The Union Way of Life is sacred. And the Trump administration is trying to kill it.
Trump is trying to take union rights away from a million federal workers, so John is standing with labor unions as they fight Trump in court. **[Will you join John and other senators now by co-signing their letter calling out Trump's anti-American attack on unions?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50986?code=jtk38-su-fl-v2&email=&zip=&t=8&akid=10029%2E434096%2Ei7qA_H)**
| | [Add Your Name:
I Support Unions for Federal Workers >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50986?code=jtk38-su-fl-v2&email=&zip=&t=9&akid=10029%2E434096%2Ei7qA_H)
---
John has always been 💯 pro-union for folks in PA + across the country – and he won't _ever_ back down if anyone tries to destroy the Union Way of Life. Even if that person is the President of the United States.
That's why John added his name to the letter supporting federal workers as they fight for their collective bargaining rights against the Trump administration.
But we need grassroots support to show our pro-union movement has real momentum. **[That's why we're asking: Will you stand with John and add your name to the letter now? We have a goal to get 55 responses from 18326 by midnight tonight, so please, sign now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50986?code=jtk38-su-fl-v2&email=&zip=&t=10&akid=10029%2E434096%2Ei7qA_H)**
Thanks,
Team Fetterman 💛
| |

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=jtk38-su-fl-v2-footer&t=11&refcode2=10029_434096_i7qA_H&akid=10029%2E434096%2Ei7qA_H)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=12&akid=10029%2E434096%2Ei7qA_H)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=10029%2E434096%2Ei7qA_H)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

name: Gabe Vasquez
subject: Stand with Sen. Booker and me →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress
body:
I’m a proud fighter for our NM-02’s farmers and ranchers.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/lNYIdkhPikOBrh6RGc-KWg2?unsubscribedata=YsJsFxMGbjulfLonmEaoBz1JjRhZVtY5oeAtj4jDc1g%2F0tKJYRqG15NcZ7R3V4v9ti17HajZgA1AfKCoKUGCPQqn4WlgGwwqFsRSnDQ3p0Nh1j4VlNw%2FXbgG88J%2FWfzHJAUPEl5FuGeTSMVMWBTyl4dkrNvVPcC%2Frj3EaxnNqRYFkhTKHisoQgkbY2dRwyb0Vnz1DiLjb8yPP8KbHOyMt22sxWW6yIvUpZbxmkHJGsLOE%2FBM4VAGKV7pT885QfveSaOPIpDFjtCRNtvUBtVSdMyYWPih6nq9BS129kJwyJQXD0zBNTse0NuAK3kgm2JoJVltoilA0D2rNUtHH3qioEFHkGMLqQQwOnMVV6XOaS174%2BGg3Ax78tAPiOak7F%2FLQQ%2B3YArA1bY1yBUaRfbs4qFyi79i36xS4pjJjtXF55I%3D)
---
| |
---
Gabe Vasquez here. I’m a proud fighter for our community’s farmers and ranchers. They work hard every day to provide for the people of NM-02, and they deserve to be treated with fairness and respect. **But Elon Musk doesn’t agree.** Because of the cuts he’s made through DOGE, the U.S. Department of Agriculture has failed to honor its agreements with our farmers, leaving countless hardworking New Mexicans in financial limbo. That’s why I partnered with Sen. Cory Booker to introduce legislation to hold Elon Musk and DOGE accountable for the damage being done to our farmers and their livelihoods. [Cory Booker and I need you standing with us and the hardworking farmers of NM-02. Will you add your name to my petition to stand with New Mexico’s farmers against Elon Musk?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518701/538603811/575791354?source=SBD_GV_EN_040925_DOGE-Farmers_60DO60DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTVjNmY2OC05NDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRvG5yWc-PPkhdmul2cckAbTd5wtQXKM_MexmHq9qH4=&emci=b75c6f68-9415-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c55c6f68-9415-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4482565) | | [STAND WITH OUR FARMERS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518702/538603812/575791354?source=SBD_GV_EN_040925_DOGE-Farmers_60DO60DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTVjNmY2OC05NDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRvG5yWc-PPkhdmul2cckAbTd5wtQXKM_MexmHq9qH4=&emci=b75c6f68-9415-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c55c6f68-9415-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4482565)
---
Elon Musk is leaving Americans out to dry — but believe me when I say that I’m going to fight like hell to ensure New Mexicans aren’t left behind by DOGE cuts.
I’m counting on all of you to help me send a clear message to Elon Musk: **Stop playing politics with farmers’ livelihoods.**
[Please sign my petition now to stand with me, Sen. Booker and our hardworking farmers and ranchers against Elon Musk and DOGE:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105518703/538603813/575791354?source=SBD_GV_EN_040925_DOGE-Farmers_60DO60DNTL_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzAxMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTVjNmY2OC05NDE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mRvG5yWc-PPkhdmul2cckAbTd5wtQXKM_MexmHq9qH4=&emci=b75c6f68-9415-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=c55c6f68-9415-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4482565)

clean_body: I’m a proud fighter for our NM-02’s farmers and ranchers. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Gabe Vasquez here. I’m a proud fighter for our community’s farmers and ranchers. They work hard every day to provide for the people of NM-02, and they deserve to be treated with fairness and respect. But Elon Musk doesn’t agree. Because of the cuts he’s made through DOGE, the U.S. Department of Agriculture has failed to honor its agreements with our farmers, leaving countless hardworking New Mexicans in financial limbo. That’s why I partnered with Sen. Cory Booker to introduce legislation to hold Elon Musk and DOGE accountable for the damage being done to our farmers and their livelihoods. | | Elon Musk is leaving Americans out to dry — but believe me when I say that I’m going to fight like hell to ensure New Mexicans aren’t left behind by DOGE cuts. I’m counting on all of you to help me send a clear message to Elon Musk: Stop playing politics with farmers’ livelihoods. | Gracias, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . body:
This is a longer email, but I'd appreciate it if you took two minutes to read it
| [ ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07JRTJrHpNTZPhj0YxhGePE4zv6ujrCWAm8z0VlKSP0F6D_XGmi6MVi6nOPa94krJJBsVLfalZQfZ_5UH-VELmo8v9PqTtMh6WbnNDbIA4XiFW5Q_S0iAQrM3j7TdnhnIxLCi-YEIPCj2PspRlTJ3NZRcqc_tMFs4M4pD1COKk-S19n-EaGSjlHzuJXGoMDuZHPK4HSOWD4X-zmEcWJNCWhQ%3D%3D)

Peter,

**My name is Joe Males, and I 'm running for United States Congress in California's 25th district.** [**This is a longer email, but I humbly ask you to read it and consider donating to my campaign at the end.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07JRTJrHpNTZPhj0YxhGePE4zv6ujrCWAm8z0VlKSP0F6D_XGmi6MVi6nOPa94krJJbVctwP1oPb-mJtjKdL5h_VH7ZsTI6ZsEuV0Ok6tY-Js62wWtx5sZ2aRSDxa9swnInUMSpjglwe_Ex2IYAL7YRWWoAHnniqVMKZ4aeFJc5rtVY2yghCvOUaXVDVjJT0z02xiO2yCm0oTB1poHBiE8eA%3D%3D)

**WHO AM I?** [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07u5-0rXUrcYTT17wTz6Ea1Qzs9gEgEwt1-ZmD4zlfl69nf7ft1H4HcytKtHUn256KhTSW7U6RUAMGTw47bE3g467RXzc4T_n7ljOrQZ6ga3TX1tHUS80ztZrgpKlkDOCgPNvwwHcTMaWn-8JdrnEczDwO0geWj0W2W0clIHxSqz66lgu0bY9ufsdy6HRs4UVGahJWu-KIVVYetkK_YUyw9Q%3D%3D)

_Like I said, I 'm Joe Males. I'm a Mexican-American who was adopted by two wonderful parents when I was four years old. _

**At a young age, I joined the United States Marine Corps to defend our country and ultimately earned the rank of Sergeant before my discharge.** Once I entered civilian life, I started my entrepreneurial career owning a successful small computer business until my son took over the family business.

**Since the Democrats will want to use this to attack me, I will tell you: I was a former Democrat.** I switched over to the Republican Party during the Reagan era once I saw what the Democrats truly stood for. I've seen firsthand how today's Democratic Party has abandoned working families. Every single day, I hear from constituents who are struggling with everyday challenges. I hear them, and I fully agree with them. It's time for change in California.

**WHY DID I ENTER POLITICS?** [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07u5-0rXUrcYTT17wTz6Ea1Qzs9gEgEwt1-ZmD4zlfl6__o7Byt23ND7xHlVIvYQSkLSZCDfe7r5w0nCoGc_68ZqRApmQBELVAU6HOcL3KeYx8fGp9jmDqRZkPfJjnGP5m1NEDzpRMxyoQivTM_wzClOSlfvSE94U73qqhtRY31F5_jWQ7VinzHfWgc0NucG_yDNigppYkIjVh90pgCuuGYA%3D%3D)

**In short, my son, Nicholas, was tragically stabbed to death and murdered in 2016.**

If you're a parent, I'm sure you could imagine how devastating this was for me. Nicholas was only 28 at the time and did not deserve what happened.

He had followed in my footsteps and joined the Marine Corps. He was a father to two children - my grandchildren. When it happened, no one came forward with any information, and the case to find the killer went cold.

**I decided to take a stand, to fight for the rule of law and public safety so that no other family has to experience the same tragedy.** Five years later, I ran for City Council in Hemet. I won, and just a few months later, our amazing law enforcement found the killer and arrested him.

**WHAT ARE MY PRIORITIES AS YOUR NEXT CONGRESSMAN?** [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07u5-0rXUrcYTT17wTz6Ea1Qzs9gEgEwt1-ZmD4zlfl69BaeJTAH3iq9gIETrk4T0KGi8Xcn0X1jK3KqgclYsVvKLkhXO0xTt12XyGfSRhj5YFCBWeWJSJFsYZkdsaMXIrL1AOBjTLALaV_d4tYv8MzqvC5koCSCraMAH54SfIckfaDPQTYjb5K31sfs2VRJr6X7dL04maDskBkg56g47qlA%3D%3D)

_**As a former Democrat turned Republican, I know what the Democrat Party is supposed to represent. But ever since the Reagan era, they 've continued to move farther and farther to the extreme left. Now, they stand for DEI, wokeness, putting Americans last, and doing everything they can to fight against President Trump.**_

**As a Hispanic American who lives in a border district and who was adopted by American parents, I fully believe in LEGAL immigration.** America is THE BEST COUNTRY IN THE WORLD! Millions of people around the world want to move here for the American Dream, for the opportunity of a better life, but they must do it THE RIGHT WAY.

**Our Southern Border has been porous under Joe Biden 's Administration. **Living in a border district, I've seen firsthand millions of illegal immigrants entering the country with the help of the dangerous Mexican Cartel, many through my hometown, bringing dangerous drugs like fentanyl, trafficking women and children, and committing heinous crimes on our side of the border. This needs to END, and I'm grateful for President Trump's leadership on this. In Congress, I'll always defend strong border security.

**On top of that, I am a firm believer in the America-First Movement.** After four years under Joe Biden's leadership, America has become weak in every aspect. I already mentioned our border security, but our military, social life, and economy have all become weakened under the rule of DEI and wokeness.

**As a military veteran, it pained me to see the way Joe Biden withdrew from Afghanistan, giving the Taliban millions of dollars worth of high-level American military equipment, which they parade around.** Our weakened military presence allowed Russia to invade Ukraine and Hamas to launch terrorist attacks on Israel. I'll do everything in my power as a Congressman to support our military so we prioritize READINESS over WOKENESS.

**Finally, we must dismantle DEI in every corner of the government.** DOGE's work to cut wasteful spending has been a great start, but we must continue to fight to lower the cost of living, defend free speech, and usher in the Golden Age of America.

**WHY DO I NEED YOUR HELP?** [](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07u5-0rXUrcYTT17wTz6Ea1Qzs9gEgEwt1-ZmD4zlfl6_qzSvwQC4Hz3VS33ouy1N_OnlOGO7cBT0uUGtBgb12KbbFezjHDb4RU6-0bkHlqO-pok4_f7VPOFABqvSHkfAALxMKJRTEjDT9AAQ-9eK-EwnryD286vjv3OGNAnzZocEtjTKV2XoaRVj9uwNkVsnjbQXNY9PTQy9xeDi9g1resA%3D%3D)

**Simply put - the Radical Left has a stranglehold on California.** Just like they're trying to flip Texas Blue, I'm trying to flip California Red. It may seem impossible, but so many Californians are sick and tired of suffering under Gavin Newsom, Nancy Pelosi, and Adam Schiff's leadership here. I know many people who have left California just because of the politicians who want to turn our beautiful state into a Communist Utopia.

**But Newsom, Pelosi, and Schiff have MILLIONS of dollars in reserve, ready to spend against my campaign to prevent common sense leadership.** They only care about lining their own pockets, even if their constituents suffer. _It 's going to be an uphill battle, but if there's one thing I learned as a Marine, it's that the only way to create a better tomorrow is through dedicated hard work and grit. Together, we can fight and WIN._

| [ **FLIP CALIFORNIA RED** ](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07JRTJrHpNTZPhj0YxhGePE570QG_AYxO_sGpWGs-NOA94UdJlTtAwn7ZqKmI5tDzIF3Ljac7tJEJaGHRDoCAHbRJ_EToFSZypkdY9SAkjETUqb3youf6EvIaVXg51UnaQRQMrrxBmbnEHgH8NcHs_WKFPOblliqN5cWlFyNVESBp6rguieUyDWNzu-vjp14Jhro60Aq831fhnpNdxu0aRmg%3D%3D)
---

Thank you for taking the time to read all of this. I truly appreciate it.

[**Now, I 'm humbly asking you to send my campaign a donation before midnight. Something as small as $1, $10, or $25 will help more than you might think.**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07JRTJrHpNTZPhj0YxhGePE4zv6ujrCWAm8z0VlKSP0F6D_XGmi6MVi6nOPa94krJJgvR440s0iLIaHHrsc6ISjsHbm3glyUhg1pC4iCE-hXy5YRYCScV-Jeb2WuEVg89S_0irJ3zacJ0F6m26xuxaZVUiNfZJ5A5jXvjiLfavd2mWcdGZKNDPVdGe4p2SOBg901YwvCBxHhVThS2A1ELoLg%3D%3D)

Semper Fidelis,
Joe Males

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07JRTJrHpNTZPhj0YxhGePE4zv6ujrCWAm8z0VlKSP0F6D_XGmi6MVi6nOPa94krJJX2yw204VeKm1OE32WoG0s975Zk4d4Dcc-BGC2gLNtXqoPtP7ykm1IOTMEp7oJR0n3eoCkQ90ydxGGOzwO_3PNLAjrBEH8OOOCR7tjVh5XgWzEmyqnEK7hAYpY3S3B-7Kzqri6amdu0NFTp1qDpl26Q%3D%3D)

Meet Joe Males:

**Joe Males is a Marine Veteran, small business-owner, city council member, and most importantly, a father. Throughout his life, he has put service to his community at the forefront of his life 's mission.

Shortly after turning 18, Joe enlisted in the Marine Corps. He attended boot camp in Camp Pendleton and later served overseas in the Philippines and Guam. After being discharged as a Sergeant, Joe remained committed to supporting his fellow veterans. He took on leadership roles in his local Elks Lodge and American Legion post, working to ensure veterans in the community had the resources and support they deserved.

Following his time in the Marine Corps, Joe carried his strong work ethic and discipline into the field of computer networking services. He started in an entry-level position, worked his way through multiple leadership roles, and in 1996, he built his own business from the ground up. Joe knows firsthand the hard work and sacrifice of this journey, and he's determined to make it easier for hardworking Americans to do the same.

Joe's entry into politics was deeply personal. After his son, a Marine who followed in his footsteps, was tragically murdered back home, Joe vowed that no parent should have to endure such a loss. Determined to take a stand for public safety and the rule of law, he ran for Hemet City Council to help ensure no other family would experience the same tragedy.

During his tenure on the City Council, Joe has led numerous initiatives to improve infrastructure, drive business growth, and keep neighborhoods safe and clean. He takes pride in his ability to collaborate with fellow council members and get results, even when facing different perspectives. Joe is committed to bringing this same results-driven approach to Washington D.C., to ensure the voices of the American people are heard and their needs are met.

** [**HELP JOE MALES!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=1cf7aacf6e2b45b4bfbb6ba4c99c5756&_e=0q68Urr9inhb3mIriIuaOVv1VgWZngMRNK6u9msrNpuYiB1YN0xoo27hAKJi-kkPQUgMdxXC_0J2R2lgYKLdQw0ixO5IjYryFv-9Bbgjp0puRa2A37ol86Zq52AaZD07JRTJrHpNTZPhj0YxhGePE4zv6ujrCWAm8z0VlKSP0F6D_XGmi6MVi6nOPa94krJJZxeB-2p-4_P97Tc6GF43ivG-n_t0f793qqnDPE67iw546SinHbr9cGLJvrpZMqLUhReO295p6Q1CiuTiauWTZKvib3vX7rivypWJnRopI6Qtja1TDRO-JnXtF4dc6J50qbIy26i9D5Djp0zWM440Zg%3D%3D)

clean_body: This is a longer email, but I'd appreciate it if you took two minutes to read it | Peter, My name is Joe Males, and I 'm running for United States Congress in California's 25th district. WHO AM I? Like I said, I 'm Joe Males. I'm a Mexican-American who was adopted by two wonderful parents when I was four years old. At a young age, I joined the United States Marine Corps to defend our country and ultimately earned the rank of Sergeant before my discharge. Once I entered civilian life, I started my entrepreneurial career owning a successful small computer business until my son took over the family business. Since the Democrats will want to use this to attack me, I will tell you: I was a former Democrat. I switched over to the Republican Party during the Reagan era once I saw what the Democrats truly stood for. I've seen firsthand how today's Democratic Party has abandoned working families. Every single day, I hear from constituents who are struggling with everyday challenges. I hear them, and I fully agree with them. It's time for change in California. WHY DID I ENTER POLITICS? In short, my son, Nicholas, was tragically stabbed to death and murdered in 2016. If you're a parent, I'm sure you could imagine how devastating this was for me. Nicholas was only 28 at the time and did not deserve what happened. He had followed in my footsteps and joined the Marine Corps. He was a father to two children - my grandchildren. When it happened, no one came forward with any information, and the case to find the killer went cold. I decided to take a stand, to fight for the rule of law and public safety so that no other family has to experience the same tragedy. Five years later, I ran for City Council in Hemet. I won, and just a few months later, our amazing law enforcement found the killer and arrested him. WHAT ARE MY PRIORITIES AS YOUR NEXT CONGRESSMAN? As a former Democrat turned Republican, I know what the Democrat Party is supposed to represent. But ever since the Reagan era, they 've continued to move farther and farther to the extreme left. Now, they stand for DEI, wokeness, putting Americans last, and doing everything they can to fight against President Trump. As a Hispanic American who lives in a border district and who was adopted by American parents, I fully believe in LEGAL immigration. America is THE BEST COUNTRY IN THE WORLD! Millions of people around the world want to move here for the American Dream, for the opportunity of a better life, but they must do it THE RIGHT WAY. Our Southern Border has been porous under Joe Biden 's Administration. Living in a border district, I've seen firsthand millions of illegal immigrants entering the country with the help of the dangerous Mexican Cartel, many through my hometown, bringing dangerous drugs like fentanyl, trafficking women and children, and committing heinous crimes on our side of the border. This needs to END, and I'm grateful for President Trump's leadership on this. In Congress, I'll always defend strong border security. On top of that, I am a firm believer in the America-First Movement. After four years under Joe Biden's leadership, America has become weak in every aspect. I already mentioned our border security, but our military, social life, and economy have all become weakened under the rule of DEI and wokeness. As a military veteran, it pained me to see the way Joe Biden withdrew from Afghanistan, giving the Taliban millions of dollars worth of high-level American military equipment, which they parade around. Our weakened military presence allowed Russia to invade Ukraine and Hamas to launch terrorist attacks on Israel. I'll do everything in my power as a Congressman to support our military so we prioritize READINESS over WOKENESS. Finally, we must dismantle DEI in every corner of the government. DOGE's work to cut wasteful spending has been a great start, but we must continue to fight to lower the cost of living, defend free speech, and usher in the Golden Age of America. WHY DO I NEED YOUR HELP? Simply put - the Radical Left has a stranglehold on California. Just like they're trying to flip Texas Blue, I'm trying to flip California Red. It may seem impossible, but so many Californians are sick and tired of suffering under Gavin Newsom, Nancy Pelosi, and Adam Schiff's leadership here. I know many people who have left California just because of the politicians who want to turn our beautiful state into a Communist Utopia. But Newsom, Pelosi, and Schiff have MILLIONS of dollars in reserve, ready to spend against my campaign to prevent common sense leadership. They only care about lining their own pockets, even if their constituents suffer. It 's going to be an uphill battle, but if there's one thing I learned as a Marine, it's that the only way to create a better tomorrow is through dedicated hard work and grit. Together, we can fight and WIN. | Thank you for taking the time to read all of this. I truly appreciate it. Semper Fidelis, Joe Males Meet Joe Males: Joe Males is a Marine Veteran, small business-owner, city council member, and most importantly, a father. Throughout his life, he has put service to his community at the forefront of his life 's mission. Shortly after turning 18, Joe enlisted in the Marine Corps. He attended boot camp in Camp Pendleton and later served overseas in the Philippines and Guam. After being discharged as a Sergeant, Joe remained committed to supporting his fellow veterans. He took on leadership roles in his local Elks Lodge and American Legion post, working to ensure veterans in the community had the resources and support they deserved. Following his time in the Marine Corps, Joe carried his strong work ethic and discipline into the field of computer networking services. He started in an entry-level position, worked his way through multiple leadership roles, and in 1996, he built his own business from the ground up. Joe knows firsthand the hard work and sacrifice of this journey, and he's determined to make it easier for hardworking Americans to do the same. Joe's entry into politics was deeply personal. After his son, a Marine who followed in his footsteps, was tragically murdered back home, Joe vowed that no parent should have to endure such a loss. Determined to take a stand for public safety and the rule of law, he ran for Hemet City Council to help ensure no other family would experience the same tragedy. During his tenure on the City Council, Joe has led numerous initiatives to improve infrastructure, drive business growth, and keep neighborhoods safe and clean. He takes pride in his ability to collaborate with fellow council members and get results, even when facing different perspectives. Joe is committed to bringing this same results-driven approach to Washington D.C., to ensure the voices of the American people are heard and their needs are met. name: Grassroots Army
subject: Happy Anniversary Grassroots Army
body:
[ View in browser](https://9l762.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/mr/sh/1t6AVsd2XFnIGF8hGVU0EPuu2QkNev/7dkYjeK2OTSw)

**HAPPY ANNIVERSARY GRASSROOTS ARMY!**
--------------------------------------

Five years ago today, I made a choice: kneel to tyranny or stand for freedom. I stood.

400,000 patriots stood with me. Big Tech tried to erase us. They failed.

>From the ashes, The Grassroots Army was born.

For five years, we’ve fought in the trenches, battered but unbroken, for our families, our faith, and our freedom.

The fight for America is far from over and neither are we.

**CLICK THE IMAGE TO WATCH OUR VIDEO**

**It’s time to take back what they stole. Hold the line. Take ground.**
-----------------------------------------------------------------------
They tried to silence us. They tried to destroy Trump. They tried to crush the American spirit. They failed. Trump is back.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Patriots are rising. The swamp is being exposed. Now is NOT the time for doubt.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

It’s time to take back what they stole. Hold the line. Take ground. The best is yet to come.
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**WATCH THIS INSPIRING VIDEO! CLICK THE IMAGE**

Let your voices be heard. Take this poll on who you are looking for as our next U.S. Senator.
=============================================================================================

CLICK THE IMAGE TO TAKE THE POLL!
=================================

Governor Whitmer stripped us of our constitutional freedoms, sacred values, and citizens’ rights. She locked down our businesses. She shut down our churches. She robbed our kids of their education. She destroyed lives and livelihoods — all while not following her own orders. Rules for thee, not for me.
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Governor Gretchen Whitmer failed Michigan. She failed you. On April 9, 2020, when others stayed silent, I stood up — and 400,000 fearless patriots stood with me. Big Tech tried to erase us. The media tried to silence us. The elites tried to shame us. But we refused to back down.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We became the Grassroots Army. We fight. We build. We win. We stand for faith, freedom, family, and common sense. We will never forget what they did. We will never let it happen again.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

This movement isn’t just surviving — it’s growing. This movement isn’t just pushing back — it’s taking back Michigan, one community at a time. We’re just getting started. Stay engaged. Stay activated. Stay in the fight. Because when We the People stand together, we win.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Click our Nanny Governor below to see the video we released to celebrate our 5 year anniversary.

**Join the Movement — Wear the Mission**
----------------------------------------

This isn’t just merchandise. It’s a badge of honor. Every shirt, every sweatshirt, every piece represents the heart and soul of our grassroots army — the doers, the fighters, the believers who refuse to back down.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

When you wear it, you’re standing tall with countless others who are working every single day to take back our communities, restore common sense, and protect the values that made this country great. You’re showing the world that we are the force for change.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Every purchase directly supports the movement — fueling rallies, empowering volunteers, and pushing the mission forward.
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

We are deeply grateful for every one of you who stands with us. This is more than support. This is family. This is America rising again — and it’s only just getting started.
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Click the image below to Gear Up and Stand Proudly. **
========================================================

**Let’s win this together.**
============================

**GJS Investments LLC**

8357 Barony Pt, 49071, Mattawan

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

You've received this email because you've subscribed to our newsletter.

[Unsubscribe](https://9l762.r.ah.d.sendibm5.com/mk/un/sh/1t6AVsdYhqSR1mLJmycafKClcNaT5x/qSihsSrps5_f)

If they succeed, it opens the door for future candidates to challenge election results they simply don’t like. We can’t let that happen. **The DASS Legal Fund is fighting tooth and nail to protect every vote and stop outrageous attempts like this to undermine democracy. Peter, Donald Trump recently issued an unlawful executive order that attacks our democracy -- trying to use power he _does not have_ to limit our freedom to vote. This comes on the heels of Congressional Republicans pushing forward with the SAVE Act -- a misleadingly named bill that could prevent millions of Americans from casting their ballots. **These are just the latest moves out of the MAGA Republican playbook to dismantle our democracy and silence the will of the people.** **Here at the NDRC, we 're fighting for a democracy where everyone can make their voice heard -- with fair maps and fair elections -- and we need you with us.** [**Rush a $30 donation now to help defeat these kinds of anti-democratic attacks and end gerrymandering.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/105520685/538610935/1925646595?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_SaveActTrumpEO_email_20250409-NDRC-Tier1-SaveActTrumpEO_75&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250409-NDRC-Tier1-SaveActTrumpEO_75&utm_campaign=SaveActTrumpEO&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY2NmRkNzM1LTljMTUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=aaPm-lMSXp3zG1WCoQe1GpKzd3V-aOb_BPf0rVgKbDM=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

The SAVE Act is one of the most significant threats to voting rights we've seen in decades -- and Trump mirrored some of its worst provisions in his executive order.
Under the SAVE Act, every voter would need to show documents like a passport or birth certificate whenever they register to vote or update their voter information.
In effect, that would make it impossible to register to vote online or through the mail.
And millions of Americans couldn't easily provide the required forms of identification. This would **threaten to disproportionately disenfranchise service members, rural Americans, tribal citizens, survivors of natural disasters, working-class voters, and tens of millions of married women who have changed their names.**
Even when Republicans had the chance to address these harms while reviewing the bill in committee, they chose to bury their heads in the sand and ignore the clear potential dangers.
**MAGA Republicans have shown their true voter-suppressing colors. Now, we must do everything we can to stop their anti-democracy agenda.**

name: Peters Post
subject: The latest updates

body:
# [#]This is an exclusive newsletter for Scott’s top supporters to stay up-to-date on the campaign and Scott’s work in Congress. If you want to keep Scott fighting for us in Congress, you can click here to donate! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sp-2504-fr?amount=15&refcode2=1d89fc31-9d15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7]
Peter,
2025 has gotten off to quite the start, to say the least. I’ve heard from so many constituents that they’re concerned about the direction in which our country is headed. While families are struggling to make ends meet, Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and GOP extremists are doing nothing but gutting our government and slashing essential services.
I want you to know that I am doing everything in my power as your Congressman to fight back.
Read the full update below for more details about our work so far this year, and make sure to follow the campaign on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/scottpeterssandiego] , X [https://twitter.com/ScottPetersSD] , and Instagram [https://www.instagram.com/scottpetersca50] to stay up-to-date.
I’m looking forward to what the rest of this year will bring. As always, I’m grateful to have your support.
– Scott
http://scottpeters.com [http://scottpeters.com]
Scott’s State of the Union Guest
At President Trump’s joint address to Congress, Scott brought as his guest Dr. Jim Brewer, a medical professor and chair of UCSD’s Department of Neurosciences, the top NIH-funded neuroscience department in the country. Because of Trump and the GOP’s proposed cuts to NIH funding, Dr. Brewer’s critical and life-saving research on Alzheimer’s disease is in jeopardy. Scott is fighting to protect the patients and innovation that will be harmed by such cuts.
★ ★ ★
Standing up for Transgender Servicemembers
In February, Trump issued an executive order banning transgender individuals from serving in the U.S. military. It hurts our military to turn away brave, qualified Americans who want to serve our country, solely based on their gender identity. That’s why Scott stood against this ban in 2017, and why he is fighting back again this time. Scott will always stand with the LGBTQ+ community and with our military.
★ ★ ★
Defending Democracy
While House Republicans are bowing to pressure and failing to stand up to the Trump Administration’s overreach and continued disregard for the separation of powers, Scott and his fellow Democrats are fighting back. They expect us to be complacent while an unelected billionaire slashes essential government services and GOP leadership Congress’s power to review Trump’s tariffs – but we won’t back down. Scott voted against their Trump-enabling budget, and he remains committed to working across the aisle when possible – without sacrificing our communities’ well-being.
http://scottpeters.com [http://scottpeters.com]
Continuing to address the Tijuana River Valley (TRV) Sewage Crisis
Scott has been working tirelessly to secure the funding needed to address the cross-border sewage crisis that has plagued our region for years. After working alongside the San Diego Congressional delegation to secure $650 million for the International Boundary and Water Commission (IBWC), which is enough to fully repair & expand the South Bay International Wastewater Treatment Plan (SBIWTP), Scott is still working to secure long-term solutions to protect our communities’ health. Last month, he introduced legislation that will allow the IBWC to access additional funding pathways, instead of relying solely on annual Congressional appropriations or emergency funding.
In March, Scott also joined with his California colleagues to invite EPA Administrator Lee Zeldin to visit the South Bay International Wastewater Treatment Plant (SBITWP) and see firsthand the ongoing environmental and public health harms on our communities.
★ ★ ★
http://scottpeters.com [http://scottpeters.com]
Hands Off Rally
On Saturday, Scott joined a local San Diego “Hands Off” protest – over 30,000 people attended! He’s taking a stand to defend our democracy and let Donald Trump know we won’t let his cruel, reckless agenda roll back the progress we’ve made on healthcare access, LGBTQ+ rights, climate action, opportunity for all, and much more. We can rest assured that Scott will continue using every tool available to him in Congress to push back on this Administration and protect San Diego.
# [#] ★ ★ ★
Fighting for Medicaid
Scott has been a longtime advocate for protecting Medicaid funding. One in five CA-50 residents relies on Medicaid for critical health services – but the GOP’s proposed $880 billion in cuts would rip away their and millions of other Americans’ health care coverage, and increase costs for tens of millions more. That’s why Scott is taking a stand. Last month, he joined the community at UC San Diego Health to talk about the impact of these cuts:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP39/1/88061/images/IMG_6356%20%281%29.jpg] ★ ★ ★
Democracy Summer Applications are Open
We’re excited to announce that Team Peters is a partner in the Democracy Summer program! This is an incredible opportunity for young people who are passionate about political leadership and protecting democracy. So if you’re ready to embark on a summer of political organizing and learning and to make new lifelong friends along the way, or know a student who would be a perfect fit, click here to apply by April 18th. [https://democracy-summer.breezy.hr/p/6d868a04eb45]
Keep up with the latest in California’s 50th by following Scott on social media:FOLLOW ON FACEBOOK » [https://www.facebook.com/scottpeterssandiego/]
FOLLOW ON X » [https://twitter.com/ScottPetersCA50]
FOLLOW ON INSTAGRAM » [https://www.instagram.com/scottpetersca50]
Thanks for being a part of our team.
– Team PetersDONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sp-2504-fr?amount=15&refcode2=1d89fc31-9d15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/petersfooter?refcode=em_footer&amount=10]
As a leader among Democrats in Congress, Scott Peters has one of the strongest track records of achieving progressive reforms and getting things done. He’s committed to protecting our environment, improving access to affordable healthcare, implementing compassionate immigration reforms and protecting reproductive freedom.Democrats in swing districts like Scott’s rely on grassroots supporters like you. Make a contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/petersfooter?refcode=em_footer&amount=10]
Unsubscribe. [https://go.scottpeters.com/p/jHaskSoF-Ei0b44Q3Qkc7Q2?unsubscribedata=7EGL1ZlPQUFt6aognDakGJcm0uT9kab2466s4cJm6tGSAhxnwp%2F2nqesEEJ4L04Pu%2FlfmU%2BknJBJG%2B2iFwel3i6MJ4tJEJOitIpllbmJSgqS9sB3bE7O2VFk8Hs5a8%2BNp7A8W5xPl8RsH%2FvIYYDoZ5PvKcd7%2B84Wg1sOUX5wpfJq%2B5D%2F10LU1ye3XID6AYdoDkZ4hti%2FKBaM5%2FkaPYA6T8zszlMJYqBKfuUqe4uehNTwVRh4i3%2FPISdsJGph%2FeFtSWcXjEg9R2Clykts9foIQW%2F3LDAa5KeFHKiCKG9sFxYN9EoHI%2Fy9KzGeBm7WPOrLkJcIkKw0vyZJGnf1zDZG68U4%2FcEpLNlcAxo31thIp1kczijL%2Blh0amU%2FpNhPvtKG%2BKZFHI4hWndHZfPOXL60DNGz25M3KQb33a7JKxiVJHw%3D]
https://www.facebook.com/scottpeterssandiego/ [https://www.facebook.com/scottpeterssandiego/] https://twitter.com/ScottPetersCA50 [https://twitter.com/ScottPetersCA50] https://www.instagram.com/scottpetersca50 [https://www.instagram.com/scottpetersca50]

Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress

Scott Peters for Congress
PO Box 22074
San Diego, CA 92192
United States

name: Ron Wyden
subject: A stunning rejection of Trump, Musk, and the GOP

body:
Special elections last week showed an undeniable trend.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/105520941/538611800/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZTJiNDcwYy05ZTE1LWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hqGknQ71lan9XOAEYvuCvmGW0j6pAGDbYgb588HrSgU=&emci=d1e7d0c6-9615-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=ae2b470c-9e15-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=9818364)
---

| | The tide is turning against Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the GOP agenda. Last Tuesday's election results removed _any_ doubt about that. Let's recap:
* **In Wisconsin:** Democratic-aligned candidate Susan Crawford won a State Supreme Court seat by a 10-point margin despite Musk spending _$26 million on behalf of her opponent._
* **In Florida's 1st Congressional District:** Republicans won a special election by _22 fewer points_ than Trump's 2024 margin.
* **In Florida's 6th Congressional District:** Republicans won a special election by _16 points fewer_ than Trump's 2024 margin.

Relentless involvement from Trump's biggest financial backer couldn't prevent a Democratic landslide in swing-state Wisconsin — if anything, it looks like voters turned out in droves to **send a message that they're fed up with Elon Musk's assault on our federal government and Americans' earned benefits.** And in the first federal elections since November, the GOP saw a **steep drop-off** from 2024 numbers in deep-red districts. It's no coincidence that this happened while Congressional Republicans are preparing a budget that slashes Medicaid, disrupts Social Security, and makes life markedly harder and more expensive for millions of Americans. **People are voicing their discontent.** And I'm proud to stand with you as we keep up the fight for a better future. We have a lot of work to do, but it's clear that momentum is on our side. I'm ready to move full-speed ahead, take on the GOP's agenda wherever I can, and help elect Democrats across the country in 2026 and beyond. [**If you're ready to join me in that fight, chip in $9 – or any amount – today! clean_body: Special elections last week showed an undeniable trend. | | | | The tide is turning against Donald Trump, Elon Musk, and the GOP agenda. Last Tuesday's election results removed any doubt about that. Let's recap: In Wisconsin: Democratic-aligned candidate Susan Crawford won a State Supreme Court seat by a 10-point margin despite Musk spending $26 million on behalf of her opponent. In Florida's 1st Congressional District: Republicans won a special election by 22 fewer points than Trump's 2024 margin. In Florida's 6th Congressional District: Republicans won a special election by 16 points fewer than Trump's 2024 margin. Relentless involvement from Trump's biggest financial backer couldn't prevent a Democratic landslide in swing-state Wisconsin — if anything, it looks like voters turned out in droves to send a message that they're fed up with Elon Musk's assault on our federal government and Americans' earned benefits. And in the first federal elections since November, the GOP saw a steep drop-off from 2024 numbers in deep-red districts. It's no coincidence that this happened while Congressional Republicans are preparing a budget that slashes Medicaid, disrupts Social Security, and makes life markedly harder and more expensive for millions of Americans. People are voicing their discontent. And I'm proud to stand with you as we keep up the fight for a better future. We have a lot of work to do, but it's clear that momentum is on our side. I'm ready to move full-speed ahead, take on the GOP's agenda wherever I can, and help elect Democrats across the country in 2026 and beyond. = = Onward, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by ** Wyden for Senate P.O. Box 3498 Portland, OR 97208 United States Email is an important way for Ron Wyden to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Team Schiff
subject: Add your name in support of Adam’s first bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=8463%2E5257348%2EyeA333 ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Hey Derek — Did
you see Adam’s exciting news yesterday?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250409-firewall-act.D_lLkn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=8463%2E5257348%2EyeA333 ]NBC News: A proposed tax credit could help homeowners hit by
climate-fueled natural disasters 'I wanted to introduce a bill as my first
bill that deals with the tragic fires in Southern California, which are an
order of magnitude unlike anything we've seen in terms of fire-related
catastrophes,' Schiff told NBC News. Schiff said the bill is also one
possible solution to the country's growing insurance crisis, as insurance
providers back out of certain markets or refuse to write new policies in
hurricane-prone states like Florida or states at high risk of wildfires
like California.

In case you missed it, Adam introduced his first bill in the U.S. Senate!

The FIREWALL Act is a bipartisan bill that will protect Californians’
homes from natural disasters by providing tax credits for upgrades to make
houses more resilient.

By getting ahead of natural disasters, we can save taxpayer dollars AND
prevent the devastation that so often comes along with wildfires, floods,
and other natural disasters.

Adam is delivering for Californians, just as he promised to do on the
campaign trail. And he’s willing to work with anyone to get things done.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250409-firewall-act.D_lLkn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=8463%2E5257348%2EyeA333 ]Will you show your support for Adam’s first bill by adding your name to
our petition today? We’re urging the Senate to take up the FIREWALL Act.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1023?c0=engagement-20250409-firewall-act.D_lLkn&refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=8463%2E5257348%2EyeA333 ]SHOW YOUR SUPPORT

Thank you for supporting and uplifting Adam’s work to make a difference
for California communities.

— Team Schiff

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5243?refcode=AU_ABS_EG_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250409_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=1007&akid=8463%2E5257348%2EyeA333 ]DONATE

135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
